Main left section: Large full-body illustration of {argument name="character name" default="PPT Weapon Specialist"}, a slender young anime woman with very long flowing white/silver hair, pale skin, one visible orange cybernetic visor/monocle over the eye, and a calm serious expression. She wears a layered white futuristic coat/cape, technical straps, small orange PowerPoint-like “P” markings, white shoes with orange details, and light mechanical accessories. She holds an oversized transparent white-and-gray sci-fi railgun shaped like a presentation slide deck, with orange UI panels, small “P” icons, glassy panels, rails, and mechanical grips. Add an orange annotation beside the weapon reading “PPT DEVICE - SLIDE RAILGUN.”

Left typography and profile: At the far left, place a bold vertical Japanese headline in large black and orange characters: {argument name="headline text" default="一枚で、世界を変える。"}. Under it, small English text reads “PPT WEAPON SPECIALIST.” Include a compact profile block labeled “// PROFILE” with 8 lines: NAME: UNKNOWN, CODE NAME: --, AGE: ?, HEIGHT: 158cm, WEIGHT: 49kg, NATIONALITY: UNKNOWN, SPECIALTY: INFORMATION MANIPULATION, WEAPON: PPT DEVICE. Add a small sentence near the bottom: “ONE SLIDE, INFINITE IMPACT.” Bottom-left has a small orange PowerPoint-style square icon, “CONFIDENTIAL FILE,” and “PPS-001.”

Right-side technical panels: Arrange exactly 5 labeled sections on the right half. Section 1 is “FACE DETAIL,” containing 3 face images: one wide close-up portrait of the character looking sideways with orange visor, plus two smaller stacked close-ups showing the orange eye/visor mechanism. Section 2 is “TURNAROUND,” containing exactly 4 small full-body views: front, back, three-quarter side, and side/back view. Section 3 is “WEAPON DESIGN,” containing one long side-view diagram of the railgun. Section 4 is a weapon action row beneath it with exactly 4 small thumbnails labeled “01 / IDLE,” “02 / LAYOUT LOCK,” “03 / SLIDE LINK,” and “04 / TRANSITION SHOT,” showing the gun at rest, locked layout mode, slide-link glow, and a translucent orange firing/transition blast. Section 5 is a small sidebar with “COLOR PALETTE” containing exactly 5 square swatches: white, light gray, medium gray, black/dark gray, and orange; below it a “KEYWORD” list with exactly 4 Japanese words: 構造, 整列, 誘導, 変革.

Visual style: Delicate Japanese anime concept design, thin clean ink lines, pale watercolor-gray shadows, high-tech UI annotations, fashion techwear, schematic presentation-board layout, minimal background, precise spacing. Use orange only for emphasis, UI marks, visor, icons, and key headline character. Make the railgun transparent and presentation-software themed, with visible slide panels and orange interface blocks.

Constraints: Keep the composition text-heavy but clean and readable. Do not add extra characters. Do not add extra thumbnails beyond the counted sections. No watermark. Preserve the Japanese headline and keyword text exactly as specified while keeping all other labels in English.

content:

All panels should feel like they were shot in the same futuristic sky mansion with floor-to-ceiling glass, reflective marble floors, transparent walls, and views of clouds and blue sky.

Subject details: The woman is {argument name="character description" default="a slim young woman with long wavy black hair"}. Her face should be intentionally obscured with a soft rectangular blur or anonymized mask in every panel. Keep her styling elegant, rich, and minimalist, like a high-fashion lifestyle editorial.

Panel count and contents:
1. Central large panel: The woman sits in the foreground wearing {argument name="central outfit" default="a white tailored suit with a low neckline and delicate necklace"}, with long dark hair over her shoulders. Behind her is a transparent multi-level glass mansion suspended above clouds, showing luxurious interiors, stairs, sofas, and tiny distant figures.
2. Top-left panel: The woman stands indoors beside a tall twisting crystal sculpture, wearing {argument name="top left outfit" default="a black-and-white tweed cropped jacket and high-waisted white trousers with a slim belt"}; glass walls and cloud views behind her.
3. Bottom-left panel: The woman sits on a cream sofa in a black long-sleeve dress, holding or resting beside a structured black designer handbag, with a dining area and panoramic cloud view in the background.
4. Top-right panel: The woman stands on a glass terrace above the clouds wearing {argument name="top right outfit" default="a dramatic floor-length black gown with a voluminous trailing skirt"}; the mansion interior extends behind her through transparent walls.
5. Bottom-right panel: The woman poses in a short black sparkling dress or blazer dress with black high-heeled sandals, surrounded by tall faceted crystal obelisk sculptures on a reflective marble floor.

Visual style: Hyper-realistic luxury editorial photography, cinematic soft daylight, reflective glass and chrome, icy blue highlights, polished marble, delicate shadows, high-end architecture visualization mixed with fashion photography. Emphasize transparency, reflections, diamonds/crystals, clouds below the building, and an expensive serene atmosphere.

title: Luxury Glass Sky Penthouse Fashion Collage

content:
Goal: Create a vertical Japanese infographic guide for SynClub explaining in-chat sound effects triggered by typing words in parentheses. Use the headline {argument name="headline text" default="チャット内効果音 一覧ガイド"} and the brand name {argument name="brand name" default="SynClub"}.

Canvas: Portrait 2:3 layout, cream parchment background with navy and gold accents, thin geometric lines, small sparkle icons, rounded cards, clean app-guide styling. Top left has the SynClub logo icon and wordmark on a dark navy header strip. Main title is large, bold Japanese typography in dark navy and gold. Under the title, add the instruction: 「（ ）で囲んだワードを入力すると、効果音が再生されます！」.

Layout: Left two-thirds contains the main guide list in four stacked rounded category cards. Right side contains a chibi anime guide character at the top and a smartphone-like chat screen mockup below. Bottom left contains a navy usage-tip box, and bottom right contains a gold-bordered callout banner.

Subject details: At upper right, draw a cute chibi schoolgirl-style anime character with long dark hair, navy uniform, gold hairpins, and a pointing stick; include a speech bubble saying 「使ってみてね！」. Her face is covered by a centered soft gray square blur/censor block. Use {argument name="guide character style" default="chibi anime schoolgirl with long dark hair and navy uniform"} for the character styling.

Guide list: Show exactly 4 sound-effect categories, each with an icon, colored title, and visible trigger phrases in Japanese parentheses.
1. 「ドア系」 with a door icon, brown/gold header, 5 trigger phrases: 「（ドアをノックする）」「（ドアを叩く）」「（ドアを開ける）」「（ドアを閉める）」「（鍵をかける）」.
2. 「書籍系」 with an open-book icon, blue header, 3 trigger phrases: 「（本を開く）」「（ページをめくる）」「（本を閉じる）」.
3. 「触れ合い系」 with a handshake icon, gold header, 8 trigger phrases: 「（抱きしめる、ハグ、抱く）」「（服を脱ぐ）」「（撫でる）」「（頭を撫く）」「（袖を引っ張る）」「（ドキドキ、赤面、頬が真っ赤）」「（舐める）」 plus one line spacing/continuation style as in a compact list.
4. 「生活系」 with a house icon, green header, 3 trigger phrases: 「（靴を振る）」「（携帯が鳴る）」「（布団に入る）」.

Chat mockup: Right middle shows a dark navy rounded phone frame labeled 「会話画面イメージ」. Inside is an anime chat scene with a silver-haired fantasy woman in warm café lighting. At the top of the chat image, show the name {argument name="chat character name" default="ファンネリア"}. Overlay exactly 4 rounded chat bubbles: two salmon/pink narrator bubbles and two navy user-response bubbles. Highlight some trigger words in yellow inside the pink bubbles, including 「ドアをノックする」 and 「頬を赤らめつつ」. Keep Japanese chat text small and atmospheric; it does not need to be fully legible, but must resemble a real roleplay chat screen.

Bottom text: Bottom left navy box titled 「使い方のポイント」 with a lightbulb icon. Include explanatory Japanese text saying sound effects trigger when actions are written in parentheses in the sentence, example 「（ドアをノックする）失礼します…」, and a highlighted note: 「『会話動画』生成の際、自分側の台詞に効果音の記述を挿入しても再生されます。」 Add a small disclaimer below: 「※上記はすべてではありません…まだ判明していない効果音が存在します！」 with a small exclamation icon. Bottom right gold callout with megaphone icon says 「よりリアルな会話体験を！」 and underneath 「効果音を活用して、臨場感あふれるチャットを楽しみましょう！」.

Visual style: Polished Japanese social-media infographic, high-resolution, crisp readable typography, warm cream background, dark navy borders, gold highlights, rounded rectangles, subtle star sparkles. Keep all Japanese text clean and correctly placed. No watermark beyond the SynClub brand mark.

content:
Goal: Create a clean web-app interface screenshot showing an AI video-generation workspace with a large cinematic preview image and a text prompt composer below it.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 screenshot on a very light gray background, minimal modern UI, soft shadows, rounded corners, lots of white space.

Main preview: Place one large rounded-rectangle preview panel centered near the top, about 85% of the canvas width and 60% of the canvas height. The preview shows a photorealistic close-up of {argument name="main subject" default="a young woman with long dark hair"} standing in a dewy green field at sunrise. Her face is mostly covered by a large opaque square privacy block in the center, colored dark warm brown. Visible details include dark hair on the left side, a small part of the lower face and neck below the block, misty grass in the foreground, distant hills, a bright warm sunrise glow on the right, and a soft cinematic shallow-depth-of-field look.

Left thumbnail rail: On the left side of the preview, show exactly 5 small vertical rounded thumbnails stacked evenly. The 5 thumbnails are: 1) close-up face with eyes closed, 2) close-up face with a small overlay icon, 3) side-profile close-up, 4) blurred brown square privacy-block image, 5) darker blurred image with a tiny overlay icon.

Right action toolbar: On the right side of the preview, show exactly 6 circular floating buttons stacked vertically. The 6 buttons are: 1) heart icon in red, 2) X icon, 3) circular refresh arrow, 4) download arrow, 5) black highlighted upload/share icon, 6) three-dot more menu. Add a small muted-audio icon in the bottom-right corner inside the preview panel.

Prompt composer: Below the preview, centered, create a rounded white prompt input card with a subtle border and shadow. At the top-left of the card show exactly 4 small attachment tiles in a row: 1) a plus button, 2) a cropped brown-face thumbnail, 3) a face/portrait thumbnail, 4) a small character-sheet-like thumbnail with multiple figures. Under the attachments, include this readable English prompt text: "Use this image as the start keyframe. Create a seamless cinematic close-up video of a young woman in a sunrise field. The shot opens with a quiet pause, holding her face in stillness with her eyes gently closed. Her expression is calm, inward, and emotionally delicate, as if feeling the morning light before awakening. After this held opening moment, she slowly opens her eyes with natural, graceful eyelid motion." Use {argument name="quality label" default="720p"} as the selected pill in a row of small option pills, with neighboring pills labeled "480p", "6s", and "10s". Place a black circular send button with an upward arrow at the bottom-right of the card.

Additional details: Add a small circular user avatar near the lower-left of the composer area. Keep typography small, clean, sans-serif, and UI-like. The overall impression should be a realistic screenshot of a video prompt tool, not a standalone photograph. Do not add extra buttons, extra thumbnails, watermarks, browser chrome, or unrelated text.
title: AI Video Workspace Screenshot
description: A realistic UI screenshot of an AI video-generation tool showing a censored sunrise portrait keyframe, thumbnail rail, action buttons, and prompt composer.

Use exactly 5 rendered views: 1 large hero render on the left occupying most of the page, and 4 smaller stacked panels on the right showing: front view, side profile, rear/top view, and a close-up detail crop of the controls. Use thin white gutters between panels and soft studio shadows.

Branding and text: Add a minimalist title block below the large hero render with the product name {argument name="product name" default="AERO PAD"} in spaced uppercase lettering, a thin horizontal divider line above it, and the description {argument name="tagline" default="Wireless gaming controller with sculpted ergonomics, tactile precision, and refined premium materials."}

Style: High-end industrial design visualization, photorealistic 3D render, soft diffused lighting, matte graphite and black materials, subtle texture, clean Apple-like product presentation, no sketch lines remaining.

Constraints: Do not add hands, people, packaging, logos, or extra accessories. Keep the design clearly derived from the reference sketch while making it look production-ready.

content:
Goal: Create a clean brand exploration board for a fictional SaaS landing-page builder called {argument name="brand name" default="Neito"}, showing the same website and brand identity system repeated in exactly 4 color directions.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 white canvas, arranged as a 2×2 grid of four complete brand/website mockup panels with generous white space. Each panel is nearly identical except for the accent color and soft blurred gradient decorations.

Layout: Each of the 4 panels contains exactly 2 main areas: a large landing-page mockup on the left and a narrow brand-guide column on the right. The four accent themes are: 1 blue, 2 green, 3 orange, 4 purple.

Landing-page mockup details: At the top left place the logo mark as two forward slashes followed by “Neito” with a small star/spark symbol. Across the top navigation place exactly 5 items: Product, Templates, Pricing, About, and a black rounded “Get started” button. Center a large editorial serif headline: “Words become landing pages.” Below it add small gray supporting copy about turning ideas and content into beautiful ready-to-share landing pages, then a black pill button reading “Start for free”. Under the button place exactly 3 small feature chips with icons: “No code”, “Quick setup”, and “Always in sync”. Behind the hero headline use a huge airy blurred circular gradient ring in the panel’s accent color.

Bottom website cards: Under each hero section place exactly 3 rectangular content cards with thin borders and rounded corners. Card 1 reads “Build pages from your ideas.” with a small black pill button “Try Neito”. Card 2 reads “Launching soon.” and includes a small rounded email/input pill plus a black “Notify me” button and a thin abstract circle-line graphic. Card 3 is numbered “01” and reads “Type your thoughts.” with small descriptive text and a large cropped blurred accent-color ring in the lower right.

Brand-guide column: Add a small heading “BRAND IDEA” and a short Japanese-style paragraph block in small black text. Below it create exactly 4 labeled sections separated by thin gray horizontal rules: COLOR PALETTE, TYPOGRAPHY, VISUAL LANGUAGE, and a sample card. In COLOR PALETTE show exactly 2 circular swatches labeled Main and Accent; the Main swatch is near-white and the Accent swatch matches the panel color, with a small hex-code label beside each. In TYPOGRAPHY show exactly 2 type specimens: a large serif “Aa” labeled for headlines and a smaller sans-serif “Aa” labeled for body text. In VISUAL LANGUAGE show exactly 4 circular tokens labeled Flow, Connection, Simplicity, and Flex, with one or more using the accent color as a blurred ring. The final sample card reads “From thought to landing page.” with small subtext and a cropped blurred accent-color ring.

Visual style: Minimal premium web-design presentation, monochrome typography, lots of white space, thin light-gray dividers, subtle shadows, soft frosted gradients, editorial serif headline paired with tiny modern sans-serif UI labels. Keep everything crisp like a Figma brand exploration screenshot. Use {argument name="headline text" default="Words become landing pages."} as the main repeated hero headline, {argument name="accent palette" default="blue, green, orange, purple"} for the four color variants, and {argument name="canvas ratio" default="16:9"}.

Constraints: Show exactly 4 panels, exactly 3 bottom website cards per panel, exactly 2 brand areas per panel, exactly 2 color swatches per brand guide, exactly 2 typography specimens per brand guide, and exactly 4 visual-language tokens per brand guide. Do not add photos, people, device frames, dark backgrounds, or extra panels.
title: Neito Brand Color Exploration Board
description: A structured prompt for generating a 2×2 SaaS brand identity and landing-page mockup board with four accent color variations.

content:
Goal: Create a retro editorial collage about chaotic graphic design and meme-like workplace posters, using layered printed flyers on a warm off-white background. Make the composition feel like a scanned magazine spread or social media banner, with imperfect paper shadows, slight grain, and playful mixed-media cutout energy.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 image, approximately 1200 x 675 px, cream background with lots of negative space on the right.

Layout: Arrange exactly 6 visible main elements in an overlapping collage. 1) Back-left vertical white poster with a gray spiky kaiju monster at the top, yellow eyes, black claws, and partial tall black East Asian lettering running downward. 2) Lower-left cropped retro cream-and-green minivan front, partly hidden behind the main poster. 3) Center-back bright cobalt-blue anime/card-like rectangle with a colorful illustrated eye/character fragment and taped scraps, mostly obscured. 4) Front-left main flyer: a beige poster tilted slightly, featuring a cute squirrel or chipmunk sitting at a computer desk on green carpet, wearing a lanyard badge, with a red teardrop mark on its cheek, red outline doodle around the animal, mouse and monitor cables visible, bold red Chinese headline across the top, vertical red Chinese side text, small black bullet list, black bottom slogan, and blue brand text at bottom right. 5) Front-right main flyer: a larger beige poster tilted slightly, featuring an alpaca or llama at a computer running Photoshop, also wearing a lanyard badge with a red tear mark, red sketch outline, blue cable scribbles, star doodles, vertical small English schedule text on the left edge, bold red Chinese headline at top, vertical red Chinese side text, small black bullet list, black bottom slogan, and blue brand text at bottom right. 6) On the far right, place the single lowercase black serif word “design,” centered vertically in the empty cream space.

Text content: Use visible Chinese poster typography as decorative but legible where possible. The squirrel poster headline should read {argument name="squirrel headline" default="存不下钱啊！"}; the alpaca poster headline should read {argument name="alpaca headline" default="草泥马上班！"}; include side text similar to {argument name="side caption" default="表面：好的？内心：毁灭吧"}; include bottom slogan {argument name="bottom slogan" default="内心：毁灭吧"}; include small brand text {argument name="brand text" default="摸鱼 TOUCH FISH"}. Include tiny English details such as “DAILY MENTAL STATE,” “9 a.m. ↓ 9 p.m.,” and “Work from Mon. - Sat.” on the flyers.

Visual style: Retro Chinese zine poster design, playful corporate burnout meme aesthetic, hand-drawn red marker annotations, blue star doodles, paper collage, soft shadows, slightly desaturated colors, realistic animal photo cutouts mixed with flat graphic design, imperfect print texture, clean cream negative space, high-resolution but with a scanned-paper feel.

Constraints: Keep the two animal flyers as the dominant focus, with the squirrel flyer in front-left and the alpaca flyer in front-right. Preserve the exact count of 6 main visible elements. Do not add extra posters, extra animals, watermarks, or modern UI elements. Keep the right-side word “design” isolated and uncluttered.
title: Retro Meme Design Poster Collage
description: Generates a layered retro collage of Chinese workplace meme posters with animal cutouts, ideal for social banners or editorial design visuals.

content:
Goal: Create a clean 2×2 showcase collage presenting four different icon material styles on a white background, like a prompt collection preview for GPT Images. Use thin pale-gray dividers between quadrants and consistent generous spacing. The overall image should feel like a catalog sheet of ready-to-use icon styles.

Canvas: Wide horizontal canvas, 16:9 ratio, white background, four equal rectangular panels arranged in a 2×2 grid with subtle light-gray gutters.

Top-left panel: Render exactly 15 colorful 3D digital marketing and social media icons, arranged in three neat rows of five on a white studio background with soft shadows. Include these 15 items: 1 red-and-white megaphone, 1 red target with arrow, 1 smartphone showing an app screen, 1 red heart notification card with a small badge, 1 blue hashtag tile, 1 desk calendar, 1 desktop analytics monitor, 1 yellow email envelope with an @ symbol and paper plane, 1 stack of business cards, 1 magnifying glass over profile avatars, 1 upward growth bar chart with green arrow, 1 female influencer filming with ring light and floating heart, 1 blue QR code tag reading “SCAN ME,” 1 blue thumbs-up speech bubble reading “2.3K,” and 1 billboard reading “YOUR BRAND.” Use glossy rounded 3D shapes, bright red, blue, yellow, and green accents, and soft realistic drop shadows.

Top-right panel: Render exactly 20 black hand-drawn line-art icons inspired by famous art motifs, arranged in four rows of five on a white background. Include these 20 items: 1 seated Mona Lisa-like portrait, 1 starry-night landscape frame, 1 screaming figure with wavy background, 1 birth-of-Venus shell figure, 1 melting clock, 1 veiled woman portrait bust, 1 American Gothic-style couple, 1 great wave, 1 vase of flowers, 1 seated thinker figure, 1 classical standing male statue, 1 classical robed female statue, 1 abstract patterned dress figure, 1 bull head, 1 faceless bust portrait, 1 pop-art soup can labeled “Campbell’s SOUP,” 1 two hands nearly touching, 1 circle of dancing figures, and two additional simple museum-sketch portrait heads to complete the grid. Use expressive monochrome ink lines, slightly imperfect sketch strokes, no color fills.

Bottom-left panel: Render exactly 20 black Japanese-themed flat silhouette icons, arranged in four rows of five on a white background. Include these 20 items: 1 Mount Fuji with clouds, 1 Eiffel Tower silhouette, 1 Tokyo Skytree-like tower, 1 torii gate, 1 multi-tier pagoda, 1 Japanese castle, 1 bullet train, 1 cherry blossom branch, 1 pair of maple leaves, 1 Daruma doll with the character “福,” 1 maneki-neko lucky cat with the character “福,” 1 samurai helmet, 1 patterned kimono, 1 folding fan, 1 sushi nigiri, 1 ramen bowl with chopsticks, 1 tea bowl, 1 bamboo whisk, 1 sake bottle with cup, and 1 small cup. Use solid black vector silhouettes with crisp edges and minimal internal white cutouts.

Bottom-right panel: Render exactly 15 retro household and gadget objects as realistic 3D icons, arranged in three rows of five on a white studio background with soft shadows. Include these 15 items: 1 vinyl record player, 1 vintage tabletop radio, 1 cream rotary telephone, 1 brass twin-bell alarm clock, 1 wooden square clock, 1 wall-mounted rotary telephone, 1 brass desk fan, 1 wood-grain stereo receiver, 1 turquoise canister vacuum cleaner, 1 antique coffee grinder, 1 gray calculator, 1 portable cassette player, 1 mint-green tabletop radio, 1 vintage slide projector, 1 silver-and-brown camera, and 1 instant camera if needed only by replacing another item so the visible count stays exactly 15. Use nostalgic beige, brown, brass, mint, and gray colors with realistic materials and soft shadows.

Visual style: This is a polished icon-series comparison board. Keep all panels bright, high-key, uncluttered, and evenly spaced. Avoid captions, watermarks, logos outside the tiny icon details, extra panels, or background texture. Make the icon theme customizable as {argument name="collection theme" default="icon material styles"}, while preserving the four-panel catalog layout.
title: Four-Panel Icon Style Catalog
description: Creates a wide 2×2 catalog image comparing colorful 3D marketing icons, art line icons, Japanese silhouettes, and retro gadget icons.

content:
Goal: Create a polished Japanese OGP/social media banner for a B2B generative AI implementation support service, emphasizing AI becoming part of daily work.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 1200×630 px banner, clean corporate technology style, bright and trustworthy. Use a pale sky-blue to white gradient background with a soft sunrise glow on the right.

Layout: Place a semi-transparent frosted white rectangular panel slightly left of center, occupying about 55% of the width and 82% of the height, with a subtle white border and soft shadow. All main text sits inside this panel, left aligned. The right half shows a futuristic city skyline fading into the background, with sweeping highway-like light trails curving from the lower right toward the center.

Text content: At the top of the panel, add a small blue brand line with thin horizontal decorative lines on both sides: {argument name="brand text" default="Lightkeeper AI伴走"}. Beneath it, add a smaller dark navy subtitle: {argument name="subtitle text" default="中小企業の生成AI内製化・定着支援"}. The main headline is very large, bold, dark navy Japanese type on two lines: {argument name="headline text" default="AIを、\n日常の仕事に。"}. Near the bottom left, add a short gold horizontal accent line, then a smaller bold navy supporting message on two lines: {argument name="supporting text" default="研修で終わらせず、\n現場定着まで伴走します。"}.

Visual style: Use modern Japanese sans-serif typography, heavy weight for the headline, crisp spacing, high contrast navy text. Color palette: deep navy, medium corporate blue, soft white, pale cyan, and warm gold highlights. Add translucent floating UI panels in the background: exactly 5 faint panels, including 1 line chart card on the left, 1 donut chart card on the lower left, 1 bar chart card upper right, 1 organization/network icon card mid-right, and 1 small abstract data card far right. Add subtle hexagon patterns and small glowing particles, but keep the design uncluttered.

Constraints: Preserve the Japanese text exactly as written in the default values. No people, no logo icon, no watermark, no mockup frame, no extra text. Ensure the final banner feels like a professional landing-page hero or OGP image for an AI consulting service.
title: Japanese AI Consulting OGP Banner
description: Creates a clean corporate Japanese OGP banner for a generative AI implementation and workplace adoption support service.

content: Generate a portrait vision centered around a large capital 'X' letter. The main subject is not a standard portrait but is cut by a huge, clean, hard-edged X-shape. The character's image is hidden inside the strokes of the X, with the face near the intersection. Allow parts of the subject like fingers, hair, or shoulders to break out of the X boundaries, appearing in front of the white structure to create a sense of depth. The background should be bright white space. Colors should be extracted from the subject's natural skin tone and lighting, maintaining a clean and precise look. Contrast sharp edges with realistic textures. Person: {argument name="person" default="Luo Yonghao"}. Aspect ratio 9:10.

content:
Goal: Create a realistic desktop screenshot of Microsoft PowerPoint in Japanese, showing an editable banner advertisement design for a matcha drink. The scene should look like the banner is being built from separate selectable PowerPoint objects, with many resize handles, rotation icons, and bounding boxes visible.

Canvas: 16:9 widescreen screenshot, approximately 1200×675 px, with the full PowerPoint application window visible. Use a light gray Windows/Office interface, Japanese ribbon labels, one slide thumbnail on the left, the main slide centered, status bar at the bottom, and a zoom level around 107%.

PowerPoint interface: Show the Home tab active with Japanese menu items across the top such as File, Home, Insert, Draw, Design, Transitions, Animations, Slide Show, Record, Review, View, Help, plus contextual Shape Format and Picture Format tabs. Include a search box near the top, a red Share button at top right, and a single slide thumbnail in the left navigation pane. The filename area should suggest a saved presentation named similar to “premium_editable_matcha_banner”.

Main slide layout: The slide itself is a premium café banner split into two visual halves. The left half is a cream paper-like advertisement panel over a warm blurred café/table background, and the right half is a close-up photo of an iced matcha latte in a clear glass on a wooden tray, with soft natural window light, green leaves above, a bamboo whisk in the background, and warm brown tones. Add a subtle vertical division between the cream text panel and the photo. Use a dark green, cream, beige, and warm wood color palette.

Visible editable objects: Show many individual PowerPoint selection boxes and handles on the banner, as if almost every text box, line, shape, icon, and photo is selected or editable. Include white circular resize handles, rotation arrows, thin gray bounding boxes, and overlapping object outlines. Count and show exactly 13 selected/editable object groups: 1 large slide background/image frame, 1 cream left panel, 1 small brand text group, 1 English subtitle text box, 1 large Japanese headline text group, 1 round dark-green badge, 1 description paragraph text box, 1 price box, 1 green call-to-action button, 1 date text box, 1 limited-quantity text box, 1 store information label on the photo, and 1 small dotted decorative icon group.

Text content on the banner: Preserve Japanese text accurately where visible. Brand area: “KISSA AOI” and “SEASONAL CAFE DRINK”. Main headline: “初摘み抹茶の” on the first line and “アイスラテ” on the second line. Round badge: “初夏限定”. Description paragraph: “香り高い抹茶に、きなこの余韻。涼やかな苦みと、やさしい甘さを一杯に。” Price: “¥680”. CTA button: “近くの店舗を見る”. Date: “6.7 SAT - 7.21 MON”. Small note: “数量限定”. Store label over the photo: “青井珈琲 淀屋橋店” and below it “本日 11:00 販売開始”.

Design details: Use elegant Japanese typography with a dark forest-green headline, thin decorative horizontal rules around the headline, cream rectangles with fine green borders, rounded dark-green buttons, and small dotted white decorations on green shapes. The badge should be a dark-green circle near the upper right of the cream panel. The store label should be a dark-green rounded rectangle near the bottom right of the drink photo. The overall ad should feel premium, calm, seasonal, and café-like.

Customization slots: Use the drink concept as {argument name="drink name" default="初摘み抹茶のアイスラテ"}, brand as {argument name="brand name" default="KISSA AOI"}, price as {argument name="price" default="¥680"}, CTA as {argument name="call to action" default="近くの店舗を見る"}, and store as {argument name="store name" default="青井珈琲 淀屋橋店"}.

Constraints: Make it a screenshot of PowerPoint, not a clean exported poster. Keep the editing handles and object outlines highly visible. Do not add extra slides, extra products, watermarks, or unrelated UI panels. Keep the photo realistic and the ad elements editable-looking rather than flattened.
title: Editable Matcha Banner in PowerPoint
description: Generates a realistic Japanese PowerPoint editing screenshot featuring a premium editable matcha latte banner advertisement.

content: Create a square 1:1 digital graphic on a pure black background featuring the lowercase word {argument name="main word" default="bug"} as the central subject. Use exactly 3 large rounded lowercase letters, thick and glossy, with a beveled 3D glass/plastic look: the left letter in electric cyan-blue, the middle letter blending deep blue to violet, and the right letter in hot magenta-pink. Add bright neon outlines, inner glow, reflective highlights, and subtle transparent depth inside each letter. Behind the word, place exactly 1 circular energy ring, incomplete and hand-drawn in feel, wrapping around the text with a blue arc on the left/top and a purple-magenta arc on the right/bottom. Add small glowing particles scattered around the ring and text, plus exactly 4 prominent starburst lens flares: one at the upper left of the first letter, one at the lower left edge, one near the top of the middle letter, and one bright pink flare on the upper right of the last letter. The overall style should be high-contrast cyber neon, luminous, crisp, centered, with no extra text, no border, and no watermark.
title: Neon Bug Text Logo
description: A glossy cyber-neon wordmark with glowing letters and an electric circular energy ring, ideal for logo or animated GIF style generation.

content:
Goal: Create a clean light-neumorphic app shortcut icon set on a white background, suitable for a mobile app feature grid or homepage “king kong area”.

Canvas: Wide horizontal canvas, approximately 16:9, pure white background with generous empty margins. Center the icon group horizontally and vertically with lots of whitespace.

Layout: Arrange exactly 8 circular feature icons in a 4-column by 2-row grid. Use even spacing, with each icon inside a soft pastel circular disc about the same size. No titles under the icons.

Icon style: Soft 3D clay/neumorphic rendering, rounded edges, glossy highlights, subtle ambient occlusion, gentle shadows, pastel gradients, miniature toy-like objects, clean commercial UI style. Each circular background should be a faint pastel gradient matching the icon color. Use high-key lighting from the upper left, no harsh outlines, no dark background.

Icon count and subjects, left to right:
1. Red shopping bag with yellow rope handles on a pale pink circle.
2. Blue camera with yellow shutter button and circular lens on a pale blue circle.
3. Blue-and-white milk carton with a yellow splash graphic on a pale blue circle.
4. Purple grapes with green leaves and tendril on a pale lavender circle.
5. Faceless male professional avatar wearing a blue suit, white shirt, purple tie, and small circular badge on a pale blue circle.
6. Yellow document folder containing papers, one paper visibly labeled 「合同」, on a pale yellow circle.
7. Red gift box with yellow ribbon and bow on a pale pink circle.
8. Mint-green document sheet with checklist lines, a tab visibly labeled 「摘要」, on a pale green circle.

Customization: The icon set should represent {argument name="app category" default="general lifestyle and services"}; keep the visible Chinese labels exactly as {argument name="folder label" default="合同"} and {argument name="document label" default="摘要"} if text is included.

Constraints: Generate only the 8 icons described above, no extra icons, no captions, no watermark, no frame, no mockup device, no people beyond the single faceless avatar icon, and preserve the airy white composition.
title: Soft 3D App Feature Icon Grid
description: Generates a clean two-row grid of eight pastel neumorphic 3D app shortcut icons for mobile homepage feature areas.

content:
Goal: Create a clean desktop web app screenshot showing an AI image generation gallery interface for comparing portrait outputs.

Canvas: Wide horizontal browser-like screenshot, approximately 1200×410 px, white background with generous margins, minimal modern UI.

Top input area: Centered rounded prompt bar near the top, light gray outline, containing the exact prompt text: “A close-up portrait shot of a young south east asia woman with long red hair illuminated by”. At the far right inside the bar is a black circular submit button with a white upward arrow.

Navigation row: Beneath the prompt bar, aligned left, show exactly 5 navigation elements: 1 magnifying-glass search icon, 2 selected pill tab labeled “All”, 3 text tab labeled “Pins”, 4 text tab labeled “Published”, 5 text tab labeled “Unpublished”. Use dark gray text, with the selected “All” tab in a light gray rounded pill.

Gallery layout: Show exactly 4 image cards in one horizontal row, evenly spaced. Each card is a pale gray rounded rectangle background with a vertical portrait thumbnail centered inside it and a small white outline heart icon near the lower-right corner of the card.

Portrait thumbnails: Each thumbnail depicts a close-up portrait of {argument name="subject description" default="a young Southeast Asian woman"} with {argument name="hair color" default="long red hair"}, wearing a plain gray T-shirt, photographed from the shoulders up against a muted green-gray background. The lighting is moody and directional, with realistic skin texture, dark shadows under the chin and neck, and warm reddish highlights in the hair. The face in each thumbnail is obscured by a soft rectangular blur censor block in muted beige-gray tones.

Count and variation of the 4 portraits: 1 left card shows the woman slightly angled with hair falling over the left side and the head cropped near the top; 2 second card shows a straighter centered head-and-shoulders crop with red hair framing both sides; 3 third card shows the chin lifted and neck elongated, face turned slightly upward with red hair visible on the right; 4 fourth card shows the closest crop, head high in frame, red hair along both sides, with the darkest face blur rectangle.

Visual style: Minimal white UI, soft shadows or very subtle borders, rounded corners, neutral gray typography, realistic generated portrait thumbnails. Keep the interface uncluttered and preserve the exact visible text labels. Do not add logos, watermarks, extra buttons, or additional gallery items.
title: AI Gallery Portrait UI Screenshot
description: A structured prompt for generating a minimalist AI image gallery screenshot with four censored portrait thumbnails and a prompt input bar.

content: Use {argument name="character" default="the character from the reference image"} as the base design to draw "a single frame of a short video accidentally taken by a regular person on a train, showing an anime character living a normal life in the real world." Accurately maintain the atmosphere of the character as an anime illustration. Preserve the impression of the face, hairstyle, hair color, eyes, ears, body proportions, silhouette, and facial expression. Never break the character's identity. Do not turn the character into a photorealistic human. Maintain high-quality anime illustration expression for the character part. The setting is {argument name="setting" default="the interior of a typical Japanese commuter train"}. Realistic, photorealistic background depiction. Naturally depict advertisements, windows, handrails, straps, seats, doors, and guide displays. Do not make the space look like a clean advertising photo. Give it a sense of everyday life and use typical of real public transportation. The composition is a vertical short video. A screenshot of an SNS video taken with a smartphone. The photographer is sitting near the opposite seat. The character is sitting on the long seat opposite. A natural angle seen slightly from the side, not directly from the front. The character is looking at a smartphone. Not looking at the camera. Not posing. Not aware of the photographer. A bag, paper bag, or shopping bag that the character might have is placed at the character's feet. An atmosphere like coming home from work or shopping. They can be wearing earphones. They can have a tired or sleepy expression. They are just normally in transit. Surrounding passengers exist naturally. No one is reacting specially to the character. Depict the surrounding world as a mysterious everyday life where people are "used to the existence of anime characters." Add a modern {argument name="social media UI" default="atmosphere similar to TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts"} to the screen. Not a LIVE broadcast screen. Naturally display the number of likes, comment section, share button, etc. Do not fix the comment content; let the AI generate it naturally. Comments are mainly in Japanese. Important: The comment section should not treat the character like a celebrity. No flaming or news treatment. It should have a natural temperature, like seeing an urban legend or a rare wild animal. Emphasize textures typical of smartphone photography: light HDR processing, fine sensor noise, slight JPEG compression feel, natural exposure, slight chromatic aberration, autofocus feel, high ISO noise, and fine shakes typical of handheld shooting. Reality like a frame cut from a short video. Prohibit movie poster style. Prohibit cinematic direction. Prohibit dramatic lighting. Prohibit excessive depth of field effects. Do not overload with information. Prohibit advertising photo style. Avoid AI-specific glossy rendering. Prioritize the strange reality of "a mysterious video that accidentally flowed through social media," "for some reason no one is surprised," and "only the person themselves is living normally."
title: Anime Character Social Media Snapshot
description: A detailed image-to-image prompt for GPT Image 2 designed to generate a realistic social media snapshot of an anime character on a Japanese commuter train, emphasizing character consistency and authentic environment.

content: Transform the uploaded image into a high-contrast monochrome particle-render aesthetic. Subject reconstructed entirely from thousands of tiny glowing white dots and voxel-like particles on a pure black background. Use point-cloud dispersion, volumetric particles, halftone density gradients, and scattered noise trails to define the silhouette. Preserve the original subject composition and pose, but simplify details into clean geometric forms. Style should feel like futuristic AI architecture visualization mixed with experimental generative art.  Visual characteristics:  black background only  white particle clusters forming the subject  subtle floating debris and dissolving particles around edges  sparse orange/red accent particles (very minimal)  cinematic negative space  ultra minimal  soft bloom glow on dense particle areas  depth created through particle density  abstract but recognizable silhouette  no realistic textures  no colors besides black, white, and tiny orange accents  brutalist futuristic design aesthetic  clean composition  vertical poster layout  slight voxel / point-cloud rendering effect  high contrast  generative AI art style  experimental architecture visualization aesthetic  Typography treatment: small thin mono-space typography placed minimally on left and right sides, similar to futuristic design posters, white text only, subtle and secondary to the artwork  Rendering style: octane render, point cloud simulation, particle system render, volumetric dispersion, procedural dots, cinematic lighting, ultra detailed, abstract minimalism  Negative prompt: realistic shading, painterly textures, colorful backgrounds, low contrast, photorealism, messy composition, extra objects, blur, noisy artifacts, low resolution
title: Monochrome Particle Render Art
description: Transforms images into high-contrast monochrome particle art using a point-cloud aesthetic with floating debris and cinematic lighting.

content:
Create a premium mid-century-inspired flat editorial illustration of {argument name="subject" default="a forest scene"}, rendered in a refined handcrafted printmaking aesthetic. The artwork should feel like a sophisticated vintage children’s encyclopedia illustration combined with Scandinavian editorial design and retro nature-book graphics.

Language: English 8K ultra-high resolution with a 3:4 aspect ratio

STYLE: minimalist flat-shape illustration soft geometric simplification handcrafted gouache + risograph + silkscreen print texture subtle paper grain and dry ink imperfections {argument name="color palette" default="muted refined mineral tones"} clean matte colors crisp neutral white balance bright museum-quality paper appearance no yellow tint no beige cast no sepia tone no glossy rendering no photorealism no 3D shading elegant editorial composition premium picture-book atmosphere modern museum-shop illustration vibe

content:
Goal: Create a polished Japanese business infographic slide comparing AI presentation-material generation methods and tools, with a corporate white, navy, orange, and green palette. The main message is that Manus × GPT image 2.0 is currently the best overall option.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 landscape slide, clean white background, thin light-gray card borders, deep navy typography, subtle blue-gray shadows. Leave a right-side vertical photo strip occupying about 24% of the canvas.

Header: At top left, small Japanese lead-in text using {argument name="small header text" default="AI資料生成、いろいろ試した結論"}. Below it, a very large elegant serif headline using {argument name="main headline text" default="「Manus × GPT image 2.0」がいちばん良い"}. Under the headline, add a smaller subtitle using {argument name="subtitle text" default="資料生成のやり方・ツールを徹底比較。今のところ総合力で頭ひとつ抜けています。"}.

Right photo area: Add exactly 2 realistic business lifestyle photos stacked vertically with soft bright office lighting. Top photo: a Japanese businessman in a navy suit working at a laptop showing slide thumbnails, seated near a window, face softly blurred. Bottom photo: a Japanese businesswoman in a beige blazer looking at a smartphone at a desk, face softly blurred. Keep the photos cropped cleanly with white margins, matching the slide’s corporate look.

Section 1 layout: Create a large rounded rectangle card titled "資料生成の3つのやり方". Inside it place exactly 3 horizontal method cards connected by two right-pointing arrows. Method 1: blue code icon, label "① コードでプレビュー", small text "HTML / CSS / JSで作成", bottom pill "再現性が高い". Method 2: orange PowerPoint icon, label "② PowerPointを直接作る", small text "細かい調整がしやすい", bottom pill "時間がかかる・属人化しやすい". Method 3: green image icon, label "③ 画像生成でスライドにする", small text "自由度が高くスピーディ", bottom pill "総合力で最もバランスが良い".

Section 2 layout: Below, add a title "画像生成をどのツールでやるか（主要4ツール比較）" and exactly 4 equal comparison cards in a row. Card 1: Claude Code / Codex, gear/code icon, sublabel "（GPT image 2.0 API）", bullet "実装向きで表現に制約あり". Card 2: ChatGPT, OpenAI knot icon, sublabel "（直接生成）", bullet "一度に出せる枚数に制限". Card 3: Genspark, sparkle icon, bullet "エラーが多くデザインも弱い". Card 4: highlighted best card with orange border and crown icon, small orange badge "最良", title using {argument name="best tool name" default="Manus × GPT image 2.0"}, bullet "精度・枚数・デザインの総合力◎".

Section 3 layout: Add a rounded box titled "どんな資料に向いているか" with exactly 2 side-by-side suitability cards. Left card with green person icon: title "画像生成で十分戦える資料", examples "研修資料 / YouTube用スライド / 軽めの提案書 など". Right card with orange crown icon: title "人がPowerPointで作り込むべき資料", examples "大型提案書 / 高度なカスタマイズが必要な資料 など".

Bottom conclusion bar: Full-width light-blue conclusion strip with a navy label box reading "結論", a circular check icon, and large conclusion text using {argument name="conclusion text" default="現時点では Manus × GPT image 2.0 がベスト"}.

Branding: Bottom right place a small orange abstract mark and the word "NEXTSCALE" in dark gray. Keep all text crisp and aligned, use Japanese business-slide typography, avoid clutter, and do not add any extra cards beyond the counted 3 method cards, 4 tool cards, 2 suitability cards, and 2 photos.
title: Manus GPT Image 2.0 Comparison Slide
description: A Japanese corporate infographic slide comparing AI slide-generation methods and tools, ideal for social posts or presentation decks.

Top left contains an ornate cream plaque with a pink bow above elegant script text reading “My Melody”, a large pink “×”, and the REALITY App logo below. Under it place a very large pink serif year, {argument name="year" default="2026"}. Beneath the year, add a pink ribbon banner with white Japanese text {argument name="main banner text" default="コラボレーション"}. Bottom right has a round cream badge reading “My Melody 50th Anniversary”. Add small copyright text along the bottom edge.

She has very pale silver-white hair with long bangs, bright turquoise-blue eyes, soft blush, small catlike animal ears, and a shy pose with both oversized sleeves lifted near her face. Her hair accessories include exactly 4 visible decorative pieces: a large white flower with gold accents on the left side of her head, gold dangling chains, blue jewel ornaments, and pink ribbon bows. Outfit: a pink gingham pinafore dress with white scalloped trim, white blouse with enormous puffy sleeves, pale blue bow at the collar, heart-shaped strap buckles, white underskirt, and a tiny clear hanging pouch containing a My Melody plush and blue beads. content:
Goal: Create a wide editorial hero banner about {argument name="headline topic" default="Codex的下一块拼图"}, showing a jigsaw-puzzle metaphor for AI coding, visual design, and missing capabilities.

Canvas: Ultra-wide horizontal banner, approximately 5:2 aspect ratio, dark charcoal technical background with faint grid lines, subtle blueprint marks, tiny dots, and thin circuit-like guide lines. Center the artwork with a large off-white paper/cardboard jigsaw puzzle assembly casting soft shadows.

Layout: Use exactly 15 visible puzzle elements: 13 off-white connected puzzle pieces forming a rectangular mosaic, 1 vivid cobalt-blue puzzle piece inserted at the bottom-right edge, and 1 dashed-outline empty missing-piece slot immediately to the right of the blue piece. The puzzle should look physical, with rounded tabs and sockets, slight bevels, paper texture, seams, grime, and realistic shadowing.

Text content: The main typography dominates the puzzle surface. Use huge bold black sans-serif Chinese type reading {argument name="main title text" default="Codex的"} across the top row and {argument name="subtitle text" default="下一块拼图"} across the middle row. Make the letters oversized, cropped slightly by puzzle seams, and integrated into the tile layout. Keep the text crisp and high contrast.

Visible graphic elements: Include exactly 7 small embedded UI/diagram motifs on puzzle pieces: 1 dark code editor panel in the lower-left with short colored code lines and a small </> symbol; 1 pie chart combined with a small bar chart along the lower middle; 1 simple node-and-connector flow diagram near the lower center-right; 1 bullet-list panel with three round bullets to the right of the flow diagram; 1 user profile card in the upper-right with avatar icon and horizontal text lines; 1 small spreadsheet/dashboard grid in the top-right corner with gray cells and one blue highlighted cell; 1 document/image card on the right side with small mountain thumbnail lines, overlapped by a blue chat bubble containing two white dots and two white horizontal lines.

Visual style: Premium tech editorial illustration, cinematic lighting, tactile paper puzzle texture, muted monochrome palette of black, warm off-white, gray, and accent cobalt blue {argument name="accent color" default="cobalt blue"}. Add subtle scratches, dust, and paper grain. Use realistic shadows between pieces, but keep the whole image clean and readable.

Constraints: No people, no extra logos, no watermark, no random English words beyond tiny unreadable code strokes, and no additional large text. The blue puzzle piece should feel like the key missing component that completes the system, while the dashed empty slot hints that another piece is still absent.
title: Codex Jigsaw Puzzle Tech Banner
description: A wide editorial tech banner using interlocking puzzle pieces, bold Chinese headline typography, and small AI workflow UI motifs to illustrate Codex as the next missing piece.

content:
Goal: Create a vertical smartphone live-stream screenshot showing a Gen Z anime shrine maiden doing a livestream at night inside Fushimi Inari Shrine, blending a realistic photo-like background with a 2D anime avatar overlay and social media UI.

Canvas: 9:16 vertical mobile screen, 675 × 1200 style composition. Dark nighttime atmosphere, high contrast, warm orange shrine lighting, realistic wet stone path reflections.

Background: A photorealistic night scene of endless vermilion torii gates receding into the distance at Fushimi Inari Shrine. The path is centered with strong depth perspective. Add a glowing stone lantern on the left foreground, dark trees and foliage around the gates, glossy rain-wet paving stones, and warm amber light spilling across the scene. Some torii pillars have black Japanese characters painted on them.

Main subject: Center foreground full-body anime girl avatar, slightly pasted over the realistic scene like an AR live-stream filter. She is {argument name="character name" default="Moena"}, a cute young shrine maiden with {argument name="hair color" default="brown"} twin-tail hair tied with blue ribbons, soft anime shading, and a deliberately blurred/obscured face as if anonymized. She wears a traditional miko outfit: white kimono top with red trim, long detached sleeves with red cords, red pleated hakama-style skirt with a large bow at the waist, white thigh-high tabi socks, and red-and-white sandals. Pose: standing upright, both hands raised near her shoulders making double peace signs. Cute, cheerful idol-streamer energy.

Top live-stream UI: Overlay a TikTok-like livestream interface. At top left show a circular anime profile icon, username text in Japanese: {argument name="account name" default="萌奈のおすそわけ"}, a heart count “♡ 23.8K”, and a bright pink rounded button reading “＋フォロー”. Near the top center-right show a pink “LIVE” badge, an eye icon with “2.1K”, and a white close X at the far right. Under the username area show a small flame icon and the ranking text “週間ランキング 28位”.

Right-side engagement column: Include exactly 4 vertical action items: 1) red heart icon with “12.3K”, 2) white comment bubble with “847”, 3) white bookmark icon with “1,254”, 4) white share arrow with “520”.

Comment overlay: Add exactly 6 semi-transparent live comments stacked on the lower left, each with a small circular avatar. Preserve these Japanese comments: 1) “夜の伏見稲荷大社きれい！” 2) “神様近い？怖くないの？” 3) “えっ、巫女さん！？本物！？” 4) “今のやば…神域すぎる….” 5) “萌奈ちゃんどこから来たの？！” 6) “千本鳥居、エモすぎる”. Beneath them add a final faint comment line “ご利益ありそう。🙏”.

Bottom input and navigation UI: At bottom left place a rounded comment input field reading “コメントを入力…”, with a smiley icon at its right end. At bottom right add exactly 3 gift/navigation icons with labels: a rose labeled “バラ”, a present labeled “ギフト”, and two-person icon labeled “マルチ”.

Visual style: Realistic cinematic shrine photo background plus crisp anime illustration overlay, mobile livestream screenshot, Japanese social app aesthetic, bright pink accent UI, white text, subtle transparency on comments, no extra characters, no watermark, no visible camera frame outside the phone screenshot.
title: Anime Miko Night Shrine Livestream
description: Generates a TikTok-style Japanese livestream screenshot of an anime shrine maiden avatar broadcasting from a realistic night scene at Fushimi Inari Shrine.

Keep the illustration highly polished, luminous, romantic, and detailed, with an ethereal manga style and glossy digital painting finish.

content:
Goal: Create a vertical Japanese landing page first-view hero image for an at-home English program for busy working mothers, with a warm parent-child learning photo on the right and large sales copy on the left.

Canvas: Vertical smartphone LP/FV design, 675×1200 px or 9:16 ratio, cream-white background, soft pastel palette, airy spacing, friendly family-oriented mood.

Visual style: Clean Japanese web advertising design, rounded shapes, hand-drawn decorative accents, pastel pink, brown, yellow, mint green, and sky blue. Use a bright lifestyle-photo look blended into a graphic LP layout. Keep typography large, rounded, and highly readable; emphasize key words in vivid pink.

Main image area: On the right half, show a Japanese mother and young child sitting at a wooden table doing English flashcard study at home. The mother wears a simple cream blouse and sits beside the child; the child wears a yellow striped top and holds an illustrated apple card labeled “apple”. Place a tablet on the table at the far right with cute stickers and text “Let’s enjoy English!”. Add four visible English flashcards on the table: 1) apple held by the child, 2) cat card, 3) dog card, 4) ball card. Obscure both faces with soft rectangular skin-tone privacy blurs while keeping hair, clothes, hands, and activity visible. Background includes a plant, shelf, soft daylight curtains, and pastel triangular bunting flags across the upper right.

Header: Top left logo with a small house icon and the brand text “おうち英語きっず”, with “おうち” in pink, “英語” in dark brown, and “きっず” in blue.

Text content: Add a dashed pink speech bubble near the top left containing “忙しいママでも続けやすい” with a small heart. Large main headline on the left: “1日10分、 おうちで英語が 好きになる。” Make “10”, “英語”, and “好き” bright pink, the rest dark brown, and underline the headline with a yellow brush stroke. Supporting copy below: “30代ワーキングマザーのための 子どもおうち英語講座”. Add small body text: “英語が苦手でも大丈夫。 動画・ワーク・声かけ例つきで、 親子で楽しく続けられます。”

Benefit cards: Include exactly three rounded feature cards in one row near the lower middle: 1) pink clock icon with “1回10分”, 2) green heart icon with “ママの英語力不要”, 3) blue house icon with “自宅でOK”.

CTA: Near the bottom, add one large rounded hot-pink button with white text “無料体験レッスンを見る” and a white circular arrow icon on the right. Under it, add a small smartphone icon and text “スマホでOK・今すぐチェック” with small pink attention marks.

Decorations: Add small hearts, spark lines, stars, dots, scalloped cloud-like cream shapes along the bottom edge, and a cute smiling cloud icon at bottom right. Keep everything soft, cheerful, trustworthy, and conversion-focused.

Customizable details: Use the brand name {argument name="brand name" default="おうち英語きっず"}, the main headline {argument name="main headline" default="1日10分、おうちで英語が好きになる。"}, the target audience line {argument name="target audience" default="30代ワーキングマザーのための 子どもおうち英語講座"}, the CTA button text {argument name="CTA text" default="無料体験レッスンを見る"}, and the tablet sticker phrase {argument name="tablet phrase" default="Let’s enjoy English!"}.

Constraints: Use Japanese text exactly as specified where visible, maintain a professional LP hero layout, include exactly three benefit cards and exactly four flashcards, no extra people, no watermark, no browser chrome.
title: Japanese Kids English LP Hero
description: Generates a pastel Japanese landing page hero for an at-home children’s English lesson aimed at busy working mothers.

content:
Create a minimalist black and white flat vector portrait of {argument name="name" default="[NAME]"} in an expressive Notion-avatar style.

Line work and mood:
Use thick, consistent monoline black outlines. The drawing should feel smooth, organic, confident, and hand-designed rather than stiff, robotic, or generic. Give the character a clear personality with a relaxed, cool, or friendly expression. Emphasize distinctive facial features, hairstyle, facial hair, accessories, and other identity details.

Selective black fills:
Keep the style mostly outline-based, but use solid black areas deliberately. Fill major dark shapes such as hair masses, beards, eyebrows, sunglasses, or dark clothing. Leave skin, the main face area, and lighter details as pure flat white inside the bold outlines.

Composition and technical style:
Center the character as a clean bust or headshot on a white background. Use only pure black and pure white. No gray, no shading, no gradients, no soft lighting. The final image should read as high-contrast, crisp 2D vector graphics with a polished avatar-system feel.
title: Notion Style Flat Vector Portrait
description: Creates minimalist black and white identity art in the style of Notion avatars with bold monoline outlines.

content:
Goal: Create a clean isometric vector illustration sheet showing exactly 21 separate business-person poses and office mini-scenes on one canvas, like a reusable character asset collection.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 horizontal canvas, light gray or off-white background, no borders, no title text, no labels, no watermark. Arrange the subjects in a neat 3-row by 7-column grid with generous spacing and soft gray oval shadows under each figure or desk.

Visual style: Modern isometric corporate illustration, semi-flat vector rendering with subtle gradients and soft shading, crisp edges, realistic but simplified proportions, neutral professional mood. Use {argument name="background color" default="very light gray"}. Characters wear {argument name="business outfit style" default="white shirts, navy skirts or trousers, dark shoes, simple ties for men"}; women have brown hair tied back, men have short brown hair. Use a restrained palette of white, navy, charcoal, brown wood, gray metal, and black shoes.

Layout and exact scene count: Include exactly 21 discrete illustrations, arranged left to right in three rows of seven.

Top row, 7 scenes: 1) standing businesswoman holding a dark tablet or clipboard, 2) businesswoman seen from behind writing on a freestanding whiteboard with a marker, 3) businesswoman walking while holding a takeaway coffee cup, 4) businesswoman standing and working on an open laptop, 5) businesswoman standing with one hand to her ear as if talking on a phone, 6) businesswoman standing and writing on a black clipboard, 7) businesswoman seated at a wooden desk using a laptop on an office chair.

Middle row, 7 scenes: 1) businessman standing with a black briefcase at his side, 2) two businessmen shaking hands, 3) businessman walking while reading paper documents, 4) businessman leaning over a wooden desk and typing on a laptop, 5) businessman sitting in a black office chair with crossed legs and one hand on his chin, 6) businessman standing and talking on a phone, 7) businessman standing casually with hands in pockets.

Bottom row, 7 scenes: 1) businesswoman hurrying or running while holding a tablet and stylus, 2) businessman placing or retrieving binders from a tall gray office shelf, 3) businessman celebrating with both fists raised, 4) businesswoman sitting casually on the edge of a wooden desk while holding a takeaway coffee, 5) businesswoman seated at a wooden desk using a laptop, 6) businessman sitting in a dark lounge chair thinking with one hand near his chin, 7) businesswoman standing and talking on a phone while holding a blue folder.

Subject details: Keep all figures small, full-body, three-quarter isometric view with consistent scale. Desks are simple brown tabletops with thin gray legs; chairs are dark office chairs where appropriate; whiteboard has a thin gray frame and legs; shelf is gray with visible binders. Emphasize office work gestures, communication, meetings, walking, thinking, and productivity. Use {argument name="character hair color" default="brown"} and {argument name="primary accent color" default="navy blue"}.

Constraints: No text anywhere in the image, no logos, no photorealism, no exaggerated cartoon faces, no background environment beyond the individual props and shadows. Keep the composition airy, evenly spaced, and suitable for business presentation assets.
title: Isometric Business People Asset Sheet
description: Generates a wide isometric vector sheet of 21 office worker poses and business mini-scenes for presentations, websites, or UI illustrations.

content:
Create a Y2K futurist Windows desktop remix of Van Gogh’s The Starry Night as a glowing cyberpunk operating-system screenshot. The canvas is a 4:3 desktop wallpaper in deep ultramarine, neon violet, electric blue, cyan, and gold, with painterly impasto brush strokes forming huge swirling star vortices across the sky. Preserve the Starry Night composition: a tall black cypress-like spire in the lower left foreground, rolling dark hills, a glowing village transformed into a futuristic city, and a river or bay reflecting purple-blue neon lights. Add transparent glassmorphism Windows-2000/XP style UI overlays with violet chrome, bloom, scanline shimmer, pixel fonts, and small title-bar buttons.

Desktop layout: a vertical translucent sidebar on the far left with exactly 8 desktop icons, from top to bottom labeled: “my pc”, “internet”, “e-mail”, “msn”, “music”, “pictures”, “shop”, “explore”. At the very top left place a window title bar labeled “Starry_Night.vin” with menu items “file”, “edit”, “view”, “tools”, “help”. Along the bottom place a glowing purple taskbar with a rounded “start” button on the left and a system tray on the right showing “02:37 AM”; include a recycle bin icon and label “recycle bin” near the bottom right.

Add exactly 3 floating windows on the right side. Window 1, top right: a music player titled “now playing”, with a small square album thumbnail, track text “vincent’s dream” and “sleepy gogh”, five empty star-rating outlines, timestamp “01:37 / 04:28”, a progress bar, and previous / pause / next controls. Window 2, mid-right: an info panel titled “about: painting.exe”, headed “THE STARRY NIGHT”, listing “vincent van gogh”, “1889”, “oil on canvas”, “remixed in: 3000”, “resolution: 1024x1280”, “color mode: neon rgb”, “size: 1.37 mb”, and bottom text “status: timeless.”; include a glowing wireframe globe graphic on the right side of this panel and a small heart outline in the lower right. Window 3, lower right: a notepad window titled “untitled - notepad” with menu items “file”, “edit”, “format”, “view”, “help”, containing the text “maybe the stars / are just windows / to other worlds. / / -vvg”.

Style constraints: make the whole image look like a nostalgic early-2000s vaporwave desktop interface merged with expressive oil paint; use luminous edges, transparent purple panels, crisp readable white pixel text, soft CRT glow, and no modern flat design. Keep all visible text exactly as specified and avoid adding extra windows, characters, logos, or watermarks.
title: Y2K Starry Night Desktop
description: A detailed prompt for creating a neon Y2K Windows-style desktop remix of Van Gogh’s The Starry Night with cyberpunk UI panels.

content:
Goal: Create a Y2K futurist remix of Leonardo da Vinci's Mona Lisa as a retro computer desktop wallpaper, blending Renaissance portraiture with glossy cyber aesthetics.

Canvas: 4:3 landscape image, 1024×768 feel, full-screen composition with a translucent Windows 98 / early-2000s operating system interface overlaid on top of a purple sci-fi city at sunset.

Main subject: Center the {argument name="character name" default="Mona Lisa"} from the waist up, posed like the original painting with folded hands, calm enigmatic smile, soft sfumato face, and dark wavy hair. She wears reflective chrome sunglasses resting on her head, small hair clips, dangling earrings, a metallic orbital choker necklace, a lavender zip-front futuristic top, and a transparent iridescent plastic jacket with glossy folds. Keep the classical Renaissance face texture visible but modernize everything around her with Y2K cyber fashion.

Background: Replace the Tuscan landscape with a dreamy futuristic waterfront city at dusk. Use tall needle-like skyscrapers, hovering ring structures, distant illuminated towers, pink-purple clouds, reflective water, and tiny blue-magenta lights. The palette is lavender, violet, chrome, rose gold, and electric blue with soft bloom and slight CRT grain.

Desktop UI overlays: Use translucent glassmorphism windows with glowing violet borders, pixel fonts, beveled buttons, and subtle scanline artifacts. Include exactly 5 visible interface groups:
1. Top-left Paint window titled “untitled - Paint,” with menu words “File Edit View Image Colour Help,” a vertical tool palette, and a row of small color swatches at the bottom; inside the canvas is the futuristic skyline.
2. Left-middle music player titled “now playing,” showing a purple CD icon, the track text “back to renaissance” and “da vinci remix,” plus playback controls.
3. Left-side vertical launcher dock with exactly 6 labeled icons: “internet,” “e-mail,” “msn,” “music,” “shop,” and “files.”
4. Top-right system profile window headed “MONA.LISA,” with a wireframe head graphic and biometric text: “heartbeat: 88 bpm,” “mood: enigmatic,” “location: italy, 1503,” “remixed in the year 3000,” and “© da vinci.exe.”
5. Bottom-right Notepad window titled “untitled - notepad,” with menus “File Edit Format View Help” and the poem text: “in a world / full of filters / be timeless / --M.L.”

Additional objects: On the right side, place a chrome table with a reflective glass sphere and a star-shaped chrome ornament, both matching the Y2K futuristic look.

Bottom taskbar: Add a translucent purple Windows-style taskbar spanning the full bottom edge, with a star “start” button on the left and the time “3:33 AM” on the right.

Visual style: Hyper-detailed digital painting with Renaissance realism, glossy plastic, chrome reflections, holographic purple UI, dreamy vaporwave lighting, retrofuturistic Y2K cyber aesthetic, soft film grain, subtle pixel/CRT texture, and high polish. Make the image look like a timeless old-master portrait running inside a futuristic early-internet desktop.

Constraints: Preserve the iconic Mona Lisa pose and expression, keep all text legible, do not add extra UI groups beyond the 5 listed, avoid modern flat UI styling, avoid watermarks.
title: Y2K Futurist Mona Lisa Desktop
description: Generates a glossy retrofuturistic Mona Lisa remix as a purple Y2K computer desktop wallpaper with translucent UI windows.

content:
Goal: Create a surreal Y2K-futurist Windows XP desktop remix of Edvard Munch’s The Scream, as if the painting is the actual computer wallpaper and the OS interface is floating on top.

Canvas: 4:3 desktop screenshot, 1024×768 feel, glossy late-1990s/early-2000s computer UI. Dominant palette is neon violet, ultraviolet, magenta, electric blue, black chrome, and orange sunset highlights. Everything should glow with CRT bloom, glassy transparency, scanline-like softness, and cyberpunk reflections.

Background wallpaper: Reimagine {argument name="painting subject" default="Edvard Munch’s The Scream"} as a futuristic neon harbor scene. The iconic bridge walkway runs from the lower left toward the center, wet and mirror-reflective with bright purple light strips. The sky is a swirling expressionist vortex of luminous purple, pink, orange, and blue strokes, like liquid fiber-optic trails. A futuristic city skyline rises across the water with glowing towers and reflections. Two dark human silhouettes stand on the bridge at left. In the lower center foreground, include the screaming figure in a glossy black chrome robe, hands raised to its face; the face area is covered by a flat muted mauve-gray rectangular block, like an intentional censor or missing image placeholder.

Desktop shell: Add a vertical icon column on the far left with exactly 8 desktop icons, each glowing purple-blue with small white lowercase labels: 1) my computer, 2) internet, 3) e-mail, 4) msn, 5) music, 6) pictures, 7) settings, 8) help, plus a trash can icon near the bottom labeled trash. Use chunky Y2K icon styling with glass orb effects.

Taskbar: Along the bottom, create a translucent purple Windows XP-style taskbar. On the far left is a rounded Start button with the Windows logo and the label {argument name="start button text" default="start"}. On the far right system tray, include tiny status icons and the clock reading {argument name="clock time" default="11:11 PM"}.

Open windows: Include exactly 4 floating translucent purple application windows with pixel fonts, beveled borders, and small minimize/maximize/close buttons.

Window 1, upper left: A Microsoft Paint-style window titled “untitled - Paint”. It has a menu bar reading “File  Edit  View  Image  Options  Help”, a vertical tool palette on the left, a small canvas showing a mini version of the neon harbor skyline and swirling sky, and a color palette strip along the bottom with many purple, pink, blue, and gray swatches.

Window 2, upper right: A music player window titled “now playing”. It shows square album art of a neon city grid, the track information: “scream.wav”, “the angst mixtape”, “track 03”. Add a waveform visualization, progress time “01:42 / 03:24”, a progress bar, and three playback controls: previous, pause, next.

Window 3, middle right: A system info window titled “system.exe”. Text inside should read: “THE SCREAM.EXE”, “artist: edvard munch”, “year: 1893”, “remixed in: 3000”, “resolution: 1024x1280”, “color mode: neon rgb”, “size: 1.42 mb”, “status: existential”. Include a glowing purple wireframe skull/head graphic on the right and a segmented loading bar along the bottom.

Window 4, lower right: A notepad window titled “untitled - notepad”. Menu bar reads “File  Edit  Format  View  Help”. Body text reads exactly: “nothing is real”, “but the signal”, “and the scream”, blank line, “-//user”.

Visual style: {argument name="style phrase" default="Y2K futurism, cyberpunk vaporwave, translucent Windows XP interface, neon expressionist oil-paint texture"}. Make the interface crisp enough to read, but integrate it with the painterly, swirling neon environment. Use intense glossy reflections, purple rim lighting, glass panels, pixelated UI typography, and nostalgic early-internet aesthetics.

Constraints: No modern flat design, no photorealistic people, no extra windows beyond the 4 specified, no extra desktop icons beyond the listed icons and trash, no watermark, preserve the legibility of all visible UI text.
title: Y2K Futurist Scream Desktop
description: Generates a neon Windows XP-style desktop remix of The Scream with vaporwave UI windows, icons, and cyberpunk expressionist scenery.
