content:
Goal: Create a square futuristic medical-status illustration for a cute star mascot, styled like a sci-fi HUD screen about a migraine episode.

Canvas: 1:1 square image, dark navy blue background with glowing cyan interface borders, subtle scanlines, neon UI accents, high contrast, clean digital illustration.

Main layout: A large central hospital-bed scene framed by a transparent holographic medical dashboard. At the top, display a big glowing English headline: “STATUS : MIGRAINE”. In the top-right corner add small text “MEDICAL LOG : HOSHI-CHAN” with a tiny plus sign. Under the headline, place two lines of Japanese message text: “昨日は片頭痛で寝込んでおりました。” and “久しぶりに大変きつうございました。” with the phrase “大変きつう” highlighted in cyan.

Subject details: In the center, show {argument name="character name" default="Hoshi-chan"} as a simple white five-point star mascot lying in bed under a blue plaid blanket. The star has tiny black dot eyes, a small straight mouth, and one blue teardrop of sweat on the right cheek, looking exhausted. Around the head, draw exactly 8 red-orange migraine pain symbols: 5 jagged lightning zigzags and 3 spiral squiggles. Behind the character are blue pillows and a dim bedroom setting. Include exactly 2 bedside objects: a dark bedside lamp on the left table and a small glass of water beside it. On the right side, include a tissue box with one white tissue sticking out.

HUD elements: Add a left vertical sidebar with exactly 5 icons from top to bottom: white star icon, horizontal menu lines, heartbeat line, bar chart, small dot. Add a compact right-side pain monitor card with a red warning triangle, red heartbeat waveform, label “PAIN LEVEL”, and a row of red segmented bars almost full.

Bottom information area: Use exactly 3 stacked glowing cyan status rows. Row 1 has a red warning triangle icon and Japanese text “状態異常：片頭痛 / 強制睡眠 / 食欲低下”, plus a small red heartbeat waveform on the right. Row 2 has a cyan capsule pill icon and Japanese text “服薬：片頭痛薬”, plus a circular cyan checkmark on the right. Row 3 has a cyan calendar icon and Japanese text “2026/05/30：痛みと睡眠で終わりました”, plus a tiny pixel-art white star mascot on the right.

Footer: Add small centered text “HOSHICHAN SYSTEM” above larger “REST MODE”. Include decorative cyan diagonal ticks, a small pixel heart icon in the lower left, and a crescent moon with a plus sign in the lower right.

Visual style: Cute but clinical cyber-medical dashboard, anime mascot simplicity, deep blue monochrome lighting with cyan neon UI and red-orange pain accents. Soft glow, crisp vector-like interface lines, legible typography, no photorealism.

Customization: The main diagnosis should remain {argument name="status text" default="MIGRAINE"}; the date line should use {argument name="date" default="2026/05/30"}; the two-line message should preserve {argument name="Japanese message" default="昨日は片頭痛で寝込んでおりました。\n久しぶりに大変きつうございました。"}.

Constraints: Keep all visible text sharp and readable, use exactly 3 bottom status rows and exactly 8 red-orange pain symbols, do not add extra characters, watermarks, logos, or unrelated UI panels.
title: Cute Star Migraine HUD
description: A square cyber-medical dashboard illustration showing a cute star mascot resting in bed with migraine status logs, useful for social posts or character health updates.

content:
Goal: Create a square screenshot of a dark AI image-generation web interface showing a generated Minecraft gameplay screenshot. The interface should look like someone typed {argument name="user prompt" default="Generate a screenshot as if I'm playing Minecraft."} and received a rendered game image below it.

Canvas: Square 1:1 image, approximately 576 by 576 pixels, dark black background, with the content aligned near the top-left and a large empty black margin on the right and bottom.

Top UI layout: At the very top-left, show the white prompt text: “Generate a screenshot as if I'm playing Minecraft.” Beneath it, show a small blue label “Model” with a vertical three-dot menu icon beside it. Below that, draw a wide dark rounded rectangle dropdown bar containing the blue text “Thinking” and a small downward chevron. The UI should feel like a minimal web app in dark mode.

Generated image panel: Under the dropdown, place a large square Minecraft-style gameplay screenshot with slightly rounded corners. The screenshot should be first-person perspective in a bright blocky village scene.

Minecraft scene details: Show a sunny daytime village with a blue sky and exactly 8 visible white blocky cloud clusters. On the left foreground, include a partially visible wooden-and-cobblestone house with a wooden door, plank roof, cobblestone wall, and a lit torch. In the center distance, show a gray stone church/tower with narrow yellow-lit windows. Around it, include a small village house, a leafy green tree, grass blocks, a dirt path, and a fenced crop field. The crop field should contain golden wheat, green crops, a wooden fence border, and exactly 6 visible torch posts with yellow flames around the village/farm area. Keep the Minecraft aesthetic authentic: cubic blocks, pixelated textures, low-resolution game rendering, no photorealism.

First-person HUD and equipment: In the lower left foreground, show a raised shield. In the lower right foreground, show the player holding an iron sword. Along the bottom, draw the Minecraft HUD with exactly 10 red hearts, exactly 10 hunger drumsticks, a green experience level number “18,” and a 9-slot hotbar. The hotbar should contain these 9 visible slots from left to right: shield icon, iron sword, pickaxe, axe, shovel, empty or dark slot, stack of 64 blocks, stack of 23 torches/items, stack of 17 items, plus a water bucket icon visible at the far right edge if space permits. Make the HUD slightly pixelated and game-accurate.

Visual style: The whole image should look like an actual screenshot of a browser-based AI generator displaying a generated Minecraft gameplay image, not a clean standalone render. Use dark UI chrome, small crisp text, and a blocky game screenshot embedded inside it. No watermark, no extra captions, no logos.
title: Minecraft Gameplay in AI Generator UI
description: A dark web app screenshot showing a generated first-person Minecraft village gameplay scene with HUD, useful for recreating the tweet-style AI game screenshot.

content:
Goal: Create a dark futuristic mobile web app screen for a custom trading card generator called {argument name="app name" default="CARDIFY"}, showing one completed fantasy TCG card ready to finalize.

Canvas: Vertical smartphone screenshot, 720×1200 style aspect ratio, black and charcoal background with thin neon cyan divider lines and rounded borders. Overall look is premium cyberpunk UI mixed with high-detail fantasy card art.

Layout: Top navigation bar contains exactly 3 visible elements: a large stylized CARDIFY logo on the left, a circular neon cyan shopping cart icon near the upper right, and a neon cyan three-line hamburger menu icon at the far right. Below it is a centered card preview inside a thin cyan rounded rectangle panel. Under the card preview, show small gray monospace text reading “Tap to flip card”. At the bottom, place exactly 3 action buttons: a large cyan-outlined rectangular button labeled “Finalize →”, a smaller yellow-outlined square button with a wrench icon, and a smaller purple-outlined square button with a download icon.

Trading card design: The card is a vertical fantasy collectible card with rounded corners, ornate red-gold metallic frame, glowing crimson highlights, and electric purple energy curling around the border. The card title bar at the top reads {argument name="card title" default="The Moosk"} in large white serif type. On the right side of the title bar are exactly 3 circular mana/type icons: a skull icon, a red dragon/swirl icon, and a blue water droplet icon. The lower type bar reads {argument name="type line" default="Legendary Creature — Human Rogue"} in gold serif text, with a small star-like rarity emblem to its right. The flavor text box below reads {argument name="flavor text" default="He walks between worlds."} in italic white serif type. The bottom-right power/toughness badge reads {argument name="power toughness" default="5/4"} in large bold white numerals.

Main card artwork: A dramatic anime-fantasy illustration of a lone male rogue viewed from behind, standing on a rocky cliff at sunset. He has short dark hair, dark armor, and a huge tattered black cloak streaming leftward in the wind. He holds a glowing orange-red sword pointed downward in his right hand. In the distance is a luminous ocean horizon with a large setting sun, red and purple clouds, and a dark spired fantasy city near the water. Purple lightning arcs and magical energy ribbons surround the character and frame, with red sparks scattered through the cloak and foreground. Use extremely detailed painterly digital art, high contrast, cinematic lighting, saturated magenta, violet, crimson, orange, and gold.

Constraints: Keep the screen as a mobile app mockup, not a standalone card. Use exactly 1 trading card preview, exactly 3 top navigation elements, exactly 3 mana/type icons, and exactly 3 bottom action buttons. Preserve all visible UI text clearly. Do not add extra cards, popups, watermarks, or unrelated interface panels.
title: Cyberpunk Fantasy Trading Card App
description: Generates a mobile app mockup displaying a customizable fantasy trading card with ornate card art and neon action controls.

content: Generate a paper-based line drawing visual work based on a specific theme. The image is first established by extremely fine, slightly shaky hand-drawn lines to build space, subject outline, structural transitions, paths, and scale relationships. Then, a few high-purity color surfaces are introduced only to the most critical recognition planes, connection nodes, emotional pauses, and centers of gravity; color is not a full fill but acts as precise annotations to edit attention. The overall visual area is dominated by warm off-white paper and black fine lines. Paper texture, tiny spots, and a slight scan feel should be clearly present. Ample white space is reserved above or around to make the subject appear as if observed in a page of a travel manuscript. Visual weight is concentrated in the middle or lower-middle part, maintaining breathable distance around the subject. The composition consists of a clear anchor, a low-density environment layer, and a few colored nodes. The core object maintains recognizable structural lines, outlines, local hatching, and compressed details. Details gather along edges, openings, corners, and movement paths. Volume and shadows are achieved through fine hatching and varying line density. Background appears as a low-density line-art memory layer. Added tiny figures or symbols serve as scale 'noise' to give a sense of life and usage. If text is needed, use narrow, restrained annotation-style fonts. The final surface shows the finish of pen line drawing, colored pencil, or light ink overlay, with quiet, open, manual textures and slight perspective errors. Theme: {argument name="subject" default="Close-up of the Great Hall of the People"} Aspect Ratio: {argument name="ratio" default="1:2"} Usage: {argument name="usage" default="Mobile wallpaper"}
title: Hand-Drawn Linear Sketch Art
description: A complex prompt for generating delicate line drawings on paper with precise color annotations and a manuscript feel.

content:
Goal: Create a cinematic vertical tech poster about searching historical conversation threads by content and branch name in a developer app.

Canvas: Vertical 2:3 composition, dark premium editorial style, deep navy-black background with subtle star-like dust and a warm golden beam of light entering from the upper right.

Main text: At the top center, large bold Chinese headline {argument name="headline text" default="按内容与分支搜历史线程"}. Below it, centered smaller gold subtitle {argument name="app version" default="Codex App 26.527"}. Add a tiny decorative divider line with a small diamond under the subtitle.

Main subject: In the lower half, show an old dark metal archive filing cabinet at a three-quarter angle, with one drawer pulled open toward the viewer. Main subject: A transparent floating glass Windows-style application panel angled slightly in perspective, hovering above the reflective base. The panel has rounded corners, beveled glowing edges, a faint frosted-glass surface, and a small Windows logo in the upper-left corner. Interface details: Inside the glass panel, show a minimal dark UI with a left sidebar containing exactly 6 icons stacked vertically: menu, home, document, folder, grid, and settings. Add a content area with faint horizontal text bars on the upper left, a large central rectangle, and a stylized keyboard outline across the lower area. Keep the UI semi-transparent and understated.

Robotic interaction: Show exactly 2 chrome robotic hands emerging through circular glowing portals in the glass interface. Hand 1 is in the upper-right content area, extended forward and pointing at a bright cursor-click glow near a white mouse pointer. Hand 2 is lower-left, hovering over the virtual keyboard and pressing one illuminated key. The robot hands should be highly detailed polished metal with articulated joints, cool blue reflections, and subtle motion-like light streaks around the portals.

Overall palette should be dark navy, charcoal, silver chrome, frosted glass, and electric cyan. Make the image elegant, atmospheric, and technically polished.

Constraints: Keep the composition clean and centered; include exactly 2 text lines, exactly 2 robotic hands, exactly 6 sidebar icons, and exactly 3 window controls. Do not add logos other than the simple Windows-style mark, do not add extra paragraphs or watermark, and avoid cluttered UI text.

Header: Center the title at the top with a small stacked multicolor document icon to its left. Add a thin horizontal divider line below the header. In the upper-right area, place a compact rounded button labeled “↑ 图库索引”.

Show exactly 12 visible gallery cards: 8 full cards in the first two rows and 4 partially visible cards in the third row at the bottom edge. Each card contains a white research-paper-style thumbnail image, a bold lettered title underneath, and three small dark rounded tag pills below the title reading exactly “landscape”, “high”, and “Curated”.

Visible card count and labels: Card A: “患者队列与多模态生物标志物流称流程”, thumbnail showing a patient cohort workflow with boxes, charts, and a survival curve. Card B: “单细胞免疫图谱”, thumbnail showing a single-cell immune atlas with UMAP clusters, dot plot, stacked bar chart, and trajectory plot. Card C: “多模态医疗 AI 方法图”, thumbnail showing a multimodal foundation model clinical decision support diagram with medical image, pathology, text, and model blocks. Card D: “治疗响应统计图”, thumbnail showing therapeutic response statistics with bar charts, forest plots, scatter plot, and a circular workflow. Card E: “Transformer 编码器-解码器架构”, thumbnail showing a transformer encoder-decoder architecture diagram with stacked module blocks. Card F: “多智能体 LLM 系统架构”, thumbnail showing an LLM multi-agent system architecture with central model block, surrounding tool icons, memory, reflection, and evaluation modules. Card G: “去噪扩散正/逆向链”, thumbnail showing a denoising diffusion forward and reverse process chain with noisy image panels and arrows. Card H: “经验缩放规律图”, thumbnail showing empirical scaling laws with multiple descending colored curves and a legend. Bottom partially visible card 1: title begins “Benchmark comparison across 10 frontier LLMs”, thumbnail with bar chart comparisons. Bottom partially visible card 2: title begins “Ablation of core reasoning components across 5 benchmarks”, thumbnail with grouped bars. Bottom partially visible card 3: title begins “LLM pretraining data mixture and downstream splits”, thumbnail with stacked area/data mixture blocks. Bottom partially visible card 4: title begins “Representative multi-head attention patterns in a 16-layer Transformer”, thumbnail with heatmaps.

Visual style: Use a modern SaaS dashboard aesthetic, dark mode, neat academic curation feel, subtle cyan accents, small but legible labels, and realistic research figure thumbnails that resemble high-quality journal diagrams. Keep thumbnails varied but consistently white-background scientific figures.

Constraints: Preserve the Chinese interface labels and card titles as written. Do not add people, photos, watermarks, browser address bars, or decorative clutter. The composition should feel like a screenshot of a curated research-figure template library named {argument name="project name" default="GPT-IMAGE-2-SKILL"}.

Layout: Split composition. Left two-thirds contain the typography and social ID. Right third contains one large circular portrait medallion. The portrait circle has two concentric neon rings, magenta outer glow and cyan inner glow, positioned near the right edge and vertically centered.

Text content: Use exactly 4 visible text lines on the left: 1) large title “{argument name="character name" default="Retro Future Girl"}” in a tall elegant serif font with metallic pink-to-cyan gradient and subtle bevel; 2) smaller spaced-out subtitle “{argument name="creator role" default="Creator"}” in white futuristic sans serif; 3) magenta label “{argument name="social platform label" default="X / Social ID"}”; 4) white monospaced handle “{argument name="social handle" default="@Retro_Future_Girl_666"}”. Place thin neon divider lines under the subtitle and around the social handle area, with small angled endpoints and one tiny magenta dot accent.

Subject details: Inside the circular portrait, show exactly 1 anime-style retro-future girl from the shoulders up. She has vivid pink bob-cut hair, cyberpunk mechanical armor, a robotic cybernetic hand raised near her face, and a dark futuristic city interface background with cyan light details. Cover the center of her face with exactly 1 opaque square block in muted magenta-purple, aligned over the eyes and nose, as if a deliberate avatar privacy placeholder.

Decorative elements: Include exactly 2 small sets of diagonal neon hatch marks, one centered near the top border and one centered near the bottom border, each set containing 5 short slanted bars. Use thin cyan and magenta HUD linework, glossy edge highlights, and a premium metallic holographic feel.

Visual style: High-contrast cyberpunk, clean creator card / digital business card design, sharp vector-like typography, anime illustration in the portrait, neon glow, metallic texture, futuristic UI frame. No extra logos, no QR code, no additional text beyond the 4 specified lines.
title: Cyberpunk AI Creator Card

content:
Goal: Create a futuristic cyberpunk AI creator business card for {argument name="character name" default="Machine Musk"}, combining a dark brushed-metal interface layout with neon magenta and cyan lighting.

Canvas: Horizontal 16:9 business-card style composition, wide rectangular card with rounded corners, beveled metallic border, tiny screw details in the corners, black brushed aluminum texture, glowing cyan accents on the left and glowing hot-pink accents on the right and bottom edge.

Layout: Split the card into two main zones. The left 45% is an information panel with logo, name, title, and contact rows. The right 55% is a dramatic anime cyberpunk character portrait inside an angled polygon frame. Add thin neon circuit lines, HUD-like separators, and geometric panels connecting the left contact rows to the right portrait frame.

Branding and text: At top left, place a chrome 3D emblem logo shaped like the letter “M” inside a hexagonal neon cyan-and-magenta frame. Below it, set the large stylized headline “{argument name="brand name" default="Machine Musk"}” in sharp italic sci-fi lettering, with “Machine” in metallic white and “Musk” in electric magenta. Under the headline, place the spaced subtitle “{argument name="title" default="DARKHERO"}” in white uppercase letters. Use clean, readable futuristic sans-serif typography.

Contact section: Include exactly 5 horizontal contact rows on the lower left, each with a neon-outlined hexagonal icon at the far left and white contact text to the right. The 5 rows are: 1) magenta envelope icon with “{argument name="email" default="hello@machinemusk.ai"}”; 2) cyan globe icon with “www.machinemusk.ai”; 3) magenta Twitter bird icon with “@MachineMuskAI”; 4) cyan Discord icon with “discord.gg/machinemusk”; 5) magenta YouTube play icon with “@MachineMuskAI”. Each row should sit on a thin glowing horizontal line with alternating cyan and magenta accents.

Character details: On the right side, show an anime-style futuristic cyborg or dark hero with short messy white hair, a white high-collar armored jacket, black mechanical components, tubes, cables, and glossy robotic details. The character wears a large white VR visor or cyber mask over the eyes, with small black technical markings. The background behind the character is a blurred neon city at night with vertical signs and bokeh lights in blue, cyan, purple, and pink. Add a large opaque dark slate-gray square censor block over the center-right of the character’s face and upper torso, covering much of the visor and chest area.

Visual style: High-contrast glossy sci-fi illustration, cyberpunk anime, premium creator card, metallic bevels, neon rim lighting, glassy reflections, crisp UI lines, cinematic lighting, dark background, saturated magenta and cyan glow. Make the final image look like a polished GPT-image-2 ready creator card or digital name card mockup.

Constraints: Keep all text sharp and legible, use exactly 5 contact rows, preserve the dark metallic cyberpunk palette, avoid extra logos or watermarks, and maintain a professional business-card composition.
title: Cyberpunk AI Creator Business Card

content:

Canvas: Wide landscape card, 16:9 ratio, black base with rounded corners and a thick glossy holographic chrome border. Use high contrast neon magenta, cyan, white, black, and small yellow accents. The whole card should feel like a premium metallic collectible trading card or futuristic creator ID.

Layout: Left side contains the main identity typography and social information; right side contains the character illustration. Use exactly 4 main text zones: 1 top-left small title bar reading “STREET CULTURE CREATOR”, 1 huge metallic Japanese display name reading “くまごろうちゃん”, 1 white chrome-framed role plate reading “空手家”, and 1 bottom-left social ID box with magenta label “X / SOCIAL ID” and large handle “@marry_666”. Add a dark oversized graffiti-style background word behind the main name, reading “KUMAGORO”, partly obscured by the foreground typography.

Subject details: On the right, draw one dynamic anime-style female street creator riding a panda-themed motorcycle/scooter. She has vivid pink hair flowing outward, a red scarf sweeping to the right, a yellow sleeveless outfit, black gloves, and large headphones. Her face is covered by a square privacy blur/mosaic block. The vehicle front is shaped like a cute glossy panda head with black panda eye circles, shiny lens-like mechanical eyes, chrome highlights, and cyberpunk blue lighting. Add a small panda-ear helmet or panda mascot head above the blurred face area.

Graphic elements: Include exactly 6 decorative feature types: neon magenta crown doodle above the main title area, cyan handwritten graffiti text reading “PANDA POWER”, chrome diagonal racing stripes, black-and-white checker pattern near the bottom, paint splatter strokes in magenta/cyan/yellow, and a comic sticker at bottom-right reading “GO! FAST!” in magenta, cyan, white, and yellow lightning styling.

Visual style: Ultra-detailed glossy gpt-image-2 illustration, metallic 3D chrome Japanese typography, holographic reflections, layered graffiti textures, anime character rendering, street racing energy, sharp highlights, lens flares, sparkles, ink splashes, dense but readable composition.

Customizable fields: Use creator category {argument name="creator category" default="STREET CULTURE CREATOR"}, main Japanese name {argument name="main name" default="くまごろうちゃん"}, role label {argument name="role label" default="空手家"}, social handle {argument name="social handle" default="@marry_666"}, and theme slogan {argument name="theme slogan" default="PANDA POWER"}.

Constraints: Keep all visible text crisp and correctly spelled, preserve the four main text zones, use one character and one panda vehicle only, keep the face intentionally obscured by a square privacy blur, no extra logos, no watermark.

content:
Goal: Create a futuristic AI creator card / digital business card for a bee-themed creator named {argument name="creator name" default="Honey"}, combining luxury black metal, hot pink neon linework, and warm honey amber photography.

Canvas: Horizontal rounded-rectangle card, 16:9 aspect ratio, dark black brushed-metal background with subtle leather/grain texture, beveled corners, thin glowing pink border lines, cyberpunk UI accents, and a premium collectible badge feel.

Layout: Split composition with 2 main areas. Left area takes about 52% of the card and contains the identity typography and profile fields. Right area takes about 48% and contains a large angular photo window with a bee-themed portrait. Add small decorative circuit lines, dotted marks, hexagon motifs, thin brackets, and glowing magenta strokes around the card edges.

Left area details: At top left, place a hexagonal icon containing a simple bee symbol, with a small dripping honey effect under the hexagon. Below it, place a huge elegant serif name in glossy pink gradient text: {argument name="creator name" default="Honey"}. Add a small sparkle star near the final letter and a flowing underline flourish beneath the name. Under the name, create exactly 3 labeled information bars with thin neon pink outlines and small left-side icons:
1. Label “TITLE”, value “蜂蜜職人”.
2. Label “X / SOCIAL ID”, value {argument name="social id" default="@Honey_daisuki_09"}.
3. Label “CATCHPHRASE”, value {argument name="catchphrase" default="蜂蜜は世界を救う"}.
Use white text for the field values, small uppercase pink labels, and techno-style divider ticks at the right ends of the bars.

Right photo window: Create one large cropped angular polygon frame with neon pink border and amber glow. Inside it, show a young female honeybee cosplay creator in a warm honeycomb environment: fuzzy brown bee hood with two black antennae, translucent insect wings, pink hair, sleeveless fuzzy brown top, yellow-and-black striped skirt, leaning forward in a cute pose. The background should be golden orange with honeycomb cells, dripping honey, glowing bokeh, and macro hive details. Keep the face intentionally covered by a plain centered square privacy mask in warm brown, matching the generated example.

Badge: Add exactly 1 circular certification seal at the lower right corner overlapping the photo frame. It should be black and hot pink with a small bee icon in the center and readable ring text: “HONEY CERTIFIED” and “100% PURE”.

Visual style: High-detail photorealistic portrait mixed with graphic cyber card design, glossy holographic pink highlights, dark metallic luxury material, warm amber lighting, sharp UI lines, premium VTuber/creator business-card aesthetic.

Constraints: Use exactly 1 main portrait, exactly 1 top-left bee hexagon logo, exactly 3 information bars, and exactly 1 certification seal. Do not add extra people, extra cards, watermarks, QR codes, or unrelated text.
title: Honey Bee Creator Card
description: Generates a futuristic bee-themed AI creator business card with neon pink UI styling and a honeycomb portrait area.

content:
Goal: Create a three-panel vertical Japanese app promotion graphic for a romantic LINE-chat analysis app, using a soft pink dating aesthetic.

Canvas: Wide horizontal composition containing exactly 3 tall rounded-rectangle poster panels side by side, each like a smartphone ad card. Use a dreamy sunset cityscape background with pink clouds, bokeh lights, sparkles, floating hearts, and a warm romantic glow. Overall palette is blush pink, coral, white, and soft peach.

Panel 1: Left panel introduces compatibility analysis. Large Japanese headline at top: 「気になるあの人との 相性が わかる！」 with 「相性」 oversized in bright pink. Smaller copy below: 「LINEのトークを分析して、相性・会話の傾向・距離感をやさしく見える化するアプリ」. Show a blurred-face young couple standing close at lower left, and a tilted smartphone at lower right displaying a compatibility result screen with a large grade “A”, a pink radar chart, a score around 87, and detailed analysis cards. Add a pink heart badge over the couple reading 「トークから ふたりの相性を 見える化」. Add exactly 4 stacked feature cards at the bottom-left with icons and Japanese text: 1) Wi-Fi icon 「オフラインでも分析OK！」, 2) lock icon 「プライバシー重視の安心・安全設計」, 3) LINE chat icon 「LINEトークを読み込むだけ」, 4) robot icon 「AIがやさしく分析」.

Panel 2: Center panel focuses on relationship timeline. Large Japanese headline: 「ふたりの思い出が、ひと目でわかる」 with 「ひと目でわかる」 in bright pink. Smaller copy: 「はじめての会話や通話、関係の変化を見る化」. Center a front-facing smartphone showing an app screen titled like 「YUKAとの分析結果」 with a pink header and a vertical timeline list. Include exactly 4 floating white speech-bubble callouts with pink icons: 1) heart icon 「はじめてのトークがわかる」, 2) chat/phone icon 「通話やメッセージの記録が見える」, 3) calendar icon 「思い出のタイムラインをチェック」, 4) small heart/spark icon near the screen indicating memories. Keep the phone UI legible but stylized, with bottom navigation icons.

Panel 3: Right panel focuses on frequently used words. Large Japanese headline: 「相手がよく使っている言葉が 見えてくる」 with 「見えてくる」 in bright pink. Smaller copy: 「よく使うフレーズをまとめて見比べて、ふたりらしい言葉の傾向を見つけよう」. Center a front-facing smartphone showing a pink-and-white keyword dashboard with grouped pill tags and section bars for the user and partner. Add exactly 4 floating white callout bubbles with pink icons: 1) heart icon 「相手のことが見えてくる」, 2) clipboard icon 「よく使う言葉をまとめてチェック」, 3) two-person icon 「2人の共通フレーズもわかる」, 4) small heart bubble as decorative accent.

Visual style: Polished Japanese mobile app advertisement, cute romantic UI design, glossy smartphone mockups, rounded corners, soft shadows, subtle sparkles, hearts, and bokeh. Use a clean rounded Japanese sans-serif font; emphasize key headline words in hot pink while other text is dark charcoal. Faces in the couple photo should be intentionally blurred for privacy.

Constraints: Use exactly 3 poster panels, exactly 3 smartphones, exactly 4 feature cards in the first panel, and exactly 4 floating callouts in each of the second and third panels. Do not add extra panels, watermarks, QR codes, or brand logos beyond the LINE mention in the Japanese copy.
title: Japanese Romance App Ad Panels
description: A three-panel pink Japanese mobile app advertisement showcasing relationship compatibility, timeline memories, and frequently used words.

content:
Goal: Create a polished Japanese proposal-style idea sheet for a casual mobile puzzle game where players collect 3 matching pies to clear them, titled {argument name="headline text" default="パイを3つ集めて消す カジュアルゲーム 4テーマ案"}. The sheet should look like a cheerful game design concept board, with cute UI mockups and explanatory diagrams.

Canvas: Wide landscape 16:9 presentation sheet, warm cream background, thin rounded border, tiny sparkles and dessert decorations. Use a soft pastel kawaii illustration style with clean vector-like edges, subtle shadows, glossy game UI highlights, and high readability.

Layout: Divide the canvas into exactly 4 large rounded theme panels arranged in a 2×2 grid. Each panel has a numbered badge, a Japanese theme title banner, a smartphone gameplay mockup on the left, and instruction/example cards on the right. Add a bottom strip with exactly 4 short feature notes and icons.

Main title: At the top center, show a small pie icon followed by the large headline. Emphasize the number “4” in pink and add a small heart at the end.

Panel count and themes: Use exactly 4 theme concepts.
1. Pink dessert cafe theme titled {argument name="theme 1 title" default="ストロベリースイーツカフェ"}, with strawberry shortcakes, berry tarts, whipped cream, pink trays, and a cute bunny cafe mascot.
2. Yellow picnic theme titled {argument name="theme 2 title" default="アニマルピクニック"}, with a red-checkered picnic cloth, wicker basket tray, small animal friends, fruit pies, and sunny outdoor greenery.
3. Green fantasy woodland theme titled {argument name="theme 3 title" default="フェアリーフォレストベーカリー"}, with a magical forest bakery, mushrooms, lanterns, fairy-like character, berry pies, wooden tray, vines, leaves, and warm glowing lights.
4. Blue ocean dessert theme titled {argument name="theme 4 title" default="オーシャンデザートパーティー"}, with underwater pastel scenery, coral, shells, sea creatures, shell-shaped desserts, and a shell-decorated tray.

Smartphone mockups: Each of the 4 panels must include exactly 1 vertical phone screen on the left, for a total of 4 phones. Every phone shows a cute match-3-like pie collection game screen with a top HUD showing “Lv.15”, score “2,480”, and a pause button. In each game board, show many individual pies on a themed background, plus a bottom deck/tray with empty slots and a white hand cursor tapping or dragging a pie. Include a small yellow arrow indicating movement toward the tray.

Instruction cards: In each of the 4 panels, include a top explanation card headed “遊び方” with exactly 3 illustrated steps from left to right: tap a pie and put it into the deck, collect 3 of the same pie to clear them, and if the deck becomes full it is GAME OVER. Below it, include exactly 2 smaller example cards: one green/positive card labeled “3つそろえて消える例” showing 3 matching pies clearing with sparkles, and one red/warning card labeled “デッキがいっぱいの例” showing a full tray and the text “GAME OVER” with an exclamation warning icon.

Bottom strip: Add exactly 4 feature notes separated across the bottom, each with one icon: a hand icon with “かんたん操作 / タップだけのシンプル操作！”, a lightbulb icon with “3つそろえる爽快感！ / そろえるとパッと消えて気持ちいい♪”, a heart icon with “かわいいパイがいっぱい！ / 見ているだけで癒される4つの世界♪”, and a warning icon with “デッキが満杯になる前に / うまくそろえてハイスコアを目指そう！”.

Visual constraints: Keep all Japanese text crisp and legible, use rounded friendly fonts, maintain a consistent proposal-board layout, avoid photorealism, avoid dark or gritty styling, avoid extra panels, avoid extra phones, and do not add watermarks or logos.
title: Four Theme Pie Puzzle Game Sheet
description: Generates a cute Japanese proposal-style concept sheet for a casual mobile pie-matching game with four themed UI mockups.

content:
Goal: Create a polished device wallpaper showcase for {argument name="wallpaper subject" default="Tokyo Tower on a rainy night in Tokyo"}, presented as a premium tech mockup.

Canvas: Square 1:1 composition on a soft light-gray studio background, with three rounded white display cards casting subtle shadows.

Layout: Show exactly 3 devices: 1 large open laptop centered across the top card, 1 tablet on the bottom-left card, and 1 smartphone on the bottom-right card. The top card is the widest and contains the laptop front-on; the two bottom cards are smaller and aligned side by side with even spacing. All devices should display the same wallpaper image.

Wallpaper scene: A cinematic rainy Tokyo street at night, looking straight down a wet boulevard toward Tokyo Tower glowing bright orange in the center distance. Tall dark office buildings line both sides, with lit windows, streetlights, red traffic lights, car headlights, and vivid red-orange-blue reflections stretching across the rain-slick road. Deep blue stormy evening sky, high contrast, realistic photography style, symmetrical urban perspective.

Device details: The laptop is silver with a black bezel and a small top-center notch, seen frontally with a thin base visible. The tablet has a black rounded bezel in landscape orientation. The smartphone has a black rounded frame in portrait orientation with a pill-shaped dynamic island at the top.

Screen overlays: Add realistic lock-screen UI to all 3 devices. The laptop and tablet show the date text "Tuesday, May 20" above a large white time reading {argument name="lock screen time" default="9:38"}. The laptop also has small Wi-Fi and 100% battery indicators in the top-right and a thin white home indicator near the bottom. The tablet includes a compact weather widget on the left showing circular "100", "72°", "Cloudy", and small forecast text. The smartphone shows "Tuesday, May 20" above the large time, a small weather widget with "100" and "72° Cloudy", a circular widget icon on the right, plus flashlight and camera icons near the bottom.

Visual style: Ultra-clean Apple-like product presentation, realistic device render, glossy screens, soft ambient lighting, crisp edges, subtle depth, no people, no extra logos, no watermark, no surrounding clutter.
title: Rainy Tokyo Tower Device Mockup
description: Generates a clean multi-device wallpaper showcase featuring a rainy Tokyo Tower night scene for desktop, tablet, and phone previews.

content:
Goal: Create a sleek monochrome brand guidelines cover for {argument name="brand name" default="UtopikAI Studio"}, presenting it as a premium AI studio visual identity system.

Canvas: Square 1:1 format, black charcoal background with subtle grain, faint vignette, and thin technical drafting lines. Use a minimal futuristic editorial layout with generous negative space.

Layout: Add a very thin rectangular border close to the canvas edges, with tiny corner ticks, small crosshair marks at the top center, left middle, right middle, and bottom center, and faint dotted vertical guide marks near both side edges. In the upper left, place small spaced uppercase text “UTOPIKAI STUDIO”; in the upper right, place “BRAND GUIDELINES”. In the center, build a large geometric construction grid: a 2-by-2 square grid with faint circular arc segments and quarter-circle curves, like logo construction guides. Overlay the main logo lockup across the middle-lower portion of this grid.

Logo lockup: Use a white abstract icon to the left, made from four square tiles containing curved quarter-circle cutouts, forming a symmetrical modern mark. To the right, set the wordmark “UtopikAI” in bold clean geometric sans serif, bright white, with “Studio” smaller and lighter aligned under the right side of the wordmark. Count exactly 2 logo elements: 1 abstract icon and 1 two-line wordmark.

Main title area: In the lower left quadrant, place the large title {argument name="document title" default="Brand Kit"} in white, set in a clean modern sans serif. Directly beneath it, add the subtitle {argument name="subtitle text" default="Visual identity system"} in smaller muted gray text. Under the subtitle, add one short thin horizontal white line and one longer very faint gray line.

Footer: Along the bottom edge, add small technical footer labels: left “VERSION 1.0”, center “VISUAL IDENTITY SYSTEM”, and right {argument name="year" default="2024"}. Connect the footer area with thin angular drafting lines and subtle horizontal rules.

Visual style: Premium black-and-white brand kit cover, minimalist, tech-luxury, precise Swiss grid design, high contrast white typography, subtle gray construction lines, crisp vector-like rendering, no mockup perspective.

Constraints: Use exactly 5 main text groups: top-left studio label, top-right guidelines label, central logo lockup, lower-left title/subtitle block, and bottom footer metadata. Keep all text sharp and legible. Avoid extra colors, photos, people, shadows, or decorative clutter.
title: Monochrome AI Studio Brand Kit Cover
description: A premium black-and-white brand guidelines cover for an AI studio, useful for visual identity presentations and brand kit mockups.

content:
Goal: Create a clean Apple-style device wallpaper showcase featuring an anime-inspired water-breathing scene starring {argument name="character name" default="Tanjiro Kamado"}, suitable for phone, tablet, and desktop wallpaper previews.

Canvas: Square 1:1 promotional mockup on a soft light-gray background with subtle shadows. Place three rounded white display cards arranged in a neat grid: one large card across the top and two smaller cards below.

Layout: Show exactly 3 device mockups. 1) Top: a large silver laptop centered inside a wide rounded white card, open front-facing, with a thin black bezel and small top notch. 2) Bottom left: a landscape tablet inside a rounded white card. 3) Bottom right: a vertical smartphone inside a rounded white card. Keep generous spacing, soft drop shadows, and a premium minimal presentation.

Wallpaper artwork: The same {argument name="wallpaper scene" default="blue water vortex in a misty river valley"} appears on all three screens. The scene shows a small back-facing anime swordsman wearing a dark green and black checkered haori, standing ankle-deep in reflective water, facing a huge spiraling wave tunnel. Use dramatic Water Breathing energy: layered circular blue waves, splashes, foam, spray, and a bright pale center in the vortex. The environment is cold and misty, with rocky river shallows, dark stones, pine-covered cliffs, foggy mountains, and a blue-white winter palette. Make the wallpaper painterly, cinematic, detailed, and high contrast, with no gore and no extra characters.

Device screen details: Add subtle iOS/macOS lock-screen style overlays. On every device show the large white time {argument name="time" default="9:38"}. Add small date text above it reading {argument name="date text" default="Tuesday, May 20"}. Laptop screen includes small Wi-Fi and battery icons at the top right and a thin white home indicator near the bottom. Tablet screen includes the same large time plus a right-side widget stack with exactly 3 visible widgets: a circular battery widget marked 100, a weather widget showing 72°, and a small calendar/reminder style widget. Phone screen includes the time and date, faint widgets near the top, and exactly 2 bottom lock-screen buttons: flashlight on the left and camera on the right.

Visual style: Ultra-clean product mockup, realistic device hardware, crisp black glass bezels, rounded corners, soft ambient studio lighting, shallow shadows, high-resolution wallpaper art, cool blue tones, premium tech advertising composition.

Constraints: Use exactly 3 device mockups and exactly 3 white cards. Do not add logos, watermarks, captions, Chinese text, or extra promotional text outside the device screens. Keep the character small relative to the giant wave vortex so the scene feels epic and wallpaper-ready.
title: Water Breathing Device Wallpaper Mockup
description: Generates a premium three-device mockup showcasing an anime-inspired blue water vortex wallpaper for desktop, tablet, and phone.

content: Create a polished product mockup showing a cozy winter campfire wallpaper adapted across three Apple-style devices. The wallpaper illustration should resemble a cute Japanese crayon-anime style without logos: five small cartoon children and one small white dog gathered around a bright campfire in a snowy pine forest at night, with falling snow, deep navy-blue trees, warm orange firelight illuminating the characters and snow, and a soft magical winter atmosphere. The main character is a round-faced child in a red winter sweater standing behind the fire, surrounded by four friends: one with dark spiky hair on the left, one in a brown coat at lower left, one curly-haired child in pink on the right, and one child in a green hood at lower right; the white dog sleeps or curls up near the fire in front. Show exactly three devices on a light gray studio background, each inside a rounded white display card with soft shadows: one large laptop mockup centered at the top, one tablet mockup at bottom left, and one smartphone mockup at bottom right. On all screens, display the same wallpaper composition, cropped appropriately. Add realistic lock-screen UI overlays: large time {argument name="time" default="9:38"}, date {argument name="date" default="Friday, November 15"}, small status icons, and subtle translucent widgets. The tablet should include a translucent weather widget on the upper left showing {argument name="weather location" default="Cupertino"} and {argument name="temperature" default="45°"}; the phone should include three circular widgets below the time and two small bottom lock-screen icons. Use clean high-end Apple product rendering, black bezels, thin device frames, rounded corners, soft ambient shadows, sharp screen detail, and a balanced wallpaper-preview layout suitable for desktop, tablet, and mobile backgrounds. Avoid brand logos, watermarks, extra text, or additional devices.

content:
Goal: Create a clean promotional device mockup showing a cozy {argument name="wallpaper theme" default="Crayon Shin-chan winter snow scene"} wallpaper adapted across laptop, tablet, and phone screens.

Canvas: Square 1:1 composition, soft light-gray studio background, rounded white display cards with subtle shadows, high-resolution product-ad style.

Layout: Show exactly 3 devices in a balanced grid: 1 large silver laptop centered across the top, 1 black-bezel tablet at bottom left, and 1 black-edged smartphone at bottom right. Each device sits inside its own rounded white rectangular card. The laptop card is widest; the tablet and phone cards are smaller and aligned beneath it with a narrow gap between them.

Wallpaper scene: A soft watercolor/anime winter landscape with a snowy forest, pale misty sky, snow-covered evergreen trees, bushes, and a white snowy field. The scene should feel gentle, nostalgic, and cute, with falling snow and cool blue-white tones. In the foreground include exactly 6 cartoon figures from left to right: 1 bundled child in a dark blue winter hat and blue coat holding snow, 1 small girl in a pink winter outfit, 1 central mischievous boy in a red sweater and yellow shorts running happily with arms raised, 1 small blond child in a green outfit, 1 stocky child in a yellow shirt walking at the right, and 1 small white dog running near the center-right. Keep the characters in a playful Crayon Shin-chan anime style with simple rounded features and expressive poses.

Device details: The laptop is open front-facing with a thin black bezel, centered notch at the top of the screen, silver keyboard and trackpad visible. The tablet is landscape orientation with thick black bezel and rounded corners. The smartphone is vertical with a pill-shaped dynamic-island cutout and slim black frame.

Lock-screen overlays: Add subtle translucent iOS-style lock-screen UI on the devices. Use the time {argument name="lock screen time" default="9:38"} prominently in white or light gray. Use the date {argument name="lock screen date" default="Friday, November 15"} above the time. On the tablet, include a translucent weather widget block at upper left showing {argument name="weather text" default="Cupertino 45° Clear"} and three small circular widget icons beneath it. On the phone, include three small circular widgets under the time and two lock-screen icons near the bottom. Keep all UI text soft and semi-transparent so the wallpaper remains the focus.

Visual style: Premium Apple-like presentation, realistic device mockup lighting, soft shadows, rounded white cards, crisp screens, gentle winter palette, charming watercolor background, cute anime characters, no harsh contrast.

Constraints: Use exactly 3 devices and exactly 6 wallpaper characters/animals. Do not add extra characters, logos, watermarks, captions, or promotional text outside the device screens. The wallpaper must be visibly the same scene adapted to desktop, tablet, and phone crops.
title: Shin-chan Winter Device Wallpaper Mockup

content: Create a wide JRPG fantasy title logo splash screen for {argument name="character name" default="Hatsune Miku"}. Canvas: 16:9 horizontal white background, clean high-key presentation with no border. Main composition: huge ornate serif fantasy logo centered-left reading {argument name="main title text" default="HATSUNE MIKU"}, arranged on two lines with “HATSUNE” above “MIKU”; use metallic teal-to-white gradient letters, beveled 3D edges, sharp Gothic serifs, bright star glints, thin gold outlines, and subtle drop shadows. Add a small Japanese subtitle centered under the logo reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="初音ミク"}, flanked by tiny decorative sparkle ornaments. Character silhouette: on the right side, place a dark teal anime idol silhouette of Hatsune Miku in profile facing left, showing exactly 2 very long twin-tails flowing dramatically to the right and downward, with exactly 2 rectangular hair accessories accented in pink and cyan. Background fantasy elements: behind the logo add a pale gold circular magic crest with compass-like spokes and one tall spear-shaped ornament rising above the title; on the far right behind the silhouette add a distant dark teal Gothic castle skyline with multiple pointed towers. Decorative elements: add sweeping translucent aqua brushstroke waves curling around the logo and character, especially one large crescent stroke on the left and several ribbon-like hair/water strokes on the lower right; scatter small star sparkles, paint splashes, and a few pink petal-like fragments. Include a small magenta number {argument name="edition number" default="01"} near the lower right of the main logo. Visual style: elegant Japanese fantasy RPG key art, logo design focus, crisp vector-like typography mixed with watercolor splashes, luminous cyan and teal palette with pale gold accents, high detail, polished game-title presentation. Constraints: use exactly one character silhouette, one main two-line title, one Japanese subtitle, and one edition number; keep the background mostly white and uncluttered; no extra logos, no watermark, no frame.
title: JRPG Fantasy Title Logo Splash Screen
description: A specialized prompt for creating elegant Japanese fantasy RPG title screens with custom typography and character silhouettes.

content:
Create a realistic 2x2 comparison grid showing the same adult man with four different haircut options, intended as a “which haircut fits him best?” visual. Canvas: square image with four equal rectangular photo panels separated by thick clean white gutters and a thin white outer margin. Each panel shows the man from mid-torso upward, centered, facing camera, wearing the same medium-blue denim button-up shirt with an open collar and chest pocket. His face must be anonymized with a smooth vertical rectangular blur/mosaic patch in warm beige tones, covering all facial features but leaving ears, jawline, neck, and hair visible. Background in every panel is the same softly blurred, bright modern living room: white built-in bookshelves with books and decor, a dark TV on the left shelf area, green houseplants, a beige sofa with cushions on the right, warm wooden floor, and a large round paper pendant lamp near the upper center. Lighting is natural daylight, warm and realistic, shallow depth of field, DSLR portrait quality.

Layout and haircut count: show exactly 4 haircut variations, one per panel. Top-left: medium-length wavy dark brown hair, voluminous and swept back with loose texture. Top-right: short spiky textured crop, close sides, dark brown hair. Bottom-left: slicked-back undercut or taper, neat side volume, glossy combed-back top. Bottom-right: very short buzz cut, evenly cropped close to the scalp. Keep the same pose, shirt, body proportions, room, camera distance, and color grading across all four panels so only the hairstyle changes. No text, no labels, no logos, no watermark.
title: Four Haircut Comparison Grid
description: A realistic square 2x2 photo grid comparing four hairstyle options on the same anonymized man in a cozy living room.

content: With the attached subject as the protagonist, please summarize "{argument name="app type" default="a collection of screenshots for a realistic next-generation mobile app"}" into a single image. This is not an advertising poster. It is a high-quality visual such as an App Store introduction image, product design announcement, or UI case study. Accurately maintain the features, color, shape, face, clothing, and impression of the subject in the reference image. Treat the subject as the main content within the app. Do not change it to another character or product. Arrange {argument name="number of screens" default="4 to 6"} vertical smartphone screens. Make each screen different. Included screens: Home screen, detailed profile screen, analysis dashboard, collection screen, editing screen, sharing screen. UI elements: Fictional app name, tab bar, card UI, buttons, graphs, tags, short descriptions, numeric displays, icons, small notification displays. The design is a sophisticated 2026 mobile UI. Clean, practical, and with clear information design. Do not overuse glassmorphism. Text should be easy to read, primarily in English and short. Do not use real company names, app names, or logos. The background is a simple studio background. The overall look is professional like app introduction images on Dribbble, Product Hunt, or Apple. However, make it look natural as a fictional product. Priorities: UI that looks real, retention of reference image features, persuasiveness as a screenshot, and information density worthy of being saved on social media.

content:
Goal: Create an isometric vector illustration set of the same {argument name="character type" default="professional businesswoman presenter"} in many presentation and office situations, arranged like a clean pose library on a white background.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 canvas, bright white or very light gray background, no borders, no title, no captions, no watermark. Use soft oval gray floor shadows under each figure.

Visual style: Polished modern isometric people illustration, semi-flat vector style with subtle gradients and soft shading. The character has a simplified faceless face, light skin, brown hair tied in a low bun, navy business suit, white blouse, cropped trousers, and black high heels. Keep proportions consistent across all poses and use the same outfit throughout.

Layout: Arrange exactly 13 separate full-body figures in two rows with generous spacing, like a presentation asset sheet. Top row contains 7 figures; bottom row contains 6 figures. All figures face slightly different isometric angles and remain isolated with no overlapping.

Pose count and details: Include exactly 13 discrete poses: 1) standing presenter facing forward with one hand open in a welcoming gesture, 2) rear-view presenter pointing with a stick at a wall presentation board showing a pie chart and lines, 3) standing presenter holding a small object or remote and gesturing to the side, 4) standing presenter holding a remote in one hand and gesturing with the other, 5) walking businesswoman carrying a gray folder under one arm, 6) walking businesswoman holding a spiral notebook or report, 7) standing businesswoman gesturing as if speaking to someone, 8) standing figure raising one index finger to make a point, 9) standing figure holding up a spiral report sheet with chart lines, 10) standing figure with arms crossed confidently, 11) seated figure on a gray chair using an open laptop while gesturing, 12) leaning forward and pointing to papers or charts on the floor, 13) standing figure leaning slightly with one hand on hip and the other index finger raised.

Subject customization: Keep the character recognizable as the same person in every pose, but allow the overall character to be changed to {argument name="character appearance" default="light-skinned woman with brown hair in a low bun"}. Use {argument name="outfit" default="dark navy suit, white blouse, black heels"}. Optional props should match a {argument name="presentation theme" default="corporate business presentation"}. Keep the illustration clean, minimal, and presentation-ready.
title: Isometric Business Presenter Pose Set
description: A clean isometric vector asset sheet showing one business presenter in 13 office and presentation poses for slides, websites, and corporate graphics.

content:
Goal: Create a clean isometric character pose sheet showing {argument name="character role" default="a professional female presenter"} in multiple presentation and business-meeting situations.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 canvas with a light gray-white background, no borders, no title text, no watermark. Use generous spacing so each vignette reads as a separate pose.

Visual style: Minimal modern isometric vector illustration, soft shadows under every figure and object, muted corporate palette, smooth flat shading, subtle gradients, crisp edges. The character should have fair skin, dark brown hair in a low bun, simplified faceless features, and wear {argument name="outfit" default="a white skirt suit with white high heels"}. Props should be light gray and white with small blue-gray chart accents.

Layout: Arrange exactly 12 discrete isometric vignettes in two rows of six, evenly spaced across the canvas. Keep the scale consistent and show the character from varied isometric angles.

Vignettes, exactly 12:
1. Front-facing woman standing and speaking into a handheld black microphone, one arm gesturing outward.
2. Rear-view woman standing behind a white podium with a gooseneck microphone.
3. Woman pointing at a transparent presentation board showing one pie chart and three vertical bar charts.
4. Woman standing with a dark tablet or clipboard held at chest height.
5. Woman walking while carrying a dark briefcase in one hand.
6. Woman walking quickly while holding a stack of folders and documents.
7. Rear three-quarter woman standing and gesturing to an unseen audience.
8. Woman holding a handheld microphone while presenting with an open-palmed gesture.
9. Woman standing confidently with one arm raised and index finger pointing upward.
10. Woman standing with one hand raised high as if asking or answering a question.
11. Woman seated at or standing behind a podium setup with a chair visible behind, speaking into a gooseneck microphone.
12. Woman leaning over a low table or desk with printed charts, reviewing or arranging presentation papers.

Additional presentation furniture and props: Include exactly 3 separate white podiums with black gooseneck microphones, 1 transparent chart board, 1 low desk/table with papers, 1 chair, 1 handheld microphone in the first vignette, 1 handheld microphone in the eighth vignette, 1 tablet/clipboard, 1 briefcase, and 1 stack of documents. Avoid any readable text or logos.

Add a top bar with the local address on the left and exactly 3 small window/control icons on the right. Content area: create a gallery-style UI with Chinese poster/card designs inside rounded white panels. content: Create a clean flat vector illustration of a modern collaborative office scene on a warm cream background. Canvas: Portrait-oriented screenshot on a white page, approximately 768 × 984 px, with generous margins and a very light gray horizontal rule near the top.

Under the artwork, add exactly 3 lower content elements: 1 source line, 1 prompt label line, and 1 pale gray code-style prompt box.

Main artwork: Generate an old-master oil painting parody of {argument name="painting subject" default="Mona Lisa"} drinking {argument name="drink brand" default="Coca-Cola"}. The figure is seated in the classic Mona Lisa pose with dark brown hair, Renaissance clothing, folded lower hand, and a misty landscape background in muted green, brown, and ochre tones. The left hand holds a red soda can near the mouth, with the white Coca-Cola script visible on the can. The painting should look aged, softly blended, and varnished, imitating a Renaissance oil portrait. Add one opaque dark brown square censorship block over the face, centered from forehead to chin, obscuring the facial features while leaving hair, neck, hand, and soda can visible.

Lower text content: The source line reads “来源： @liyue_ai” with the handle in blue like a hyperlink. The next line reads “提示词:”. The code box contains exactly 2 labeled language blocks: “[中文]” followed by “生成一张蒙娜丽莎畅饮可乐的油画。” and “[English]” followed by “Generate an oil painting of Mona Lisa drinking cola.” Add one small copy icon at the upper right of the code box.

Visual style: Minimal Chinese web article interface, white background, black and gray sans-serif UI text, light gray code box, subtle borders, no decorative clutter. Keep the artwork painterly and historically styled, while the surrounding page remains crisp like a browser screenshot.

Constraints: Include exactly 1 main artwork, exactly 1 soda can, exactly 1 face-obscuring square, exactly 1 title line, exactly 1 source line, exactly 1 prompt label, exactly 1 code box, and exactly 2 language sections inside the code box. Do not add extra images, comments, watermarks, or unrelated UI panels.

content:

Canvas: Vertical portrait composition, 4:5 aspect ratio, dense foreground-to-background detail, cinematic lighting, no border, no watermark.

Main subject: One young anime woman stands slightly right of center, facing forward with a calm serious expression. She has very long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="turquoise teal"} hair, small horn-like accessories, pale skin, and an ornate black, white, and silver gothic fantasy outfit with layered skirt panels, armor straps, ribbons, chains, and gem details. She holds one long spear or lance diagonally across her body, its shaft extending from lower center toward upper left, with delicate metallic ornaments and teal magical glow.

Creature and companion count: Include exactly 3 major companion figures: 1 enormous pale stone-and-teal dragon coiling behind and to the right of the girl, with an angular head, glowing green eyes, folded serpentine neck, and crystalline teal accents; 1 adorable teal dragon plush toy seated in the lower-left foreground, with soft rounded limbs, small horns, a large glowing turquoise gem-like eye, tiny claws, and ornate jewelry around its neck; 1 translucent turquoise holographic spirit girl on the left side behind the plush, glowing like a projected magical blueprint, with long hair and a faint dress silhouette.

Foreground objects count: Include exactly 5 prominent foreground relics: 1 large beige paper-model spaceship or airship stretching across the bottom from left to right with panel lines, teal glowing circular engine light, and emerald stained-glass sections; 1 small ornate birdcage-like golden structure at the lower left; 1 rectangular paper blueprint tag hanging near the lower right; 1 cluster of teal crystals near the plush; 1 tangled web of golden chains and filigree wires draped over the spaceship and floor.

Environment: The setting is an immense gothic cathedral workshop with tall pointed arches, carved ivory stone, miniature spires, scaffold-like paper architecture, suspended wires, blueprint sheets, fragmented parchment panels, and teal crystal growths. In the upper center background, place 1 large circular rose window glowing turquoise and white, with exactly 3 tall lancet stained-glass windows beneath it. Add additional narrow stained-glass windows at the sides, but keep the central rose window dominant.

Visual style: Highly polished Japanese fantasy illustration, ornate anime character design, intricate linework, soft painterly rendering, luminous turquoise and emerald highlights, warm beige stone and parchment tones, ethereal dust, layered depth, magical cathedral ambience, elegant steampunk-paper-craft details, extremely detailed but harmonious.

Lighting and color: Use a palette of ivory, antique parchment, silver, deep charcoal, emerald, and glowing cyan-teal. Backlight the scene through stained glass, add turquoise rim light around the dragon, hologram, crystals, plush eye, and spear ornaments. Keep the mood dreamy, mysterious, and luxurious.

Constraints: No readable text, no modern objects, no extra characters beyond the 1 main girl, 1 large dragon, 1 plush dragon, and 1 holographic spirit girl. The plush dragon should look especially cute and desirable as a stuffed toy while still matching the elaborate fantasy world.

content:
Goal: Create a screenshot-style image of a video editing/compositing workspace demonstrating chroma-key preparation for transparency.

Canvas: 654×522 pixel landscape screenshot, dark gray software interface, no browser chrome or desktop frame. The main preview occupies the upper half, timeline occupies the lower half.

Preview area: Center a bright pure green chroma-key background rectangle. On it, place exactly 2 full-body anime cyber-ninja women as imported image artwork: the left figure is a three-quarter pose with one leg crossed forward, the right figure is front-facing with legs apart. Both have {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair, pale skin, teal eyes, glossy black bodysuits with subtle red/orange glowing seams, black gloves, high-heeled boots, and long black scarf/ribbon shapes trailing behind them with orange-red glowing tips. Crop the top of both heads slightly at the top edge of the preview, matching a real editor viewport. Leave dark gray margins outside the green preview.

Interface layout: Below the preview, show a playback bar and transport controls. Include exactly 6 visible transport buttons on the right: play triangle, stop square, step/back button, step/forward button, double-chevron rewind, and a partially visible extra control at the far right. At the left of the time display, show white timecode text {argument name="current timecode" default="0:00:00.00"}. Use small white UI text and gray panels.

Timeline: Show a ruler with time labels exactly 5 visible labels: 0:00:00.00, 0:00:03.33, 0:00:06.66, 0:00:10.00, and 0:00:13.33, plus a partially visible 0:00:16.66 at the far right. Show exactly 3 layer rows labeled Layer1, Layer2, and Layer3, with a Root row above them. Add a red vertical playhead at the start near 0:00:00.00. On Layer1, place one blue selected clip beginning at the start, labeled {argument name="clip label" default="ChatGPT Im"}. Draw a thick hand-drawn red oval/circle around the Layer1 clip and the beginning of the timeline, as if annotating where to click. Show a small tooltip near Layer2 with Japanese text beginning with {argument name="tooltip text" default="画像ファイル : ChatGPT Image 2026年5月4日 22_47_49.png"}.

Visual style: Realistic low-resolution software screenshot, crisp UI elements, slight aliasing, functional dark theme, no decorative framing. The anime artwork should look like polished AI-generated character art embedded in the editor rather than a flat icon.

Constraints: Keep the chroma-key green solid and vivid. Do not add extra characters, extra clips, or extra annotation circles. Do not include watermarks. Preserve the screenshot crop so the right-side controls and far-right time label are partially cut off.

description: Creates a dark video editing interface screenshot showing two anime characters on a green screen with a circled timeline clip for transparency workflow tutorials.

Create a dreamy anime-style fantasy portrait of {argument name="character name" default="a mysterious blue-haired girl"} standing under an ornate transparent art umbrella. The scene is a luminous celestial reverie in cool sapphire, lavender, and white tones, with backlit clouds and soft daylight bokeh behind her. The character has very long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="deep indigo-blue"} hair, pale skin, and an elegant off-shoulder frilly dress in navy and translucent pale blue, decorated with sheer ruffles, star beads, pearl chains, a dark blue bow at the throat, and a faceted blue gemstone pendant. Her face is intentionally hidden by a centered opaque square gradient mask in muted blue-to-lavender, covering the facial area while leaving hair, outfit, hands, and accessories visible. She holds the umbrella shaft with one hand near the lower left of her torso, posed calmly and serenely.

The umbrella is the main visual feature: one large transparent dome umbrella with a dark navy ruffled outer rim, visible black ribs, glossy reflections, and an inner fantasy sky design filled with clouds, constellations, glittering star trails, pearl strands, and celestial charms. Include exactly 4 prominent moon ornaments/designs on or inside the umbrella: 2 large pale crescent moons on the left side, 1 thin circular moon ring near the upper center-left, and 1 small crescent moon on the right side. Include exactly 3 larger hanging star charms that stand out among many tiny sparkles: one near the upper center, one near the right center, and one near the lower torso area. Add floral details: exactly 2 large blue-white roses, one tucked beside the left side of the hair near the temple and one at the lower right waist/sleeve area. Add delicate dangling pearl-and-star hair ornaments on both sides of the head.

Overlay a subtle transparent smartphone-style psychological scan UI that does not distract from the character. Include exactly 2 translucent UI panels: first, a small rounded rectangle at the top right reading “SCAN 100%” with tiny barcode-like lines and minimal sparkle marks; second, a larger frosted-glass rounded rectangle at the bottom left reading “INNER SCAN COMPLETE”, then “Type : {argument name="type text" default="Starlit Reverie"}”, then “Mood : {argument name="mood text" default="Serene / Pure / Longing"}”. Inside the bottom-left panel include exactly 3 simple line icons along the bottom: a rose icon, a star icon, and a crescent moon icon. Add a small cursive signature-like label at the bottom right reading “{argument name="signature text" default="Inner-Umbrella Archive"}”. Use high-detail Japanese anime illustration rendering, crystalline highlights, soft bloom, transparent fabric textures, ethereal lighting, and a polished vertical composition. Avoid extra text, avoid watermarks, and keep the face mask as a clean square overlay.

content:

Canvas: 16:9 widescreen slide, clean white background on the left half and a full-height photographic image on the right half. Use a refined monochrome palette: white, charcoal, deep navy-black, cool gray, and soft daylight.

Layout: Divide the slide vertically at the center. The left 50% is a white design area with generous negative space; the right 50% is a photo panel. On the far left, place one thin vertical line near the margin, broken into two segments with the vertical word “BRAND” centered between them. Near the top-left area, set the large spaced-out headline “CONCEPT”. In the middle-left area, place a small abstract geometric logo made from exactly 2 dark navy square/rectangular blocks, followed by the large spaced-out title “KEY MESSAGE”. Under the logo/title row, add one short horizontal rule, then exactly 2 small supporting text lines: “Short statement line” and “Supporting statement line”.

Text content: Use {argument name="main headline" default="CONCEPT"} as the top headline, {argument name="key message text" default="KEY MESSAGE"} as the central title, and the two supporting lines {argument name="supporting copy" default="Short statement line / Supporting statement line"}. All typography should be uppercase or title-like where shown, with wide letter spacing, thin modern sans-serif font, dark navy-black color, and precise alignment.

Photo panel: The right half should show a quiet, high-end architectural interior with concrete walls, tall floor-to-ceiling windows, soft natural light, and strong diagonal shadows. Include exactly 1 human figure: {argument name="photo subject" default="a woman in a long black coat, seen in side profile, standing calmly and looking out the window"}. The figure should be positioned slightly right of center in the photo panel, elegant and contemplative, with a low bun hairstyle and minimal detail.

Visual style: Premium Japanese/Scandinavian editorial design, calm, spacious, museum-like, understated corporate branding, cinematic realism on the photo side, sharp typography on the white side.

Constraints: Keep the composition uncluttered. Use exactly 1 vertical brand label, exactly 1 headline, exactly 1 abstract logo, exactly 1 central title, exactly 1 horizontal rule, exactly 2 supporting text lines, and exactly 1 person in the photo. No extra icons, no mockup borders, no watermark.

content:

Canvas: Vertical 4:5 image, realistic close-up product photography on a soft beige tabletop, shallow depth of field, warm natural light from the left, blurred antique mirror/gold ornament in the back left and cream roses in the back right.

Main subject: A freestanding layered pop-up card in ivory, dusty blue, pale silver, and pearl white. The card forms an arched miniature room with ornate laser-cut paper layers, filigree borders, floral decorations, and a seated anime girl in the center. The character is {argument name="character name" default="Nozomu"}, a delicate blonde girl with long straight hair, soft gray-blue eyes, faint blush, and a melancholy gentle expression. She wears a muted blue dress or oversized blouse with white frilled trim, layered necklaces, earrings, and a blue headband with white flower hair ornaments and ribbons. She sits curled up with one knee raised, one hand resting near her cheek, facing slightly right but looking toward the viewer.

Pop-up construction and countable elements: Use exactly 5 major vertical paper layers: 1 front nameplate base, 1 floral sofa/ledge layer, 1 character cutout layer, 1 ornate arched window layer, and 1 rear blue-and-ivory room backdrop. Add exactly 1 cream chandelier centered at the top. Add exactly 8 hanging crystal/star ornaments around the arch: 2 star charms, 3 diamond-shaped crystals, and 3 small teardrop crystals. Add exactly 2 decorative side lattice panels, one on each side. Add exactly 4 visible flower clusters: front left blue-white cluster, front right blue-white cluster, rear left pale cluster, rear right pale cluster. Add exactly 2 small pillows, one on each side behind the character.

Text content: On the large front plaque, write the name in elegant serif capitals: {argument name="main name text" default="NOZOMU"}. Under it, write {argument name="subtitle text" default="Silent Blue Muse"}. Under that, in smaller type, write {argument name="small descriptor text" default="official pop-up business card"}. On a tiny bottom label, write {argument name="serial number" default="No. 0001"}. On a small vertical side tag at left, include the Japanese hiragana text 「のぞむ」 in black ink.

Visual style: Highly detailed anime illustration printed on layered die-cut paper, elegant rococo and Victorian stationery motifs, pale blue floral fantasy aesthetic, thin silver linework, pearl accents, soft shadows between paper layers, realistic paper thickness, glossy highlights on crystal ornaments, refined handmade craft quality.

Constraints: The image should look like a real physical pop-up card being photographed, not a flat poster. Keep all text legible and centered on the plaques. Do not add extra characters, extra labels, watermarks, logos, hands, or packaging.

The numeral should be thick, smooth, glossy, and dimensional, like a custom sans-serif 3D glyph, with a luminous gradient running from golden yellow and orange at the upper left through hot pink in the middle to vivid violet and electric purple at the lower tip. content:
Goal: Create a polished presentation board of {argument name="app theme" default="number-play and logic puzzle"} app icon concepts, showing multiple alternative icon directions for a modern mobile app.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 landscape canvas on a warm off-white background, minimal gallery-style spacing, soft shadows, premium design-review mockup aesthetic.

Header: Centered at the top, large elegant serif title text: {argument name="headline text" default="App Icon Concepts"}. Under it, a small uppercase tagline with spaced letters: {argument name="tagline text" default="PLAY WITH NUMBERS • LOGIC • PATTERN • RHYTHM • CURIOSITY"}. Use tiny colored dots between the words.

Layout: Arrange exactly 10 rounded-square app icons in a clean 2-row by 5-column grid. Each icon is the same size with consistent corner radius and subtle drop shadow. Add a single centered letter label beneath each icon, exactly A through J.

Icon concepts, exactly 10:
A: Cream monochrome icon with stacked 3D numerals 1, 2, and 3 standing on a circular pedestal, sculptural clay/plaster look.
B: Dark navy icon with four raised rounded number tiles, colored blue 7, cream 3, orange 5, and teal 8, arranged like playful puzzle blocks.
C: Deep purple-black icon with a large gradient numeral 9 in orange-to-magenta-to-violet, with colorful particle dots bursting from the right edge.
D: Dark teal icon showing an orbital logic pattern: concentric circular paths, small white spheres, and a glowing cyan center.
E: Warm ivory icon with flowing rainbow wave bands rising from left to right, small Fibonacci-like numbers above the wave: 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13, 21.
F: Dark indigo icon with a geometric network made of thin white connecting lines and dots, with a glowing golden center point like a constellation.
G: Dark teal icon with a luminous infinity loop made from many fine parallel lines, transitioning from cyan on the left to golden orange on the right.
H: Light cream icon with a 3x3 grid of tactile number tiles, numbers 2 4 7 on the top row, 1 5 6 in the middle, 8 3 9 on the bottom; the 5 tile is blue and the 7 and 8 tiles are dark.
I: Dark navy icon with a large glossy white 3D question mark, small colored buttons/dots on it, suggesting curiosity and puzzles.
J: Near-black icon with a circular color wheel or dial around a dark central disk, segmented rainbow colors, plus a small white sphere at the upper right edge.

Visual style: High-end app store icon exploration sheet, soft 3D rendering mixed with clean vector precision, rounded corners, realistic highlights, subtle ambient occlusion, crisp typography, balanced white space, no watermark.

Constraints: Keep the board uncluttered, preserve exactly 10 concepts and the A–J labels, avoid adding extra icons or explanatory text beyond the title, tagline, numbers inside icons, and labels.
title: Number Puzzle App Icon Concepts
