content: Use the reference image as the base design to depict a 'moment where a reincarnated anime character is working normally at a real-world drive-thru store'. Accurately maintain the atmosphere of the character as an anime illustration. Maintain the impression of the character's face, hairstyle, hair color, eyes, ears, silhouette, proportions, and expression. Never break the character's identity. Do not turn them into a live-action human. The character part must maintain anime illustration expression. The setting is a realistic fast food restaurant or cafe drive-thru, reminiscent of a global chain. Realistic background depiction. A real-world space with a lived-in feel. Not too clean. Do not make it look like an advertisement photo. Naturally place menu signs, intercoms, paper bags, drink cups, kitchen equipment, lines of cars, greasy lighting, and realistic store facilities within the store and around the drive-thru. Perspective of a streamer live-streaming with a smartphone. POV composition shot from inside a car. Naturally frame-in the car window, steering wheel, drinks, dashboard, and side mirrors in the foreground. The person on the streamer's side is not holding up the smartphone, but is naturally reaching out to receive a product or paper bag. An anime character clerk in uniform is serving through the drive-thru window. The character is performing natural actions of 'working normally', such as handing over a paper bag, confirming an order, operating a cash register terminal, inserting a straw, or responding according to the manual with a blank expression or a slightly sleepy look. Important: The character themselves doesn't particularly care that they are an anime character. The surrounding world isn't completely surprised either, and there's an atmosphere like 'they just normally exist'. Add a live-stream style UI. Modern vertical live-stream UI like TikTok LIVE, YouTube Live, or Instagram Live. Naturally display a comment section, viewer count, LIVE indicator, likes, and gift notifications. Do not fix the comment content; let the AI generate it naturally. Emphasize a strangely realistic atmosphere where the live-action world and anime character are naturally fused. Add smartphone-like qualities such as light HDR processing, fine sensor noise, slight JPEG compression, natural exposure, minor chromatic aberration, auto-focus feel, slight camera shake, high ISO noise, live-stream specific highlights, and the unstable feel of handheld shooting. Do not make it look like a movie poster. No excessive cinematic production. No overly beautiful compositions. Avoid 'glossy rendering' typical of AI. Do not overload with information. Emphasize a sense of chance and daily life, like a 'mysterious live-stream clip posted on social media'. Emphasize an atmosphere typical of modern internet culture, where 'only the streamer's energy is a bit off'.
title: Anime Character Drive-Thru Clerk (POV)
description: A complex image-to-image prompt that fuses anime characters into a realistic smartphone-style live stream capture at a fast-food drive-thru.

content:
Goal: Create a premium vertical Japanese landing-page hero visual for {argument name="product name" default="Claude Code"}, presenting AI coding support as smart, calm, and professional.

Canvas: Portrait 3:4 composition, approximately 768×1152. Photorealistic editorial advertising style with subtle UI overlay elements, cinematic shallow depth of field, warm dark green and brown tones, soft window light, elegant contrast, no cartoon look.

Main scene: A modern work desk in a dim cafe or studio office. On the right, show one Japanese or East Asian adult man in a dark knit sweater, seated in a thoughtful pose with one hand near his chin; his face is covered by a flat square anonymizing blur block. On the left foreground, show an open laptop angled toward the viewer displaying a dark terminal screen with Claude Code-style command output. Include exactly 5 visible desk objects: 1 ceramic coffee mug, 1 open notebook, 1 black pen, and 2 stacked programming books. The background should be softly blurred with plants and window reflections.

Hero text: Large elegant white Japanese serif headline in the upper left: 「考える力を、コードに変える。」 Beneath it, add a smaller subheadline: 「Claude Codeと、AI時代の開発をスマートに。」 Add a short Japanese paragraph below explaining that Claude Code understands thinking and supports design, implementation, and improvement as an AI coding partner.

Laptop detail: The terminal should show small readable English command-line lines suggesting project creation, dependency installation, git repository initialization, and generated components, ending with “Component created successfully!” Keep it realistic but not overly dominant.

Right feature panel: Place a translucent glassmorphism rectangular panel in the lower right with thin white borders. Title: 「開発を加速する、Claude Codeの主な機能」 Include exactly 5 feature rows, each with a simple outlined icon on the left and Japanese text on the right: 1) speech bubble icon, 「自然言語でのコーディング支援」 with a note about generating optimal code from Japanese instructions; 2) gear icon, 「プロジェクト全体を理解」 with a note about analyzing codebases and proposing context-aware changes; 3) pencil icon, 「リファクタリングもワンクリック」 with a note about safely improving complex processes; 4) document icon, 「テスト・ドキュメントも自動生成」 with a note about supporting development through high-quality tests and documentation; 5) terminal icon, 「CLIでシームレスに統合」 with a note about integrating naturally into terminal workflows. At the bottom of the panel add: 「あなたの開発体験を、よりスマートに、より創造的に。」

Lower metrics: In the lower left, show exactly 2 statistic blocks in white: 1) 「開発時間」 with large “最大55%削減” and a tiny footnote; 2) 「バグの早期発見率」 with large “2.3倍向上*”.

Footer bar: Add a dark translucent horizontal footer across the bottom. Left text: 「Claude Code Insight」 followed by 「ハウツー」. Right text: 「AIコーディングの実践知とノウハウを発信中 ▶」.

Visual constraints: Use refined Japanese typography, large white headline, thin dividers, glass panels, and realistic reflections. Keep all visible text clean and aligned. Avoid extra logos, watermarks, random UI clutter, or additional feature rows.
title: Claude Code Japanese Hero Ad
description: A polished Japanese marketing hero image for Claude Code with a cinematic developer workspace, feature panel, and performance metrics.

content:
Goal: Create a wide brand identity and advertising creative overview for a minimalist Nordic skincare brand named {argument name="brand name" default="FJÄLL"}, showing a complete campaign system on a clean white studio background.

Canvas: Horizontal 16:9 presentation board with a lot of negative space, soft warm off-white background, centered composition. Use muted Scandinavian colors: stone gray, cream, beige, sage green, charcoal blue-gray, and natural skin tones. Lighting is soft, diffused, premium, and editorial.

Layout: Arrange exactly 11 discrete tiles in a refined grid. Top row contains 3 larger brand assets: 1) a minimal circular mountain-line logo with the word FJÄLL and small subtext, 2) an alternate logo with a small abstract mountain/stone icon above the word FJÄLL and the tagline “NORDIC SKINCARE”, 3) a square product still-life photo of one dark gray skincare tube standing upright on a pale stone surface with a rock prop. Bottom row contains exactly 8 campaign mockups, evenly spaced and aligned: 1) square lifestyle product photo with hands holding the tube beside a cream product information card, 2) square close-up of a gray clay/mineral cream smear on stone with tiny text “MINERAL TEXTURE”, 3) vertical application tutorial tile showing cream being applied to fingers with a simple header, 4) vertical dew/balm hand-care tile showing cream rubbed onto the back of a hand, 5) square hero ingredient tile with the tube standing among stones, leaves, and three circular ingredient callouts, 6) vertical social media video interface mockup with a hand holding the product, visible play/engagement UI icons along the side and bottom, 7) vertical ad poster with the product tube, botanical sprigs, rock props, and headline text near the bottom, 8) tall mobile website or landing-page mockup with a clean navigation bar, product detail blocks, and an application photo.

Subject details: The product is a single squeeze tube labeled {argument name="product label" default="FJÄLL"}, matte dark blue-gray packaging, white minimalist typography, small circular emblem, premium cosmetic proportions. The skincare texture is thick, mineral, clay-like, pale gray-beige. Hands should look natural, softly lit, and elegant. Props include smooth stones, mineral rocks, small green leaves, neutral linen or plaster surfaces, and shallow shadows.

Text content: Include readable brand text “FJÄLL” on logos and packaging, “NORDIC SKINCARE” as a tagline, and campaign/product text suggesting {argument name="product name" default="Midnight Solstice"}, {argument name="benefit phrase" default="Performance in every touch."}, mineral texture, application, dew-bomb, and ingredient callouts. Keep small body copy mostly decorative but plausible, clean, and aligned.

Visual style: Luxury skincare art direction, minimal Swiss editorial layout, soft product photography, airy whitespace, muted natural palette, understated typography, commercial creative portfolio look. Make the entire board appear like a polished generated ad-material batch preview rather than a single ad.

Constraints: Use exactly 11 visible tiles total, exactly 3 on the top row and exactly 8 on the bottom row. Do not add extra products beyond the one tube design. Avoid bright colors, clutter, heavy shadows, glossy plastic, cartoon style, or watermarks.
title: Nordic Skincare Campaign Board
description: Generates a minimalist Scandinavian skincare brand identity and ad-material presentation board for premium cosmetic campaign concepts.

content:
Goal: Create a fictional Japanese movie information page and poster for an anime sci-fi mystery film titled {argument name="movie title" default="ノヴァ・リフレイン"}, with the subtitle {argument name="subtitle" default="終わらない記憶"}. The design should look like a polished streaming/movie review website screenshot paired with theatrical key art.

Canvas: Vertical 3:4 composition, dark navy interface, approximately 768×1024. Use a two-column top layout and a full-width review feed below. Overall mood is futuristic, rainy, emotional, and cinematic.

Top-left poster: A tall theatrical anime poster with rounded corners and a thin blue border. Show a rainy cyberpunk city at night under a starry purple-blue galaxy sky. In the foreground is a teenage anime girl wearing a black hooded jacket, glowing cyan cat-ear headphones, dark twin-tail hair, and a small sleeve patch reading “S-07”. Her face is deliberately obscured by a soft square gray blur censor block. A small distant figure stands in the wet street behind her. Add Japanese tagline text at upper left: “記憶は、消えても、想いは、残る。” At the bottom of the poster, display the large title “ノヴァ・リフレイン”, beneath it “— NOVA: REFRAIN —”, then “— 終わらない記憶 —”, and at the very bottom “2025.07.18 (FRI) ROADSHOW” in purple-blue lettering.

Top-right movie details panel: Use a dark card with subtle borders and clean Japanese UI typography. Include exactly 4 genre tags at the top: “SF”, “ヒューマンドラマ”, “青春”, “ミステリー”. Below them show the title “ノヴァ・リフレイン” and subtitle “— 終わらない記憶 —”. Add the release line “2025年7月18日公開 / 上映時間 126分”. Show overall rating with exactly 5 gold star icons, the last star half-filled, and numeric rating “4.4”. Include exactly 3 action buttons: a purple play button labeled “予告編を見る”, an outlined bookmark button labeled “あとで観る”, and an outlined share button labeled “シェア”.

Synopsis section: Add heading “あらすじ” and a short Japanese synopsis about a near-future world where memory data has become normal, a high school girl named レティシア tries to restore the lost memories of a friend after an accident, and discovers a hidden “truth” that could alter the fate of the world.

Staff and cast section: Use two columns. Staff column title “スタッフ” with exactly 8 fictional staff lines: “監督：ソフト・レイン”, “脚本：ミサセ・ユウリ”, “音楽：ハルカ・ミサキ”, “撮影：フジサキ・レン”, “美術：カガリ・トウマ”, “編集：ナギサ・コトネ”, “VFX：アイオ・シュウ”, “制作：エクリプス・ピクチャーズ”. Cast column title “キャスト” with exactly 6 fictional cast lines: “レティシア：ユイナ・カナメ”, “アイオ：カガミ・リク”, “カイト：ハヤセ・ソウタ”, “博士：レイジ・クロサワ”, “ナビAI「ノヴァ」：ミユ・シラカワ”, plus one additional short fictional name if needed to fill spacing. Do not use real celebrity names.

Review feed: Below the top panels, create a section titled “みんなのレビュー” with a small button on the right reading “すべてのレビューを見る”. Include exactly 5 review cards stacked vertically, each with a circular avatar, reviewer display name, handle, gold star rating, bold Japanese review title/body, timestamp, and purple thumbs-up count. Reviews are:
1. Avatar: anime girl portrait. Name “星乃そら”, handle “@sora_hoshino_23”, rating “5.0” with 5 gold stars, title “今年一番の没入感。ラスト10分、涙が止まらなかった。” timestamp “2025/7/18 23:41”, likes “324”.
2. Avatar: dark-haired anime boy side profile. Name “霧島レン”, handle “@lenscape_07”, rating “4.5”, title “SF好きなら絶対ハマる。設定も演出も一級品。” timestamp “2025/7/19 10:12”, likes “198”.
3. Avatar: cute cat photo. Name “もちまる”, handle “@mochimaru_33”, rating “3.5”, title “泣けるけど、ちょっと難しかったかも？” timestamp “2025/7/19 14:56”, likes “87”.
4. Avatar: blue sky and clouds photo. Name “蒼井ナツメ”, handle “@natsume_aoi”, rating “4.0”, title “音楽がとにかく良い。サントラ絶対買う。” timestamp “2025/7/19 18:30”, likes “142”.
5. Avatar: anime portrait with face softly blurred. Name “タカト・ユウキ”, handle “@yuki_t_movie”, rating “2.5”, title “設定は面白いけど、後半の展開が駆け足すぎたかな。” timestamp “2025/7/20 00:05”, likes “51”.

Visual style: High-quality anime key visual combined with a modern dark-mode Japanese cinema database UI. Use neon cyan and purple accents, soft glow, rainy reflections, thin dividers, rounded cards, crisp legible Japanese text, gold stars, and a premium sci-fi drama atmosphere. Keep all names fictional and avoid real staff or cast.

content:

content:
Goal: Create a vertical smartphone screenshot of a TikTok-style live stream where an anime elf maid character has appeared in the real world on a sunny urban rooftop, as if viewed through a phone during a live broadcast.

Canvas: 9:16 portrait mobile screen, realistic phone UI overlay, 768×1152 style composition. The background is a photoreal rooftop with concrete floor, chain-link safety fence, air-conditioning units, hazy city skyline, and hard midday sunlight casting shadows.

Main scene: A first-person human hand reaches in from the lower left foreground toward the character, slightly motion-blurred and out of focus. Center frame shows a small full-body anime girl standing on the rooftop, looking upward toward the camera. She has {argument name="hair color" default="pale blue"} bob-cut hair, long pointed elf ears, and an elaborate black-and-white gothic lolita maid outfit. Her face is covered by a large opaque gray censor square, centered over the upper face and nose area. Keep the character rendered in a crisp anime illustration style while the rooftop, hand, and lighting remain photorealistic, emphasizing the surreal contrast of an anime character physically present in a real livestream.

Character details: Use {argument name="character name" default="ちいカオスちゃん"} as the streamer name in the UI. The character wears exactly 12 visible outfit/accessory groups: 1) black maid headband with white frills, 2) black bow and flower ornaments on the hair, 3) red hair clip, 4) black choker with metal ring, 5) black-and-white ruffled maid dress, 6) white apron with bold text reading “CUTIE CHAOS”, 7) red hanging tag with Japanese characters, 8) black sleeve cuffs with patches, 9) small cross and skull-like accessories, 10) layered black skirt with blue trim, 11) asymmetrical knee socks, and 12) chunky platform shoes with straps and red-blue accents.

TikTok live UI layout: Add a complete mobile livestream interface overlay. Top left shows the time “13:47”. Under it, a rounded streamer card with a circular anime avatar, the name “ちいカオスちゃん”, viewer count “12.8K”, and a pink rounded “+ フォロー” button. Below that, show a flame icon and “日間ランキング1位”. Top right shows Wi-Fi/battery icons, two small circular viewer avatars, a person icon with “999”, and an X close icon. Mid-right top shows “他の配信を見る >” and a promo tile reading “TikTok LIVE FEST” with “Japan” beneath it and a colorful TikTok logo.

Right-side action rail: Include exactly 7 stacked action elements from top to bottom: 1) circular profile avatar with a pink plus badge, 2) white heart icon with “12.8K”, 3) comment bubble with “256”, 4) bookmark icon with “1,024”, 5) share arrow with “304”, 6) bottom share-style arrow with “128”, and 7) a row of gift/navigation icons near the bottom labeled “マルチ...”, “バラ”, and “ギフト”.

Left-side live comments: Show exactly 5 visible comment/activity lines in translucent white text with small circular avatars: 1) “user_0831” saying “え、なにこの子！？天使！？”, 2) “yuki_1027” saying “カワイイんだけどww”, 3) “ねこ大好き” saying “耳！エルフ耳！”, 4) “chaos推し” saying “衣装のセンスやばい...”, and 5) “sora_88が参加しました”.

Bottom UI: Add a rounded comment input bar reading “すてきなコメントを書く” with a smiley icon. Keep the interface semi-transparent and realistic, as a captured social media livestream screen.

Visual style: Hybrid photorealistic live-action rooftop footage plus high-quality anime character compositing, cinematic sunlight, shallow depth of field on the foreground hand, crisp mobile UI, playful chaotic kawaii-goth aesthetic. Use {argument name="platform style" default="TikTok LIVE"} visual language.

Constraints: Preserve the Japanese UI text exactly where specified, use no extra comments beyond the 5 listed, keep the face hidden by the gray square, and avoid adding watermarks outside the TikTok-style interface.
title: Anime Elf Maid in TikTok Live
description: Generates a vertical TikTok-style livestream screenshot of a gothic anime elf maid appearing on a realistic rooftop.

content:
Use the reference image as the base for character design and depict "the moment an {argument name="character" default="anime character"} appeared in a real-world {argument name="scene" default="live stream"}."

Accurately maintain the atmosphere of the character as an anime illustration.

Never break the character's identity. Do not turn them into a live-action human. Maintain anime illustration expression for the character part.

Vertical smartphone distribution screen. TikTok LIVE, YouTube Live, Instagram Live, common vertical live streaming UI.

The background is not fixed. Randomly generate a realistic urban space or a realistic space with a sense of daily life. Examples: {argument name="background example" default="rooftop of a building"}, in front of a convenience store, game center, in front of a station, residential area, stairs of a multi-tenant building, late-night alley, riverbed, in front of karaoke, around a late-night vending machine, streaming room, otaku room, in front of a regional city station, rainy sidewalk, shopping district, etc.

The background is not too clean. Emphasize the sense of life, clutter, and realistic noise.

Naturally frame in live-action level human hands and arms in the foreground of the screen. The human side should show movements like trying to touch the girl, pointing, measuring distance, reacting in surprise, offering food or drink, or accidentally interfering during the stream.

The foreground hand should be slightly blurred with a shallow depth of field. Emphasize reality like "footage someone accidentally captured during a live stream."

Do not make it like a movie poster. No excessive cinematic production. No overly beautiful compositions. No excessive glowing effects. Avoid AI-specific glossy rendering. Do not overload with information.

The live streaming UI should include comment sections, concurrent viewer counts, LIVE display, likes, gift notifications, etc. The comment section should have realistic reactions buzzing with skepticism.

Unify lighting naturally. Match ambient light of the background and character, such as natural light, street lights, convenience store lighting, monitor light, etc.

Add smartphone photography-like texture. Light HDR processing, fine sensor noise, slight JPEG compression feel, natural exposure, weak chromatic aberration, light lens bloom, autofocus-like atmosphere, slight camera shake, and instability typical of handheld shooting. Emphasize a sense of coincidence like a "mysterious witness stream screenshot posted on SNS" rather than a perfect work.
title: Anime Character Real-World Stream i2i
description: An advanced image-to-image prompt to blend anime characters into realistic smartphone livestream interfaces and urban settings with human interaction.

content:
Goal: Create a dark-mode desktop app UI mockup for a JSON diff tool named {argument name="app name" default="Tilted Diffs"}, showing an API response comparison titled {argument name="diff title" default="API Response — Checkout v2"}.

Canvas: 16:10 widescreen desktop screenshot, roughly 1152×768, with a macOS-style app window floating on a dark bluish gradient background. Use subtle shadows, rounded corners, thin borders, and a polished developer-tool aesthetic.

Layout: The app has 4 main regions: 1 left sidebar, 1 top toolbar spanning the editor area, 3 vertical code editor panes. The first editor pane is selected and outlined with a bright blue focus glow. The middle pane shows colored inline diff highlights. The rightmost pane is narrow and partially visible, like an additional file tab or third comparison column.

Left sidebar: Show macOS traffic-light buttons at top left: 3 circles, red, yellow, green. Under the app name, include 1 search field with placeholder text “Search diffs…” and a keyboard hint. Below it show exactly 8 saved diff list items with small document icons and timestamps: 1) “API Response — Checkout v2” with “Today, 10:24 AM”, highlighted in blue as the selected item; 2) “User Profile — Public API” with “Yesterday, 4:18 PM”; 3) “Orders Endpoint — v1 vs v2” with “May 20, 2025, 9:14 AM”; 4) “Product Catalog — EU Region” with “May 19, 2025, 2:47 PM”; 5) “Auth Response — SSO” with “May 18, 2025, 11:03 AM”; 6) “Billing Summary — Q2” with “May 17, 2025, 3:22 PM”; 7) “Webhook Payload — Stripe” with “May 16, 2025, 10:11 AM”; 8) “Search Results — Relevance” with “May 15, 2025, 5:35 PM”. At the bottom include exactly 1 prominent blue “+ New Diff” button and 1 small gear icon.

Top toolbar: On the left, display the title “API Response — Checkout v2” with a tiny edit pencil icon. Center a segmented control with exactly 2 tabs: “Editors” selected in blue and “Diff” inactive. On the right include exactly 4 compact shortcut controls labeled “⌘T add column”, “⌘D toggle diff”, “⌘← / ⌘→ move focus” and one small spacing gap between groups.

Editor panes: Use a monospaced code font, line numbers, JSON syntax highlighting, dark navy panels, and thin rounded borders. The left pane header is “source.json” with a document icon and a three-dot menu. The middle pane header is “target.json” with a document icon and a three-dot menu. The narrow right pane header is “more.json” and should show only the left portion of code, implying overflow. Each full editor pane has a bottom status bar with “Ln 1, Col 1”, “Spaces: 2”, “UTF-8”, “LF”, and “JSON”.

Code content: Show JSON for an order checkout response. Use requestId “req_8f3a9b42”, orderId “ord_123456”, currency USD, items for Wireless Headphones and Travel Case, and shipping information. The left source version should include timestamp “2025-05-21T10:24:31Z”, version “v1”, status “pending”, totalAmount 129.99, Wireless Headphones unitPrice 99.99 with discount null, Travel Case quantity 1, unitPrice 30.00, discount null, shipping method “standard”, estimatedDays 5, and address line “123 Market St”. The middle target version should show diff markers in a left gutter and colored row highlights: red removed rows, green added rows, yellow changed rows. It should include timestamp changed from “2025-05-20T15:11:09Z” to “2025-05-21T10:24:31Z”, version changed to v2, status changed from pending to confirmed, totalAmount changed to 139.99, Wireless Headphones unitPrice changed to 109.99 and discount added as 10.00, Travel Case quantity changed to 2, and shipping method changed to express with estimatedDays 2. Show approximately 32 numbered lines in each full editor.

Visual style: Premium SaaS developer tool interface, crisp vector-like rendering, dark theme, cobalt-blue accent color, muted gray text, realistic but clean UI screenshot, no people, no watermark, no browser chrome outside the app window. Keep all text legible and aligned to a grid.
title: Dark JSON Diff Tool UI Mockup
description: Generates a polished dark-mode desktop UI mockup for a JSON API diff and code comparison tool.

content:
Goal: Create a realistic screenshot-style image of a ChatGPT image generation interface demonstrating multiple image outputs from one request.

Canvas: Landscape 16:9 screenshot crop, white background, resembling a mobile or narrow desktop chat interface. Keep the composition slightly zoomed in so the right edge of the image carousel is visible.

Layout: At the top right, place one rounded light-gray user message bubble containing Japanese text. Beneath it on the left, show the status line “Thought for 2m 7s ›” in light gray. Below that, show one large generated image preview with rounded corners, and a narrow strip of additional generated thumbnails on the right side.

Text content: The user bubble should read: “絵コンテを参考に今回のベた塗アニメMVで使用する背景イラストを被写体なしで10個作成してください。\nテイスト強めで汚らしっぷつぷ感はなくしてください。プロアニメーターとして画質はよくしてほしいです。\n16:9　n=10”. Highlight the “n=10” part as the key detail.

Generated image preview: The main preview is a pastel anime background illustration of an empty stylized street with no characters, inspired by a colorful East Asian shopping district. Use soft cel-shaded anime line art, bright pastel blue, pink, yellow, and mint tones, lanterns hanging from buildings, decorative circular signs, shopfronts on both sides, a centered vanishing point, and a decorative archway in the distance. The image should look like a professional anime MV background, 16:9, clean and polished.

Discrete visible elements to include: exactly 1 user message bubble; exactly 1 status line; exactly 1 large main generated image; exactly 3 narrow vertical thumbnails partially visible on the right, each showing a different pastel anime background; exactly 2 circular overlay buttons on the main preview, one dark “編集” edit button at bottom left and one white downward arrow download button near bottom right; exactly 1 small dark share/upload icon button at the lower-right corner of the main preview.

Annotation: Add thick hand-drawn yellow marker annotations over the screenshot: exactly 1 yellow circle around “n=10”, exactly 1 thick yellow arrow pointing from the circled “n=10” down toward the right-side thumbnail strip, and exactly 1 tall yellow bracket-like outline encircling the vertical thumbnail strip. The yellow marker should look casual and drawn by hand.

Style: Clean UI screenshot aesthetic with subtle antialiasing, light gray interface elements, Japanese text rendered legibly, and bright yellow annotation marks. Use {argument name="main annotation text" default="n=10"} as the highlighted parameter in the chat message. Keep the screenshot realistic, not a poster or infographic.
title: Annotated ChatGPT Multiple Image Outputs
description: A screenshot-style composition showing a Japanese ChatGPT image generation request with n=10 highlighted and multiple generated anime background thumbnails.

content:

Canvas: Tall phone screenshot, 9:16 aspect ratio, black background, iPhone-style status bar at the top. The time reads 19:44, with cellular bars, 4G, and battery at 67%.

Under it, show the gray status text “Thought for {argument name="thinking time" default="33s"}”.

The apple is glossy with red skin, yellow-green highlights near the top indentation, subtle vertical streaks, a small brown stem, and soft studio lighting. The background inside the photo is a plain pale gray wall above the wooden desk, slightly blurred. The card has large rounded corners and fills most of the screen width.

Overlays and bottom UI: Inside the lower-left of the image card, add one brown rounded button labeled “編集する”. Inside the lower-right, add one circular brown share button with a white upload/share arrow icon. Below the image card, add exactly one standalone ellipsis line: “…”. content:
Goal: Create a bright Japanese skincare advertising banner for a daily-use sunscreen, with an airy luxury cosmetic feel and soft morning sunlight.

Canvas: Wide horizontal web banner, 1200×675 px, 16:9 aspect ratio. Use a very pale blue-white color palette, high-key lighting, soft shadows, and a clean minimalist Japanese beauty-ad aesthetic.

Layout: Split the composition into three main zones: left product hero, center typography and feature icons, right lifestyle model. On the left, place one tall transparent cylindrical pump bottle standing on a glossy reflective surface, occupying about 25% of the width. In the center, place large handwritten Japanese headline text in soft blue. On the right, show a young woman in a white camisole near a bright window, cropped from chest upward, turned slightly toward the camera; her face is covered by a large opaque beige square privacy block, while hair, ear, neck, shoulders, and upper chest remain visible. Background should be a sunlit white room with blurred window frames and a hint of green plant on the far right.

Product details: The bottle is clear glass/plastic with a frosted white sunscreen liquid inside, a shiny silver cylindrical cap, and delicate blue label typography. The bottle label should include: “SPF 50+”, “PA++++”, “UV PROTECTION SUNSCREEN”, “Daily Use UV Protector”, and “50mL / 1.69 FL.OZ.” Add a tiny sun icon above the SPF text.

Text content: At the top left, add small Japanese copy “紫外線から、肌をもっと美しく。” with a small English subtitle “Daily use sunscreen” beneath it. Center headline: {argument name="headline text" default="やさしく、つよく。"}. Bottom-center SPF claim: “SPF 50+ PA++++” in large blue text, plus a thin outlined rectangular label reading “国内最高基準値*”. Add a very small footnote below in pale blue, visually present but not overly legible.

Feature icons: Include exactly 3 small line icons beneath the headline, evenly spaced with thin vertical dividers: 1) sun icon with “UV” and Japanese label “強力UVカット”, 2) water droplet icon with label “うるおい 保湿ケア”, 3) sparkle icon with label “透明感 トーンアップ”. Use simple blue line art.

Model details: The model has {argument name="hair color" default="soft brown"} hair tied loosely up with wispy strands near the ear and neck, fair luminous skin, delicate shoulder line, and a white camisole strap. Her face must be obscured by a perfectly rectangular solid beige overlay, roughly from forehead to chin and spanning most of the face area, color close to warm gray-beige.

Visual style: Photorealistic product-ad composite, soft bloom, gentle lens flare, cool blue shadows, natural daylight, glossy reflection under bottle, lots of negative space, refined Japanese cosmetics branding. Keep all typography light blue, thin, elegant, and clean. Avoid clutter, extra products, additional people, logos, watermarks, or harsh contrast.
title: Japanese Sunscreen Beauty Banner
description: A photorealistic Japanese skincare ad banner featuring a sunscreen bottle, SPF claims, feature icons, and a sunlit model with a privacy-covered face.

content:
Please create a business card design with a scannable QR code based on SNS (X) profile information.

[Purpose]
Summarize the X account profile information into a single sophisticated horizontal business card. The design, color scheme, layout, margin design, and font atmosphere of the business card should be automatically suggested by AI so that the whole looks most beautiful.

[Information to be posted]
- Name: {argument name="name" default="XXXX"}
- Title: {argument name="title" default="XXXX"}
- X account: @{argument name="account name" default="XXXX"}
- Profile text: XXXX
- Achievements/Features: XXXX
- One-word catchphrase: XXXX
- QR code link destination: https://t.co/OQINcuK6wHXXXX

[About QR codes]
- The QR code should not be for decoration, but should be scannable with a smartphone.
- Embed the link accurately.
- Place the QR code in a sufficient size and prioritize scanning accuracy.
- Ensure sufficient margins around the QR code.
- Do not overlap text or decorations on the QR code.
- Do not distort or excessively process the QR code.
- Prioritize high contrast with the background for easy reading.

[Design conditions]
- Horizontal business card design.
- Convey a sense of luxury/sophistication/trust/professionalism.
- Minimalist and beautiful layout utilizing white space.
- All text in Japanese, clear and easy to read.
- Clear priority of information, making name and title most prominent.
- AI automatically decides the best background color, accents, and font balance.
- Avoid a cheap template feel.
- Elegant finish suitable for actual printing.

[Important]
- AI should suggest designs beautifully and naturally, not fixed layouts.
- However, prioritize practicality for the QR code.
- Avoid garbled characters and ensure all text is legible.
- Organize information for maximum readability.

Aspect ratio 16:9.
Create in high resolution.
title: QR Code Business Card Designer
description: A functional prompt for GPT Image 2.0 to design a sophisticated business card that includes a scannable QR code and professional layout.

content:
Goal: Create a realistic interior wall signage mockup with measurement annotations for a reception/office entrance, showing recommended dimensions and spacing for a company sign.

Canvas: Square 1:1 image, photorealistic architectural visualization, front-facing view with slight natural perspective. Use a warm modern palette: light beige wall panels, pale wood cabinet, black signage, black metal door grille, and wood slat ceiling.

Scene layout: Center the composition on a beige feature wall with a mounted sign. On the right, include a tall black vertical-slat door or gate occupying about one quarter of the image width. At the top right of the wall, add one small white CCTV security camera angled downward. At the top center, add one rectangular wall-mounted light fixture with a single warm downlight. At the bottom center, place one light-wood cabinet with two doors and exactly two round black knobs. Across the lower wall behind the sign, include a horizontal band of narrow vertical rectangular tiles. The ceiling at the very top should show warm brown wooden slats running diagonally.

Main sign content: Use raised matte-black 3D letters on the wall. The largest line reads {argument name="company logo text" default="Ryplix"}. Directly underneath, centered smaller text reads {argument name="company legal text" default="Infotech Pvt. Ltd."}. Below that, centered, display a large number {argument name="unit number" default="1210"}, with one thin horizontal line above it and one thin horizontal line below it. Keep all sign elements black with soft realistic shadows.

Measurement annotations: Add fine black dimension arrows, dashed guide lines, and small technical labels around the sign. Include exactly 10 visible measurement labels in the main wall area: “3.5 - 4 in” from the bottom of the light to the logo, “7 - 7.5 in” beside the logo height, “1.5 in” between the logo and legal text, “2.5 - 3 in” between legal text and the number, “4 - 4.5 in” beside the number height, “4 - 5 in” from the number to the cabinet-top tile area, “34 in” as a long horizontal width guide above the cabinet, plus two side gap labels “5 - 6 in” on the left and “5 - 6 in” on the right.

Left information panels: Add exactly three rounded white cards stacked vertically along the left side of the image. Card 1 title: “SIGNAGE SIZE (RECOMMENDED)”. It contains exactly three item groups separated by thin horizontal rules: “Ryplix” with “Width: 19-20 in” and “Height: 7-7.5 in”; “Infotech Pvt. Ltd.” with “Width: 14 in” and “Height: 1.75 in”; “1210” with “Width: 8.5-9 in” and “Height: 4-4.5 in”; then “Lines (Both)” with “Width: 10-11 in” and “Thickness: 6 mm”. Card 2 title: “SPACING (RECOMMENDED)”. It contains exactly four item groups separated by thin rules: “Light bottom to logo top” with “3.5 - 4 in”; “Logo to Infotech text” with “1.5 in”; “Infotech text to 1210” with “2.5 - 3 in”; “1210 to bottom (cabinet top)” with “4 - 5 in”. Card 3 is a small note card reading: “Note: All dimensions are approximate. Visual spacing may vary slightly on site.”

Visual style: Clean modern office design, natural lighting, realistic materials, subtle shadows, crisp legible typography, professional signage installation guide aesthetic. Use black sans-serif text for all labels and cards. The measurement lines should look like a design-spec overlay, not handwritten.

Constraints: Keep the image free of people and clutter. Do not add extra logos, extra cards, extra measurement labels, or additional decorative objects. Maintain accurate alignment: logo, legal text, unit number, light, and cabinet should all be centered on the same vertical axis.
title: Office Signage Dimension Mockup
description: A photorealistic office entrance signage specification mockup with dimension guides and recommended sizing notes for client approval.

content:
Goal: Create a polished promotional collage for {argument name="product name" default="Pi"}, showing that presentation visuals can be beautiful and varied by default.

Canvas: Square 1:1 image, about 768×768 px, with a white background and a tight mosaic of rounded-rectangle presentation-slide thumbnails separated by thin white gutters. Use soft shadows, subtle bevels, and modern SaaS launch-ad aesthetics.

Layout: Arrange exactly 17 visible slide tiles in an irregular grid around one dominant central banner. The central banner spans most of the width and contains a dark rounded-square app icon on the left with a large light-blue “Pi” mark and a small diamond accent, plus the bold black slogan {argument name="main slogan" default="Beautiful by default. Limitless by design."} on the right. Surround it with varied presentation templates, mixing editorial, historical, abstract, photo, and product-design styles.

Visible tile count and contents: Include exactly 17 discrete tiles: 1) top-left painterly fantasy landscape with a glowing circular ring over water and mountains; 2) top-center dark “Standards” slide with a leather strap photo on the left, mustard title text, and small icon rows; 3) top-right wide purple-and-white “Design” slide with a seated laptop illustration and geometric UI decorations; 4) far top-right pastel gradient “Design” title slide; 5) left-middle black-and-white “Legacy” slide with the word partly cropped and a grayscale portrait holding an object, face obscured by a gray blur; 6) center-middle “Suzhou” slide with serif title, pale mountains, and a black-and-white classical Chinese garden photo; 7) right-middle vintage storybook “Prince:” slide with a small prince figure sitting on a planet under a starry sky; 8) far-left middle partially cropped antique mural/fresco slide with only the ending of a word visible; 9) central dominant {argument name="product name" default="Pi"} logo-and-slogan banner; 10) far-right dark lecture slide titled “3. Masterworks: Iconic Re…” with dense bullet text and small icons; 11) lower-left “Solstice” slide with soft watercolor greenery, a sun, lake, and sunflowers; 12) lower-center “Craftsmanship” slide with serif title, small circular icons, folded fabric photos, and a signature label; 13) lower-right map slide with a stylized terrain map and orange route line; 14) far-right small “Route” card with four colored square legend markers; 15) bottom-left misty karst mountain river photo tile; 16) bottom-center “3. User Experience Design” slide with paragraphs, bullet cards, and a smartphone mockup on a pale iridescent background; 17) bottom-right beige “Morandi Color System: Definition, History, and Professional Applications” slide with muted vases and botanical decor, plus a partially visible blue-purple technology slide titled “Apple Liquid G… Next-Generation Interface Design.”

Visual style: The collage should feel like a premium product-launch hero image for AI presentation generation: crisp typography, high visual diversity, rounded 12–18 px corners, clean white separators, subtle depth, and a balanced mix of neutral tones, pastel purple, sage green, muted blue, charcoal, cream, and watercolor textures.

Text constraints: Keep the central slogan large and fully legible. Other slide titles may be smaller but should resemble realistic presentation text. Use English text only. Do not add people outside the described slide thumbnails, do not add browser chrome, and do not include watermarks.
title: Pi Presentation Template Collage
description: A square promotional mosaic showcasing diverse AI-generated presentation slide designs around a central Pi logo and slogan.

content:
Goal: Create a clean black-and-white logo guide and usage sheet for {argument name="event name" default="AI COSPLAY EXPO 2026"}, presented as a professional brand identity document.

Canvas: Portrait A4-style page, white background, thin light-gray divider lines, generous margins, crisp monochrome vector look. Use bold futuristic techno sans-serif typography, all caps, high contrast black ink.

Header: Top-left title reads “AI COSPLAY EXPO 2026” with small subtitle “INTERNATIONAL EVENT” underneath. Top-right small label reads “LOGO GUIDE & USAGE SHEET”. A thin horizontal rule separates the header from the main content.

Core logo design: The symbol is a black silhouette of a cute anime-style twin-tail cosplay girl standing inside four broken corner brackets, with a small diamond sparkle below. Combine it with bold text “AI COSPLAY EXPO” and large stacked numerals “2026”, plus the small tagline “- INTERNATIONAL EVENT -” and credit line “produced by {argument name="producer name" default="AI lady collection"}”.

Layout: Divide the page into exactly 7 numbered brand-guide sections using small black square number badges and thin gray rules.

Sections:
1. “PRIMARY LOGO – HORIZONTAL”: large horizontal lockup. Symbol on the left, text on the right: “AI COSPLAY EXPO” above huge “2026”, tagline “- INTERNATIONAL EVENT -”, and credit “produced by AI lady collection”.
2. “STACKED LOGO”: vertical centered lockup. Symbol on top, “AI COSPLAY EXPO” stacked in three lines, large “2026”, tagline, and producer credit below.
3. “SYMBOL MARK”: standalone large silhouette symbol only.
4. “MONOCHROME VARIATIONS”: show exactly 4 logo variations: black horizontal logo, gray/outline horizontal logo, black stacked logo, gray/outline stacked logo.
5. “INVERTED (WHITE ON BLACK)”: black rectangle containing exactly 2 white reversed logos: one horizontal logo at top and one stacked logo below.
6. “CLEAR SPACE / MINIMUM SIZE”: left side shows the horizontal logo inside a dotted clear-space box with “A” spacing markers on the top, left, right, and bottom; right side shows exactly 2 minimum-size examples: “MINIMUM SIZE (PRINT)” with width label “25mm / 0.98 in”, and “MINIMUM SIZE (DIGITAL)” with width label “32px”.
7. “USAGE EXAMPLES”: show exactly 4 simple outline icons with labels: globe icon labeled “INTERNATIONAL APPAREL”, ticket icon labeled “EVENTS & TICKETING”, open book icon labeled “MAGAZINE & EDITORIAL”, and medal badge icon labeled “STAFF & EXHIBITOR”.

Footer: Bottom strip divided into three columns. Left column title “ORGANIZER TEXT EXAMPLES” with two Japanese-style text lines: “主催: AI lady collection” and “公式 SNS: AI lady collection”. Center column contains a small stacked version of the logo. Right column title “CREDIT LINE” with the line “produced by AI lady collection”.

Visual style: Minimal Swiss grid meets Japanese event-brand manual, precise alignment, thin gray separators, no color except black, white, and light gray. Make all text legible, sharp, and print-ready. Avoid extra sections, extra icons, watermarks, gradients, shadows, or decorative backgrounds.
title: AI Cosplay Expo Logo Guide Sheet
description: A monochrome brand identity usage sheet for a fictional AI cosplay expo logo, suitable for event branding mockups and style guide presentations.

content: Perfect for modern design and conceptual projects, this prompt creates serene and balanced minimalist scenes. These visuals use clean compositions, negative space, and subtle textures to evoke calmness and sophistication.

content:
Goal: Create a clean gallery sheet of vintage illustrated postage-stamp designs for an atlas-style North American city collection, presented as collectible UI/export assets.

Canvas: Landscape canvas, about 870×653 px, off-white background with generous margins and even spacing. Arrange the stamps in a precise 3-row by 6-column grid, for exactly 18 stamps total. Each city appears as a pair: first a sepia monochrome stamp, then a muted full-color version.

Layout: Use three horizontal rows with six stamps per row. Leave wide white space between stamp pairs and rows. Add faint small gray export filename captions under the paired groups, aligned near the lower left of each pair, such as “stamp-export-atlas-north-america-46”, “stamp-export-atlas-north-america-47”, “stamp-export-atlas-north-america-48”, continuing through the visible groups.

Stamp design: Every stamp is vertical with cream perforated edges, aged paper texture, thin ornate border, and an oval or arched central illustration window. Put “SOL” in the top-left corner and “100” in the top-right corner of every stamp. At the bottom of each stamp, include a ribbon banner with the city or neighborhood name, then stacked location text below it. Use engraved linework, antique travel-poster composition, soft shadows, and slightly worn ink.

Exact stamp count and labels: Include exactly 18 individual stamps in this order, left to right, top to bottom: 1 sepia Boston, Massachusetts, United States with a narrow historic street scene; 2 color Boston, Massachusetts, United States with red-brick buildings and a streetlamp; 3 sepia Charlotte, North Carolina, United States with a cozy storefront street and a “Noda” sign; 4 color Charlotte, North Carolina, United States with colorful buildings, plants, and blue sky; 5 sepia Chicago, Illinois, United States with a vertical “Chicago” theater sign and urban architecture; 6 color Chicago, Illinois, United States with the same theater sign in warm gold and teal tones; 7 sepia Wicker Park, Chicago, Illinois, USA with a storefront facade; 8 color Wicker Park, Chicago, Illinois, USA with an orange-brick storefront and teal sign; 9 sepia Cincinnati, Ohio, United States with a historic market building; 10 color Cincinnati, Ohio, United States with the same market in brick orange, green trim, and sky-blue background; 11 sepia Cleveland, Ohio, United States showing a grand arched arcade interior; 12 color Cleveland, Ohio, United States with teal glass ceiling and warm interior perspective; 13 sepia Dallas, Texas, United States with skyline and a “Deep Ellum” sign; 14 color Dallas, Texas, United States with lively street colors, teal sky, and Deep Ellum sign; 15 sepia Denver, Colorado, United States with a blue bear statue form against a glass building; 16 color Denver, Colorado, United States with a bright blue bear and green glass facade; 17 sepia Des Moines, Iowa, United States with a Tudor-style house; 18 color Des Moines, Iowa, United States with red roof, cream walls, green lawn, and blue sky.

Text content: Keep the stamp typography uppercase and vintage serif. Use the customizable collection mark {argument name="stamp currency text" default="SOL"}, denomination {argument name="stamp value" default="100"}, and export caption prefix {argument name="export filename prefix" default="stamp-export-atlas-north-america"}. Preserve the city labels as readable English, but allow the overall series theme to be {argument name="atlas region" default="North America"} and the visual finish to be {argument name="stamp finish" default="alternating sepia engraving and muted full color"}.

Visual style: Antique engraved postal ephemera, travel stamp sheet, cream paper, scalloped perforations, subtle drop shadows, fine hatch shading, warm browns, faded inks, muted teal, rust, ochre, brick red, and sky blue. Make the colored stamps look hand-tinted rather than modern digital. Keep all stamps consistent in size and framing.

Constraints: Do not add people, logos, watermarks, or extra stamps. The key requirement is exactly 18 stamps in a 3×6 grid, with paired sepia/color variants for the 9 listed places, readable city/state/country labels, “SOL” and “100” on every stamp, and faint gray export filenames beneath the groups.

Below it, create one large white rounded rectangle card with a thin pale gray border. Inside the card, place exactly 6 image thumbnails in a 2-column by 3-row grid, each thumbnail with rounded corners. Each thumbnail has a floating circular delete button overlapping its top-right corner; there are exactly 6 delete buttons, each white with a gray X icon. Use {argument name="accent color" default="soft pink"} for the small image icon background and {argument name="text color" default="slate blue-gray"} for the title and upload text.

content:
Goal: Create a polished marketing mockup for a Japanese mobile app called {argument name="app name" default="ES添削AI"}, an AI entry-sheet/resume critique app for students, shown as three iPhone-style screens side by side on a clean white background.

Canvas: Wide horizontal image, approximately 16:9. Place exactly 3 black-framed modern iPhones with rounded corners, top Dynamic Island, status bar time 9:41, and bottom home indicator. Use bright white UI cards, soft shadows, rounded corners, and a purple-to-blue gradient accent style. Overall look should be like a realistic App Store/SNS concept mockup, clean and trustworthy.

Phone 1, Home screen: Header text at top left reads 「ES添削AI」, with a circular user/profile icon at top right. Hero section includes a small purple sparkle label 「AIがあなたのESをプロ視点で徹底添削します」, a bold headline 「あなたの強みが、もっと伝わるESへ。」, supporting copy 「通過率を上げるESを一緒に作りましょう。」, and a small illustration of a student working on a laptop with purple AI/chat icons. Section title 「添削を始める」. Add one large gradient call-to-action card with a document icon, text 「ESを新しく添削する」 and smaller copy 「ESを入力またはファイルをアップロードして、AIが添削します」 plus a right chevron. Section title 「機能一覧」. Show exactly 4 feature list cards: 1) clock icon, 「添削履歴」, 「過去に添削したESを確認できます」; 2) chat icon, 「面接質問を予測」, 「あなたのESから面接で聞かれそうな質問を生成します」; 3) person icon, 「自己分析サポート」, 「強みやガクチカを整理するお手伝いをします」; 4) building icon, 「企業別アピール提案」, 「志望企業に合わせたアピールポイントを提案します」. Bottom navigation contains exactly 5 items: 「ホーム」 active, 「添削履歴」, 「面接質問」, 「自己分析」, 「企業別提案」.

Phone 2, Results overview screen: Top bar has a back arrow and centered title 「添削結果」. Under it, show exactly 4 tabs: 「総合評価」 active with purple underline, 「項目別評価」, 「添削コメント」, 「改善例」. Main white card title 「総合評価」. Left side has a circular score ring showing {argument name="score" default="87"} and 「/100」. Right side text reads 「評価ランク」, large rank {argument name="grade" default="A"}, 「素晴らしいESです！」, and 「この調子で仕上げましょう。」. Next card title 「通過率予測」, text 「このESの通過率は高いと予測されます」, green badge 「高」, horizontal progress bar, and 「80%以上」. Next card title 「強み」 with exactly 3 green check items: 「具体的なエピソードが書けている」, 「あなたの価値観が伝わっている」, 「企業とのマッチ度が高い」. Next card title 「改善ポイント（優先度順）」 with exactly 3 numbered rows: 1 「結論をより明確に書きましょう」 with red badge 「高」; 2 「成果を数字で示すと説得力が増します」 with orange badge 「中」; 3 「ガクチカの背景をもう少し詳しく」 with gray badge 「低」. At bottom, a large purple-blue gradient button reads 「改善例を見る」.

Phone 3, Detailed comments screen: Top bar has a back arrow and centered title 「添削結果」. Repeat exactly 4 tabs: 「総合評価」, 「項目別評価」, 「添削コメント」 active with purple underline, 「改善例」. Show exactly 2 visible critique sections in stacked white cards. Section 1 heading 「設問1：学生時代に力を入れたこと」 with red badge 「高」, subheading 「コメント」, comment text explaining that the conclusion is written last and should first communicate what the student accomplished, and that numerical results improve persuasiveness. Then subheading 「改善例」 with a light purple suggestion box labeled 「AI提案例」 containing rewritten Japanese text about focusing on increasing sales at a cafe, working as an part-time leader, and increasing sales by 20% in 3 months. Section 2 heading 「設問2：あなたの強み」 with orange badge 「中」, subheading 「コメント」, comment text explaining to support how the strength was demonstrated with an episode and to end with how it can be used at the company. Then subheading 「改善例」 with a light purple suggestion box labeled 「AI提案例」 containing a rewritten example beginning 「私の強みは『課題解決力』です。」 and mentioning cafe congestion and improving operations, cropped slightly at the bottom as if scrollable.

Visual style: Japanese iOS app UI, San Francisco/Noto Sans style typography, purple and indigo gradients, subtle pastel lavender highlights, blue accent icons, soft card shadows, crisp alignment, plenty of white space. Use realistic phone hardware shadows and spacing. Keep text legible and mostly identical to the specified Japanese labels.

Constraints: Show exactly 3 phones, exactly 4 home feature cards, exactly 5 bottom navigation items on the first phone, exactly 4 tabs on each results screen, exactly 3 strengths, exactly 3 improvement points, and exactly 2 visible comment sections. Do not add extra screens, watermarks, logos, or decorative clutter.

content:

The app name should be {argument name="app title" default="レポート添削AI"} and the screen should look like a finished product UI.

Canvas: Wide horizontal image, approximately 16:7 aspect ratio. Center a large rounded rectangle app window with a soft shadow, thin light-gray border, and bright white background. Add subtle vertical divider lines and very light gradients to make it feel like a polished SaaS/mobile web interface.

Layout: Use exactly 2 main content panels inside the app window. Left panel is the report input area. Right panel is the AI correction results area. Place a dark circular close button with a white “×” in the top-right corner of the modal. Add two floating dark pill buttons near the bottom-left overlapping the modal: one labeled “＋ ALT” and one labeled “編集”. A partial dark rounded bar is barely visible at the bottom-right edge, cropped by the image frame.

Left panel details: At the top center, show the heading “レポート添削AI” and a smaller subtitle “AIがあなたのレポートを改善します”. Below, add the section label “レポートを入力してください”. Show a large textarea card with a sample Japanese report paragraph about SNS usage among young people; include a small character counter “128/3000” at the lower right of the textarea. Under the textarea, place one prominent purple rounded button labeled “添削する”. Beneath the button, add a tiny caption “AIによる添削開始”.

Right panel details: Add the title “AIによる添削結果”. Show a rating row with label “総合評価” and a small green rounded badge labeled “B+”. Then create an “改善ポイント” section containing exactly 3 checklist items, each preceded by a green circular check icon: 1) “具体例があると説得力が増します”, 2) “データや根拠を加えるとより良くなります”, 3) “結論を明確にすると締まりが良くなります”. Below that, add an “改善例” section with a paragraph of Japanese corrected text beginning with “近年、SNSの利用者数は増加しており、2023年の総務省の調査によると、10代の約90%がSNSを利用している。” and continuing in small readable Japanese body text.

Visual style: Minimal Japanese product UI, Apple-like rounded corners, crisp sans-serif Japanese typography, black and dark-gray text, green success accents, purple primary CTA button with slight gradient, generous whitespace, realistic soft shadows, high-resolution screenshot aesthetic.

Constraints: Keep the UI text in Japanese exactly where specified, use no extra panels beyond the 2 main panels, include exactly 3 checklist improvement items, no people, no illustrations, no watermark, no browser chrome, no phone frame.

At the top, place a small brand row with a circular mint leaf-like logo, the word {argument name="product name" default="MINTPAGE"}, a thin divider line, and the subtitle {argument name="brand subtitle" default="AI LANDING PAGE STUDIO"}. In the center panel, show the headline “From Idea to Code. Instantly.” with “Code. Instantly.” in mint italic styling, followed by form fields such as Business Name, Target Audience, and Core Mission. On the right panel, show a code editor titled “Live Environment” with readable but small React/Tailwind-style code and a short rendered text snippet saying “Landing pages that look iconic. Built to convert.”

Foreground objects: On the left side of the desk, place a translucent acrylic desk plaque with the circular logo and the text “MINTPAGE” and “AI LANDING PAGE STUDIO.” Beneath or beside it, stack exactly 3 slim books with visible spine labels: 1) BUILT FOR CONVERSION, 2) REACT + TAILWIND + AI, 3) DESIGN SYSTEMS THAT SCALE. In front of the monitor, place a slim white keyboard. On the right side, place a small translucent floating status card titled “PROJECT STATUS” listing exactly 5 checked items: 1) Live Environment, 2) Context Defined, 3) Style Generated, 4) Design Created, 5) Code Exported. Also include a pale blue ribbed pen cup with exactly 4 writing tools and a white mouse.

Environment: Minimal modern office with soft-focus shelves and plants in the background, large window lighting from the right, subtle reflections on the glass desktop, gentle depth of field, no people.

Visual style: Premium startup launch graphic, soft volumetric lighting, realistic product photography, glassmorphism overlays, mint-green accents, dark blue serif typography, crisp UI details, calm high-end studio atmosphere.

Constraints: Use exactly the counted elements listed above, keep the image uncluttered, make the headline the most prominent text, avoid extra logos, watermarks, or unrelated text.

content:
Goal: Create a dark editorial benchmark comparison card for {argument name="headline text" default="Tilt-shift palace corridor — avant-garde"}, comparing two generated fashion images in a palace corridor.

Canvas: Square 1024×1024 social media graphic with a nearly black warm-brown background, thin divider lines, and a refined fashion/tech review aesthetic.

Layout: Use exactly 2 stacked image panels centered horizontally, each with a palace corridor fashion render. The top panel is larger and begins near the upper third; the bottom panel sits directly below with a thin horizontal separator between them. Add a small header at the very top left reading “FASHION EDITORIAL · TECHNICAL LIGHTING”. Add a bottom caption band with the headline, a score-delta pill, a short note, and subtle branding.

Panel 1: A high-quality fashion editorial render labeled near the top left “GPT IMAGE · HIGH” and marked with a coral rounded “WINNER” badge near the top right. Show a full-body avant-garde model standing centered in a grand arched palace corridor with perfect one-point perspective, tall columns, classical statues, bright window light, and strong tilt-shift depth blur toward the distance. The model wears a geometric black, cream, and gray structured dress with sharp diagonal stripes, symmetrical shoulder panels, a cinched waist, a wide skirt with black diamond shapes, and a small architectural circular handbag held at the right side. The face should be intentionally blurred/obscured. Add a large white score “{argument name="top score" default="3.7"}” at the lower right of the panel.

Panel 2: A lower-quality competing render labeled near the top left “NANO BANANA PRO”. Show the same concept but less accurate: a centered model in the same sunlit vaulted palace corridor, warmer golden lighting, strong blur, less perfect geometry, and a flatter/less faithful outfit. The model holds an architectural circular object across the chest, with the face also blurred/obscured. Add a large translucent gray score “{argument name="bottom score" default="2.8"}” at the lower right of this panel.

Bottom text content: In the lower band, display the headline “{argument name="headline text" default="Tilt-shift palace corridor — avant-garde"}” in bold white. Beneath it place one coral pill reading “{argument name="score delta" default="GPT +0.9"}”, followed by the note “Perfect one-point perspective, geometric outfit fidelity”. Put a small orange V-shaped logo and the word “vibedex” at bottom left, and a faint “@vibedex” at bottom right.

Visual style: Premium dark UI, muted cream and black palette, coral accents, clean sans-serif typography, crisp alignment, cinematic shadows, shallow depth of field, editorial fashion lighting, and subtle grain.

Constraints: Include exactly 2 image panels, exactly 2 score numbers, exactly 2 model figures, exactly 1 winner badge, exactly 1 headline, exactly 1 score-delta pill, and exactly 2 brand marks. Preserve the split-screen benchmark layout and avoid adding extra charts, buttons, or decorative icons.
title: Tilt-Shift Palace Corridor Comparison
description: Creates a dark fashion benchmark card comparing two palace-corridor avant-garde model renders with scores and editorial notes.

Goal: Create a vertical promotional app-style mockup for a “selfie to comic” image transformation tool, showing one portrait converted into multiple comic styles while keeping the same face structure recognizable.

Canvas: Tall smartphone-like 4:5 composition, dark glossy interface frame with thin cyan glow lines along the left and right edges. Background outside the phone is softly blurred, like a desk or creative studio with papers and drawing materials.

The retro comic panel should use bold outlines, red and yellow background bursts, blue-black hair highlights, orange skin tones, and halftone dots. Layout: Create a clean desktop landing page with a white background and purple brand accents. Add a top navigation bar with the existing logo/name on the left, five centered menu links labeled 「特徴」, 「使い方」, 「料金」, 「アップデート」, 「よくある質問」, and on the right 「ログイン」 plus a purple CTA button labeled 「無料で始める →」.

Hero section: On the left, add a small rounded badge reading 「AI・個人開発の最新ニュースを毎日お届け」. Add a large bold Japanese headline: {argument name="hero headline" default="開発の「今」を、毎日あなたのもとへ。"} with the phrase 「あなたのもとへ」 highlighted in purple. Below it, add supporting copy: {argument name="hero description" default="DevKnow は、AI・テック・個人開発に関する最新情報を毎日厳選してお届けするニュースアプリです。"}. Add two hero buttons: a primary purple 「無料で始める →」 button and a secondary white 「使い方を見る」 button. Under the buttons, add exactly 3 trust points with small purple check icons: 「登録不要で始める」, 「いつでも解約OK」, 「Webブラウザで利用可能」.

Features section: Beneath the hero, add a centered section label “FEATURES” in purple and the heading 「DevKnow でできること」. Create exactly 4 rounded feature cards in one row with soft shadows and purple icons: 1) lightning icon, title 「毎日の厳選ニュース」, description 「AI・テック・個人開発の最新ニュースを毎日厳選してお届けします。」; 2) stacked layers icon, title 「カテゴリで簡単に検索」, description 「興味のあるカテゴリを選んで、必要な情報にすぐアクセス。」; 3) bookmark icon, title 「保存してあとで読む」, description 「気になるニュースを保存して、あとでゆっくり読めます。」; 4) bell icon, title 「通知で見逃さない」, description 「重要なニュースは通知でお知らせ。トレンドを逃しません。」

Style constraints: Make it look like a modern production-ready landing page, not a raw app screenshot. Use spacious margins, rounded corners, subtle shadows, purple gradient buttons, crisp Japanese typography, and remove any clutter outside the composed landing page. Keep the reference app UI content visible but secondary to the landing page design.
title: DevKnow SaaS Landing Page
description: Generates a polished Japanese SaaS landing page from an existing app screenshot, with hero CTA, product mockup, navigation, and feature cards.

content:
Create a vertical cinematic sci-fi 3D render of a giant transparent glass-like 𝕏/Twitter profile page standing upright on a futuristic circular display platform, with a tiny full-body 3D avatar of the profile owner standing in front of it at the lower right. The profile belongs to {argument name="character name" default="Alexandra Aisling"}, handle {argument name="profile handle" default="@AllaAisling"}. The avatar is a stylish female sci-fi explorer with warm brown skin, short curly hair, orange headphones/goggles, a red-orange utility jumpsuit, cropped cream tactical vest, gloves, and chunky white-orange boots, posed confidently with arms relaxed. The face should be intentionally soft/blurred and not photorealistic, like a personalized avatar placeholder. Behind the profile card is an atmospheric alien city at night with stars, glowing futuristic towers, moons/planets, warm rim lighting, and shallow depth of field.

The profile card should resemble a dark-mode 𝕏 profile interface, scaled like a monumental translucent tablet with rounded corners and glossy edges. At the top is a wide banner image showing a desert sci-fi ruin: a domed white stone building with arched openings, dusty mountains, clouds, and two visible celestial bodies. Add a circular avatar overlapping the banner on the left, matching the character’s orange headphone look with a blurred face. Include a small blue verified check beside the name and an “Edit profile” pill button on the right.

Visible profile text: name “Alexandra Aisling”, handle “@AllaAisling”, bio “AI Creator, redefining the boundaries of AI-generated art, exploring future worlds in writing and images. Adobe Firefly Ambassador.”, joined date “Joined April 2023”, stats “965 Following” and “52.2K Followers”. Include exactly one Communities card labeled “Art Odyssey” with the description “Connect and collaborate with like-minded AI creators, share knowledge and techniques, and inspire innovation in the AI art...” and “4.6K Members”. Include exactly seven navigation tabs: Posts, Replies, Subs, Highlights, Articles, Media, Likes, with Posts selected and underlined in blue. Include one pinned post by Alexandra Aisling with the opening text: “They called her Ghost Circuit. She is the last ronin who refused to surrender her mind to the city’s machine gods.” followed by “Three nights ago, she stole something buried beneath the megacity. Something powerful enough to wake systems that were meant to stay dead forever.” Show faint engagement icons and counts including 112, 243, 1.8K, and 53K.

On the platform, add exactly three foreground props: a small glass dome terrarium containing a miniature version of the same desert ruin on the left, a metallic potted plant on the right, and a glowing front nameplate reading {argument name="nameplate text" default="@AllaAisling"}. Use premium octane-render style, highly detailed materials, cinematic orange-blue lighting, realistic reflections, volumetric atmosphere, and sharp focus on the character and profile card. Keep the composition centered, vertical 2:3 aspect ratio, no extra people, no watermark, no unrelated text.

content:
Goal: Create a warm, sophisticated schematic-aesthetic design systems mood board for {argument name="theme" default="friendly AI interface design"}, combining technical diagrams, vintage paper textures, and subtle futuristic UI symbols.

Canvas: Wide horizontal image, approximately 16:9, with a dark charcoal background and a centered 2-row by 3-column grid of six rectangular panels separated by thick black gutters. The overall mood is warm, archival, precise, and slightly mysterious, like a design-system exploration wall.

Layout: Use exactly 6 panels:
1. Top-left panel: dark navy/black technical blueprint with an orbital spiral or galaxy-like contour diagram, fine cyan linework, small glowing amber dots, vertical measuring lines, tiny unreadable annotations, and a small boxed icon near the bottom right.
2. Top-middle panel: cream paper schematic of a cute rounded robot face, made from layered rounded-rectangle contour lines, two teal dot eyes, a small peach smile, vertical and horizontal construction lines, small crosshair marks, and faint measurement notations.
3. Top-right panel: warm beige abstract architectural flight-path schematic with sweeping teal and gray arcs, angular line structures, fine grid lines, crosshairs, orange glow points, and tiny technical labels.
4. Bottom-left panel: aged spiral-bound notebook page with paper tape on the corners, circular radar charts, geometric construction diagrams, small UI glyphs, a peach smiley sticker in the upper right, a small card near the bottom left, and a red hexagonal stamp near the bottom right.
5. Bottom-middle panel: misty futuristic architectural landscape or plaza in muted teal and tan, overlaid with perspective grids, fine UI measurement lines, subtle orange highlights, and translucent schematic annotations.
6. Bottom-right panel: dark charcoal icon-system sheet containing exactly 54 small geometric UI glyphs arranged in a clean grid, using thin teal, peach, and beige lines; include circles, sliders, crosshairs, brackets, arrows, nodes, target symbols, grids, and abstract interface controls.

Visual style: Warm take on technical schematics; combine Bauhaus-like precision, mid-century information design, old engineering drawings, soft futuristic interface graphics, and tactile analog materials. Use muted colors: charcoal black, faded cream, parchment beige, dusty teal, pale cyan, peach, amber, and soft gray. Lines should be extremely fine and precise, with subtle glow only on small highlights. Add paper grain, scan texture, faint speckles, worn edges, and layered transparent drafting marks.

Text and marks: Include tiny pseudo-technical annotations and measurement ticks, but keep all text mostly illegible and decorative. Avoid large readable headlines. Use minimal symbols such as plus signs, crosshairs, coordinates, micro labels, and tiny rule marks.

Constraints: No people, no photorealistic objects except paper/notebook texture, no logos, no watermark, no extra panels beyond the 6 specified panels. Maintain a polished design-system exploration feel rather than a chaotic collage.
title: Warm Schematic Design System Board
description: Generates a six-panel warm technical mood board for exploring futuristic AI interface design systems.

content:
Goal: Create an ornate vertical Chinese historical-romance poster / character infographic featuring {argument name="character name" default="Shi Xiangyun"} as a full-body young noblewoman in a spring garden, blending cinematic photorealism with delicate illustrated UI overlays.

Canvas: Vertical 2:3 poster, warm parchment-and-gold palette, soft morning sunlight, shallow depth of field, high detail. Background is a blooming classical Chinese courtyard garden with pavilions, stone path, flowering trees, peonies, drifting pink petals, and a dreamy misty atmosphere.

Main subject: Centered full-body Hanfu woman standing on a round carved stone platform. She wears a flowing pastel embroidered Hanfu in {argument name="dress colors" default="pale blue, blush pink, ivory, and soft teal"}, layered translucent sleeves and long ribbons moving in the breeze, floral embroidery, pink sash belt, tassel ornaments, embroidered shoes, and ornate traditional hair buns decorated with small flowers and hairpins. Her right arm reaches toward the viewer holding a small green floral porcelain wine cup; her left hand holds a bouquet of large pink peonies. Use a graceful, poised, friendly gesture, with the face softly obscured or left non-specific.

Left title column: Add a textured parchment vertical strip on the left. Large black brush-calligraphy title reads 「史湘云」. Smaller vertical subtitle reads 「红楼梦·枕霞旧友」. Add a small red seal stamp. Below are exactly 3 stacked rectangular navigation tabs labeled: 1) 「明朗豪爽」 2) 「醉卧芍药」 3) 「少年清气」.

Information cards: Surround the subject with exactly 8 vintage parchment story cards connected by thin gold geometric lines, small circular number badges, translucent crystal-like paper shards, and faint constellation nodes. Each card has a sepia miniature illustration and Chinese title/body text. Use these exact numbered titles:
01 「史府旧影 湘云初至」
02 「大观园中 掌声成趣」
03 「海棠诗社 才思明快」
04 「芦雪庵联 豪气纵笔」
05 「醉卧芍药 春梦花眠」
06 「金麒麟缘 命运微响」
07 「枕霞旧友 笑语如风」
08 「云散高唐 明朗余音」
Place cards 01, 02, 03, 04 down the left/left-lower side and cards 05, 06, 07, 08 down the right side. Keep the card text small, decorative, and secondary; prioritize the titles and the numbered badges.

Bottom elements: At the base of the platform, add a gold plaque with the quote {argument name="bottom quote" default="一盏春酒，满身花气"}. Along the very bottom edge, add a thin gold timeline with exactly 5 labeled nodes: 「初至」, 「诗社」, 「联句」, 「醉卧」, 「余音」.

Visual style: Elegant Chinese vintage editorial design, Red Chamber Dream aesthetic, parchment texture, gold filigree borders, ink brush typography, sepia story thumbnails, translucent collage fragments, romantic peony blossoms, soft bokeh, premium museum-poster composition, highly detailed fabric and embroidery, cinematic lighting.

Constraints: Keep all text in Chinese exactly where specified, use no English text inside the image, no watermark, no logo, no extra cards, no extra timeline nodes, no modern objects.
title: Shi Xiangyun Hanfu Story Poster
description: Creates an ornate Chinese historical-romance character infographic poster with a Hanfu heroine, peony garden setting, and eight numbered story cards.

content: Create an abstract vertical phone wallpaper showing a close-up surface of clear tropical water with shimmering caustic light patterns, soft ripples, and iridescent pastel color refractions. The image should fill a tall {argument name="aspect ratio" default="9:16"} canvas with no horizon, no objects, no people, and no text. Use a luminous aqua and cyan base with areas of {argument name="accent colors" default="lavender, violet, pale pink, and turquoise"}, like sunlight refracting through shallow pool water or holographic glass. Include exactly three noticeable circular ripple whirlpools: one near the upper-left edge, one larger spiral in the lower-left quadrant, and one small partial spiral near the bottom center edge. Add long diagonal wave streaks flowing from upper right to lower left, bright white highlights, pearly glow, subtle rainbow dispersion, and a dreamy high-key exposure. The overall style is photorealistic but ethereal, glossy, clean, and suitable as a calming smartphone wallpaper.
title: Iridescent Water Phone Wallpaper

content:
Goal: Create a polished 2D fantasy auto-battler gameplay mockup for {argument name="game title or mode" default="round 3-2"}, shown from an isometric top-down perspective, with a stone-tile battle arena, UI overlays, characters, shop cards, traits, and player leaderboard.

Canvas: 16:9 widescreen game screenshot, 1152×768 style composition, crisp hand-painted fantasy game art with high readability, saturated colors, soft ambient lighting, and League-of-Legends/TFT-inspired interface design.

Layout: The center is a square stone battlefield grid on a floating forest platform. The arena has worn beige tiles, mossy edges, stairs and stone railings, evergreen trees, cliffs, water at the right edge, purple banners, glowing blue crystals on the left, and four flaming braziers placed near the arena corners. At the top center, place a dark ornate HUD bar showing “3-2”, small trait/item icons, a gold counter “26”, and a long cyan progress bar beneath it. At top right, add three rounded menu buttons with icons: helmet, book, and gear.

Battlefield units: Show exactly 11 visible characters on the board: 5 enemy units on the upper half with red health bars, and 6 allied units on the lower half with green health bars and yellow star ratings. Enemy units: 1 skeleton swordsman, 1 large horned beast warrior with axe, 1 purple mage holding glowing magic, 1 small dark rogue with axe, and 1 armored skeleton fighter. Allied units: 1 blue-and-brown knight with sword and shield, 1 green elf archer/swordsman, 1 blue-armored mage or knight with staff, 1 blonde cleric holding a golden staff, 1 massive horned tank warrior with shield, and 1 small blue gnome engineer/warrior. Add a small bench character standing at the lower-left edge of the board.

Left trait panel: Create a vertical synergy list with exactly 6 rows, each with a bronze/dark icon, class name, current count, and thresholds. The visible French text should be preserved: “Guerrier” with “4” and “2 / 4 / 6”; “Mage” with “3” and “3 / 6 / 9”; “Assassin” with “2” and “2 / 4 / 6”; “Gardien” with “2” and “2 / 4 / 6”; “Elfe” with “1 / 2”; “Nécromancien” with “1 / 2”.

Right leaderboard: Add a vertical player list with exactly 8 players, each in a dark horizontal nameplate with circular avatar on the right and health number. Use these names and values: “Lunaire 100”, “Ragnar 89”, “Akira 78”, “Zorvath 64”, “Nyméria 56”, “Scarn 42”, “Yuki 34”, “Kaldrin 21”. Use varied colorful fantasy portraits: purple mage orb, blue creature, dark red portrait, green orc, pink-haired character, cyan creature, orange-haired character, blue masked character.

Bottom shop and controls: Along the bottom, create a wide shop UI panel. On the left, show a level box reading “NIV. 6” with XP “12/36” and a small cyan progress bar. Under it, exactly 2 control buttons: “Acheter XP” with coin cost “4” and blue double-up arrow icon, and “Actualiser” with coin cost “2” and circular refresh arrow. In the center, show exactly 5 purchasable champion cards with portrait art, class/trait icons, French names and traits, and gold costs: “Chevalier” / “Guerrier” cost 1; “Archer sylvestre” / “Elfe” cost 2; “Mage de givre” / “Mage” cost 3; “Assassin des ombres” / “Assassin” cost 2; “Clerc lumineux” / “Gardien” cost 1. On the bottom right, place a large ornate gold-bordered button labeled “Fin du tour” with coin cost “5”.

Visual style: Painterly fantasy game UI, clean bevels, dark teal and bronze interface frames, readable small text, glowing magic effects, warm firelight, cyan highlights, and compact mobile/PC strategy-game presentation. Keep the mockup as a single in-game screenshot, not a poster or concept sheet. Avoid photorealism, avoid extra panels, avoid watermarks, and do not add more units, shop cards, trait rows, or players than specified.
title: Fantasy Auto-Battler Gameplay UI
description: Generates a detailed isometric fantasy auto-battler screenshot mockup with board units, synergies, shop cards, leaderboard, and French UI labels for game prototype visuals.

content:
Create an ultra-realistic cinematic house exterior with stunning architectural design and premium visual aesthetics. The house can be {argument name="architectural style" default="modern, luxury, rustic, cottage, gothic, fantasy, royal, or minimalist"} in style. Include highly detailed architecture, large windows, elegant textures, beautiful landscaping, realistic pathways, glowing interior lighting, and immersive outdoor surroundings.

The environment should feel like a high-budget movie scene mixed with professional architectural photography and luxury real-estate advertising. Add dramatic cinematic lighting, volumetric sunlight, atmospheric fog, realistic reflections, shadows, {argument name="weather or time" default="rain or sunset mood"}, garden lights, trees, flowers, water elements, and detailed environmental effects for a visually powerful composition.

Use wide-angle cinematic camera perspective, depth of field, HDR lighting, ray tracing, photorealistic rendering, Unreal Engine quality, cinematic color grading, hyper-detailed textures, luxury aesthetic, masterpiece composition, ultra-realistic environment design, highly immersive atmosphere, 8K ultra detail.
