content: 16:9, do this for 4 famous space missions: void main() { string[] subjects = {"{argument name="subject one" default="[SUB_1]"}", "{argument name="subject two" default="[SUB_2]"}", "[SUB_3]", "[SUB_4]"}; // Setup Materials vec3 bg_mat = pure_black_matte(); vec3 ui_ink = unlit_metallic_gold(depth: 0.0); vec3 sculpture_mat = pbr_metal(brass, chrome) + refractive_glass(IOR: 1.5); // Setup Viewports (2x2 Grid) vec4 canvas = clear(bg_mat); for(int i=0; i<4; i++) { vec2 quadrant = get_grid_cell(i, columns: 2); // Render 3D Centerpiece mat4 reliquary = build_intricate_model(subjects[i], sculpture_mat); render_to_cell(quadrant, reliquary, lighting: museum_spotlight); // Render 2D UI Overlays vec3 wireframe = generate_blueprint(subjects[i]); vec3 text_data = infer_specs_and_quotes(subjects[i]); draw_hud(quadrant, wireframe + text_data, material: ui_ink); } // Add Global Text draw_hud(header, "{argument name="mission theme" default="[THEME]"} CORES", material: ui_ink); fragColor = canvas; }
title: Space Mission Technical Artifacts
description: A creative code-based template for generating technical visualizations of space missions as a 2x2 grid of museum artifacts with HUD overlays.

content:
Goal: Create a realistic dark-mode mobile cooking AI assistant interface showing recipe suggestions generated from fridge ingredients, in Japanese.

Canvas: Vertical smartphone screenshot, approximately 4:5 crop, black outer background with a centered app feed column. Use rounded corners, soft shadows, and a premium food-app aesthetic.

Layout: At the top, place one rounded dark charcoal chat bubble containing Japanese assistant text. Below it, show a vertically scrolling list of recipe cards. Exactly 2 recipe cards are visible: the first card is fully visible, the second card is only partially visible at the bottom.

Text content: The top chat bubble says: 「冷蔵庫の食材を活かし、フライパン一つで完結する健康的な10種のレシピをご提案します。味付けや調理法が重ならないよう、バリエーション豊かに構成しました。」 The first recipe card title says: 「鳥手羽元のエキゾチック酢煮込み」. Its description says: 「かんたん酢とニンニクを効かせた、中東風の爽やかでコクのある煮込みです。手羽元が驚くほど柔らかく仕上がります。」 The link text says: 「レシピを見る」.

Card details: Recipe card 1 has a large food photo on top and a dark information panel underneath. The photo shows {argument name="main dish" default="braised chicken drumettes with sliced onions in a light brown sauce"} served in a shallow beige ceramic bowl on a warm wooden table, photographed from a slightly overhead angle with natural restaurant lighting. Add black pepper specks on the chicken, glossy sauce, and soft depth of field. Place exactly 1 circular white heart-outline favorite button at the upper-right corner of the image area. The information panel below is very dark brown-black with the title in bold white, description in muted gray, and the recipe link in pale pink.

Second card: Show only the top portion of a second recipe card beneath the first, separated by vertical spacing. It should include a large cropped food photo showing a bowl of creamy pale-yellow noodles or soup on a wooden table, with exactly 1 circular white heart-outline favorite button at the upper-right corner. Do not show its title in the crop.

Visual style: Modern Japanese recipe app UI, dark theme, rounded 18–22 px cards, subtle borders, soft shadows, high-resolution food photography, clean sans-serif typography. Use warm browns, beige ceramic, black charcoal panels, and muted pink accent text.

Constraints: Include exactly 1 top chat bubble, exactly 2 visible recipe cards, and exactly 2 heart favorite buttons total. Keep the interface realistic and uncluttered, with no extra icons, navigation bars, watermarks, or English UI text.
title: Dark Japanese Recipe App UI
description: Generates a dark-mode Japanese cooking assistant screen with recipe cards and realistic food photography for app mockup use.

content:
Goal: Create a wide screenshot-style gallery view showing multiple generated variations of the same modern business illustration sheet.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 image, {argument name="canvas size" default="1792x1024"}, with a black application-like background and thin gutters between image tiles. At the very top, include a rounded black prompt bar containing small white monospaced text beginning with a visible JSON-style snippet: {argument name="visible prompt text" default="{\"size\": \"1792x1024\", \"prompt\": \"A modern illustration sheet displayed on a soft light grey background.\\nThe illustrations are arranged in a structured grid layout of 2 rows with 6 figures per row (12 figures total), ...\"}"}.

Layout: Show exactly 16 rectangular thumbnail tiles arranged in a 4 by 4 grid beneath the prompt bar. Each tile has a soft light gray background and depicts a miniature illustration sheet. The thumbnails are similar but not identical, like generated variations. Use narrow black spacing between tiles and slightly rounded tile corners. Add a subtle small translucent circular play/arrow icon at the lower-right corner of many tiles, as if they are preview cards in a generation interface.

Thumbnail content: Inside each of the 16 tiles, show exactly 12 stylized 3D business figures arranged as 2 rows with 6 figures per row. The people should be diverse in gender, skin tone, age, and clothing, wearing modern office attire such as navy suits, gray blazers, teal trousers, skirts, shirts, sweaters, and business shoes. Include business props throughout the figures: laptops, desks, office chairs, briefcases, clipboards, cardboard boxes, easel flip charts, whiteboards, markers, presentation boards, handshake poses, walking poses, seated computer-work poses, and standing discussion poses. Keep every figure isolated like a clean character-sheet element rather than a continuous scene.

Visual style: Polished semi-realistic 3D illustration, soft studio lighting, subtle shadows under each character, clean corporate presentation aesthetic, muted colors with navy, gray, white, teal, tan, and small accent colors. The overall composition should look like a screen capture of an AI image generation results page, not a single poster.

Constraints: Keep the top prompt bar legible enough to read the beginning, but it may truncate toward the right. Use exactly 16 gallery thumbnails, and within each thumbnail use exactly 12 business figure vignettes in a 2-row by 6-column arrangement. Do not add logos, watermarks, extra interface panels, or unrelated text beyond the top prompt bar.
title: Business Character Sheet Gallery
description: Creates a wide AI-gallery screenshot filled with 16 thumbnail variations of modern 3D business character sheets for presentation or UI mockup use.

content: Create a clean anime-style character bust portrait for a face-part generation template: a centered young female character with {argument name="hair color" default="white hair fading to pale sky blue at the ends"}, shoulder-length slightly messy layered hair with fine wispy strands, visible ears, and a futuristic white high-collar zip-up jacket with subtle light-blue accents and a small triangular detail on the collar zipper. The face area must be deliberately covered by one large vertical rounded rectangle mask, centered over the head from the upper forehead down past the mouth and chin, with a soft vertical gradient from warm pale peach at the top to cool pale blue-gray at the bottom, completely hiding the eyes, nose, and mouth while leaving hair, ears, neck, collar, and shoulders visible. Use a delicate Japanese anime illustration style with thin pale linework, soft watercolor-like shading, very light pastel colors, and a calm sterile sci-fi feel. The background is a plain light gray studio backdrop. Frame as a close-up bust from the top of the head to the upper chest, symmetrical front-facing pose, with the character occupying most of the image. Add a dark screenshot-like border around the artwork and a minimal dark bottom UI strip with faint thumbnail blocks, including tiny text at the lower left reading {argument name="lower left label" default="idle_half_u"} and a small button at the lower right reading {argument name="button label" default="close (esc)"}. Avoid any visible facial features, avoid extra characters, avoid text inside the portrait area, and keep the masked face rectangle perfectly clean and opaque.
title: Anime Face Mask Portrait Template
description: Generates a pastel anime bust portrait with a blank masked face area for creating separate facial-expression parts.

content:
Goal: Create a polished vertical landing-page hero mockup for a design subscription service, with a nostalgic halftone editorial look and Figma-style web design precision.

Canvas: Portrait 3:4 image on a pure black outer background. Center a tall rounded-rectangle website card with large corner radius, occupying most of the frame and leaving thick black margins around it.

Main visual: Inside the card, use a dreamy upward-looking photograph-style scene of wildflowers against a blue sky with soft white clouds. Apply a strong vintage halftone dot texture across the entire card image. Add a dark black gradient overlay rising from the bottom so the lower half becomes moody and readable while the top remains bright sky blue. Visible floral elements should include exactly 9 main blossoms: 1 partial yellow flower in the top-left corner, 1 pink flower near the upper-left, 2 white daisies clustered left-middle, 1 large white cosmos on the right-middle, 1 white daisy near the bottom-left, 1 small bluish flower near lower center, 1 pink flower at lower-right, and 1 dark partially hidden white flower at the bottom-right edge, plus thin stems and tiny baby's-breath buds.

Top navigation: Place exactly 3 small pill buttons centered near the top of the card with subtle glass/blur styling and soft shadows. Button 1 text: "{argument name="login button text" default="Login"}" on a dark charcoal pill. Button 2 text: "{argument name="booking button text" default="Book a call"}" with a small white phone icon before the text on a warm dark translucent pill. Button 3 text: "{argument name="pricing button text" default="See pricing"}" on a pale frosted gray-blue pill. Use small clean sans-serif white text.

Center detail: Add one loading spinner in the middle of the card, made from a white circular ring with a small orange-red dot on the lower-left part of the ring. Keep it simple and crisp.

Hero typography: Near the lower third, center a large elegant white serif headline reading "{argument name="headline text" default="Design & dev\non subscription"}". The first line says “Design & dev”; the second line says “on subscription,” with the word “subscription” in italic serif. Use refined high-contrast type, generous letter spacing, and a luxurious editorial feel.

Call to action: Below the headline, center a small white CTA reading "{argument name="call to action text" default="See Plans"}" followed by a thin right arrow. Keep it minimal and aligned with the headline.

Style constraints: High-end web hero design, realistic floral sky background, halftone print texture, dark cinematic bottom fade, rounded card corners, no browser chrome, no extra logos, no watermark, no additional text beyond the 3 nav buttons, the headline, and the CTA.
title: Halftone Floral Landing Page Hero

content:
Goal: Create a minimalist vertical Japanese title slide for a 7-page career-diagnosis carousel, with an elegant literary feel and a dark starry night background.

Canvas: Square 1:1 format, 768×768, generous negative space, print-like editorial composition.

Background: Deep plum-to-purple gradient, slightly darker at the top and subtly lighter toward the bottom, scattered with small off-white and muted gold star dots. Keep the stars sparse and delicate, with no constellations or large illustrations.

Layout: Left-aligned typography with wide margins. At the top left, place a small uppercase romanized label: “TENSYOKU SHINDAN / 2026.05.15”. Below it, create a large Japanese headline occupying the upper-left half of the canvas. Use four visible headline lines: 1) 「偏見で言う、」 in ivory, 2) 「あなたの本業」 in ivory with 「本業」 slightly muted lavender-gray and crossed by a thin horizontal strikethrough line, 3) 「天職は」 in muted gold, 4) 「これしかない。」 in muted gold. Under the headline, add a compact four-line Japanese body paragraph in ivory: 「会話履歴・案件メモ・スキル設計、」「ぜんぶ読みました。」「他人の評価を寄せ集めて、」「無自覚のまま流している才能を、」「意地悪なくらいハッキリ言語化します。」 Bottom left: small uppercase footer “BIASED / DENSE / HONEST” in muted gold. Bottom right: page indicator “1 / 7” in muted gold.

Typography: Use a refined Japanese Mincho/serif typeface with high contrast strokes for the main headline, large and dramatic. Body text should be smaller but still serif and readable. Roman text should be widely letter-spaced, thin, and understated.

Color palette: Ivory text, muted antique gold accents, lavender-gray emphasis on the stricken word, dark plum background.

Constraints: No people, no icons, no borders, no watermark, no extra text. Maintain a calm premium editorial mood, like a poetic diagnostic report cover.

content:
Goal: Create a clean 16:9 anime-style social media banner about taking a one-day break from posting but returning anyway.

Canvas: Wide landscape canvas, pale warm off-white background, minimalist editorial magazine layout with muted burgundy accents, thin gray lines, small dot grids, and lots of negative space.

Main subject: A half-body anime illustration of {argument name="character description" default="a young woman with shoulder-length wavy dark brown hair, wearing a black ribbed turtleneck sweater tucked into high-waisted camel-brown trousers with a black belt"}. Place her slightly right of center, facing the viewer. Her right arm reaches forward toward the camera with her index finger pointing directly outward, creating strong perspective foreshortening. Her left hand rests casually in a trouser pocket. Add soft painted shadows behind her and subtle hair strands around the face. Cover the upper face area with a large centered square mosaic/blur block in muted taupe, obscuring the face while leaving hair, ears, neck, and pointing finger visible.

Layout and text: Use exactly 5 main text groups. 1) On the left, a large vertical Japanese headline in brush-calligraphy style reading {argument name="left Japanese headline" default="1日投稿できませんでした、"}, with the numeral “1” large and burgundy and the remaining Japanese characters mostly black. 2) On the right side, large burgundy handwritten Japanese text reading {argument name="right Japanese phrase" default="でも…"}. 3) Along the far left edge, small vertical uppercase English text: “THANK YOU FOR WAITING.” 4) In the top-right corner, small stacked uppercase English text: “THANK YOU / FOR YOUR / PATIENCE.” 5) In the lower-right area, small uppercase English text: “I’LL BE BACK / STRONGER.”

Decorative elements: Include thin rectangular outline framing the left headline, a narrow burgundy vertical bar at the far left, tiny dotted square patterns near the top-left and lower-left, thin horizontal divider lines across the top and lower middle, a small burgundy square near the lower-right caption, a partial thin circle and dot motif on the right edge, and a burgundy diagonal hatch block in the bottom-right corner. Keep all decorations sparse and precise.

Visual style: Polished Japanese anime illustration mixed with modern editorial typography; muted palette of off-white, black, charcoal, camel brown, and dusty burgundy. Soft lighting, clean linework, gentle cel-shading, no photorealism.

Constraints: Maintain the same wide banner composition, keep the character centered-right and pointing at the viewer, include exactly the 5 text groups listed, avoid extra characters, logos, watermarks, or additional readable text.
title: Anime Comeback Posting Banner
description: A wide anime-style social media banner showing a woman pointing forward with Japanese comeback text for resuming posting after a one-day break.

content:
Goal: Create a realistic screenshot of a ChatGPT-style web conversation showing an image-generation result for game assets, with Japanese UI text and four generated asset thumbnails.

Canvas: Landscape browser/app screenshot, approximately 797×750 px, white background, clean minimal interface, cropped so only the assistant response area and the bottom row of images are visible.

Layout: At the top center, place one rounded light-gray user message bubble containing {argument name="user request text" default="image genでゲームで使えそうなアセットの画像を4枚を個別で生成して それぞれを3D化してみて！"}. Below it, left aligned, show a small gray status line reading 「25m 50s作業しました 〉」 followed by a thin horizontal divider. Under that, create an assistant response in Japanese with file lists and blue clickable file links.

Text content: Include the assistant paragraph 「できました。4枚のゲーム向けアセット画像を生成して、それぞれPixal3DでGLB化まで通しました。」 Then the label 「画像:」 followed by exactly 4 bullet links with small image/file icons: 1) mana_crystal_alpha.png, 2) treasure_chest_alpha.png, 3) energy_turret_alpha.png, 4) mushroom_house_alpha.png. Then the label 「3D化したGLB:」 followed by exactly 4 bullet links with document icons: 1) mana_crystal.glb, 2) treasure_chest.glb, 3) energy_turret.glb, 4) mushroom_house.glb. Then add the closing Japanese sentence 「生成したのは、魔法クリスタル、宝箱、SFエネルギータレット、きのこ家です。背景はクロマキーから透明化して、3D化に渡しています。」

Bottom image strip: Show exactly 4 rounded-square thumbnail cards in one horizontal row, each about 178×178 px with small gaps. Thumbnail 1 has a vivid green chroma-key background and a stylized fantasy {argument name="asset one" default="blue mana crystal obelisk on a dark stone base"}. Thumbnail 2 has a vivid green chroma-key background and a {argument name="asset two" default="wooden treasure chest with dark metal bands, gold lock, and red jewel"}. Thumbnail 3 has a vivid green chroma-key background and a {argument name="asset three" default="gray sci-fi energy turret with blue glowing core and cannon barrel"}. Thumbnail 4 has a bright magenta chroma-key background and a {argument name="asset four" default="cute mushroom house with red spotted cap roof, wooden door, and warm windows"}. All four assets are polished 3D game-art icons with transparent-cutout style lighting, centered and isolated.

Visual style: Modern ChatGPT interface screenshot, Japanese typography, black body text, blue link text, small monochrome icons, generous margins, subtle divider lines. The asset thumbnails should look like high-quality mobile game props rendered in colorful semi-realistic 3D.

Constraints: Include exactly 8 file links total, exactly 4 PNG links and exactly 4 GLB links, and exactly 4 asset thumbnail images. Do not add extra panels, watermarks, browser chrome, avatars, or unrelated UI controls.
title: ChatGPT Game Asset Generation Screenshot
description: A prompt for recreating a Japanese ChatGPT-style result screen showing four game asset thumbnails and their PNG and GLB download links.

content:
Goal: Create a realistic desktop screenshot of a ChatGPT-style web interface showing a Japanese prompt request and the resulting cyberpunk manga illustration.

Canvas: Landscape browser screenshot, approximately 768×827 px, mostly white background with lots of empty margin. The conversation column is centered slightly to the right, with a generated image preview aligned below and left of the prompt card.

Layout: At the top right, show a small embedded social media profile screenshot. Beneath it, show one large rounded light-gray Japanese prompt bubble. Below and left of the bubble, show a small status line reading “Thought for 1m 19s ›”. Under that, show one tall generated image card with rounded corners, partly visible, followed by a bottom message composer bar spanning the lower width.

Top social profile screenshot: Show exactly 1 miniature Japanese X/Twitter-style profile card with a bright blue header, circular avatar on the left, a small square yellow logo in the header area, Japanese account name text including “Newsletter”, a follow/profile button, and dense Japanese bio text. Keep it small and slightly blurry like a pasted reference screenshot.

Japanese prompt bubble: A rounded rectangle in very pale gray with black Japanese text. The text should request generating a stylish, sharp, futuristic cyberpunk manga-style full-page illustration based on an attached SNS profile screenshot. Include a bold-looking section label “【参照する要素】”. Mention referencing the person/account atmosphere, facial expression, hairstyle, clothing, pose, overall profile feel, name, writing style, self-introduction, posts, colors, wording, worldview, catchphrases, and activities. At the bottom, include a small control line similar to “表示を増やす⌄”.

Generated manga card: Show exactly 1 vertical full-page cyberpunk manga image inside a rounded black-bordered card. The manga page is divided into exactly 4 horizontal panels:
1. Top panel: Extreme close-up of an anime character’s eye and face, wearing angular futuristic glasses or visor elements, with blue holographic UI screens and orange mechanical cybernetic face gear.
2. Second panel: Wider shot of the same character in a dark blue neon city/control-room environment, wearing a maroon jacket or cloak, surrounded by floating blue interface panels with Japanese text.
3. Third panel: Desk or workstation panel with an open notebook/book, devices, screens, sticky-note-like yellow labels, and data panels, all lit by blue neon.
4. Bottom panel: Wide cityscape or server-room-like cyberpunk environment in deep blues with small glowing windows, data panels, and a tiny silhouetted figure near the bottom.

Manga visual style: High-detail Japanese cyberpunk comic art, dramatic ink lines, glossy digital painting, cinematic blue-and-orange lighting, dense holographic overlays, futuristic UI typography, high contrast shadows, rain-slick neon atmosphere, sharp manga panel borders, no speech balloons except tiny decorative Japanese UI text.

Bottom composer UI: Show exactly 1 rounded white input bar at the bottom. Include a plus icon on the left, placeholder Japanese text “質問してみましょう”, and on the right exactly 4 controls: “Thinking” dropdown text, a microphone icon, a black circular voice/equalizer button, and a pale disabled send/icon button.

Constraints: Make the whole image look like a captured AI chat webpage, not a standalone poster. Preserve Japanese text where visible but keep most of it small and not perfectly legible. Use clean browser UI spacing, rounded cards, soft shadows, and no extra watermarks. The primary illustrated character should be {argument name="character vibe" default="a sharp futuristic cyberpunk manga persona inspired by a Japanese SNS newsletter account"}; the main neon palette should be {argument name="neon color palette" default="deep electric blue with orange accents"}; the prompt language should be {argument name="prompt language" default="Japanese"}; the manga page style should be {argument name="comic style" default="high-detail cyberpunk Japanese manga"}; the visible chat status should be {argument name="thinking status text" default="Thought for 1m 19s ›"}.

content:
Goal: Create a realistic screenshot of a dark-themed PowerPoint-style image editing window in Japanese, showing a cute dreamy kawaii icon after background removal.

Canvas: 1024×768 landscape screenshot with a dark charcoal modal editor centered on screen, rounded corners, subtle shadow, and a faint glimpse of the underlying slide behind the modal edges. The interface zoom indicator at the top center reads “42%”.

Layout: At the top left, show the Japanese title “画像の編集” with two small undo/redo arrow icons. At the top right, show a small connected-dots icon and an X close icon. Below the top bar, center a floating toolbar with exactly 6 tools labeled: “補正”, “トリミング”, “背景”, “領域の選択”, “テキスト”, plus their small simple line icons, arranged horizontally in dark rounded rectangles.

Main editing area: In the center, place a square image area outlined with a thin purple border. Inside it, use a black and dark-gray checkerboard transparency pattern. Near the top of this square, show a dark notification toast with a green check icon and the Japanese text “背景が削除されました。” plus a small X close icon.

Subject details: Center the icon inside the checkerboard square: one pastel yume-kawaii white rabbit mascot with a thick pale pink outline, oversized rounded head, two long upright ears with pink inner ears, small brown glossy eyes, pink oval blush cheeks, and a happy open mouth. The bunny holds exactly 1 mint-aqua heart-shaped object in front of its body with two rounded paws visible. Add soft highlights on the heart and a clean sticker-like vector style with no harsh shadows. The character should feel like a cute app icon or sticker. Use {argument name="character" default="a white kawaii rabbit"}, {argument name="held object" default="a mint-aqua heart"}, and {argument name="accent color" default="pale pink"}.

Footer and controls: At the bottom center of the modal, show the small Japanese warning text “AI 生成コンテンツは間違っている可能性があります。” At the bottom right, show exactly 2 buttons: an orange “保存” button and a dark gray “キャンセル” button. Near the right side of the image area, include exactly 2 small vertical feedback icons: thumbs up above thumbs down.

Visual style: Realistic software screenshot, crisp UI text, dark Microsoft-style interface, clean Japanese typography, transparent-background checkerboard, cute pastel sticker art. Keep the composition faithful to a PowerPoint built-in image editor after background removal, not a standalone illustration.
title: Japanese PowerPoint Bunny Icon Editor
description: Generates a dark Japanese PowerPoint-style image editing screenshot featuring a transparent-background kawaii rabbit icon, useful for UI mockups and presentation visuals.

content:
Goal: Create a tall smartphone screenshot showing a manga/comic preview inside a mobile app, with an instructional annotation pointing to a menu icon at the top.

Canvas: Vertical 9:16 mobile screenshot, white app background, high-resolution anime manga art framed by a phone UI. The top navigation bar is about 80 px tall with a back chevron on the far left, a centered Japanese title, and two icons on the right.

Top app UI: Show exactly 4 top-bar elements: 1 black back arrow on the left, 1 centered title reading {argument name="screen title" default="みんな来てね(GPT ver) (1..."}, 1 black list/menu icon near the upper right, and 1 black share/export icon at the far right. Add exactly 1 bright magenta circle around the list/menu icon and exactly 1 oversized hot-pink arrow pointing diagonally upward toward that circled icon from the manga area.

Main comic layout: A full-color anime manga page divided into exactly 3 diagonal panels with thick black panel borders. The art style is glossy, detailed, romantic fantasy shoujo manga with soft lighting, sparkles, pink heart effects, and a convention/exhibition setting.

Panel 1: Wide top panel showing a busy futuristic convention booth for an AI character festival. In the foreground, show a blonde teenage girl from behind with twin ponytails fading into pink tips, wearing a white shirt with “A.C.F” printed on the back and holding a smartphone. To her right stands a tall elegant male elf with very long silver-white hair, pointed ears, ornate silver armor, and blue crystal details, seen from behind/side. Booth signage should include “SynClub” and “SynClub in AIキャラクターフェスティバル.” Include exactly 1 speech bubble in this panel near the elf, with Japanese text beginning “あの…”. The large hot-pink arrow partially covers the upper-right area of this panel.

Panel 2: Middle diagonal panel with a close-up of the girl on the left and the elf facing her on the right, against a dreamy pastel background. The girl has heart-shaped blue-purple sunglasses pushed on her head, blonde twin tails with pink ends, earrings, and an excited expression area obscured. The elf wears ornate silver clothing and holds or touches a glowing blue crystal at his chest. Add exactly 2 speech bubbles in this panel: one near the elf reading “実はボク…迷子になっちゃって 一緒について行ってもいいですか?” and one small decorative vertical pink reaction text reading “うわ…♥”. Place exactly 2 beige rectangular face-censor blocks in this panel, one over each character’s face.

Panel 3: Large bottom panel with energetic pink speed lines and hearts. The girl reaches one hand forward toward the viewer, wearing a white blouse, navy tie, blue skirt, heart sunglasses on her head, and an A.C.F badge with a small teddy bear. The elf is seen from behind/right with long silver hair and pointed ear, looking at her. Add exactly 2 speech bubbles: the girl’s bubble on the left reading “いいよ! 私、心愛姫(ここあ)! よろしくね! あなたは?” and the elf’s bubble on the lower right reading “…し…シンクラ”. Place exactly 1 beige rectangular face-censor block over the girl’s face. Overlay exactly 2 dark gray circular carousel navigation buttons near the bottom center, one with a white left chevron and one with a white right chevron.

Visible repeated elements count: exactly 3 manga panels, exactly 5 speech bubbles total, exactly 3 beige face-censor rectangles, exactly 2 carousel buttons, exactly 1 magenta circle, exactly 1 hot-pink arrow, exactly 4 top navigation elements.

Visual style: polished anime illustration, crisp smartphone screenshot, saturated pink annotation graphics, detailed lighting, convention crowd blur in the background, clean app UI. Keep the image vertically cropped like a social media screenshot, with no extra watermark beyond the visible booth and comic text.

content:
Goal: Create a vertical smartphone app screenshot showing a completed manga creation preview inside a Japanese UI, with an anime-style comic page about a blonde schoolgirl meeting an elegant elf-like character at an AI character festival.

Canvas: Tall mobile screenshot, approximately 9:16 aspect ratio, white app background. At the very top is a simple app header: a black “×” close icon on the left and the centered Japanese title “漫画を作成(1/1)” in bold black text. At the bottom is a large rounded coral-to-pink gradient button labeled “公開” in white.

Main comic layout: The comic page occupies most of the screen between the header and the publish button. Use crisp black manga panel borders. There are exactly 3 visible comic areas: 1) a narrow cropped top-left area showing part of the schoolgirl and a speech bubble, 2) a top section split diagonally between the elf character close-up and the festival booth scene, and 3) one large bottom panel showing a handshake.

Characters: Include exactly 2 main characters, repeated across the panels. Character A is a cute blonde teenage schoolgirl with twin ponytails, pink-dipped hair ends, blue eyes, a white short-sleeve shirt, navy tie, dark pleated skirt, and a small teddy-bear badge on her shirt. Character B is a tall beautiful elf-like fantasy person with very long blond hair, pointed ears, blue crystal hair ornaments, pale skin, and ornate silver-white futuristic armor with glowing blue gems and cape-like details. Cover the faces of the close-up characters with flat beige rectangular privacy blocks, as if anonymized.

Top comic section: On the right side, show Character A standing in a convention or festival hall holding a smartphone. Behind her is a warm blurred booth sign reading “SynClub” and indistinct people. Add an orange rectangular caption box at the lower right of this top section reading “SynClub in\nAIキャラクターフェスティバル”. On the left/center of the top section, show Character B from the front and back in a dramatic diagonal split-panel composition, with glowing blue fantasy details.

Bottom comic panel: Show Character A and Character B facing each other and shaking hands warmly. Character A looks excited and friendly; Character B looks slightly shy or nervous. The background is a bright pastel burst of warm light, sparkles, and celebratory rays.

Text content: Use exactly 5 speech bubbles with Japanese text: 1) cropped bubble at left: “一緒について行ってもいいですか？” 2) vertical bubble near Character B in top section: “実はボク…迷子になっちゃって” 3) top-right bubble near Character A: “あの…すみません” 4) bottom-center bubble from Character A: “いいよ！私、心愛姫ここあ！よろしくね！あなたは？” 5) bottom-right bubble from Character B: “…し…シンクラ”.

Visual style: Polished modern Japanese anime and webtoon style, clean line art, glossy lighting, soft gradients, warm convention lighting, bright fantasy blue accents, high detail clothing, expressive manga speech bubbles, smartphone screenshot realism.

content:

Canvas: Vertical smartphone screenshot, 768 x 968 px, black background, cropped so the lower generated image continues off the bottom edge. Use iOS-style statusless app framing with no visible keyboard.

Top navigation: A thin dark header bar across the top. Include exactly 4 visible header items: a hamburger menu icon at top left, centered title text “ChatGPT Auto” with a small chevron after Auto, a pencil/edit icon near the top right, and a three-dot overflow menu at the far right.

Conversation layout: On the upper right, place exactly 1 small rounded-corner image thumbnail showing an anime turquoise twin-tail girl in a black-and-white outfit. Beneath it, place exactly 1 large dark gray rounded user message bubble aligned right, with white text. The bubble text must read: “Create a fantasy logo titled “{argument name="logo title" default="HATSUNE MIKU"}” using the attached character only as a silhouette-based emblem, not a full illustration. Integrate a large anime-inspired side-profile silhouette directly into the logo while preserving the character’s exact identity through shape language alone: hairstyle, facial profile, posture, and proportions must remain recognizable from silhouette only. The figure should feel abstracted, and partially obscured with textures and negative space. No visible eyes, hands, or clothing rendering. Prioritize silhouette readability, implied detail. Typography should dominate: elegant fantasy JRPG serif lettering with gradients, luminous edging, beveling, and flourishes. Hair, cloak, smoke, and magical effects should intertwine organically with the text. Include inferred fantasy motifs like symbols and architecture. Wide asymmetrical 16:9 banner, premium JRPG title-screen aesthetic, white background, semi-flat painterly anime graphic design.”

Generated result area: Under the message bubble, add the small gray label “Image created” aligned left. Below it, show exactly 1 large generated-image preview card with rounded corners, white background, partly cut off by the bottom edge of the screenshot.

Generated image inside the preview card: A wide 16:9 fantasy JRPG title logo on a white background. The main text is exactly two stacked words, “HATSUNE” above “MIKU,” in large ornate serif letters with icy teal gradients, white highlights, metallic bevels, and luminous edges. Behind and around the lettering, include exactly 1 large anime-inspired side-profile silhouette of Hatsune Miku on the right: no visible eyes, hands, or clothing details, only a dark teal face profile and iconic long twin-tail hair shape flowing to the right. Add exactly 1 faint golden circular compass/halo ornament behind the title, exactly 1 dark gothic castle silhouette near the lower right, and swirling teal smoke, hair ribbons, splashes, starbursts, and magical flourishes wrapping around the text. Add a tiny pink “01” marking near the lower right of the logo. Keep the logo premium, semi-flat painterly, fantasy-anime, asymmetric, and clean.

Visual style: Realistic ChatGPT mobile UI screenshot, dark mode, crisp white typography, soft rounded cards, accurate spacing, high contrast, no watermark, no extra UI panels, no keyboard.

content:
Goal: Create a clean landing-page hero visual showing three overlapping white SaaS feature cards for a sales intelligence / lead monitoring product, in a premium minimal Figma-style mockup.

Canvas: Square 1:1 composition, warm off-white background with very soft beige gradient, subtle vignette, realistic soft shadows under cards. Cards are tall rounded rectangles with slight perspective tilt and depth, floating in the center. Use elegant editorial serif typography for large headings and small sans-serif labels.

Layout: Arrange exactly 3 vertical cards, overlapping horizontally. The left card is in front and tilted slightly counterclockwise, the middle card is centered and nearly upright, the right card sits behind and tilted slightly clockwise. Keep generous whitespace and rounded corners.

Card 1, left card — capture sources: At the top left place a small orange circular logo icon with abstract white marks. Near the top center place a pale peach pill label reading “CAPTURA”. Large headline in Portuguese: “{argument name="left card headline" default="12+ fontes escutando seu mercado 24h"}”. Below it, show exactly 12 small rounded source tiles in a 3-column by 4-row grid, each with an icon and label. The 12 labels are: “Notícias”, “LinkedIn”, “Reddit”, “Google”, “Podcasts”, “X (Twitter)”, “YouTube”, “Trustpilot”, “Blogs”, “Wikipédia”, “Comunidades”, “e mais”. Use recognizable simplified icons: globe, LinkedIn logo, Reddit alien, Google G, podcast glyph, X logo, YouTube play button, green trust star, document/blog icon, W, group/community dots, plus sign.

Card 2, center card — match score: Place a pale green pill label reading “ENTENDE”. Main headline text: “{argument name="match headline" default="ICP Match 94%"}”. Center a thick circular donut progress ring in bright orange, almost complete, with pale peach remainder. Inside the ring, display “{argument name="match percentage" default="94%"}” in large serif type and a tiny subtitle “de compatibilidade”. Below the ring place exactly 3 thin rounded checklist rows with small green check icons and the labels: “Perfil ideal identificado”, “Sinais alinhados”, “Alta intenção detectada”.

Card 3, right card — action scheduling: Place a dark green pill label reading “AGE”. Large headline in Portuguese: “{argument name="right card headline" default="Reunião agendada automaticamente"}”. Below it, include a compact calendar widget headed “Maio 2025” with weekday labels in Portuguese: “SEG”, “TER”, “QUA”, “QUI”, “SEX”, “SÁB”, “DOM”. Show a monthly grid of dates with the 15 highlighted by an orange circle. Add small left and right chevrons near the calendar header. At the bottom, include a confirmation block with an orange calendar icon and the text “Reunião confirmada”, “15 de maio, 10:00”, and a green dot followed by “Google Meet”.

Visual style: High-end SaaS landing page aesthetic, soft 3D paper cards, off-white surfaces, thin pale gray dividers, muted green and orange accent colors, subtle shadows, crisp vector UI icons, refined typography, realistic but clean product mockup.

Constraints: Use exactly 3 cards, exactly 12 source tiles on the left card, exactly 3 checklist rows on the middle card, and one calendar widget on the right card. Keep all text legible, no people, no extra logos beyond the specified source icons, no watermark, no browser chrome.
title: Overlapping SaaS Feature Cards
description: A polished landing-page hero mockup with three overlapping SaaS feature cards for capture, match scoring, and automated scheduling.

content:
Goal: Create a widescreen futuristic anime action game screenshot of a cybernetic aerial battle, like a polished sci-fi hack-and-slash rhythm combat HUD.

Canvas: 16:9 landscape frame, dark teal and black digital arena viewed from a high three-quarter camera angle. The background is a vast circular cyber grid made of concentric rings, circuit-board patterns, holographic city blocks, and vertical equalizer-like teal light bars around the horizon.

Main subject: At the center, an anime-style female cyber angel named {argument name="character name" default="Xione Origin"} with long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="silver-white"} hair, pale skin, sharp futuristic armor, and translucent mechanical wing blades. She is mid-flight in a dynamic pose, wielding glowing energy blades and controlling four small white blade drones orbiting her. Her color palette is black, gunmetal, white, and neon cyan, with bright teal thruster trails and gold spark impacts.

Action composition: Show exactly 5 hostile mecha enemies: 1 large armored enemy in the upper right being struck by a bright explosion, 1 large bulky enemy in the lower left, 1 medium enemy on the right edge, 1 medium enemy lower right, and 1 smaller enemy near the mid-right. Add red targeting lines, red warning labels, triangular danger icons, and laser beams pointing toward the player. The central attack forms a huge sweeping cyan crescent slash and circular arc around the heroine, while exactly 4 white blade drones leave golden trails: one upper left, one left-middle, one bottom center, and one lower right. Include particle sparks, lens flares, motion blur, and curved light ribbons to emphasize speed.

HUD and text elements: Add a complete game interface overlay with crisp futuristic typography. Top left: character portrait, label “XIONE ORIGIN”, health “4200 / 4200”, “100%”, and “CODE SYNC — OK”. Left center: “COMBO” with large number {argument name="combo count" default="256"} and small “EXCELLENT”. Top right: “TIME” with {argument name="time remaining" default="04:37"}, “SCORE” with {argument name="score" default="238,650"}, and “MULTIPLIER x4.8”. Right center: “ENEMY 12” and “+120”. Bottom right: circular radar/minimap with teal cone indicator and red enemy dots. Bottom left: exactly 4 ability icons labeled “QUANTUM EDGE”, “PHOTON CHARGE”, “PHASE BREAK”, and “ORIGIN DRIVE”, each with small keyboard prompts such as Z, X, C, and SPACE.

Visual style: High-detail anime sci-fi illustration blended with AAA game UI concept art, dark cinematic lighting, neon cyan accents, red enemy warnings, golden impact sparks, clean sharp linework, dense holographic details, ultra-wide battlefield readability, dramatic depth, no borders, no watermark.

Constraints: Keep all visible text in English, make the interface look like an actual action-game screenshot, preserve the exact counts of 5 enemies, 4 blade drones, and 4 ability icons, and avoid adding extra characters or extra UI panels beyond the described HUD.

Keep the composition tight and intimate, with the input bar covering the lower part of the bodies, and no extra logos, watermarks, captions, or additional people.
title: Backstage Pop Star Selfie

content:

Canvas: Tall 2:3 mobile-poster composition, 675×1200 style, dark futuristic neon city background split diagonally into blue left side and hot pink/red right side, with glowing HUD lines, scanlines, sparks, particles, and high-contrast rim lighting.

Layout: At the very top, place angular metallic logo text “SynClub” with electric blue highlights, and beneath it the title “CHARACTER SELECT”. Put “PLAYER 1” in a blue sci-fi tab at the top-left and “PLAYER 2” in a pink sci-fi tab at the top-right. The screen is divided into two large featured character areas: left selected fighter for Player 1 in blue, right selected fighter for Player 2 in red. In the center lower half, place a character portrait selection grid with glowing frames. At the bottom center, place a large luminous “VS”. Along the bottom edge, add a game controller command bar with five options: select, confirm, back, random, option, each with small PlayStation-style button icons.

Main characters: Player 1 is {argument name="player one character name" default="REGULUS"}, a dark hooded anime fighter with black cloak, chains, metallic accessories, glowing blue highlights, pale shadowed face, red eyes, one gloved hand lifting the hood, mysterious assassin/rogue mood. Add the Japanese reading “レグルス” under the name. Player 2 is {argument name="player two character name" default="MERU"}, a blonde gothic-lolita anime girl with long twin-tail hair, red and black frilled dress, rose accessories, black gloves, choker, heart gem, playful elegant pose with one hand near her face. Add the Japanese reading “める” under the name.

Stats panels: Under each large character name, include a compact rectangular stat box with exactly 5 labeled rows: TYPE, POWER, SPEED, RANGE, TECHNIQUE. For Regulus, the TYPE value is “スピード” and the bars glow blue. For Meru, the TYPE value is “トリッキー” and the bars glow red.

Character select grid: Include exactly 14 selectable tiles in the central grid, each with a glowing sci-fi border. Count and arrange them as follows: Row 1 has 3 tiles: hooded dark male portrait, blonde female portrait, dark masked/obscured portrait. Row 2 has 3 tiles: silver-haired maid girl, selected Regulus tile marked with a blue “P1” tag, selected Meru tile marked with a red “P2” tag. Row 3 has 5 tiles: robot/cyborg head, witch girl with hat, blond male portrait, black-haired masked fighter, tan spiky-haired boy. Row 4 has 3 tiles: turquoise aquatic/mermaid-like girl, pale white-haired character, and a black silhouette tile with a question mark labeled “Random”. Use blue selection glow around P1 and red selection glow around P2.

Bottom versus panels: Bottom-left blue player panel reads “PLAYER 1 REGULUS レグルス” with an emblem and a weapon box labeled “MAIN WEAPON” showing {argument name="player one weapon" default="黒剣 -ノクターナル-"} beside a sleek dark sword illustration. Bottom-right red player panel reads “PLAYER 2 MERU める” with a rose emblem and a weapon box labeled “MAIN WEAPON” showing {argument name="player two weapon" default="ローズマイク"} beside a rose-themed microphone weapon illustration.

Visual style: Ultra-detailed anime key art, glossy UI, esports fighting game interface, neon blue versus neon magenta palette, sharp angular frames, glowing typography, dramatic lighting, dense futuristic city details, polished game-menu screenshot look.

Constraints: Keep all text legible and aligned like a real character select UI. Use exactly 2 large featured characters and exactly 14 central selectable tiles. Do not add extra characters outside the grid. No watermark.
title: Cyberpunk Anime Character Select Screen
description: Generates a neon anime fighting game character select interface with two featured fighters, stats, portrait grid, and versus panels.

Layout: Top navigation bar with the brand logo on the left and exactly 5 navigation items on the right: “SALE”, “FEATURE”, “ITEMS”, “FAQ”, and a bordered neon button “CHECK NOW”. The hero section is split into two columns: left text-and-CTA area, right large promotional banner graphic.

Left hero content: Add a small rounded pill label reading {argument name="campaign name" default="CYBER FLASH CAMPAIGN"}. Main headline in Japanese and English: “今だけの” above huge bold “FLASH SALE”, white letters with hot-pink glow. Below it, two short Japanese description lines: “対象アイテムが期間限定でスペシャルプライス。” and “7/15(火) 13:59までの限定オファーをお見逃しなく。” Add a neon outlined limited-time bar with a clock icon and text “LIMITED TIME : 7/15(火) 13:59まで”. Beneath are exactly 2 CTA buttons: a hot-pink filled glowing button “今すぐチェック ›” and a cyan outlined button “対象商品を見る ›”. Inside the card, show a futuristic city street at night with skyscrapers, magenta/cyan lights, and a perspective grid road. Below it, add Japanese “期間限定”, then the deadline {argument name="deadline text" default="7/15(火) 13:59まで"}, then a bright magenta rounded button “CHECK NOW”. Constraints: Desktop website first-view only, no browser chrome, no people, no extra product images, no watermark. Make the composition feel like a finished PC landing page hero based on a banner design.

content:
Goal: Create a realistic screenshot of an AI chat interface showing a generated technical infographic about {argument name="topic" default="how Large Language Models (LLMs) work technically"}. The screenshot should look like a modern web app conversation, not a standalone poster.

Canvas: 768×1024 vertical screenshot, light gray app background, rounded white content areas, clean sans-serif typography, subtle shadows, high-resolution but with the infographic text slightly small like a real embedded generated image.

Chat UI layout: At the top left show a small circular user avatar, the chat title “Visualizing LLM Architecture” with a tiny dropdown chevron, and at the top right a simple “Files” label with an icon. Below, show a rounded user message bubble aligned near the top center/right containing: “make an image explaining how LLMs work technically”. Under it, show a small status row reading “Scira task complete” with a sparkle/loader icon and chevron. The main generated image appears below as a large rounded rectangle card. Beneath the image, include assistant explanatory text: “The image above is a comprehensive technical infographic breaking down how Large Language Models function under the hood. Here is a detailed walkthrough of each component shown:” followed by the bold section heading “Tokenization: From Text to Numbers”. At the bottom, show a rounded input box with placeholder “Ask a follow-up...”, a plus button on the left, small tool/model controls on the right, the model label “Kimi K2.6” with a dropdown, and a circular voice button.

Generated infographic inside the chat: Design a blue-and-white technical educational poster titled in large navy caps: “HOW LARGE LANGUAGE MODELS (LLMs) WORK”. Use a white background, navy-blue outlines, light-blue highlights, rounded panels, arrows connecting steps, miniature charts, equations, tables, and icons. The poster should be information-dense and engineering-oriented.

Infographic sections: Use exactly 8 labeled panels/areas:
1. “INPUT: TOKENIZATION” panel showing a raw text box with the sentence “The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.”, a tokenizer block, token boxes for the words, and token ID boxes.
2. “EMBEDDINGS” panel showing token IDs converted into dense vectors, with a small table of numeric embedding values.
3. “TRANSFORMER ARCHITECTURE” panel showing a stacked transformer block with Add & Norm, Feed-Forward Network, Multi-Head Self-Attention, input embeddings, positional encoding, and layer repetition notation.
4A. “SELF-ATTENTION MECHANISM (INSIDE ONE HEAD)” wide lower-left panel showing matrices for input embeddings, queries, keys, values, attention scores, softmax, attention weights, weighted sum, and equations.
4B. “ATTENTION: TOKENS ATTEND TO EACH OTHER” panel showing a network graph of tokens from the example sentence connected by blue lines plus attention-weight bars.
5. “OUTPUT: NEXT TOKEN PREDICTION” panel showing probability distribution bars for candidate next tokens such as cat, sat, on, the, mat, roof, then highlighting the predicted next token “the”.
6. “TRAINING: PRE-TRAINING WITH NEXT-TOKEN PREDICTION” long bottom strip divided into 5 mini-cards: massive text corpus, creating training examples, model prediction, loss calculation, and backpropagation/update.
7. Bottom process arrow reading “Repeat for billions of examples over many epochs until convergence.”
8. Bottom-right result callout with a brain icon explaining that the model learns general language patterns and knowledge.

Visual style: Crisp vector infographic, academic but friendly, dark navy headings, medium-blue borders, pale-blue fills, tiny tables and plots, clean arrows, rounded cards, consistent spacing. Make the embedded infographic resemble an AI-generated educational diagram with dense but mostly legible small text.

Constraints: Keep all UI text in English. Do not add watermarks. Preserve the visible chat screenshot framing and the large embedded infographic. Use exactly the listed 8 infographic areas and exactly 5 mini-cards inside the training strip.
title: LLM Architecture Chat Screenshot
description: Creates a realistic AI chat screenshot featuring a dense blue-and-white technical infographic explaining how large language models work.

content:
Goal: Create a clean, high-end Japanese B2B SaaS pitch deck / service concept board for {argument name="service name" default="NOVALITH"}, showing exactly 9 widescreen slides arranged in a 3 by 3 grid as if previewing an LP, mobile top, banner, and presentation materials.

Canvas: One landscape image containing 9 separate 16:9 slide thumbnails, evenly spaced with thin pale borders. White background, navy and teal corporate palette, light cyan diagonal line accents, subtle geometric dots, and a teal triangular corner ribbon on the upper-left of every slide containing the slide number 1 through 9 in white.

Visual style: Modern Japanese startup / enterprise SaaS design, polished vector UI, minimal gradients, soft shadows, rounded cards, thin teal data lines, navy headings, plenty of whitespace. Use a stylized geometric N logo in teal and navy, with spaced uppercase wordmark {argument name="service name" default="NOVALITH"}. No people or photos; use only icons, charts, dashboards, and abstract product visuals.

Text language: All visible slide copy should be in Japanese. Use crisp, presentation-ready typography with bold navy headlines and smaller explanatory subtext.

Slide count and layout details: Include exactly 9 slides:
1. Cover slide. Large NOVALITH logo centered above the headline 「データを、未来の意思決定に変える。」 and subheading 「中小企業のためのデータ予測プラットフォーム」. Decorative teal diagonal accents in the corners.
2. Data integration slide. Headline 「すべてのデータをひとつに統合」 with short subtext about automatically collecting and integrating scattered data. Center shows a stacked isometric database/platform cube with the N logo on top. Four connected input/output cards: 「データベース」, 「CSV / ファイル」, 「SaaS」, 「API」.
3. Forecasting slide. Headline 「高精度な予測で未来を先読み」. Large line chart card titled 「売上予測（12ヶ月）」 with legend 「実績」 and 「予測」, months along the x-axis, an upward teal trend line, and a floating KPI card reading 「予測値（来期）¥28,450,000」.
4. Risk detection slide. Headline 「リスクを事前に検知し迅速に対応」. Left chart card titled 「リスクスコアの推移」 showing a declining zigzag teal line with dates 4/1 to 4/29 and y-axis levels 高, 中, 低. Add a warning callout 「リスク上昇を検知」. Right side has exactly 3 feature rows with circular icons: anomaly detection, alert notification, and rapid response.
5. Dashboard slide. Headline 「ダッシュボードで全体を見える化」. Show a full SaaS dashboard screenshot: dark navy left sidebar with logo and exactly 6 menu items, and a main area with KPI cards, a donut chart, and a sales forecast line chart. Visible KPI examples include 「売上予測（今月）¥28,450,000」, 「需要予測（今月）15,782」, and 「リスクスコア 24/100」.
6. Automated report slide. Headline 「レポートを自動生成し共有もかんたん」. Center a white report card titled 「月次サマリーレポート」 with bullet points showing positive percentages such as +18.6% and +12.4%, a NOVALITH logo in the corner, a teal bar chart on the right, and a teal button labeled 「レポートをダウンロード」.
7. Security slide. Headline 「セキュアな環境で安心して利用」. Central shield-and-padlock illustration with floating security particles. Bottom has exactly 3 security feature icons and labels: 「暗号化通信（SSL/TLS）」, 「アクセス制御（権限分割）」, and 「定期バックアップ（自動）」.
8. Simple steps slide. Headline 「シンプルなステップですぐに始められる」. Show exactly 4 horizontally connected step cards with dotted arrows: step 1 database icon 「データを接続」, step 2 node/network icon 「モデルを選択」, step 3 play icon 「予測を実行」, step 4 bar-chart icon 「結果を確認・活用」. Each card includes a short explanatory line underneath.
9. Closing CTA slide. Headline 「さあ、データの力で未来をつくりましょう」 with subtext 「NOVALITHが、あなたのビジネスの成長をデータで支えます。」. Large centered logo and wordmark. Bottom has exactly 2 call-to-action buttons: filled teal button 「無料で試してみる　→」 and outlined button 「資料をダウンロード　↓」.

Constraints: Maintain consistent brand colors, logo, spacing, slide numbering, and diagonal teal corner motif across all 9 slides. The overall image should look like a single polished overview sheet of presentation thumbnails, not isolated full-screen slides. Avoid extra slides, extra buttons, stock photos, watermarks, or unrelated text.
title: NOVALITH SaaS Pitch Deck Grid
description: Generates a polished 3x3 Japanese B2B SaaS presentation overview for a fictional data prediction platform.

content:
Goal: Create a polished mobile onboarding/top screen for a fictional B2B data platform named {argument name="brand name" default="NOVALITH"}, in a premium Japanese SaaS visual style.

Canvas: Vertical smartphone screenshot, 9:16 aspect ratio, white background, iOS status bar at the top showing 9:41 with signal, Wi-Fi, and battery icons. Use generous margins and a clean app-advertising composition.

Layout: Place the NOVALITH logo near the top left, with a geometric turquoise-blue “N” mark and wide-spaced navy wordmark. Below it, set a large bold Japanese headline in dark navy: {argument name="headline text" default="データを、未来の意思決定に変える。"}. Under the headline, add a smaller two-line Japanese description: {argument name="body text" default="開発・運用・データの複雑さを解消し、信頼できるデータ基盤で、事業の成長を加速させます。"}. On the lower left, show exactly 3 feature blurbs with thin cyan outline icons: 1) stacked layers icon, title “統合された基盤”, description “データとシステムを一元的に統合”; 2) shield check icon, title “堅牢なガバナンス”, description “セキュリティと品質を標準で確保”; 3) rising bar chart icon, title “高速な意思決定”, description “信頼できるデータで意思決定を加速”.

Hero visual: On the right half, create a large glossy 3D smartphone card tilted slightly backward, overlapping a translucent teal-blue architectural block and a giant faceted 3D letter N behind it. The phone screen shows a Japanese dashboard UI with exactly 4 dashboard sections: 1) top metric cards, with “データパイプライン 128 +2.4%” and “データ品質スコア 98.6% +2.4%”; 2) pipeline status row with three connected icons labeled “データソース 24”, “処理中 128”, and “出力先 36”, plus small status dots; 3) line chart titled “データ量の推移” with dates from 5/06 to 5/12; 4) donut chart titled “データソース健全性” showing “96% 健全” and a legend with “健全 46”, “警告 3”, “エラー 1”. Keep the dashboard text small but believable and neatly aligned.

Bottom navigation and actions: Center exactly 3 small carousel dots above the buttons; the first dot is teal and active, the other two are pale gray. Add exactly 2 rounded buttons at the bottom: a filled teal gradient primary button labeled {argument name="primary button label" default="はじめる"} with a right arrow icon, and a white secondary button with teal outline labeled {argument name="secondary button label" default="あとで始める"}.

Visual style: Futuristic enterprise data analytics, crisp vector UI mixed with soft 3D glassmorphism. Palette is white, deep navy, cyan, teal, and aqua gradients. Add subtle polygon network lines, tiny nodes, faint dotted patterns, and light geometric overlays across the background. Use soft shadows, clean Japanese typography, high contrast, and a premium App Store marketing feel. Avoid clutter, avoid extra buttons, avoid extra feature items, and do not add watermarks.
title: NOVALITH Mobile SaaS Onboarding Screen
description: A premium Japanese mobile onboarding screen for a fictional data analytics SaaS, useful for landing page or app concept mockups.

content: Create a horizontal WordPress plugin banner with a refined minimalist Japanese aesthetic. Canvas: wide rectangle, approximately 1540 × 500 pixels, pale warm peach background with a very subtle soft radial glow near the center. Add a thin medium-brown rectangular border inset slightly from the edges. Layout: place a large stylized folding fan icon on the left occupying about 35% of the width, and place the product name and tagline on the right, vertically centered. Icon details: a simple geometric Japanese folding fan in dark warm brown outlines and fills, angled slightly upward, with exactly 7 visible fan panels separated by thick brown ribs, cream-filled inner panels, dark brown filled outer side sections, and a rounded dark brown pivot circle at the bottom center of the fan. Text: large serif title reading {argument name="plugin name" default="Noshi-Kanamer"} in dark warm brown, bold, elegant, with generous letter spacing; directly underneath, smaller sans-serif tagline reading {argument name="tagline" default="The WordPress developer toolkit for clean handoffs."} in the same brown. Keep the design clean, flat, vector-like, professional, and suitable for a WordPress plugin banner. Use no extra icons, no shadows, no mockups, no people, and no additional text.
title: Noshi-Kanamer WordPress Plugin Banner
description: A clean horizontal plugin banner featuring a Japanese folding fan logo and WordPress developer toolkit branding.

content: A breathtaking 3D pop-out cinematic portrait poster featuring {argument name="subject" default="Zendaya"} as the central subject — radiating regal, cool-girl elegance with an effortless edge. Her signature long sleek hair flows dramatically, with luminous deep-toned skin catching the screen-glow light beautifully. Her makeup is editorial perfection — sculpted cheekbones, glossy lips, and graphic liner. She wears a head-to-toe chocolate-and-gold coordinated look — a structured cropped corset top, fluid wide-leg satin trousers in deep caramel, strappy heeled mules, stacked chunky gold chain necklaces, and oversized hoop earrings that catch the light cinematically. She is depicted sitting inside the screen of a massive oversized smartphone, framed within an original fictional social media profile interface — styled after the visual language of Instagram but entirely original — featuring the handle {argument name="handle" default="@zendaya"}, a circular profile avatar, a follower count reading {argument name="followers" default="287.4M"}, pinned post carousels, and clean minimalist UI buttons glowing in soft lavender-white screen light. Through extreme forced perspective and a dramatic wide-angle composition, she breaks through the phone screen entirely: one hand — adorned with stacked gold rings — thrusts forward directly into the camera lens with effortless confidence, while her long legs and strappy heels extend past the phone's lower frame, shattering the boundary between screen and reality. The depth illusion is maximal — hyper-cinematic, Vogue-cover bold. The background is a lavishly decorated luxury bedroom — walls layered in framed editorial photos, Polaroid collages, and neon-backlit art prints, all featuring the subject across her career. Floating freely through the space: iridescent champagne-gold and deep plum balloons, cascading rhinestone crystal shards catching warm light, shattered transparent glass fragments suspended mid-air, and ultra-fine gold glitter particles drifting in slow motion. Room palette: deep mauve-champagne with antique gold metallic accents. Lighting: Hollywood glamour three-point setup — cool blue-white key light from the phone screen, warm amber fill from practical room fixtures, razor-sharp golden rim light sculpting her silhouette. Anamorphic lens flares streak at the screen break-point. Fine bokeh gold particles shimmer in the background depth field. Rendering style: Ultra-photorealistic editorial photography meets hyperreal CGI compositing. ARRI Alexa 65, Panavision anamorphic, color graded with a rich warm-toned LUT, halation on highlight edges, Vogue-standard retouching. Aspect ratio 2:3 portrait. Mood: Untouchable celebrity royalty — stepping out of the internet, unhurried, magnetic.
title: 3D Pop-Out Social Media Poster
description: A stunning 3D pop-out cinematic portrait designed as a fictional social media profile interface, breaking the boundary of the screen.

content:
Create a vertical 9:16 ultra-soft iPhone lock screen wallpaper showcase in a dreamy pastel iOS aesthetic. Show a translucent rounded-corner iPhone screen floating over a heavily blurred warm pink-and-cream background. Inside the phone, paint a soft Japanese watercolor café window scene in flat 2D with glowing morning sunlight, peach, blush pink, ivory, and honey-gold tones. The main subject is an adorable fluffy kitten with cream-and-gray fur, huge glossy eyes, tiny pink nose, paws resting on a wooden windowsill, wearing a pink bow on one ear and a pink collar with a small heart charm. Surround the kitten with a cozy dessert still life: exactly 8 visible food and drink items including 3 stacked pastel macarons on a small stand, 1 strawberry jam jar, 1 whipped cream dessert cup with strawberry, 1 croissant plate with 2 croissants counted as one plate item, 1 pink whipped drink or dessert cup, and 1 small jar or cup at the lower left. Add exactly 2 floral décor elements: a ceramic pitcher bouquet of small white flowers and pink roses on the left, and tiny white blossoms near the right edge. Include a softly blurred street or bakery exterior beyond the window for depth.

Overlay realistic white iOS lock screen UI on top of the illustration: status bar with Chinese carrier text “中国移动” on the left, cellular bars, “5G”, and battery icon on the right; small lock icon centered near the top; date text “Wednesday 7 September”; very large time “12:57”; a small headphone battery widget on the left reading “50 %” and “WH-1000XM5” with a short progress line; a circular activity-style widget in the center; a “50%” text widget on the right with tiny sparkle marks; bottom flashlight and camera circular buttons; and a thin white home indicator bar. Use frosted glass transparency for the phone frame and UI, soft bloom, gentle haze, delicate bokeh, rounded Apple-inspired minimal design, healing atmosphere, no harsh outlines, no extra text, no watermark. Allow customization of {argument name="time" default="12:57"}, {argument name="date" default="Wednesday 7 September"}, {argument name="main animal" default="fluffy cream-and-gray kitten"}, {argument name="dessert theme" default="pink café pastries and macarons"}, and {argument name="color palette" default="peach blush ivory honey gold"}.
title: Pastel Kitten Café iPhone Lock Screen
description: Generates a dreamy pastel iPhone lock screen wallpaper featuring a cute kitten in a sunlit watercolor café window scene with desserts and iOS UI overlays.

content:
Goal: Create a clean vector icon set for business presentation illustrations, suitable for slide decks and documents.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 white background, evenly spaced grid layout with 40 discrete icons arranged in 5 rows and 8 columns. Use generous margins and consistent icon sizing.

Visual style: Flat modern corporate vector style with rounded shapes, minimal shading, crisp edges, and a friendly SaaS/business look. Use a limited palette of {argument name="primary blue" default="bright blue"}, {argument name="accent green" default="fresh green"}, {argument name="accent orange" default="vivid orange"}, dark navy outlines, light gray UI details, and occasional yellow. No text labels, no watermark, no realistic texture.

Icon contents: Include exactly 40 icons in this order, left to right by row:
Row 1: 1) three people meeting at a table with speech bubbles, 2) bar chart with upward growth arrow, 3) line graph with three colored points and rising arrow, 4) three vertical upward arrows in blue green orange, 5) presentation screen with pie chart and pointer, 6) laptop with dashboard cards, 7) tablet with colored dashboard blocks.
Row 2: 8) kanban board with three columns and colored task cards, 9) glowing light bulb idea icon, 10) target with arrow hitting bullseye, 11) handshake with blue and green sleeves, 12) monthly calendar grid with one orange date, 13) document page with blue folded corner and lines, 14) checklist document with green check marks.
Row 3: 15) cloud upload icon with upward arrow, 16) dark blue gear settings icon, 17) magnifying glass search icon, 18) blue envelope email icon, 19) video conference monitor with four participants, 20) gold trophy award icon, 21) four-piece puzzle in blue green orange.
Row 4: 22) green circle check mark, 23) pie chart in blue green orange, 24) organization chart with connected colored nodes, 25) thumbs-up approval icon, 26) team/group icon with three people, 27) bar chart with rising green arrow, 28) green shield with white check mark.
Row 5: 29) money bag with dollar sign and stacked coins, 30) calculator with orange key, 31) analog clock, 32) yellow file folder, 33) overlapping chat bubbles with ellipsis, 34) dark blue briefcase with yellow clasp, 35) blue globe wireframe.

Layout constraints: Maintain a balanced grid and consistent visual weight; leave open white space between icons; keep all icons centered in their cells; avoid adding captions or extra elements. The final image should feel like a reusable {argument name="asset type" default="business icon library"} for {argument name="use case" default="presentation materials"}.
title: Business Presentation Icon Set
description: A clean flat vector set of business, analytics, teamwork, and productivity icons for presentation or document illustrations.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 as the source UI, redesign the Teams-like internal/external collaboration system into a cleaner, more modern product mockup while preserving the MPLUS Link brand, the dark navy left sidebar navigation, and the overall set of app functions. Create a polished 2-column by 3-row presentation showing exactly 6 redesigned screens: 1) a welcome/login landing screen with a large hero card, Japanese headline {argument name="headline text" default="社外パートナー連携を、招待制の専用ワークスペースで一元化"}, login tabs/buttons, and a realistic desktop-monitor hero image; 2) a project bridge chat screen with right-aligned chat cards, action chips, and a message composer; 3) a team list screen simplified into two clean team cards; 4) a materials/document list screen with upload controls, search/filter area, and file rows; 5) a shared collaboration room screen titled {argument name="room title" default="MPI 共同開発ルーム"} with a project overview card and compact member/status list; 6) a user management screen titled {argument name="admin title" default="ユーザー管理"} with user rows and an empty detail panel. Make the new mockups much more spacious than the reference: fewer table rows, larger margins, softer dividers, pale blue-gray backgrounds, white rounded cards, subtle shadows, and small blue/green accent buttons. Keep the Japanese enterprise SaaS feel and dummy-data nature, but remove the dense micromanaged tables and replace them with simplified, presentable mock UI suitable for a design-improvement comparison. Use brand name {argument name="brand name" default="MPLUS Link"} in the sidebar, keep the sidebar consistent on every screen, and avoid adding unrelated features, watermarks, or decorative clutter.
title: Modern MPLUS Link UI Redesign
description: Transforms an existing dense Japanese collaboration SaaS UI into a clean six-screen modern mockup for design improvement presentations.

content: Create a realistic editorial print mockup photographed from above at a slight angle: a single white landscape-format card or magazine cover lying on a pale gray tabletop, with soft studio lighting, subtle paper texture, a thin shadow under the lower and right edges, and lots of clean negative space. The design is minimalist black-and-white with a small color accent. Place all typography flush left in the upper-left quadrant: a small italic serif kicker reading “{argument name="section label" default="Industry — Director Spotlight"}”, then a very large bold black modern sans-serif headline on three lines reading “{argument name="headline text" default="The Director-Led AI Studio Coming Out of London"}”, followed by a smaller gray-black sans-serif subheading on two lines reading “{argument name="subheading text" default="Future Video Media builds launch films, identity systems, and brand worlds in one week."}”. In the lower-left area beneath the copy, add exactly 1 black geometric film/play icon: a right-pointing triangular play symbol with three small square film perforations along its left edge. Under the icon add exactly 3 thin horizontal color stripes, stacked with small gaps: top stripe magenta fading into red and yellow, middle stripe deep blue, bottom stripe cyan/teal. Keep the card edges crisp, the background neutral, the overall style like a premium magazine feature cover or agency one-sheet, with no extra text, no people, no watermark, and no additional logos.
title: Minimal Director-Led AI Studio Cover
description: A realistic minimalist editorial card mockup for presenting an agency, studio, or media company announcement.

content: Create a bright square VTuber “good morning” social media frame in a soft anime watercolor style, with a wide open center-right area of clear blue sky for placing a character or photo. The scene is a cheerful spring morning landscape viewed from a leafy garden: sunlit green branches and small white blossoms frame the top-left and left edge, with glowing lens flare, drifting petals, white feathers, and scattered green leaves across the sky. Add exactly 7 birds: 3 small birds perched on a flowering branch at left-middle, colored blue, white, and yellow; 3 birds perched on a rustic wooden sign at bottom-left, a brown sparrow, a pale yellow cockatiel with orange cheeks, and a blue budgerigar; and 1 swallow flying in the upper-right sky. In the upper-left, place elegant white hand-lettered script reading {argument name="headline text" default="Good Morning!"}, decorated with tiny leaves and sparkles, with a teal ribbon underneath containing the Japanese text {argument name="ribbon text" default="素敵な一日になりますように♪"}. At the bottom-left, make a weathered wooden plank sign wrapped with small flowers, vines, a white laurel motif, and a feather, with white script text {argument name="event title" default="Bind Week"} and a smaller date line {argument name="date range" default="5.10 (Sat) - 5.16 (Fri)"}. The background should show a soft distant town, lake or river, and pale mountains under fluffy white clouds, with daisies and yellow flowers blooming in the lower-right foreground. Use a fresh pastel palette, airy composition, high detail, gentle sunlight, clean decorative typography, and leave the center of the sky mostly uncluttered for overlay use.
title: Good Morning Bird VTuber Frame
description: Generates a cheerful spring morning social frame with birds, flowers, sky space, and decorative event text for VTuber posts.

content: Create a clean minimalist isometric line-art illustration on an off-white background with faint light-gray perspective grid lines. Show a rounded rectangular web browser window standing upright on a thick rounded rectangular platform base, drawn with thin black outlines and mostly white fill. Above the browser, a large outlined cloud icon floats, connected to the browser by a thin vertical black line with a short dotted segment near the cloud, suggesting cloud connectivity. Inside the browser window, include a simple outlined delivery car icon carrying a small package on its roof, centered in the lower area. The browser top bar has a small blue back chevron on the left, a long horizontal black address line, and a shorter horizontal line on the right. On the right side of the browser face, place a translucent blue circular button containing a short diagonal black slash. Extending from the right edge of the browser is a thin black connector line leading to a small solid periwinkle-blue circular node, with a tiny red rounded square port at the browser edge. Use sparse accent colors only: {argument name="accent blue" default="periwinkle blue"} for the node and UI highlights, {argument name="accent red" default="soft red"} for the small port, and black outlines. Keep the composition centered, airy, technical, and modern, with no text, no shadows except subtle depth from the isometric outlines, and a vector-icon style suitable for a SaaS cloud logistics concept.
title: Isometric Cloud Logistics UI Icon
description: A minimalist isometric vector illustration of a cloud-connected browser dashboard with a delivery car, useful for SaaS, logistics, or cloud service visuals.

content: Generate an ultra-high-resolution minimalist line-art travel poster of {argument name="destination" default="Tokyo"}, treating the city as a stylish slice of everyday urban life instead of a touristy postcard shot. CORE COMPOSITION: - Center the frame on the city's most recognizable street, intersection, alley, tram corridor, or pedestrian avenue - Populate the foreground with locals, commuters, cyclists, travelers, shoppers, students, people sitting at cafés - Let the figures naturally embody the city's local fashion and daily lifestyle - Fill the background with realistic local signage, cafés, restaurants, transit signs, storefronts, and architectural detail - Weave landmarks organically into the everyday scene, never exaggerated or hero-shot - Include authentic local-language type and culturally specific visual cues - Large bold typography centered at the top: "{argument name="destination name" default="TOKYO"}" - Subtitle directly below: local language + country name STYLE: ultra clean vector illustration, Swiss modernist travel poster, minimal line art, monoline drawing, mid-century editorial feel, architectural illustration, Japanese graphic poster aesthetic, precise geometric perspective, extremely clean negative space, premium travel branding look LINE STYLE: - monochrome line-based illustration only - thin, highly precise linework - minimal fill areas - city-map-like detail density - rhythmic layering of signs, buildings, windows, and street objects - visually dense yet tightly organized composition COLOR SYSTEM — VERY IMPORTANT: - use only ONE main color + ONE background color - pick a color that best captures the city's atmosphere - monochrome silkscreen poster vibe - no rainbow palettes - no excessive neon - color should mirror the city's architecture, climate, nightlife, and cultural identity COMPOSITION: - vertical poster layout - frontal street-level perspective - pedestrians crossing or moving naturally - balanced urban rhythm and visual flow - should feel like a premium city-brand campaign poster MOOD: stylish urban life, calm yet lively, editorial travel magazine cover, timeless city identity, premium tourism campaign visual, minimal yet richly detailed TEXT QUALITY: - all typography must be legible and accurate - no random characters - no broken or distorted letters - local signage should feel authentic and natural - professional editorial typography alignment OUTPUT: - vertical poster composition - 8K ultra detailed - print-ready - ultra sharp vector quality
title: Minimalist Line Art Travel Poster
description: A comprehensive prompt for generating high-resolution minimalist city travel posters with authentic local typography and a Swiss modernist aesthetic.
