content: Create a wide 16:9 anime-style digital illustration of a grand {argument name="venue type" default="VTuber arena concert stage"} designed like a glamorous fighting-game arena, viewed from the center in a perfectly symmetrical front-facing composition. The scene is an empty polished performance floor in the foreground with glossy reflective tiles, gold geometric inlays, a large star motif at the center, and strong pink-purple reflections. In the background is an ornate elevated stage with two staircases, one on each side, leading up to a platform framed by gold trusses, black speaker towers, railings decorated with star emblems, and a huge central LED screen showing a sparkling pastel skyburst in {argument name="screen colors" default="pink, violet, cyan, and gold"}. Add exactly three visible LED screens: one large central screen and two smaller side screens, left and right, all displaying the same radiant starry concert visual. Above the main screen, place a large golden star at the top center surrounded by oversized magenta satin bows and draped curtains, with additional pink curtain swags and hanging star ornaments on both upper sides. Fill the arena with dramatic stage lighting: many spotlights, lens flares, colored beams, rows of small bulbs, glittering particles, and a festival atmosphere in {argument name="lighting mood" default="neon magenta and electric blue"}. The audience is visible at the bottom and along the far sides as dark silhouettes holding multicolored glow sticks, especially pink, blue, yellow, and purple, creating the feeling of a packed live event. Use highly detailed anime background art, crisp linework, saturated idol-stage colors, cinematic depth, reflective surfaces, ultra-clean rendering, no characters on the arena floor, no text, no logos, no watermarks.

content: Create a {argument name="style" default="clean, minimal, high-end"} facial beauty report based on this photo. Use a black-on-white design with thin lines, rounded cards, and a luxury aesthetic. Include a simple contour line drawing of the face, an honest attractiveness analysis (symmetry, proportions, bone structure, skin, etc.), clear scores, strengths, areas for improvement, and actionable grooming/style recommendations. Keep it data-driven, visually refined, and not overly flattering. Make the aspect ratio {argument name="aspect ratio" default="9:16"}.

content:
You are a professional interior design Mood Board creator. Based on the provided {argument name="space type" default="bedroom"} design photo, generate a high-end vertical 3:4 mood board. The overall visual should reference professional design proposals, showing {argument name="style name" default="Modern Mid-century"} aesthetic features, possessing a [Mood Keywords] atmosphere, and conforming to [Branding Tone] design expression.
Space Type: {argument name="space type" default="bedroom"}
Layout Requirements:
Upper section: A high-resolution, photorealistic {argument name="space type" default="bedroom"} interior rendering. It must be consistent with the user's photo in structure, furniture, materials, colors, and lighting, but refined for a professional proposal. Focus on: [Key Furniture Elements], [Material Keywords], [Color Palette], [Lighting Style].
Lower section: Display material and furnishing samples strictly corresponding to the upper design, including: Material samples, fabric samples, color swatches, finish samples, and related wood/stone/metal/glass/leather samples. All must reflect the core material and color logic of the plan.
Bottom right: A Design Legend / Color Palette info box showing: Primary color, secondary color, accent color, core materials, finish descriptions, and style keywords.
Style and Output:
Professional firm-level layout; minimalist, clean, restrained, and orderly; clear visual hierarchy and white space control; material/color labels clear and modern; overall vibe matching {argument name="style name" default="Modern Mid-century"}; Render Quality: 4K Ultra HD, hyper-detailed, photorealistic rendering. Vertical 3:4 composition.
Label Requirements:
Each sample must have a clear label organized by [Label Language] material/color/finish names in a concise, professional, and well-aligned style.
title: Interior Design Mood Board Generator
description: A comprehensive prompt for generating professional interior design mood boards. It creates a structured layout featuring a high-resolution 3D render of a space, paired with matching material samples, fabric textures, and a detailed design legend including color palettes and material specs.

content: Using REFERENCE_1 as the source article page and REFERENCE_0 as the site branding/navigation reference, redesign the article page into a polished modern dark-mode news UI while preserving the Japanese article topic and overall site identity. Keep the header with logo and nav links, but make the article layout wider and more editorial: add a back-to-archive link, a category pill, date, large bold headline, short intro paragraph, and a wide cinematic hero image with a dark space/planet glow motif. Reformat the article body into clear sections with exactly 5 visible section headings: 「Claude Codeの発表」, 「計算資源の強化とパートナーシップ」, 「利用規約の更新と謝罪」, 「機能・プロダクトのアップデート」, and 「今後の展望」. Add inline UI enhancements including one highlighted note/callout box, one quote box, bullet lists, and a bottom source-link card. Add a right sidebar containing exactly 4 stacked cards: 1) 「この記事の要点」 with 5 numbered summary points, 2) 「タグ」 with 6 tag chips labeled Anthropic, Claude, Claude Code, エージェント, 計算資源, パートナーシップ, 3) 「シェア」 with 4 share buttons/icons for link, Twitter/X, Facebook, and Hatena Bookmark, and 4) 「関連記事」 with 4 related article links and dates. Use subtle borders, rounded cards, muted gray text, amber accent lines, and generous spacing; keep the footer links GitHub and news.smol.ai.
title: Dark News Article UI Redesign
description: Transforms a simple Japanese AI news article page into a modern dark editorial layout with sidebar summaries, tags, sharing, and related articles.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 and REFERENCE_1 as the existing dark AI news website design, create a refreshed archive page UI while preserving the same brand, Japanese typography, dark theme, logo, top navigation, and footer identity. Set the active top navigation item to {argument name="active navigation" default="アーカイブ"} with a subtle yellow underline. Replace the simple list layout with a polished modern archive interface: add a large bordered hero card titled {argument name="page title" default="アーカイブ"}, with a small yellow icon label {argument name="eyebrow label" default="すべての記事"}, a short intro sentence, and a decorative golden eclipse/planet glow graphic on the right side of the hero. Below it, add a search bar and two compact dropdown controls for period and sort order. Add exactly 8 category filter pills labeled: すべて, Claude, OpenAI, Google, Agents, ツール, ニュース, 研究, その他, with すべて highlighted in yellow. Transform the article list into a timeline grouped by month with exactly 2 month sections: 2026年5月 containing 3 article rows, and 2026年4月 containing 2 article rows. Each row should show a date, a small yellow timeline dot, a bold Japanese article title, a one-line summary, 3 tag chips on the right, and a chevron arrow. Use the visible article titles from the references where appropriate, plus archive-like additional titles. Add bottom pagination with exactly 6 controls: previous arrow, 1 highlighted, 2, 3, ellipsis, 24, next arrow. Keep the page centered with generous spacing, thin borders, subtle gradients, glassy cards, and perfect readable Japanese text rendering.
title: Dark AI News Archive Redesign
description: Generates a modern dark-mode Japanese archive page redesign from an existing AI news website UI.

content:
Fashion design sketch / haute couture design page, themed inspiration from {argument name="inspiration theme" default="beetle"}. The layout is a professional fashion design board: the center is a full-body standing real female model with a realistic skin texture and high-end fashion photography atmosphere, wearing an haute couture gown inspired by the {argument name="inspiration theme" default="beetle"}. The silhouette is {argument name="gown silhouette" default="slim long dress"}. The design should extract colors, geometric shapes, and textures from the inspiration object into the skirt, bodice, embroidery, and fabric details.

Layout requirements: Top left features an exquisite hand-drawn inspiration sketch or illustration of the {argument name="inspiration theme" default="beetle"}; the right side features black and white technical line drawings of the gown with handwritten notes in English/French style about fabric and tailoring. The background is clean white with designer signatures and studio annotations, presenting a professional fashion design sheet / couture concept board visual.

Style requirements: Fusion of realistic model and high-end design manuscript. The subject and fabric details are extremely refined, featuring a mixed texture of soft watercolor and digital illustration. Lighting is soft and uniform. 4K ultra-clear, high aesthetic, suitable for brand-level fashion proposals.

Inspiration theme: Beetle
Aspect ratio: 3:4

content: Create a luxurious romantic website hero banner for a nightlife venue champagne promotion, ultra-wide 16:9 composition, set in an enchanting pink cherry-blossom forest at golden hour with a glowing sun flare at the top center, dense magenta flowers covering the ground, dark curved tree trunks forming a natural arch, drifting petals, glittering bokeh, sparkles, and a dreamy glamorous atmosphere. Center foreground shows exactly 2 champagne bottles standing side by side: the left bottle is deep ruby red with gold foil neck, ornate gold crest label, elegant monogram, and cursive brand text; the right bottle is pale blush white with subtle floral pattern, green foil neck, ornate gold crest label, elegant monogram, and cursive brand text. Add large glowing Japanese headline typography across the upper center reading {argument name="headline text" default="オリジナルシャンパン♡"}, with a second smaller line below reading {argument name="subheadline text" default="発売中"}; style the text as soft white-pink neon calligraphy with decorative swirls on both sides, small hearts, and tiny star sparkles. Use premium advertising photography mixed with fantasy digital art, high contrast, glossy reflections on glass, shallow depth of field, vibrant pink and gold color grading, cinematic lighting, clean commercial layout with the bottles perfectly centered and enough negative space behind the headline.

description: A glamorous pink cherry-blossom champagne advertisement banner suited for nightlife venue websites and promotional hero images.

content: Create a cinematic vertical cyberpunk influencer poster in a neon pink and magenta nighttime city, with wet reflective pavement, skyscrapers covered in glowing billboards, and a futuristic social-media atmosphere. Center one confident male AI creator walking forward out of an enormous upright smartphone shaped like an Instagram screen, wearing a {argument name="blazer color" default="rose pink"} tailored blazer, white turtleneck, layered silver chains, black slim trousers, and clean white sneakers; his face should be softly anonymized with a square blur while keeping the hair and body sharp. The phone interface shows the Instagram wordmark at top, time 11:11, and exactly 5 story circles across the top labeled Your Story, mtariq.ai, an obscured center profile, viral.king, and luxury.vibe. content: An abstract background based on {argument name="style" default="pop art and street art"} with influences from contemporary anime and manga. No people, characters, or text. Composed mainly of sharp, clean line art and flat shading, with vibrant, high-contrast {argument name="colors" default="neon colors (pink, cyan, yellow, purple, electric blue)"}. A dynamic layout featuring overlapping complex geometric patterns and bold shapes. Emphasis on gradients and textures using Ben-Day dots and screen tones. Adds street art elements like paint splatters and ink drips, resulting in a stylish and energetic 2D illustration background that merges retro comics with modern anime expressions.
title: Pop Art Street Abstract Background
description: An abstract background prompt inspired by the fusion of contemporary anime, pop art, and street art styles. It features sharp lines, vibrant neon colors, and dynamic geometric patterns without any characters or text.

content: Create a clean modern app logo on a pure white background: a rounded cloud-like circular badge made from overlapping soft lobes, filled with a smooth gradient from {argument name="top color" default="violet purple"} at the upper left through {argument name="middle color" default="bright azure blue"} to {argument name="bottom color" default="cyan turquoise"} at the lower right. Inside the badge, depict a minimalist landscape icon with two white snow-covered mountain peaks: one smaller peak on the left and one larger peak centered-right, both with gentle blue shadow gradients along their lower slopes. Add a small solid white sun or moon circle in the upper-left interior. Across the bottom of the mountains, include a flowing curved white wave line separating the snowy peaks from the blue lower area, with subtle depth and glossy highlight effects. Use vector-style simplicity, rounded edges, soft gradients, no text, no border, centered composition, high-resolution app icon aesthetic.
title: Gradient Mountain Cloud App Logo

content:
An {argument name="character role" default="adult Oriental fantasy female character"} in a front-facing close-up bust composition, with a cold, gentle, mysterious, and noble temperament. She possesses exquisite Oriental features, porcelain-white translucent skin, and soft, delicate facial lighting. Her eyes are quiet and detached, with a snow-like clarity and a hint of melancholy. Her black-gray long hair is styled in gorgeous ancient-style double buns, smooth and fluffy with natural layers, accented by light bangs and decorated with gold hairpins, green gemstones, tassels, bead chains, and exquisite butterfly-shaped ornaments—elegant but not cluttered.

She wears a magnificent ancient-style robe in white and dark green, evoking Oriental court and Xianxia vibes. The inner layer is white silk, and the outer layer is draped with a heavy and soft {argument name="clothing accessory" default="white fox fur shawl"} with a realistic plush texture and fluffy edges. The hem and sleeves feature dark green gradients, black woven patterns, and fine gold thread decorations, embodying a high-end, restrained, and cold Oriental aesthetic. Her slender hands elegantly hold {argument name="held prop" default="a sprig of green bamboo covered in white snow"}, with crisp green leaves and delicate snowflakes creating a wintry poetic feel.

The background is a gradient of very light warm white and pale blue-gray with clean white space. Soft snowflakes, ice crystals, shimmering particles, and faint gold light spots fall through the air, creating a serene, dreamy, and beautiful winter wonderland atmosphere. The overall color palette features snow white, dark green, jasper, pale gold, and ice blue-gray. The image is bright and transparent with soft lighting, combining ink-wash aesthetics, Oriental illustration texture, and high-end fantasy art.

Style: Beautiful Oriental fantasy illustration, ancient Xianxia beauty, detailed digital painting, soft focus lighting, snowy atmosphere, gorgeous hair accessories, exquisite clothing textures, realistic fur texture, cold fairy-like aura, poetic white space, high-end feel, ultra-high detail, exquisite character portrait, dreamy atmosphere, clean and elegant, wallpaper-grade quality.
title: Elegant Oriental Fantasy Illustration
description: Generates a high-quality illustration of a cold and elegant oriental fantasy female character with snowy winter aesthetics.

content:
Create a vertical, luxurious, and organized brand document for a Thai restaurant named "{argument name="restaurant" default="Sin-Thai"}" with the English text "{argument name="english name" default="Sin-Thai"}". The design should be classic Thai, elegant and clean, with royal colors like {argument name="colors" default="burgundy, emerald green, antique gold, wood brown and warm cream"}.

The document should include: A central logo with a noodle bowl, color palette, typography, a short description of the brand's character, a menu with several types of Pad Thai and spiciness levels, an area showing the Pad Thai dish based on the attached image, examples of food photography, packaging design, the experience of the place, and at the bottom a brief with 5 logo variations to choose from.

The food should look fresh, clean, high-end and appetizing. The entire document should feel professional, Thai, warm and precise, with small and happy touches.

content: Create a vibrant cyberpunk anime close-up illustration of {argument name="character name" default="a pink-haired virtual idol girl"} in a neon server-room setting, framed as a tight vertical crop with the left half of her face mostly cut off and her oversized hand dominating the center foreground. She has very long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="bright pink"} hair with loose strands and ribbons, a small turquoise diamond-shaped hair ornament near the top left, pale skin, and a glossy futuristic jacket in {argument name="jacket color" default="electric blue and magenta"} with black cuffs and hot-pink trim. Her hand is thrust toward the viewer in extreme perspective, making a peace sign with 2 long extended fingers, 1 visible thumb, and 3 curled or partially fused lower fingers for a slightly imperfect six-finger AI-art look. The background shows tall dark data panels and monitor columns with glowing purple, cyan, and magenta code-like bars, plus diagonal neon light streaks and pink reflections. Use a polished high-saturation anime key visual style, dramatic rim lighting, glossy highlights, shallow depth of field, energetic idol-promo composition, and a futuristic website hero-image feel.

content: Using the uploaded logo, create a high-quality professional poster for an integrated brand identity system. Goal: Everything must be based on the logo: Colors, Style, Personality, and Tone. ❌ No generic or random elements allowed. 🧱 Structure: Vertical poster with a 4:5 ratio, a clear and multi-layered Grid system; the design should be content-dense but clean and organized. 🔝 Top Section: Brand name in a clear and clean font, a short slogan expressing the brand (max 6 words), and an identity description in three words (e.g., modern / bold / simple). 🎨 Color System (Professional): Display primary colors (3–5), secondary colors (3–5), and accent colors. For each color, provide clear color blocks, HEX codes, and usage (Background / Primary / Accent). Add color gradients and color blending examples. 🔤 Typography: Specify heading font, subheading font, and body text font. Show real text examples and a clear hierarchy between sizes. 🖼️ Visual Identity: Specify image style (cinematic / minimalist / editorial…), lighting direction, and type of materials and textures. Display 3 to 5 visual examples (image style). 📦 Brand Applications (Very Important): Show realistic mockups such as product packaging, website interface (Hero Section), mobile app screen, 3 social media posts, business card, and an advertisement or billboard. ⚠️ All must share the same identity spirit. 🧩 Design System: Display UI components, cards, and spacing systems. Examples: buttons, layouts, and sections. 🔘 Icons: 6 to 10 icons in the same style (Line or Filled), consistent with the identity. 🎭 Patterns and Elements: Background patterns, decorative shapes, and elements inspired by the logo. ✨ Fine Details: Shadows, textures, reflections, and layer depth. 🎯 Overall Style: A mix between Editorial Design + Tech Style; very clean but rich in detail with a strong and clear hierarchy. 📊 Density: 30 to 50 visual elements; a mix of large and small elements in an intelligently crowded and organized design. 🚫 Important Rules: No empty spaces without a reason, no filler elements, everything has a purpose, and all elements are visually interconnected. 💎 Final Result: It must look like a strong project on Behance or an identity guide from a design agency. Something that makes the client ask: "How much?" 😏 NOT: Simple, traditional, or a ready-made template.
title: Professional Brand Identity Guidelines Poster
description: A highly detailed, structural prompt for creating a comprehensive brand identity poster including grids, color palettes, typography, and UI application mockups.

title: Chinese AI Chat Screenshot with Bunny Comic
description: A dark-mode Chinese mobile AI chat screenshot displaying a cute four-panel bunny comic is useful for recreating app demo screens, social posts, or UI mockups with embedded generated art.

content: A smartphone screenshot of the ChatGPT mobile app in dark mode, showing a generated image embedded in a conversation. The top header is a black interface with a left menu icon, the word ChatGPT, a small pink heart decoration near the title, and two rounded buttons on the right for edit/share and more options, all with a subtle purple glow. The main generated image is a rounded-corner 2x2 comic grid with exactly 4 panels, numbered 1, 2, 3, and 4 in pink circles. The comic has a dreamy bedtime aesthetic in warm pastel pink, lavender, cream, and soft gold lighting. In every panel, a fluffy white puppy with long droopy ears, a tiny pink bow near one ear, and a gentle emotional face comforts a small gray kitten plush-like character on a pink bed. The room is cozy and childlike, filled with glowing fairy lights, star-shaped bokeh, plush toys, pillows, a crescent moon visible through the window, and soft blankets. Panel 1 shows the white puppy sitting upright beside the gray kitten and holding open a picture book or storybook, both tucked into bed, with several lines of Chinese dialogue text above and small speech bubbles. Panel 2 shows the puppy hugging the kitten more closely under the blanket while talking softly, with a teddy bear or bunny plush visible on the right and Chinese text at the top. Panel 3 shows the kitten looking sadder and more curled up while the puppy wraps around it protectively, with a cup on a bedside surface in the foreground and more Chinese dialogue text. Panel 4 shows both characters lying down sleepily under the blanket, cuddled together, with the puppy’s eyes half-closed and the kitten resting, surrounded by warm sparkles and bedtime glow; Chinese dialogue text appears at the top. Along the bottom edge of the comic is a pale caption strip with additional Chinese text and a small bunny icon; at the lower left corner of the image area is a large Chinese button-like label reading 编辑. Beneath the comic inside the chat, there is a long block of Chinese text in white on black background, written like an emotional social-media-style caption with crying-face, moon, sparkle, and heart emojis, spanning multiple short paragraphs. At the very bottom is the ChatGPT message input bar with a plus button on the left, the placeholder text 问问 ChatGPT, a microphone icon, and a purple circular voice button on the right. The overall image should feel like an authentic app screenshot, vertically framed, high-contrast black UI around a cute bedtime four-panel illustration, with Chinese interface text and a polished mobile-product-photo look.
title: ChatGPT App Screenshot With Cute 4-Panel Comic
description: Generates a realistic mobile screenshot of the ChatGPT app displaying a soft pastel four-panel bedtime comic and a long Chinese chat caption, ideal for social media mockups and AI app showcase visuals.

content:
Goal: Create a serene healing-style wallpaper poster inspired by Monument Valley, with impossible isometric architecture, soft pastel colors, and a quiet motivational quote.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 2:1 poster, approximately 1200×600 px. Warm off-white background with lots of negative space, airy mist, and subtle paper texture.

Layout: Left third contains large vertical Chinese typography in three stacked rows, reading {argument name="main quote" default="不慌不忙\n游刃有余\n从从容容"}. Under it place a small Chinese subtitle reading {argument name="subtitle" default="在自己的节奏里\n把生活过成风景"}, a short thin orange divider line, then a tiny English caption: “Move at / your own pace, / and everything / falls into place.” Bottom-left has “VOL. / 03” and a thin horizontal line. Top-right has tiny spaced text “2024” above “SERENITY”. Bottom-right has a minimal circular mark, “03”, a slash, and “100”.

Architecture: The right two-thirds and lower center show a dreamy impossible isometric city of pale mint, seafoam, and ivory blocks. Include exactly 12 major architectural elements: 1 long diagonal bridge crossing the center with a tiny standing figure on it, 2 short staircases on the bridge area, 1 tall central rectangular tower, 1 glowing orange arched doorway, 1 high seafoam arch frame in front of the tower, 1 right-side staircase leading upward, 1 right teal arched doorway, 1 lower small arched opening, 1 floating elevated platform, 1 low foreground wall maze, and 1 distant translucent tower silhouette. Use Escher-like geometry, clean sharp edges, soft shadows, and atmospheric depth.

Subject details: Place exactly 1 tiny human figure on the central bridge, wearing a teal robe or dress, seen from far away, calm and contemplative. Add exactly 1 peach sun or moon near the upper center. Add exactly 1 small leafy branch entering from the right edge.

Visual style: Minimalist pastel poster, soft cinematic lighting, tranquil Japanese/Chinese healing aesthetic, Monument Valley game-like impossible architecture, frosted translucent surfaces, muted mint green, pale cyan, ivory, warm cream, and small orange accent details. Thin elegant typography, balanced composition, refined editorial design.

Constraints: Keep the mood peaceful and spacious. Do not add extra characters, vehicles, logos, or clutter. Preserve the exact visible text hierarchy and the wide wallpaper composition.
title: Serene Monument Valley Poster
description: A calm pastel wallpaper poster combining Chinese motivational typography with dreamy impossible isometric architecture.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 as the source prompt text and REFERENCE_1 as the app-screen composition reference, generate the resulting ChatGPT mobile conversation screen. Keep the Japanese prompt visible as a small rounded gray message bubble near the upper right, but create a new ordinary, accidental-looking iPhone selfie below it: it should look like the phone was pulled from a pocket and the shutter was pressed unintentionally, with messy tilted framing, slight motion blur, uneven sun flare/overexposure, and no deliberate composition. Make the selfie outdoors in bright daylight on a residential street, with part of a young woman cropped off on the right edge, long dark hair, a beige coat sleeve stretched toward the camera in the foreground, buildings and blue sky in the background. Include the ChatGPT app UI around it: top bar with hamburger button, “ChatGPT” title pill, compose icon, and three-dot menu; below the image include an “編集する” edit button and a centered down-arrow button. Preserve the casual imperfect snapshot feel rather than making it polished or cinematic.

content:
Create a clean vertical technical workflow infographic on a light gray background, using a minimalist modern product-diagram style with rounded white cards, thin colored outlines, simple vector line icons, dark navy text, and navy connector arrows. The composition is a single centered top-to-bottom flowchart with 7 numbered main steps, plus 2 parallel cache-group panels branching from step 4 into step 5, and a thick dark return arrow on the far left looping from the bottom back to the top. Use crisp sans-serif typography, generous spacing, subtle pastel accent colors, no gradients, no shadows, and presentation-slide clarity.

At the top center place step card 1 with a blue outline and a code/chat icon on the left. Title text: "1. {argument name="step 1 title" default="chat completions request"}". Subtitle beneath: "conversation_id + cache_salt + new suffix messages".

Below it place step card 2 with a blue outline and a document/list icon. Title: "2. Frontend conversation ledger". Subtitle: "lease same id + track committed messages".

Below it place step card 3 with a cyan outline and a database-with-magnifier icon. Title: "3. Exact conversation cache lookup". Subtitle: "conversation_id  committed turn state".

Below it place step card 4 with a purple outline and a branching scheduler icon. Title: "4. Scheduler cache attachment". Subtitle: "set num_computed_tokens + attach committed state".

From step 4, branch downward into 2 side-by-side group panels.

Left group panel: a pale green rounded container titled "Full-attention KV cache group". Inside it, stack 2 inner cards. First inner card has a green block-grid icon, title "Committed block refs", subtitle "share aligned full KV blocks". Second inner card below has a green layered-sheets icon, title "Tail COW copy", subtitle "copy unaligned KV tail". At the bottom of the green panel add small footer text: "paged K/V tensors for transformer layers".

Right group panel: a pale purple rounded container titled "Mamba terminal-state cache group". Inside it, stack 2 inner cards. First inner card has a purple database/network icon, title "Committed terminal state", subtitle "exact state at committed length". Second inner card below has a purple wavy-lines icon, title "Request-owned terminal copy", subtitle "copy SSM + conv state". At the bottom of the purple panel add small footer text: "align-mode terminal state placement".

Merge both group-panel outputs into a centered step card 5 with a blue outline and a microchip icon. Title: "5. Hybrid model execution". Subtitle: "run only the uncached suffix". Inside the bottom area of this card, include 2 pill-shaped labels side by side: "Transformer layers" and "Mamba layers".

Below it place step card 6 with a blue outline and a sparkle icon. Title: "6. Decode assistant tokens". Subtitle: "stream response token by token".

Below it place step card 7 with a warm yellow-orange outline and a database-with-check icon. Title: "7. Commit completed turn". Subtitle: "publish pending state or discard on failure".

Add a thick dark navy loop arrow running down the far left side, entering step 1 near the top from the left and returning from step 7 at the bottom back upward. Along this left loop, near the lower half, place stacked annotation text: "next request reuses committed conversation head".

Add 2 dashed publish arrows rising upward from step 7 toward the cache-group panels: one green dashed arrow on the left pointing to the green cache panel, labeled "publish new state"; one purple dashed arrow on the right pointing to the purple cache panel, also labeled "publish new state".

Keep the exact total count of 7 numbered main cards, 2 cache group panels, 4 inner cache cards, and 2 pill labels. Preserve a portrait aspect ratio similar to a conference-slide architecture diagram.
title: Hybrid Cache Execution Flowchart
description: A polished vertical systems-architecture infographic showing a seven-step cached chat inference pipeline with dual cache branches, suitable for technical explainers and product presentations.

Preserve the feeling of a busy shopping street, but redraw the pedestrians as stylish modern city walkers and make the storefronts and cars look more elegant and coherent.

content: Create a side-by-side comparison image showing 2 vertical Japanese skincare advertisement banners on a dark charcoal background, each banner framed as a clean smartphone-style ad mockup with a white and icy blue beauty aesthetic. The left banner should look elegant and visually polished but less sales-driven: a soft backlit close-up of a woman with wet-looking dark hair and luminous bare skin, her face partially obscured by a centered rectangular blur block, pale blue water textures, floating droplets, a white-and-silver sunscreen tube labeled {argument name="product name" default="VITA LUMIÈRE"} near the lower right, refined Japanese serif and sans-serif typography, and a large blue rounded CTA button at the bottom. Include the headline in Japanese: 「透明ツヤ肌をつくる ビタミンC×日焼け止めクリーム」, small supporting copy above and below, 3 circular benefit icons near the lower middle, the handwritten-style subcopy 「まるでスキンケア！つけるたび、素肌がうるおう。」, and a bottom CTA button reading 「今すぐ透明ツヤ肌を体感する」. The right banner should be a stronger direct-response version of the same product and model, with clearer hierarchy, bolder copy, and more persuasive conversion elements: a larger dramatic Japanese headline across the top reading 「紫外線も、くすみも、もう怖くない。」, the same model again with a centered rectangular blur over the face, the product tube shown larger on the right, a blue speech-bubble badge reading 「透明ツヤ肌をつくる」, the same handwritten-style subcopy angled across the chest area, 3 large glossy circular claim badges along the lower middle reading 「肌トーンアップ効果」, 「うるおい美容液成分80%」, and 「ビタミンC誘導体」, plus a pink campaign strip above the CTA reading 「初回限定・送料無料キャンペーン中」. The right CTA button should be larger and more prominent, reading 「今すぐ透明ツヤ肌を体感する」. Use a bright cool palette of white, ice blue, silver, and faint holographic highlights, realistic cosmetic product rendering, soft water splash accents, translucent bubbles, premium Japanese beauty-ad styling, high contrast between headline and CTA, and a clear visual impression that the right ad is more persuasive and conversion-optimized than the left.
title: Japanese Skincare Ad Comparison
description: A side-by-side Japanese sunscreen beauty ad comparison useful for illustrating the difference between a polished creative and a more conversion-focused advertising design.

content: An ultra-detailed cinematic isometric street-level view of a dense nostalgic Japanese canal-side neighborhood at blue hour, designed like a miniature lived-in urban diorama. The scene is packed with tightly clustered multi-story buildings of varied shapes and ages, with weathered concrete, faded painted walls, patched metal roofs, tiled roofs, small balconies, rooftop tanks, antennas, pipes, exposed wiring, hanging laundry, window air conditioners, satellite dishes, potted plants, vines, and warm glowing interior lights in nearly every window. At the center, place a charming teal-blue shop house with a dark blue tiled roof, rounded windows, exterior stairs, a tiny awning, and a bright retro sign reading {argument name="shop sign text" default="トリナオ"}. Surround it with many neighboring storefronts and residences stacked irregularly at different heights, creating a layered maze of alleys, staircases, landings, bridges, and utility poles. Include exactly 2 vending machines near the lower center-right area, exactly 2 bicycles along the canal-side walkway, exactly 1 satellite dish on an upper roof near the center, exactly 1 large round wall clock mounted on a cylindrical corner building on the right, and exactly 1 canal in the foreground with dark reflective water and a curved concrete embankment. Add numerous vertical Japanese shop signs and lit billboards throughout the composition, including signs resembling {argument name="main vertical sign" default="久保田"}, {argument name="green shop sign" default="山城商店"}, and other retro neighborhood business signage. The architecture should feel hand-crafted, eclectic, slightly whimsical, and deeply lived in, with dense environmental storytelling and no empty space. Lighting is soft dusk light mixed with warm amber practical lights from windows, lanterns, and signs, creating a cozy yet bustling mood. Color palette: teal, muted red, worn cream, mossy green, rust, indigo, and warm tungsten yellow. Style: hyper-detailed photoreal miniature cityscape, cinematic depth, crisp textures, subtle atmospheric haze, high dynamic range, Japanese Showa-era inspired urban nostalgia, richly layered composition, no visible people, wide landscape framing.
title: Miniature Japanese Canal Town at Dusk
description: This generates a highly detailed cozy retro Japanese canal-side city diorama, ideal for cinematic background art, concept illustration, or miniature-style urban scenes.

Also update the visible Japanese Copilot request and response text so the request says 「ピクセルアートにしてください」 and the response explains that the cat image was changed to pixel-art style, with follow-up suggestions mentioning 3 options: 「もっとドットを荒くしたい（8bit風）」, 「背景を単色にしたい」, and 「スライド右下用の小さめサイズにしたい」.

content: A cinematic first-person visual novel game interface showing a warm morning breakfast scene in a shared apartment dining room, photographed with a slightly wide-angle lens and shallow depth of field. Two young women sit across a wooden table in soft golden sunlight pouring through large sheer-curtained windows on the left. The woman on the left has messy tied-up hair, a gray tank top, and a loose cardigan slipping off one shoulder, leaning back casually with one arm behind her head. The woman on the right has long dark hair and wears an oversized cream knit sweater, resting her face in her hands and leaning toward the table. Their faces are obscured by soft rectangular blur blocks. On the table are 2 breakfast plates clearly visible: one plate in front of the left woman with pasta or salad-like food, and one large plate in front of the right woman with several slices of toast; there is also a second breakfast dish near the right side with 2 fried eggs. Include 2 mugs, 1 small glass, a clipboard with papers and a pen in the lower left foreground, a small black camera near the bottom center-right, and a vase with white flowers in the lower right foreground. The room feels cozy and lived-in, with wood furniture, a doorway in the back center, kitchen shelving and chairs in the background, and sunlit reflections across the floor and tabletop. Add a polished Chinese interactive story game HUD overlay. Top left: a dark rounded title pill with a home icon and the text "环景心动计划", plus a smaller pill reading "第一章", followed by the scene title "合租公寓的早晨" and a smaller location label "餐厅". Left side vertical stats panel with exactly 5 stacked buttons showing: "路线 未锁定", "事业 32", "真诚 38", "压力 38", "信任均值 30". Top right: exactly 4 compact rounded buttons labeled "关系", "回忆", "存档", "设置". Near the center-bottom over the table, add a small floating location tag reading "天文馆景想". Along the bottom, place a dark translucent dialogue box with a speaker name label "旁白" and the text "第二天早晨，你在餐桌中央醒来般坐下。水果、咖啡、合同、舞鞋、手柄和景程围成一圈。" with a small next-arrow button on the right. Overall style: realistic cinematic game screenshot, intimate domestic atmosphere, soft bloom, muted beige and brown palette, premium narrative app UI, immersive and emotionally suggestive.
title: Cinematic Shared Apartment Breakfast UI
description: A realistic story-game scene of two women having breakfast in a sunlit apartment, designed for visual novel or interactive narrative interface concepts.

content: Change the image into a {argument name="era" default="90s Y2K"} Tamagotchi LCD screen style. Keep the original characters and situation, but reinterpret and simplify them into cute and insignificant 8-bit pixel characters and backgrounds. Use a bright and lovely pastel LCD palette ({argument name="colors" default="centered on cream, pink, mint, and lavender"}), dot matrix texture, large pixels, 4-color limit, and flat LCD expression. Include retro UI such as battery icons, status windows, menu icons, hearts, levels, date/time, and short pixel text. Do not show the Tamagotchi device body, buttons, bezel, or frame. Create a nostalgic and lovely Tamagotchi pixel screen that fills only the inside of the LCD. Sharp focus. 8k.
title: Y2K Tamagotchi LCD Filter
description: Converts a standard image into a retro 90s Tamagotchi 8-bit pixel art screen with authentic UI elements.

content: A realistic smartphone screenshot of the ChatGPT mobile app in dark mode, shown on a black background with iOS-style UI. At the top, display a header with a hamburger menu icon on the left, a rounded tab labeled "ChatGPT" in the center, and two icons on the right: a compose icon and a three-dot menu. Below that, show a row of exactly 3 rounded-corner photo thumbnails of sleeping cats: first, an orange-and-white cat sleeping on a fluffy cushion under a black metal chair frame on a wooden floor; second, a calico cat curled tightly on a pale green round cushion on a bed; third, a cream-colored cat curled up asleep in a brown plush pet bed. Under the thumbnails, place a dark gray chat bubble with white Japanese text that says: "これを良い感じにfacebookのストーリーに流せる感じにして。ばえるかんじで". Beneath the message, show the generated image as a tall vertical Facebook-story-style collage using the same 3 cat photos blended into one warm, cozy composition. The top section features the orange-and-white cat under the chair, the middle section features the curled calico cat, and the bottom section features the cream-colored cat in the fluffy bed. Apply soft beige and brown tones, dreamy lighting, light bokeh circles, subtle sparkles, and a gentle lifestyle aesthetic. Add cute handwritten-style Japanese overlay text and stickers across the collage: a speech bubble near the top saying "今日も おつかれさま♡", a vertical note on the left reading "みんなそれぞれ お気に入りの場所で", two small heart doodles near the center, and a large diagonal caption reading "しあわせ すやすや時間。". At the bottom-left of the generated image, overlay a rounded dark button labeled "編集する", and near the bottom-center place a circular download icon with a downward arrow. At the very bottom of the screen, include the ChatGPT input bar with a plus icon, placeholder text "ChatGPT に質問…", a microphone icon, and a circular voice button. Make the overall image look like an authentic captured app screen, vertically oriented, with a thin white scroll bar visible along the right edge.
title: ChatGPT App Cat Story Screenshot
description: A realistic mobile app screenshot showing ChatGPT turning three cat photos into a cozy Japanese Facebook Story collage, useful for mockups, social media demos, and UI concept visuals.

content: A cinematic vertical night photo of a {argument name="subject" default="young woman"} sitting indoors in a modern apartment kitchen-living space, looking down at a glowing smartphone held with both hands. Her face is mostly obscured by shadow and framing, with dark hair parted in the middle and pulled into a low bun. She wears a silky slate-blue spaghetti-strap slip dress and layered gold necklaces, including a nameplate necklace that reads {argument name="necklace text" default="Angel"}. The scene is lit by moody blue, violet, and cyan ambient lighting from the room and the phone screen, creating a futuristic cyber-luxury atmosphere. Floating holographic augmented-reality interface panels emerge from the phone and hover in front of her chest and upper torso, semi-transparent neon blue and purple with thin glowing outlines, tiny particles, and digital spark effects. Show exactly 5 visible UI panels and labels: a top-left system label reading {argument name="system label" default="LIFE SYSTEM"}; a large left panel reading "Identity Status: VERIFIED (concept)" with a circular profile icon and a digital globe visualization; a center-right panel reading "Health Sync: STABLE" with a waveform-like pattern; a lower-left panel reading "Finance Flow: ACTIVE" with small bar and line charts; a lower-right panel reading "Access Level: GLOBAL"; and a small narrow panel between them reading "Habits Initialization". Modern dark wood kitchen cabinets and a softly blurred countertop sit in the background, with subtle practical lights and a window glow at left. Shallow depth of field, realistic skin and fabric texture, premium smartphone photography look, soft bloom, low-light realism, high contrast, futuristic yet believable near-future interface design, vertical 9:16 composition.

description: This generates a moody vertical cinematic portrait of a woman using a smartphone with holographic life-management UI overlays, ideal for near-future tech, AI lifestyle, and social media visuals.

content: Using the provided reference image, enhance it as a higher-resolution nadir satellite/aerial crop of the same rooftop scene. Make the rooftop details more legible, especially clarifying the single solar water heater on the white roof as a distinct rectangular panel with its small tank/cylinder attachment and a clear shadow. Preserve the tight cropped composition and realistic Earth-observation imagery look.

content:
Create a high-impact Japanese promotional hero banner for a digital product about business infographic and slide prompts, in a futuristic neon tech style. Use a wide 16:9 composition with a deep black background, subtle dark blue grid texture, glowing blue light streaks, and soft green energy waves sweeping across the bottom right. The overall look should feel premium, cyber-luminous, modern SaaS marketing, with crisp contrast and polished UI lighting.

Place the ChatGPT logo and the word "ChatGPT" in the top left, glowing in green and white. Near the upper center, add a rounded glowing blue capsule badge with a small tag that says "NEW" and main text "GPT Images 2.0". In the top right, place a green rounded rectangular app-style badge with the note logo and the word "note".

On the left half, build the main headline stack in Japanese. Add a small green outlined label reading "ChatGPT Images 2.0 特化" above the headline. Then place a very large bold white headline on two lines: "ビジネス図解・スライド" and "プロンプト". Next to the second line, place an oversized glowing electric-blue number "50" with a bright neon rim light and the smaller text "選" attached to its lower right. Below the headline, add a thin horizontal blue neon divider line. Under it, place the subheadline in Japanese: "プロ品質の図解が、秒で完成する。" with the character group "秒で" highlighted in bright blue while the rest remains white.

On the right half, show 3 stacked floating dark UI cards with blue neon outlines, each slightly tilted and glowing, like business slide templates preview thumbnails. Count exactly 3 cards. The top card should show an organization chart template with the title "01 組織体制図のテンプレート", a small subtitle line, a CEO box at top, 4 department boxes beneath it, and 8 member boxes total along the bottom row. The middle card should show a data-analysis dashboard template titled "01 データ分析・グラフ図解のテンプレート", with a green percentage "+32.5%", a monthly vertical bar chart with 6 bars labeled from 1月 to 6月, and a donut chart legend with exactly 4 items. The bottom card should show a business process flow template titled "01 ビジネスプロセス図解のテンプレート", with a 5-step horizontal icon flow connected by arrows and small Japanese labels under each step.

Along the bottom, create a row of exactly 4 feature items separated by thin vertical dividers. Each feature item should have a glowing circular icon and two-line Japanese text in white. The 4 features are: "すぐに使える プロンプト50選", "ビジネス特化の 高精度テンプレート", "時短＆高品質 作業効率を最大化", and "商用利用も安心 そのまま使える". Use icon styles resembling lightning, target/crosshair, clock, and shield respectively.

Typography should be bold, geometric sans-serif, with extremely large Japanese headline text, clean alignment, and strong hierarchy. Emphasize blue and green neon glows, glossy reflections, luminous edges, and a sleek conversion-focused landing-page aesthetic. No people, no photography, only graphic design, UI cards, icons, and Japanese marketing text.
title: Neon Japanese AI Prompt Promo Banner
description: A futuristic Japanese landing-page style promotional banner for selling ChatGPT image prompt templates for business diagrams, slides, and infographic creation.

title: Social Media Magazine Cover
description: A prompt for creating a dark, stylish web magazine-style cover that features social media URLs and descriptions.

content: Create a highly detailed single-building architectural model image of a traditional Chinese imperial hall, resembling a Forbidden City palace throne hall, shown from an isometric slightly top-down view. The composition is perfectly centered and symmetrical, with the building occupying more than 70% of the frame. Show only the main building and its immediate stone platform environment on a clean light gray-white studio background, with no cityscape, no surrounding buildings, no people, no vehicles, no text, and no unrelated objects. The hall has a grand double-eaved hip roof with sweeping upturned corners, covered in rich golden-yellow glazed tiles, with ornate ridge decorations and curled roof ornaments at the top corners. Beneath the roof, include vivid blue-green and gold painted dougong bracket details running horizontally under both eaves. The facade is a long frontal elevation with 10 red cylindrical columns across the front, supporting the eaves above 9 red wooden door bays with intricate lattice panels and gold medallion details. The building sits on a tall pale stone platform complex with 3 terrace levels visible in front, all sharply symmetrical. Add a central monumental staircase aligned to the middle axis, with 1 wide carved marble ramp in the center and 2 narrower stair runs flanking it closely, plus additional symmetric side staircases descending from the upper terrace to the lower side platforms. Include white marble balustrades with posts and rails along all terrace edges and staircase sides. The central ramp should feature elaborate low-relief dragon-style stone carving. The stone base plaza should be light gray with subtle tile joints and crisp edges. Lighting is soft, even, and neutral, like a premium museum model render, emphasizing realistic materials and clean geometry. The image should feel like a polished standalone architectural reference render for AI construction animation.
title: Imperial Chinese Hall Model Render
description: This prompt generates a clean isometric reference render of a traditional Chinese palace hall on a multi-tier marble platform, ideal for architectural visualization and build-sequence planning.

content: A vibrant futuristic promotional illustration in a wide 16:9 composition, styled like polished anime-tech advertising art. The background is a glowing purple-to-pink-to-orange gradient with neon circuit traces running across the top right and left edges, plus electric lightning effects behind the character and around the interface elements. At the top center, place large luminous headline text reading {argument name="headline text" default="GPT IMAGE 2"} in a bold rounded sans-serif font with a pink, cyan, and violet neon glow. In the center-left foreground, show a half-body anime-style businesswoman with {argument name="hair color" default="medium brown"} shoulder-length hair with soft bangs and slightly curled ends, wearing thin glasses, a navy business suit, and a white button-up shirt. Her face is obscured by a soft rectangular blur block, but her pose is energetic and confident: she faces right and points with her right index finger toward a large floating software window. On the right half of the image, show a large glowing futuristic image-generation interface outlined in cyan neon, with a main preview panel displaying a highly detailed 4K photoreal mountain lake landscape at sunset: turquoise water, evergreen forest, dramatic rocky peaks with snow, and warm pink-orange sky reflections. Include 3 small vertical thumbnail previews along the left side of this interface, a slim control bar below the main image, and tiny navigation icons in the lower right of the panel. Around the woman on the left side, add 4 floating neon-outlined feature cards: a top-left slide editor window with the visible title “Slide template” and simple bullet lines, a mid-left export box with the visible text “Export” and “Google Slides / PowerPoint / PDF”, a bottom-left black-and-gold badge reading “4K Resolution”, and a small square image icon near the woman’s pointing hand. Add 3 sparkle stars around the large interface for a glossy premium look. At the bottom center, place large glowing gradient text reading {argument name="bottom text" default="Now on Manus Slides"}. Make the entire scene sleek, high-contrast, glossy, and commercial, with crisp line art, soft cel shading, neon rim lighting, and a clean tech-launch poster aesthetic.
title: Neon GPT Image 2 Promo Poster
description: This prompt generates a futuristic anime-style promotional banner for AI image generation in presentation software, ideal for product announcements and social media marketing.

content: Create a clean modern promotional hero image for a Japanese inventory management app landing page on a soft warm off-white background with a subtle pale mint gradient rising from the bottom. Center the composition vertically. At the top, place a rounded white pill logo with the text "Zaiko" in green. Directly below it, add a small rounded badge with a tiny yellow dot and the text "05 Proで拡張". Then add a large bold Japanese headline in dark navy reading "管理をもっと、快適に。" and a smaller gray subheadline reading "無制限登録・分析・広告なしのProプラン". Under that, show exactly 3 small rounded feature chips in one row: a white chip with a green dot and the label "無制限", a white chip with a yellow dot and the label "分析", and a white chip with a red dot and the label "広告なし". In the center, display a large realistic iPhone front view with thin black bezel, rounded corners, subtle reflections, and a soft shadow. On the phone screen, show an app subscription page in Japanese with the top bar time 1:44, back chevron, a left tab label "(tabs)", and the centered title "Proプラン". The page content should feature a pale gold circular icon with a gold star, the title "Zaiko Pro", and the subtitle "もっと便利に、もっと快適に". Below that, include a rounded white comparison card with 3 feature rows and 3 column headers "機能", "Free", "Pro". The 3 rows should be: "アイテム無制限" with "3個まで" under Free and "無制限" in green under Pro; "消費ベース分析" with "-" under Free and "OK" in green under Pro; "広告非表示" with "広告あり" under Free and "広告なし" in green under Pro. Beneath the card, add a section title "プランを選択" and exactly 2 stacked plan options: a selected annual plan outlined in green with a green radio button, the label "年額プラン", a small red badge "お得", and the price line "¥2,000/年 (月あたり約¥167)"; then an unselected monthly plan with a gray radio button, the label "月額プラン", and the price "¥300/月". Under the plans, place a large rounded green call-to-action button reading "Proにアップグレード". Below it, add a centered text link "以前の購入を復元" and several lines of tiny gray subscription disclaimer text. At the very bottom behind the phone, add a large rounded orange pedestal card with a white pill label containing the text "Proなら広告なしでスムーズ" in green. Use a polished startup-app marketing style, soft shadows, airy spacing, rounded UI, crisp Japanese typography, and a premium minimal aesthetic.

Beneath it, add a smaller rounded outlined badge with a blue dot and the text "02 初回ガイド". Below that, set a large bold Japanese headline in dark navy: {argument name="headline text" default="初回ガイドで、すぐ使える。"}, followed by a smaller gray subtitle: "起動したら管理の流れをやさしく案内". Under the subtitle, show exactly 3 small rounded white category chips with soft shadows, evenly spaced: "サンプル" with a green dot, "使い方" with a blue dot, and "すぐ開始" with a dark dot. In the center, show a realistic modern smartphone mockup front view with a black bezel, slightly rounded corners, subtle reflections, and a dramatic soft blue glow under it. The phone screen displays the app UI with a green top bar and the title "Zaiko" in white, iPhone-style status icons at top, and a dimmed app interface behind a centered onboarding modal card. The white modal has rounded corners and a soft drop shadow, with a pale green circular icon area containing a green cube symbol at top. Then a bold welcome title in Japanese, "Zaikoへようこそ！", a smaller subtitle "消耗品管理アプリ", and body text "このアプリは、おうちの消耗品を管理するよ！". Below that, add a small green-highlighted sentence: "『そろそろ買わなきゃ！』を教えてくれるから、買い忘れなし ✨". At the bottom of the modal, include a large rounded green primary button labeled {argument name="button text" default="使い方を見る"} with a small book icon, and below it a muted text link "スキップ". Behind the modal, the app UI should be visible but subdued: a green header, side category strips, and a bottom tab bar with exactly 3 tabs labeled "ホーム", "買い物リスト", and "設定", each with simple white icons. Beneath the phone, place a large rounded blue callout card with soft shadow and a centered white pill label reading {argument name="footer text" default="はじめての設定も迷わない"}. Use a polished Apple-style SaaS marketing aesthetic, soft gradients, subtle shadows, rounded UI elements, crisp typography, and a friendly trustworthy feel.

content: A monochrome black-ink line drawing designed specifically as a 360-degree panorama in equirectangular projection, with strong panoramic warping and curved architectural lines across the entire extra-wide frame. The scene is a narrow outdoor landing or walkway in a dense Japanese urban residential neighborhood, viewed from eye level, with the left and right edges bending upward as if wrapped for VR or polar panorama conversion. In the left foreground, a young woman with a deliberately blurred face crouches on the concrete floor near a metal railing, wearing a loose short-sleeve T-shirt with a dark chest pocket, shorts, and sneakers; her medium-length dark hair hangs forward. Next to her, exactly 1 black cat sits on the ground facing toward the city view. Also in the left foreground are exactly 1 closed umbrella leaning against the wall, exactly 2 plant pots, exactly 1 outdoor air-conditioning unit, exactly 1 mailbox, exactly 1 doorbell/intercom, and exactly 1 vertical apartment sign reading “201 コーポ ハルカ.” The midground opens to a descending staircase and tightly packed houses and apartment buildings with balconies, awnings, windows, utility boxes, and narrow alleyways. The background is filled with an intricate web of power poles, transformers, and overhead electrical wires stretching across the sky in dramatic arcs. Render everything with fine pen-and-ink hatching, sketchbook crosshatching, architectural detail, and a quiet observational manga-travel-sketch aesthetic on a clean white background, no color, no gray wash except the intentional face blur. Emphasize everyday realism, dense city texture, slight fisheye distortion, and the feeling of standing inside a hand-drawn panoramic slice of Tokyo. Use {argument name="aspect ratio" default="2:1"} panoramic composition and preserve the image as a seamless 360 environment illustration suitable for conversion into a polar panorama. Optionally let the crouching subject be {argument name="character description" default="young woman in casual summer clothes"} and the neighborhood be {argument name="location style" default="dense Japanese residential backstreet"}.
title: Ink 360 Panorama of Tokyo Backstreet
description: A hand-drawn black-and-white panoramic city sketch for creating immersive 360-degree Japanese urban scenes with a human figure and cat.

content: A bright, whimsical underwater 2D game scene in a polished children’s animation style, shown as a full-screen level screenshot inside a rounded-rectangle game viewport. The setting is a colorful coral reef with a sandy seabed and a pale stone path winding from the foreground into the distance at center, creating depth. Sunbeams stream down through clear blue water from above, with many small air bubbles floating throughout the scene. Surround the path with soft, toy-like coral formations and sea plants in pastel pink, peach, lavender, turquoise, and mint, plus rocky ledges on both sides. Place 2 starfish in the foreground, one purple on the lower left rock and one pink-orange on the lower right. Add 2 translucent pink jellyfish, one left of center and one right of center, both gently glowing. Scatter 6 glowing pink clam shells along and beside the path, each emitting a soft magical aura. Add 4 golden-orange collectible shells with a pearl-like center, positioned near the middle play area. Include 2 large purple balloon-like jelly obstacles with white outlines and short dangling tentacles, one in the lower center-left and one in the mid-right. Near the left-center foreground, place a cute mermaid puppy character inspired by a preschool cartoon rescue dog: small smiling puppy face, big expressive eyes, light brown and cream fur, pink head accessory, teal mermaid tail, playful cheerful pose as if moving forward. On the right side, add a faint dashed circular target marker over the environment. Overlay simple mobile-game UI in Chinese: at the top left, two white rounded pill buttons, one reading "收贝壳" and one reading "1/5"; at the top right, a white circular pause button with "II". At the bottom center, place 3 white rounded instruction buttons with blue-gray text: "方向键 / WASD", "空格 / 回车：泡泡", and "Esc 回地图". Make the whole image glossy, soft-lit, kid-friendly, high-saturation but pastel-balanced, with a dreamy fantasy reef atmosphere and clean casual game-art composition.

content: A cute children’s 3D game screenshot in a bright underwater world, shown from a slightly elevated third-person view inside a colorful seaweed maze. The scene has a soft, glossy, toy-like look with rounded shapes, smooth clay-style materials, pastel-saturated colors, and cinematic god rays shining down through clear blue water. In the maze, a small mermaid puppy inspired by Coral from Paw Patrol stands near the lower-left quadrant, smiling with a friendly heroic expression. She has a light tan puppy face, big expressive eyes, pink-purple mermaid-themed accessories, and a small mermaid tail, designed in an adorable family-friendly animated style. Near her on the sandy seabed is a visible pair of scissors, the hidden-object target. The maze walls are made of dense green and teal seaweed with rounded pebble borders, creating winding paths across the center of the scene. The seabed is pale golden sand with caustic light patterns, scattered tiny shells and stones, and many floating air bubbles. Around the maze are whimsical coral-rock formations in blue, purple, and turquoise, including 1 shell-shaped treasure alcove on the left with a starfish above it and 1 large open pink clam shell with a pearl on the right. On the right side of the play area are 2 turtles: 1 larger light-green turtle and 1 smaller brown-green turtle, plus 3 separate clumps of upright sea plants in the open sand. Add a translucent white cross-shaped path marker or objective indicator over the center of the maze. Present it as a polished mobile game interface framed by a rounded rectangular screen. Include 6 UI elements total: top left a pill-shaped white label with the Chinese text “找剪刀”, next to it a white rounded counter reading “0/3”, top right a circular white pause button with a pause icon, and along the bottom center 3 white rounded instruction buttons labeled “方向键 / WASD”, “空格 / 回车：剪刀”, and “Esc 回地图”. The overall mood is comforting, playful, magical, and reassuring, like an educational hide-and-seek mini-game for a sick child, with high-end casual game art and a clean app-store-quality presentation.

content: A cute side-view underwater casual game start screen in a soft pastel 3D cartoon style, designed like a polished children's browser game interface. The scene shows a bright ocean floor with sun rays streaming down through clear blue water, floating bubbles, distant tiny fish silhouettes, and a dreamy coral reef environment filled with rounded pink, purple, blue, and mint corals, sea plants, shells, rocks, and sandy ground. Slightly left of center, a small mermaid puppy character inspired by a rescue-dog cartoon floats happily underwater, with a puppy face, big sparkling eyes, floppy ears, a tiny tiara-like head accessory, and a fish tail instead of hind legs, facing forward with a cheerful expression. On the right stands a whimsical candy-like coral lighthouse shaped like a pink-and-cream seashell tower with a glowing lantern room at the top, a pearl on the roof, circular shell windows, a small balcony, a purple door, and decorative coral details around the base. Overlay game UI elements directly on the scene: at top left, 2 rounded white pill buttons, the first reading "去灯塔" and the second showing "0/3"; at top right, 1 circular white pause button with a pause icon. Near the lighthouse, show 4 translucent colored target rings floating over interactive spots: 1 pink ring near the upper middle windows, 1 yellow ring near the upper right lantern area, 1 pale blue ring over a lower right shell window, and 1 large white-outlined ring around a purple jellyfish near the lower center-left. Add 3 collectible pearl-in-shell objects visible in the scene: 1 glowing golden pearl in an open shell near the center, 1 small dark blue pearl shell near the lighthouse base, and 1 red pearl shell resting on the bottom center UI panel. At the bottom center, place 3 rounded white control hint buttons with Chinese text: "方向键 / WASD", "空格 / 回车：放珠", and "Esc 回地图". Include a large semi-transparent rounded white panel behind the bottom controls. The overall image should feel joyful, safe, colorful, and magical, with high polish, gentle depth of field, soft lighting, glossy toy-like materials, and a kid-friendly mobile or web game aesthetic.

The scene is a colorful seabed with warm sun rays streaming down through clear turquoise water, soft floating bubbles throughout, and a sandy ocean floor covered with pastel coral and shells. On the right side, place a cute mermaid puppy character inspired by a preschool adventure cartoon style: a small smiling puppy with cream and light tan fur, big violet eyes, floppy ears decorated with teal accessories, a tiny purple shell necklace, and a mint-green mermaid tail, floating upright in the water. Surround the character with a magical coral reef environment containing exactly 10 prominent foreground and midground sea elements: 1 purple rock arch on the far left, 1 pink starfish attached to the left coral, 1 lavender clam shell near the bottom left, 1 large pink branching coral in the center foreground, 1 pink shell near the bottom right, 1 orange starfish on the sand near center-right, 1 blue porous rock on the right foreground, 1 cluster of blue tube coral at the far right, 1 tall pink-and-purple coral tower behind the character, and 1 orange flower-shaped coral beside the tower. Use a soft pastel palette of aqua, cyan, pink, lavender, peach, and coral orange, with glossy toy-like materials and gentle depth of field. Add three rounded UI buttons aligned horizontally near the bottom left-center: a yellow primary button labeled “开始” with a play icon, a white secondary button labeled “选关” with a circular target icon, and a white secondary button labeled “贴纸” with a star icon. Also add one small circular settings button with a gear icon in the top-right corner. At the top left, place the heading “Thought for 2m 6s” in small white sans-serif text with a subtle chevron. Inside that preview, the website hero area has a black background, elegant serif and sans-serif typography, and the small English heading “ONLINE COURSES” above a large Japanese headline that reads “デザインとキャリアを、次のステージへ”. Beneath it is a smaller Japanese subheading. The main content area of the website contains exactly 6 course cards arranged in a 3-column by 2-row grid. Each card is dark, cinematic, and premium, with a moody photo, category label, Japanese title, short description, a small circular instructor portrait, and a “詳しく見る →” style link. Card 1 shows UI design imagery and the large title “本質的なUIデザインの思考とプロセス”. Card 2 shows a Figma-related screen image and the title “Figmaマスター講座 実践編”. Card 3 shows writing tools on paper and the title “伝わる構造をつくる 情報設計の技術”. Card 4 shows a STUDIO-themed visual and the title “STUDIOでつくる ノーコードWebデザイン”. Card 5 shows a branding or book-like object and the title “ブランドの価値をつくる 設計と表現”. Card 6 shows a portfolio booklet spread and the title “魅せ方で差がつく ポートフォリオ講座”. Add subtle gold-gray highlights, thin borders, soft reflections, and a refined high-end Japanese design aesthetic. At the lower left inside the preview image, include the white Japanese label “編集”. At the lower right inside the preview image, add a small white share/export icon. On the far right side of the app interface, place exactly 4 vertically stacked rounded-square thumbnails representing alternate generated images; the top 3 thumbnails are pale light-theme page designs, and the 4th thumbnail matches the dark course-grid design. Highlight the 4th thumbnail with a glowing blue selection outline. At the bottom left of the overall screenshot, add exactly 2 small white interface icons: a copy icon and a horizontal three-dots menu. content: Create a bold Chinese promotional poster in a Mondrian-inspired, Fauvist, slightly cubist graphic style with thick black grid lines, flat primary-color blocks, and a clean white background. Vertical smartphone poster, highly structured layout, retail advertisement aesthetic, high contrast, crisp vector-like edges, playful but aggressive sales design. The headline area at the top center is a large white panel with big black Chinese text reading "大会员 2026 首次招募", and a circular yellow badge at the top right containing a simple black cartoon bear face icon. At the top left, include 3 abstract rectangular blocks stacked in a Mondrian composition: one red square, one white rectangle, and one blue vertical rectangle. On the left side create a tall countdown column with a red header labeled "倒计时", a huge rough-edged red number "1" in the center, a red "天" near the bottom, and a black footer strip with yellow text "过期恢复原价". In the main pricing panel to the right, show small black text "原价 ¥2999/年" with a strikethrough over 2999, then larger black text "到手价", then an oversized red price "¥1299" with "/年" in black, and a smaller black formula line below: "= 领券立减 200 + 拼团立省 1500 + 赠礼价值 730". Beneath that, place a full-width blue section bar labeled "省钱攻略". Under it, build a 3-column savings guide with exactly 3 numbered panels: panel 1 has a blue corner label "1", the text "领券立减 200", a blue button-like strip "扫码领券", a smaller line "先领券，再拼团", and a black-and-white QR code; panel 2 has a yellow corner label "2", the text "拼团再减 1500", and one small book or magazine cover thumbnail at the bottom; panel 3 has a red corner label "3", the text "成团即得 ¥730 专属赠礼", with smaller lines "AI 内参 1 年（¥365）" and "实物大礼包（¥365）", plus exactly 2 small gift thumbnails at the bottom. Add a white strip below the 3 columns with bold black text: "平均每天 3.55，撬动全家 AI 学习力！". In the lower middle section, place 2 host/profile blocks in the left column: the first shows a square avatar, the name "howie" in blue, and smaller black text "领航" plus "武装 AI 新技能" and "向 AI 系统要价值"; the second shows a square avatar, the name "savage" in orange-red, and smaller black text "带你" plus "培养内驱力" and "共建学习型家庭". To the right of these profile blocks, create a benefits list with exactly 4 horizontal rows, each with a colored icon on the left and black Chinese text on white: row 1 uses a blue TV or screen icon and text about full-year live companion sessions, replay access, transcripts, notes, and 24×7 AI knowledge support; row 2 uses a yellow book icon and text about 10 years of deep experience, learning OS, becoming OS, reading OS, variable OS, educating children OS, all in AI knowledge base, and long-term Q&A guidance; row 3 uses a blue people icon and text about member community, practical exchange, group community, and 1v1 consultation; row 4 uses a red people icon and text about a free family account so a teammate can study together. Near the bottom, add a yellow panel on the left with a waving full-body black cartoon bear mascot. Large fresh green maple leaves hang from the upper left, and cascading clusters of pale purple wisteria frame the left and right edges. Near the top right, place elegant hand-lettered script reading {argument name="headline text" default="May"} with small lily-of-the-valley doodles integrated into the lettering, a tiny swallow silhouette above, and the smaller text “5月” beneath it. Below that, add a clean mini calendar for May with the weekday row “S M T W T F S” and dates 1 through 31 arranged in a simple grid, using soft brown-gray text. Scatter tiny decorative hearts, dots, sparkles, and simple floral doodles around the calendar area. In the lower half, show a chibi child character standing on the path in a penguin kigurumi onesie with a dark charcoal body, white belly, yellow beak hood, and little yellow feet. The character has a short {argument name="hair color" default="ash brown"} bob peeking out from the hood, two silver hairpins on one side, and a large metal zipper ring pull at the neck. The character holds a bouquet of white lily-of-the-valley flowers in one hand and extends the other arm outward as if enjoying the breeze. Add pink flower petals drifting nearby, a red ladybug resting on a green leaf above the character, several floating maple seeds with dotted spiral motion trails, delicate white swirl lines suggesting wind around the character, and a few extra lily-of-the-valley sprigs around the composition. content: Create a warm, playful Japanese landing page for a children's clay toy brand, designed entirely in a handmade soft clay diorama style. The whole interface should look sculpted from pastel modeling clay with rounded edges, slight finger-pressed imperfections, matte texture, soft shadows, and a cozy cream background. At the top, show a pill-shaped navigation bar with a small clay house logo and the brand name "ねんどあそび", followed by 5 navigation items: "商品一覧", "セット内容", "遊び方", "お客様の声", "よくある質問", plus a round cart icon on the far right. In the hero section, place a large dark-brown clay headline on the left reading "こねて、つくって、あそぼう。" and a smaller supporting sentence beneath it reading "手ざわりが楽しい、やさしい粘土のおもちゃセット。" Add 2 rounded clay call-to-action buttons below: "商品を見る" and "ギフトにする" with a small gift icon. On the right side of the hero area, arrange 12 clay toy illustrations: a rainbow with clouds, a lion, an elephant, a block tower with red roof, a green circular badge reading "対象年齢 3+", a beige oval badge reading "安全素材", a white rabbit holding a carrot, a tree, a yellow ball, a blue toy car, a pink donut, and a strawberry, plus a small red star near the lower right. Below, create a 3-card benefits row, each card made from off-white clay with icon, title, and short Japanese description. Card 1 title: "やわらか素材" with a hand holding clay icon. Card 2 title: "くり返し遊べる" with a circular arrow icon. Card 3 title: "想像力を育てる" with a lightbulb icon. Under that, add a centered section title "人気のセットラインナップ" with 4 small colored dots around it. Then show 3 product cards. Card 1 has a blue badge "人気No.1", shows 4 animal figures: lion, elephant, rabbit, giraffe, and includes the title "どうぶつセット" and price "¥2,980" with a teal button "詳しく見る". Card 2 has an orange badge "おすすめ", shows 7 snack items: donut, cake slice, strawberry shortcake, pink ice cream cone, cookie, candy pieces, and small leaves, and includes the title "おやつセット" and price "¥2,680" with an orange button "詳しく見る". Card 3 has a blue badge "NEW", shows 4 vehicle toys: red car, airplane, police car, excavator, and includes the title "のりものセット" and price "¥3,200" with a navy button "詳しく見る". Add a horizontal reassurance strip with 3 items: a heart icon with text about parent-child fun, a gift icon with text about gift popularity, and a shield icon with text about safety and安心・安全. At the bottom, create a large coral clay banner with the headline "お気に入りのセットを見つけよう" and a cream button reading "今すぐチェック". Finally add a slim footer bar with 4 compact items and icons: "5,000円以上で送料無料", "最短当日発送", "30日間返品保証", and "サポート対応". Use a balanced, grid-based web layout, front-facing view, soft natural lighting, subtle shadows, highly polished product-design mockup quality, charming handcrafted claymation aesthetic, and a premium yet child-friendly feel.
title: Clay Toy Landing Page UI
description: A handcrafted clay-style Japanese e-commerce landing page mockup for a children's toy brand, ideal for concept design, playful UI exploration, and ad-style product presentation.
