content: Create a polished App Store promotional screenshot in a warm beige and golden-orange brand palette, portrait orientation, with a premium friendly startup aesthetic. The layout is a single vertically composed marketing graphic with a soft cream background and an orange gradient floor at the bottom. On the left upper side, place a very large elegant black serif headline split across 3 lines reading {argument name="headline text" default="Powered by leading AI models"}. To the right of the headline, add a small white jagged starburst badge with a subtle drop shadow containing 2 lines of serif text: {argument name="badge text" default="Best models"}. Beneath the headline on the left, show a vertical list of exactly 4 AI providers with icon plus name, evenly spaced: Claude with an orange sunburst icon, Gemini with a multicolor four-point sparkle icon, OpenAI with a black knot logo, and Seedance with a purple-blue gradient S icon. Below that, add a left-aligned serif body copy block with 2 parts: first a black text list on 4 lines reading "Claude, Gemini, OpenAI, Seedance.", then a final brand-colored orange line reading {argument name="tagline text" default="Empowered by Merl."}. On the right half, place a large realistic modern smartphone angled slightly left, with a reflective silver frame, black screen border, dynamic-island style top cutout, visible side button, and soft shadow. The phone screen should show a clean cream-colored app UI for an AI model-routing app. At the very top of the phone display, include the status time 9:41 and standard signal, wifi, and battery icons. Inside the app, show a tiny greeting line "HEY BESTIE.", then a bold serif question title {argument name="screen title" default="What are we casting?"}, followed by a short sans-serif subtitle about routing the request to the best AI model for the job. Add a small rounded badge in the upper right of the app content reading "+ 8 credits". Below that, include a section label "The model stack" and a stack of exactly 4 rounded cards, each in a lightly tinted pastel background. Card 1: Claude, with orange sunburst icon, description "writing, reasoning, voice-matched outputs", and a small pill label "BEST FOR WRITING". Card 2: Gemini, with multicolor sparkle icon, description "image generation, research, visual tasks", and pill label "BEST FOR IMAGES". Card 3: OpenAI, with black knot icon, description "headshots, image generation, smart creation", and pill label "BEST FOR CREATION". Card 4: Seedance, with purple-blue gradient S icon, description "video generation, motion, AI UGC clips", and pill label "BEST FOR VIDEO". Under the cards, place a large rounded yellow-orange CTA button reading "Start Casting ✦", with a small line below saying "8 credits per session". At the bottom of the phone UI, create a black tab bar with exactly 4 navigation items: home icon, a selected center pill with a small mascot face and the label {argument name="app name" default="Merl"}, a clock/history icon, and a profile icon. In front of the lower left of the phone, place a cute 3D mascot character: a rounded cream-colored blob with tiny feet, dark brown dot eyes, rosy cheeks, and a smiling mouth, wearing a golden wizard hat and matching cape tied with a round clasp. The mascot should overlap the phone slightly and sit on the orange floor, casting a soft shadow. Overall style: luxury-friendly tech branding, crisp typography, subtle realism, soft shadows, clean app mockup, App Store screenshot quality, consistent visual branding, highly legible, high resolution.

content: Create a polished App Store promotional poster for an AI headshot app called {argument name="app name" default="Shine"}, in a warm minimalist brand style. Use a vertical smartphone screenshot ad layout on a soft beige background with a curved golden-yellow shape rising from the bottom edge. Place a large elegant black serif headline in the upper left, split across 3 lines, reading {argument name="headline text" default="Create pro headshots with Shine"}. Add a white jagged starburst badge to the left-center with black serif text reading {argument name="badge text" default="Before + After"}. On the right side, show a large angled modern smartphone mockup, slightly tilted left, with thin metallic edges and a realistic screen. The phone display should show the app interface for AI-generated professional headshots. At the top of the screen, include a small wordmark reading SHINE, a large serif subheadline saying "Your best self, professionally.", supporting body text saying "Upload a few photos and we’ll create studio-quality headshots.", a small rounded pill in the upper right that says "⚡ 8 credits", and an iPhone-style status bar showing 9:41. In the middle of the phone screen, show a before-and-after comparison card with 2 portrait panels side by side, each labeled exactly once: 1 left label "Before" and 1 right label "After". The left portrait is a casual man in a dark T-shirt against a plain indoor background; the right portrait is the same man transformed into a professional headshot wearing a dark blazer over a light shirt with a warm studio bokeh background. Put a circular swap arrow button centered between the 2 panels. Below that, include a "HOW IT WORKS" section with exactly 3 steps arranged vertically: 1) "1. Upload" with the text "Add 8–12 clear photos of yourself.", 2) "2. We create" with the text "Our AI generates a variety of pro headshots.", 3) "3. Download" with the text "Choose your favorites and download high-res images." Give each step a rounded square pastel icon tile in peach or pink tones. Near the bottom of the phone screen, add a large rounded yellow CTA button reading {argument name="button text" default="Start Shine ✦"}, and beneath it small text saying "8 credits per session". In the lower left foreground, place a cute stylized white mascot character with a rounded body, tiny arms, blush cheeks, dot eyes, and a smiling mouth, wearing a golden-yellow cowboy hat and matching neckerchief; the oversized hat should extend toward the center and overlap the base area in front of the phone. Use soft 3D illustration for the mascot, premium UI design for the phone screen, consistent beige-and-gold branding, subtle shadows, clean spacing, and a refined startup-marketing aesthetic.

content: Using REFERENCE_0, turn the uploaded portrait into a clean, premium Japanese aesthetic analysis dashboard titled {argument name="headline text" default="顔立ち美容レポート"}. Keep the same photo as the source image, including the face blur/censor, and place it in a rounded card at the top right. Reformat the output as a white editorial report page with thin gray borders, black typography, and a luxury beauty-consultation layout. Add these 8 report sections: 1) top header with small English text "FACIAL BEAUTY REPORT ✦", the large Japanese title, and the subtitle "あなたらしさを活かし、より魅力的になるための分析レポート"; 2) an OVERVIEW box listing exactly 5 rows: 年齢（推定） 20–24歳, 性別 女性, 顔の形 やや卵型, パーソナル印象 清潔感・親しみやすい・柔らかい, 分析日 2024.05.24; 3) a total score box labeled 総合魅力度スコア with a circular gauge showing {argument name="total score" default="82"}/100 and a small score guide reading 50=平均的 / 70=良い / 85=非常に良い / 90+=優秀; 4) a metrics box with exactly 7 bullet scores: 左右対称性 84/100, 顔の比率（プロポーション） 83/100, 骨格・輪郭 80/100, 肌質 85/100, 目の魅力 85/100, 鼻のバランス 78/100, 口元の魅力 81/100, 全体の調和 83/100; 5) a FACIAL CONTOUR（シンプルライン図） panel showing a simplified line-art face diagram with the blurred face area masked and measurement guides labeled exactly 1/3, 1/3, 1/3 vertically and 1/5 repeated 5 times along the bottom; 6) a 詳細分析 section with exactly 8 rows matching the metrics above and short explanatory Japanese comments; 7) a strengths box titled 強み（あなたの魅力ポイント） with exactly 3 icon-led items: クリアで印象的な目元, なめらかな肌質, バランスの取れた輪郭; 8) an improvements box titled 改善できる点（より魅力を高めるために） with exactly 3 icon-led items: 目の下のクマ, 鼻の立体感, 唇の血色感; 9) a final recommendation row titled 身だしなみ・スタイル改善提案 with exactly 4 columns labeled ヘアスタイル, メイク, スキンケア, ライフスタイル, each with a simple black line icon and short Japanese advice. Add a small footer line on the bottom right reading {argument name="footer text" default="BEAUTY IS BALANCE."}. Overall style: minimalist clinic report, balanced grid layout, soft shadows, rounded panels, black and gray only, highly legible Japanese magazine design.

content: A premium dark presentation slide in a minimalist editorial tech style, widescreen 16:9 layout, matte black background with refined off-white typography and subtle gray divider lines. The overall mood is sleek, cinematic, and high-end, like a product keynote or design-forward AI startup deck. In the top left, place 2 small navigation lines of text: "UI SCENE · OPEN HARNESS" and below it "DEEP AGENTS" in thin uppercase sans serif with generous tracking. In the top right, add a small page indicator reading "07 / 08". The main headline dominates the upper left in large elegant serif Chinese and English mixed typography: {argument name="headline text" default="开放 harness,开放记忆。"}. Below it, add a 2-line Chinese body paragraph in smaller serif text: {argument name="body text" default="解决方案不是让模型供应商替你保管状态,而是把 harness、标准和记忆后端都放回开发者手里。"}. In the left-middle area, create 3 horizontal feature rows separated by thin gray lines, each row using a bold Chinese label on the left, a short Chinese description in the center, and a tiny uppercase English keyword aligned right. Row 1 label: "标准", description: "agents.md / skills 让上下文入口可见。", keyword: "OPEN". Row 2 label: "模型", description: "模型可替换,记忆不应被单一平台绑定。", keyword: "AGNOSTIC". Row 3 label: "存储", description: "Mongo / Postgres / Redis 可作为自有记忆后端。", keyword: "OWNED". On the right side, place a large embedded UI mockup inside a soft light-gray rounded rectangular frame with a subtle shadow, resembling a product dashboard screenshot. The mockup should be monochrome light beige and gray, highly structured, and divided into 3 main columns. Left column: a narrow vertical icon sidebar plus a project/file panel listing items such as "agents.md", "skills", "workflows", "memories", "tools", and a code editor block at the bottom. Center column: a section titled "模型无关" with 4 selectable model rows and small controls, plus 3 feature cards along the bottom. Right column: a section titled "记忆后端" with 3 database cards for MongoDB, Postgres, and Redis, and a lower panel titled "可迁移" showing a code snippet. Include another top card in the mockup titled "开放标准" with tab-like controls. At the bottom left outside the mockup, add a tiny caption line in Chinese and English reading "UI 情景图 · 三张同高画面板测试". At the bottom center, include a carousel indicator made of 8 small dots with the 7th highlighted as a short white pill and the others as dim gray circles. At the bottom right, place a small page number "07". Also add a faint tiny footer note near the lower right edge in Chinese and English, very subtle, such as a presentation metadata line. Use precise grid alignment, lots of negative space, understated luxury, Swiss-style composition, and a polished AI-product keynote aesthetic.

content: Generate an {argument name="file format" default="editable PSD layered file for Photoshop"} based on the reference image. Please decompose the image into several independent elements without changing their original positions and generate corresponding layers in Photoshop: 1. Main Subject: Use an image generation tool to create a PNG without a background, then copy it to the corresponding Photoshop layer. 2. Special Effects: Such as lighting, decorations, or atmospheric elements; also generate background-less PNGs and copy them to layers. 3. Text: Prioritize using Photoshop's native text tools to adjust font, size, color, and style; if the font cannot be replicated, generate background-less PNG text images and place them correctly. 4. All elements should maintain consistent position, size, and hierarchy with the reference image. 5. Finally, output a PSD file that can be opened and edited in Photoshop.
title: Editable PSD Layer Generation
description: A technical prompt designed to force GPT Image 2 to output a layered PSD structure by decomposing images into independent elements like subjects and text.

content: A 360-degree equirectangular anime-style VR bedroom scene viewed from a first-person perspective on a bed, with a young adult woman leaning very close toward the viewer in the center of the frame. She has {argument name="hair color" default="medium brown"} hair in a smooth bob with side-swept bangs, small earrings, and wears a fitted {argument name="shirt color" default="slate blue"} button-up blouse with the top buttons open and matching dark blue pants. Her pose is intimate and immersive: kneeling and straddling over the viewer on a rumpled white bed, one arm extended forward toward the camera and the other bracing on the mattress, as if reaching out inside a VR experience. The room is a warm, softly lit modern bedroom with beige walls and recessed ceiling lights, a dark wooden door on the left, a TV on a low dresser, a second dresser with framed photos, a centered window with sheer white curtains and darker gray drapes, two bedside tables with glowing lamps, one tall potted plant near the window, and one dark wooden bookshelf on the right. Include exactly 2 framed wall pictures, 2 bedside lamps, 2 potted plants, 2 dressers, 1 TV, 1 bookshelf, 1 door, and 1 window. Use a panoramic ultra-wide 360 VR distortion with curved walls and stretched bed edges, polished anime rendering, soft warm evening lighting, detailed bedding folds, clean interior design, and a realistic virtual-tour atmosphere.
title: Anime VR Bedroom Encounter
description: This prompt generates an immersive 360-degree anime bedroom scene with a woman leaning close to the viewer, suitable for VR-themed illustrations or panoramic virtual-experience visuals.

content: Create a dense futuristic Japanese sci-fi emergency HUD screen, a full-screen suit telemetry dashboard for {argument name="unit name" default="SOLJENNE"}. Black background with glowing red and orange interface graphics, thin cyan-blue grid accents, distressed industrial UI styling, and a high-contrast cyberpunk control-room aesthetic. The display is a single unified monitoring panel divided into 12 clearly separated sections with Japanese titles and smaller English subtitles. Top header bar: left title block reading "ソルジャンヌ・スーツ 外部モニタリングシステム" with English subtitle "SOLJENNE SUIT EXTERNAL MONITORING SYSTEM" and a small red "LIVE" tag; center red warning banner reading "WARNING", "危険レベル: 最大", and "DANGER LEVEL : MAXIMUM"; right identity block with 4 elements, the text "UNIT ID : SOLJENNE", "STATUS : CRITICAL", "MODE : RESCUE / EMERGENCY", and a red triangular logo above the word "SOLBRAIN" with subtitle "RESCUE & MEDICAL SUPPORT". Middle-left section titled "全身ステータス / OVERALL STATUS" showing system condition "危険 / CRITICAL", system integrity "18%", a waveform graph, and 5 vital readouts: heart rate 136 bpm, body temp 39.8°C, SpO2 72%, blood pressure 90 / 60 mmHg, plus one additional label line for heart beat status. Center large section titled "メインカメラ映像 / MAIN CAMERA FEED" containing the main image: a wounded astronaut in a glossy red-and-silver rescue suit slumped backward in a dark biomechanical environment, thick black cables or tendrils plugged around the body, sparks and debris in the background, helmet visor reflecting light, chest plate with a circular blue device, cinematic lighting, a small red "REC" indicator, and a timestamp "14:32:18:07". Directly under the camera feed, an emergency message strip with 3 blocks: left warning icon and text "緊急事態発生 / EMERGENCY CONDITION", center explanatory Japanese sentence about external attack causing systems to exceed operational limits, and right red text block including "推奨対応 / RECOMMENDED ACTION" and "緊急救助要請 / IMMEDIATE RESCUE REQUEST". Upper-middle-right section titled "スーツシステム詳細 / SUIT SYSTEM ANALYSIS" with a red outlined human figure and 7 subsystem rows: chest computer ERROR, vital monitor ERROR, medical scanner ERROR, back unit link ERROR, face guard DAMAGED, data link UNSTABLE, and one more upper body subsystem error row. Upper-right section titled "ダメージ・ステータス / DAMAGE STATUS" with a human silhouette damage diagram and 8 labeled damage lines: helmet 65%, chest armor 45%, arm protector L 32%, arm protector R 28%, back unit 18%, leg protector L 22%, leg protector R 20%, boots unit 15%. Right-middle section titled "エネルギー管理 / ENERGY MANAGEMENT" with a circular meter showing "12%" and "MAIN SYSTEM", a countdown timer "00:02:47", and a small power consumption bar chart. Middle-lower-right section titled "バイタルモニター / VITAL MONITOR" containing 4 stacked waveform panels labeled heart rate 136 bpm, respiration 26 rpm, SpO2 72%, and body temp 39.8°C. Lower-left-middle section titled "エネルギー残量 / ENERGY LEVEL" with 3 readouts: main battery 12%, backup battery 09%, estimated operation time 00:02:47, each using red segmented bars and bold numerals. Bottom-left section titled "外部環境 / EXTERNAL ENVIRONMENT" with 5 environmental readings: temp 42.1°C, humidity 89%, pressure 998 hPa, wind speed 3.8 m/s, toxic gas 7.2 ppm. Bottom-left warning strip beneath it with hazard icons and Japanese text "外部環境も危険レベルです". Bottom-center section titled "スーツ熱分布 / THERMAL MAP" showing a front-view human thermal body scan in hot reds, oranges, and yellows, with a vertical color scale. Bottom-center-right section titled "システムログ / SYSTEM LOG" with 7 timestamped entries in Japanese and English, including external attack detected, chest computer overload, abnormal vital detected, back unit link lost, energy below 20%, face guard damaged, all systems critical, and emergency rescue request sent. Bottom-right section titled "緊急警告 / EMERGENCY ALERT" with gigantic red text "!!! SOS !!!", Japanese text indicating a rescue signal is being transmitted, and a circular radar-like beacon graphic. Use ultra-detailed UI typography, compact technical panel layout, glowing lines, scanlines, subtle screen noise, red warning highlights, and a grim life-support-crisis mood.
title: Critical Rescue Suit Monitoring HUD
description: A dense red-and-black sci-fi monitoring interface showing a critically damaged rescue suit and emergency telemetry, ideal for cyberpunk dashboard art and fictional system screens.

content: A hyper-detailed cinematic isometric miniature city model of {argument name="landmark tower" default="Burj Khalifa"} rising dramatically from the center of a square architectural master-plan board, presented like a luxury urban planning maquette on a black background. The composition shows one dominant ultra-tall silver skyscraper in the exact center, surrounded by a dense ring of modern high-rise towers, illuminated roads, bridges, and glowing warm city lights. Curving turquoise-blue water features and artificial lakes wrap around the central district in multiple connected pools and canals, with one large circular fountain-like feature near the tower base and several small island shapes visible in the water. In the lower right quadrant, include a large low-rise complex with rounded geometric roofs and subtle green-lit sections, connected by multilane roads and looping interchanges. The entire city sits on one square beige map board engraved with faint street grids and planning lines, with the board edges clearly visible and slightly raised. Viewpoint is a high three-quarter isometric angle, centered and symmetrical, with the tower extending far upward into negative space. Lighting is dramatic and luxurious: warm golden edge lights on buildings and roads, cool reflections in the water, crisp metallic highlights on the central tower, and a deep black void surrounding the model. Style should feel like a photorealistic architectural visualization mixed with a premium collectible scale model, extremely intricate, sharp, polished, and elegant.
title: Luxury Miniature Dubai City Model
description: This prompt generates a photorealistic isometric architectural maquette of a landmark-centered modern city, ideal for concept art, real estate visualization, or premium urban design imagery.

content: A dark, cinematic survival-horror game inventory screen in Japanese, styled like a realistic modern console UI over a moody nighttime city background. The scene shows a rain-soaked urban intersection with 1 leaning high-rise building in the center background, 1 full moon in a cloudy sky, 1 glowing red traffic light, 1 red neon sign, 1 parked car, 1 vending machine on the far right, and 4 distant human silhouettes including 1 person holding an umbrella. The entire image has a gritty, low-key, bluish-black palette with subtle scanlines, soft bloom, wet reflections, and a tense occult atmosphere. The interface has a top navigation bar with 4 Japanese tabs labeled "所持品", "記録", "資料", "設定", plus 2 shoulder button hints labeled "L1" and "R1". On the left is an inventory grid under the label "重要アイテム" containing 6 visible slots arranged as 3 columns by 2 rows; the top row contains exactly 3 items, each with a small quantity number "1": an old key labeled "古びた鍵", a dented flashlight labeled "歪んだ懐中電灯", and an hourglass labeled "無音の砂時計". The selected slot is the old key, highlighted with a thin neon-magenta border. The bottom row shows 3 empty dark placeholder slots with faint X marks. Beneath the grid is 1 green ECG-like status indicator labeled "正常". In the lower left is an objectives panel labeled "目標" with 1 objective line: "駅前の異変の原因を調査する". In the center-bottom foreground, partially under the UI, place 1 spiral notebook opened to a page with the handwritten Japanese title "鍵の儀式" and 3 short ritual note lines, plus a hand-drawn occult circle symbol. Next to it place 1 beverage can labeled "ゼリ" and 1 small price tag card reading "おすすめ品 ¥298". On the right side, create a large item detail panel for the selected object, with the item name in magenta "古びた鍵" and a category line "分類：重要アイテム". Show a large detailed render of the rusty antique key, iron-like, worn, reddish-brown corrosion, ornate round bow with clover-like openings, and a jagged bit. Below it include 3 short Japanese description lines about it being a ritual-shaped key of unknown purpose, and at the bottom add a quoted note in magenta: "扉は開くべきものではない。閉じるべきものでもない。" followed by "― 書き殴られたメモより". In the lower right corner add 2 control prompts: "✕ 調べる" and "◯ 戻る". Make the composition feel like a polished AAA horror game screenshot, realistic UI, eerie lore-heavy item design, high contrast, subtle neon magenta accents, and a mysterious meaningless-but-plausible occult game logic.
title: Japanese Horror Game Inventory Screen
description: This prompt generates a realistic Japanese survival-horror inventory UI screenshot, useful for fake game screens, atmospheric concept art, or occult-themed interface mockups.

content: A vertical smartphone-style weather poster for {argument name="city name" default="成都"}, designed as a dreamy ultra-detailed miniature diorama cityscape under a bright blue sky. At the top center, place large bold white Chinese characters for the city name with soft 3D depth and a gentle drop shadow. Directly below it, center a fluffy white cloud icon made of rounded sculpted forms. Under the icon, add one line of smaller white text showing {argument name="date text" default="2026-04-22 星期三"}, then a larger bold white temperature line reading {argument name="temperature text" default="28° / 18°"}, then one more centered weather-condition line in white reading {argument name="condition text" default="多云"}. Keep all text vertically stacked, evenly spaced, and cleanly centered in the upper half of the image. In the lower half, create an enchanting hybrid city of traditional Chinese water-town architecture and a modern skyline: calm turquoise canals winding around tiny islands, 2 small arched stone bridges in the foreground, 1 pavilion on the left island, 1 tall multi-tier pagoda near the right-center, clusters of grey-tiled traditional houses and shopfronts, outdoor tea tables with umbrellas, lush willows, shrubs, flowers, and a few tiny boats on the water. In the distant background, show a contemporary skyline with many glass skyscrapers and 1 prominent needle-like observation tower. Scatter exactly 5 soft cumulus clouds across the sky including the central weather icon area, and add a few tiny birds for life. Use warm morning sunlight, cinematic atmospheric perspective, shallow depth of field, tilt-shift miniature photography aesthetics, highly realistic materials, delicate reflections in the water, and a polished whimsical travel-poster mood. Preserve a clean composition with generous sky above and the miniature city concentrated at the bottom, like a premium weather app hero image.
title: Miniature City Weather Poster
description: This prompt generates a polished vertical weather poster combining centered forecast typography with a whimsical miniature Chinese cityscape, ideal for travel-themed app visuals and social media weather art.

content:
Create a polished Japanese landing page hero image for a fictional premium consumer tech product brand called {argument name="brand name" default="DOKUMI"}. The page should look like a modern beauty-tech and food-safety product website, in a soft warm beige and ivory palette with elegant editorial styling, lots of whitespace, and subtle luxury cosmetics branding. Use a wide desktop web layout screenshot with a top navigation bar, a large left-aligned headline block, and a right-side lifestyle product photo composition.

The top header contains 8 visible navigation elements in a single row: the brand logo text "DOKUMI" at far left, then "ABOUT", "PRODUCT", "FEATURE", "INGREDIENT", "VOICE", "Q&A", then a small user account icon, and a rounded red call-to-action button labeled "今すぐ購入する" at the far right. Beneath the button area on the upper right, add a vertical red ribbon badge with white Japanese text reading exactly 4 stacked text groups: "発売記念", "限定", "20%", "OFF", plus small "CAMPAIGN" text below.

The hero section is split into two main columns. On the left, place a very large Japanese headline in elegant Mincho-style serif typography over three lines: "一口目は、", then "AIが先に。" with dramatic scale and generous spacing. Below it, add a smaller two-line Japanese subheading describing AI-based detection of food toxins, foreign substances, and allergens before eating, in a refined gray tone. Under that, place 2 horizontal CTA buttons: a filled red rounded button labeled "今すぐ始める" with a right arrow, and a white outlined rounded button labeled "詳しく見る" with a right arrow.

Below the buttons, add a row of 3 rounded white feature cards with thin borders and simple black line icons. The 3 cards are: 1) shield icon with title "AI画像解析" and a smaller subtitle about detecting toxins with high precision, 2) clock icon with title "3秒判定" and a smaller subtitle about instant results just by holding it up, 3) smartphone icon with title "スマホ連携" and a smaller subtitle about automatic history saving in the app.

At the bottom of the hero, add a row of 3 statistic cards with rounded corners and thin borders. The 3 cards read: 1) "累計販売台数※1" with large number "23,500" and smaller "台突破", 2) "満足度※2" with large number "94.3%", 3) "リピート率※2" with large number "81.2%". To the right of these cards, place 2 small footnote lines in Japanese: "※1 2026年4月時点 自社調べ" and "※2 2026年3月調査 N=180".

On the right side, create a soft, glamorous lifestyle photo scene. Show a stylish young woman with shoulder-length softly curled brown hair, fair skin, and a large red polka-dot bow headband. She wears an off-shoulder white ruffled blouse and rests her face lightly on one hand at a glossy tabletop. Her face is obscured by a centered rectangular skin-tone privacy block. In front of her on the table sits a sleek white handheld scanner device with a rounded vertical body and a small dark lens opening near the top rim accented in red. Next to the device is a realistic glossy red apple. Near the device, overlay a dark blue circular callout badge with white Japanese text reading "毒性チェック" and "わずか3秒", with a small plus sign beneath.

Use soft natural window light from the left, faint diagonal light streaks on the background wall, gentle shadows, realistic product rendering, and a premium e-commerce LP aesthetic. The composition should feel clean, aspirational, and slightly playful, like a startup landing page for an unusual AI gadget. Include all visible Japanese text exactly where specified.
title: Japanese AI Product Landing Page Hero
description: A premium Japanese e-commerce hero image for a fictional AI food-safety scanner, suitable for startup landing pages and concept product marketing.

content: Create a cute Japanese mobile game advertisement poster split vertically into 2 equal halves, with a soft pastel watercolor background and glossy translucent bubbles scattered around the canvas. The left half has a mint green to pale yellow wash, and the right half has a cream to blush pink wash. At the top left, place a large rounded Japanese headline in bold teal green: {argument name="left headline text" default="見つけて、ひらめいて、にゃ。"}, with a smaller subtitle beneath it in muted brown-gray: {argument name="left subtitle text" default="やさしいヒントで誰でも遊べる"}. At the top right, place a large rounded Japanese headline in bold raspberry pink: {argument name="right headline text" default="ミニゲームも、たっぷり。"}, with a smaller subtitle beneath it in muted mauve-gray: {argument name="right subtitle text" default="記憶・パズル・スライドで遊びほうだい"}. Centered in each half is a black-bezel smartphone mockup shown straight-on. The left phone displays a hidden-object style game screen inside a bright greenhouse sunroom with lush tropical plants, a cream hammock stretched diagonally across the middle, pink tiled floor, warm sunlight through glass panels, hanging pastel glass orbs, lemons in the lower left foreground, and tiny cute character accents hidden in the scene; a Japanese room title appears at the top inside the phone UI: {argument name="left game screen title" default="おひるねサンルーム"}. The right phone displays a memory minigame screen on a pale pink interface with a back arrow, a centered Japanese title at the top reading "マカロン記憶ゲーム", a 3-step indicator showing 1 highlighted and 2 and 3 faded, small instruction text "よく見てにゃ…", and exactly 4 macarons arranged in a 2 by 2 grid: pink top left, blue top right, yellow bottom left, white bottom right, each on a soft circular shadow. Add small sparkling star icons and two decorative macarons at the bottom right outside the phone, plus tiny heart doodles nearby. The overall style is polished app-promo key art, kawaii, airy, elegant, soft-focus, with rounded typography, gentle gradients, subtle floral details, and a premium casual game advertisement look.

content: A polished Japanese mobile game promotional graphic in a soft pastel kawaii style, formatted as a square split-screen advertisement with 2 vertical panels side by side. The left half has a pale blush pink watercolor background, and the right half has a warm cream-to-pink gradient background. At the top of the left panel, place a large bold rounded Japanese headline in dark rose pink reading {argument name="left headline text" default="ミルクと、ふわふわ脱出。"}, with a smaller gray subtitle below reading {argument name="left subtitle text" default="やさしい謎解きの世界へ"}. Centered below is a black-framed modern smartphone mockup showing the title screen of a cute pastel escape game: a fluffy cream-colored kitten with big watery eyes on a sparkly pink background, decorative bubbles and hearts, a logo in Japanese reading もふもふミルク にゃんこ with a smaller ribbon-like subtitle 脱出ゲーム, and a large rounded start button near the bottom reading はじめる. Around the phone on the pink background, scatter translucent soap bubbles, tiny bows, hearts, and star-shaped sparkles near the lower area. In the right panel, place a large bold rounded Japanese headline in dark rose pink reading {argument name="right headline text" default="謎を解いて、おへやを抜けだそう。"}, with a smaller gray subtitle below reading {argument name="right subtitle text" default="全10ステージの脱出パズル"}. Centered below is a second black-framed smartphone mockup showing in-game play: a dreamy pastel pink room with striped wallpaper, a wooden shelf unit or vanity table, 3 small plush animals lined up on the top shelf, 3 empty square frames or slots on the middle shelf, and 2 small objects on the lower shelf including a pink rectangular item and an angled card-like object. Add a tiny top-left room title inside the phone UI reading ミルクのおへや, a small circular icon at top right, a vertical lock icon on the right edge, and a pale bottom text bar reading アイテムがまだないよ. The entire composition should feel like an App Store screenshot for a gentle puzzle game, with soft lighting, pastel pinks and creams, rounded typography, clean spacing, and a cute feminine aesthetic.
title: Pastel Japanese Mobile Game Store Screenshot
description: A soft kawaii App Store-style promotional image for a pastel Japanese escape game, useful for mobile game marketing visuals and store screenshots.

content: A realistic yet whimsical mobile chat screenshot in a WhatsApp-like interface, shown full screen. The background is pale green with faint doodle icons. At the top is a light purple incoming message bubble with two lines of Chinese text and a timestamp on the right, reading: "生个图我看看" on the first line and "来了，给你整了个“憨憨汉堡 + 薯条套餐”风格 😄" on the second line. Below it is a large rounded-corner image inside the chat. The generated image shows a cozy warm-lit tabletop food scene: a chubby gray British shorthair cat is styled as a hamburger, sitting with eyes closed and paws tucked under, placed between a sesame bun top and bottom bun, with green lettuce and a slice of yellow cheese visible around its body. To the right of the burger-cat is a small orange tabby kitten, cheerful and energetic, standing upright with one front paw raised in a waving pose, mouth open in a happy smile, large glossy eyes looking toward the viewer. In the lower right foreground is a red fries carton tipped slightly with golden French fries spilling out. The table is wooden with a sheet of brown parchment under the burger-cat. The background of the photo is softly blurred, golden and sunlit, with a drink cup and straw and a leafy plant in bokeh. Put a small dark rounded timestamp label "10:54" at the bottom-right corner of the image. Under the image, add an outgoing pale green message bubble aligned right with Chinese text: "这个是用什么生成的" and a gray-green timestamp "10:55" with two check marks. At the very bottom, show another light purple incoming bubble beginning with the same text "这个是用什么生成的". Keep the overall composition exactly like a smartphone screenshot of a chat conversation, mixing cute photorealistic animal food art with clean messaging app UI.
title: Cute Cat Burger Chat Screenshot
description: A WhatsApp-style smartphone chat screenshot featuring a photorealistic cute cat burger image, useful for recreating viral AI-image sharing posts on social media.

content: A pixel-art style mosaic illustration of a tropical parrot perched on a short brown branch in the middle of dense jungle foliage, created as if assembled from a tight uniform square grid of tiny colored tiles with thin dark outlines around every square. The single bird is shown in side profile facing right, with a large curved black beak, a pale cream face, a bright red-orange forehead and throat, a vivid yellow neck, a bright green body, and long wings and tail feathers in saturated blue and cyan. The parrot is centered vertically and slightly left of center, standing upright on the branch, with the tail extending downward. Surround the bird with lush layered leaves in many shades of green, from deep forest green to lime, filling the entire frame with no sky visible. Use strong contrast, crisp black contouring, and a glowing light green area behind the parrot to separate it from the darker foliage. The overall image should look like retro pixel art or stained-glass mosaic, highly detailed, colorful, square format, and edge-to-edge tiled texture.
title: Pixel Mosaic Jungle Parrot
description: This prompt generates a colorful square pixel-art mosaic of a tropical parrot in dense green foliage, ideal for retro-style posters, wallpapers, or decorative digital art.

The left side contains a tall Instagram Story-style cosplay snapshot mockup in a rounded rectangle, aspect ratio 9:16, with a realistic top-down selfie of {argument name="character name" default="Boa Hancock"} cosplay. The cosplayer is an adult woman with long straight {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair, wearing a red and pink anime-inspired outfit with a low neckline, gold hoop earrings, white shoulder accents, and red sleeves with a pink-and-black petal-like cuff detail. Her face is intentionally obscured by a square blur/pixelated censor block, but her right hand is clearly making an OK gesture near her mouth and she appears to be sticking out her tongue behind the blur. Camera angle is high above, like a phone selfie, with polished gray-brown marble flooring in the background. Add Instagram Story UI overlays: a thin progress bar across the top, a small circular profile photo, username {argument name="Instagram username" default="hancock_official"}, a verified check, “2h”, three-dot menu, and an X close icon; at the bottom include a rounded “Send message” field plus heart and paper-plane icons. The right panel is a clean white gallery interface with a small circular avatar, the name {argument name="creator name" default="Julian Alex"}, floating circular action buttons for heart, share, and close, a stats row with exactly 2 items: an eye icon with “1149” and a heart icon with “26”, a Model section reading “GPT Image 2”, and a Prompt section containing the exact text: {argument name="visible prompt text" default="Generate an Instagram Story-style cosplay snapshot of Boa hancock, shot from a top-down angle. Her right hand is making an OK gesture placed near her mouth, and she is sticking out her tongue. Aspect ratio: 9:16."}. At the bottom right place a dark navy rounded “Recreate” button with a refresh icon. Use lots of white space, soft gray dividers, modern minimal UI styling, and make the screenshot look like a real browser/app capture rather than a polished poster.

content: Create a clean flat vector app logo presentation on a dark UI background. Center a large rounded-rectangle preview card in warm light beige. Inside the card, place a cute minimalist gaming logo: on the left, a stylized handheld game console icon drawn as a rounded rectangular device stacked over 2 visible offset layers like pages or cards, with a small ribbon bookmark hanging from the bottom edge. The console body is coral red with cream screen details, thin dark brown outlines, and tiny dark brown controller symbols: 1 cross-shaped D-pad on the left, 4 small circular buttons on the right, plus 4 tiny decorative dots in the center forming a smiling playful face impression. To the right of the icon, place the lowercase brand wordmark {argument name="brand name" default="gamelist"} in thick rounded geometric sans-serif letters, colored coral red to match the icon. Keep the spacing balanced so the icon and text read as one cohesive modern startup logo. Use a soft, friendly, vector-only aesthetic with no gradients, no photorealism, no texture, and high SVG-friendly simplicity. The palette should be limited to 4 colors: {argument name="primary color" default="coral red"}, cream, dark brown, and warm light beige. Show 4 small vertical thumbnail variations aligned along the right side of the dark interface, each showing the same logo on slightly different light neutral backgrounds. Add subtle UI framing only: a circular gray Edit button at bottom left of the large preview card, a circular gray share/upload button at bottom right of the card, and small monochrome action icons below the card on the dark background. Overall composition should look like a screenshot of an AI image generation result showcasing an app logo concept.
title: Cute Gamelist App Logo Mockup
description: A polished AI-image-style logo preview showing a friendly gaming app wordmark and icon, useful for generating SVG-ready startup branding concepts.

content: A minimalist flat vector illustration on a light gray background showing a stylized pelican riding a bicycle, composed from simple geometric SVG-like shapes with thick dark charcoal outlines and sparse details. The bicycle is shown in side view with 2 large wheels, each with a circular rim and a simple cross of 4 spokes, a black frame, seat, crank, and handlebars, resting on a single thin horizontal ground line near the bottom. The pelican is abstract and slightly awkward, built from clean outlined shapes: a white circular-oval body positioned over the bike, 2 narrow orange-yellow leg shapes hanging down toward the pedals, a white neck and head extending forward, 1 small black eye, a long triangular orange-yellow upper beak, and 1 large pale pink lower pouch. Add a separate white wing shape angled upward above the body. Keep the composition intentionally simple and a little imperfect, as if it were an SVG demo drawing generated from code in a code editor screenshot, but render only the artwork itself with no interface, no text, no shadows, and no extra scenery.
title: Minimal SVG Pelican on Bicycle
description: This generates a simple geometric vector-style pelican riding a bicycle, useful for SVG demo art, code-themed visuals, or playful minimalist illustrations.

content: Create a futuristic Japanese promotional hero graphic for an AI creative service, designed like a high-impact social media ad or presentation slide. Use a dark black-and-deep-blue cyber background with glowing circuit patterns, star-like particles, and neon light trails forming circular rings around a central editing screen. The composition is a single wide landscape layout with 6 distinct visual panels plus 1 human presenter on the right. At the top center, place a huge bold Japanese headline in distressed metallic gold and white text reading "鍵は画像" on the first line and "一瞬で伝わる" below it, with dramatic 3D depth, rough texture, and strong glow. In the center, place the largest panel: a luminous blue-framed desktop editing interface showing a vivid futuristic cityscape at sunrise, viewed from above with a river, greenery, sleek skyscrapers, warm orange sunlight, and a right-side vertical toolbar including sliders and a color wheel. Surround this centerpiece with 5 smaller glowing panels connected by curved gold arrows pointing outward from the center. Top left panel: a thumbnail example with a futuristic city image and Japanese text reading "未来を、いま創る。", smaller subtext "AI × Innovation" and "時代のソリューション", and a bright cyan label below the panel reading "サムネイル". Top right panel: a banner example with an abstract blue digital globe or network image and Japanese text reading "AIで、未来をデザインする。" with smaller subtext "テクノロジーで、社会にインパクトを。", and a cyan label below reading "バナー". Bottom left panel: a slide/document example with a business infographic style, title text "AIでビジネスを加速", three circular icon areas, an upward graph on the right, and a cyan label below reading "資料・スライド". Bottom center panel: an SNS post example showing a person standing on a mountain peak at sunrise with bold Japanese text "挑戦が、未来を変える。", small social media engagement icons and counts along the bottom bar, and a cyan label below reading "SNS画像". Bottom right panel: a flyer example with a dark blue event poster layout, title text "AI活用セミナー", smaller line "ビジネスの可能性を広げる", large date "6.15", time "10:00–17:00", a yellow circular badge reading "参加費無料", and a cyan label below reading "チラシ・パンフレット". On the right side of the overall composition, place a young woman presenter from waist up, facing forward, lightly smiling, raising her right index finger near her face as if making a key point. She has long straight split-dyed hair, pastel pink on one side and pastel blue on the other, fair skin, and wears a white T-shirt with black text reading "{argument name="brand text" default="OKIHIRO AI Creative"}" and a high-waisted soft pink skirt. Her face is intentionally simplified or obscured in a clean ad-like way. At the very bottom, add an enormous gold Japanese slogan inside a black-and-gold framed banner reading "非エンジニアに刺さる". Use intense contrast, neon cyan edge lighting, gold accent typography, glossy UI frames, energetic motion arrows, and a polished tech-marketing aesthetic that feels optimized for convincing non-technical business users about AI-powered image generation.
title: Japanese AI Creative Promo Slide
description: A futuristic Japanese marketing graphic showcasing AI-generated image use cases across thumbnails, banners, slides, social posts, and flyers for business promotion.

At the top center, place a modern app logo: a cyan hexagon icon with large white letters “SC” and a small circuit symbol inside the C, followed by the brand text “SKILL Cert by AI” in a clean sans-serif font, with “SKILL” large and black, “Cert” below it in black, and “by AI” smaller in cyan. Center the composition around a bold Japanese headline in very large white text with a dark navy outline and soft drop shadow: {argument name="headline text" default="AIが出題する資格バトルアプリ"}. Directly below, add a second line of medium-large white Japanese text with the same outline and shadow: {argument name="subheadline text" default="200以上の資格でオンライン対戦"}. In the middle foreground, place one large glossy rounded rectangular call-to-action button in bright cyan with subtle gradient, bevel, and shadow, containing bold white Japanese text: {argument name="button text" default="今すぐ無料で対戦"}. Show exactly 3 smartphone mockups arranged around the center: 1 on the lower left, tilted slightly right, showing a leaderboard app screen with a line graph at the top, small profile avatars, ranking rows, and Japanese UI labels; 1 large phone on the lower right, tilted slightly left, showing a multiple-choice quiz screen with Japanese question text and radio-button answers plus a cyan bottom button; 1 smaller phone on the far right edge, angled inward, showing a darker dashboard-style screen with charts and Japanese text. Add exactly 4 floating UI graphic clusters in the background: 1 analytics line-chart panel near the upper left, 1 holographic cube/dashboard cluster near the upper right, 1 glowing wireframe brain or neural sphere near the lower left-center behind the button, and 1 hexagon chart/card element near the right-center. content: Create a clean 2x2 grid of four front-facing 3D typographic sculptures on a light gray seamless studio background, separated by thin white dividers. Each quadrant features a single giant letter built entirely from dense, realistic filmmaking equipment and on-set props from a different cinematic era, with the letterform chaotic but clearly legible. Use high-end Cinema 4D product-render aesthetics, ambient occlusion, realistic scale relationships, intricate kit-bashing, subtle wear, metallic reflections, and three-point studio lighting with a soft overhead source. Top-left: the letter S, representing early silent-era or proto-cinema filmmaking, constructed from antique brass-and-wood cameras, exposed gears, film reels, projector parts, bellows, tripod wood legs, and vintage optical housings; warm bronze and copper tones; include 3 extra props at the base: a black megaphone labeled "DIRECTOR", a clapboard, and a short stack of film canisters; one projector-like lens at the upper right glows brightly. Top-right: the letter C, representing classical Hollywood film production, built from black metal film cameras, studio lenses, magazines, matte boxes, dolly components, control boxes, and analog set hardware; mostly black, steel, and gunmetal with subtle brass accents; include 4 extra props integrated around the base and inner right side: a clapperboard, a boxy side module, a film magazine marked "35", and a small cylindrical canister; a large forward-facing lamp or lens glows at the upper right. Bottom-left: the letter N, representing modern analog or late-20th-century cinema, assembled from Arriflex-style cameras, long cine zoom lenses, support rigs, rails, cables, a slate, and a field recorder; predominantly matte black with silver hardware and a few red accent rings; include 3 clearly visible base elements: a clapperboard section, a labeled director strip, and a rectangular audio recorder/control unit at the bottom. Bottom-right: the letter D, representing digital and virtual production, built from RED-style digital cinema cameras, monitors, battery packs, wireless transmitters, drones, LED panels, green-screen fabric inserts, and modular rig components; black technical bodies with vivid green accents and screen graphics; include 4 notable integrated device types: drone arms/propellers at the top, a rectangular LED light panel, multiple monitors, and a large camera lens at the lower left. Keep all objects grounded and physically connected, no floating pieces, no flat typography, no handwriting, no paper look, no messy background. Ultra-detailed, sharp, 8k, polished graphic design asset for a poster or visual comparison of filmmaking eras.
title: Filmmaking Eras Typographic Grid
description: A polished 2x2 studio render showing four letters sculpted from era-specific filmmaking equipment, ideal for editorial graphics or visual comparisons of cinema history.

content:
Create a clean 2x2 grid on a pure white studio background featuring 4 large 3D typographic sculptures, each a single character built entirely from filmmaking equipment from a different era. The four glyphs are exactly 4 characters: top-left letter A, top-right number 5, bottom-left letter X, bottom-right number 9. Each character should be front-facing, centered in its quadrant, legible but formed from a dense pile of realistic cinema tools and on-set props, with believable occlusion, weight, and construction logic. Use high-end Cinema 4D product visualization, subtle ambient occlusion, soft three-point studio lighting with a softbox overhead, crisp shadows, realistic materials, and isolated composition.

Top-left: the letter A made from early cinema and silent-era equipment, assembled from vintage wooden tripods, hand-cranked film cameras, brass lenses, reels, megaphones, bell-shaped horns, matte black metal parts, leather straps, and aged wood. Surface qualities should include worn varnished wood, black crackle paint, brass tarnish, scuffed metal, and dusty antique patina. The silhouette should feel chaotic but readable, with tripod legs and old camera bodies defining the A shape.

Top-right: the number 5 made from mid-century analog filmmaking gear, assembled from classic film cameras, magazine reels, metal canisters, brown leather cases, audio accessories, silver fabric packs, director chairs, cylindrical lenses, grips, and vintage production bags. Materials should emphasize brushed aluminum, leather, canvas, rubber, and weathered industrial finishes. The 5 should be chunky and balanced, with stacked props tightly packed into the glyph.

Bottom-left: the letter X made from late 20th century video and broadcast equipment, assembled from shoulder-mount camcorders, portable recorders, battery packs, coiled cables, cassette-like modules, control panels, worn blue and gray plastic housings, and rugged field electronics. Include visible wiring and taped components. Materials should feel utilitarian and slightly battered, with dark plastic, anodized metal, stickers, rubber grips, and yellow accent details. The crossing diagonals of the X must be clear and substantial.

Bottom-right: the number 9 made from contemporary digital cinema and virtual production gear, assembled from modern cinema cameras, compact monitors, LED light panels, drones, gimbals, matte boxes, black modular accessories, and a vivid green chroma screen wrap forming part of the numeral. Include sleek vents, carbon fiber textures, matte black metal, polished glass, and bright green screen fabric as the dominant accent color. The 9 should feel the most modern and refined, with modular precision and clean industrial design.

Keep the background plain and uncluttered, no extra text, no floating objects, no flat typography, no 2D rendering. The sculptures should look like physical objects at realistic scale, highly detailed, photorealistic, and suitable as a graphic design asset.
title: Filmmaking Eras Typographic Grid
description: A polished 2x2 studio-rendered typographic artwork showing four letters and numbers built from filmmaking equipment from different cinematic eras, ideal for editorial, poster, or concept-visual use.

content: Create a premium neumorphic smart-home and media control UI kit on a clean light gray background, arranged as a balanced dashboard-style composition of floating rounded cards and circular controls with soft extruded shadows, subtle inner highlights, frosted white surfaces, and elegant teal-and-orange accents. The overall style is minimalist, futuristic, tactile, and highly polished, like a high-end mobile interface concept. Include exactly 18 discrete UI modules and icons: 1 large circular volume knob card in the upper left with a glossy deep teal center, dotted perimeter, plus and minus symbols, and the text “VOLUME 67%”; 1 vertical volume slider card with the label “VOLUME”, a white knob, orange level bars, small speaker icons, and “67%”; 1 large circular balance dial at the top center-right with numeric markings 25, 50, 75, 100, the central value “72%”, the label “BALANCE”, and a small orange indicator dot; 1 circular compass widget in the upper right with N, E, S, W labels, a metallic teal compass needle, and a small orange accent dot on the rim; 1 smaller circular min-max knob on the left middle with a teal center, textured white dial edge, orange indicator dot, and “MIN” and “MAX” labels; 3 small circular utility buttons beneath it in one row, showing a power symbol, a connectivity or wireless symbol, and a heart outline; 1 horizontal toggle switch below those buttons with a teal knob and the text “ON”; 1 large media player card in the center with a square album cover showing abstract layered teal dunes or waves, the track title “Beyond The Horizon”, the artist name “Aurora Nights”, a heart icon in the top right, a waveform progress display, timestamps “1:45” and “3:58”, and 4 playback controls along the bottom row: shuffle, previous, central orange play button, next, and repeat; 6 rounded-square app icons in two columns on the right side, arranged in 3 rows, showing exactly these symbols: paper plane arrow, stacked layers, shield with check mark, cloud, bell with a small orange notification dot, and gear; 1 rectangular clock card at the bottom left with a circular analog clock face, large digital time “10:58 AM”, the date line “Thursday, May 23”, and sunrise/sunset times “06:15 AM” and “08:24 PM”; 1 weather card at the bottom center with the location “San Francisco”, current temperature “18°”, condition “Partly Cloudy”, high/low “H: 21°  L: 13°”, a large sun-behind-cloud illustration, and a 5-column hourly forecast labeled “11 AM”, “12 PM”, “1 PM”, “2 PM”, “3 PM”; 1 pill-shaped tab selector at the lower right with 3 tabs, where the left tab is active in teal with an audio waveform icon, and the other 2 tabs show a user icon and a folder icon; 1 search bar directly beneath it with a magnifying glass and placeholder text “Search...” ; 1 horizontal slider below the search bar with a teal progress line and a white knob; 1 large rounded CTA button at the bottom right reading “{argument name="button text" default="EXPLORE"}” with a right-facing orange arrow; and 5 circular bottom navigation icons centered along the bottom edge, showing home, bar chart, calendar with “23”, chat bubble, and user profile, plus 2 floating action buttons beside them: a camera icon and an orange plus sign. Use a restrained palette with white and very light gray surfaces, deep teal-green gradients for active states, and warm orange for highlights and notifications. Emphasize depth through soft ambient shadows, subtle bevels, glossy reflections, and realistic material rendering. Keep the layout spacious, symmetric but not rigid, and suitable for a luxury mobile app concept presentation.

content: A clean neumorphic mobile dashboard UI mockup shown straight-on, centered on a soft light gray background, inside a white rounded smartphone frame with subtle embossed shadows and glossy soft highlights. The interface uses a minimalist white-on-white design with teal green and warm orange accent colors. At the very top of the phone, include a small circular menu button on the left, a centered speaker slit and front camera dot, and status icons on the right showing Wi‑Fi, signal, 100%, and battery. The main layout contains 12 distinct UI modules: 1 large time card at upper left showing “AM”, “10:24”, and “Friday, May 24” with three tiny pagination dots beneath; 1 weather card at upper right showing a soft 3D partly cloudy sun icon, “24°”, “Partly Cloudy”, and “New York”; 4 small circular action buttons in one row under the time card, showing a grid icon, heart, bell, and gear, with the grid button filled in dark teal; 1 slim horizontal slider card to the right of those buttons with a droplet icon, “40%”, and a teal progress bar; 1 large circular volume control occupying the left middle area, with a thick beveled silver knob, a surrounding tick-mark ring split into teal on the left and orange on the right, a short orange indicator line near the upper right, tiny speaker icons on both sides, and a pill label reading “VOLUME”; 1 music player card on the right middle with square album art in dark teal waves, the title “Ocean Drive”, subtitle “Miami Nights”, a thin orange playback progress line with times “1:45” and “3:48”, and three circular transport controls for previous, play, and next, with the play button filled teal; 3 small rounded buttons in a row beneath the music player, showing an equalizer icon filled teal, a broadcast icon, and sliders icon; 1 compass card at lower left with small circular buttons in the top corners, heading text “320° NW” above, and a detailed analog compass with N, E, S, W letters and a teal-and-orange needle pointing northwest; 1 equalizer card at lower right with four vertical sliders, scale markings “+12”, “0”, “-12”, and bottom frequency labels “60”, “250”, “1K”, “4K”, “16K”, using orange slider stems and white knobs; and 5 bottom dock controls: an orange circular power button, a small Bluetooth button, a central pill waveform panel, a crescent moon button, and a sun brightness button. Use soft ambient shadows, gentle inner embossing, rounded corners, precise spacing, and a premium futuristic smart-home or control-center aesthetic inspired by high-end dribbble neumorphism, ultra-detailed, crisp vector UI, realistic depth, polished product presentation.

content: A clean neumorphic UI component showcase on a soft light gray background, arranged as a balanced design board of 18 separate interface elements with subtle shadows, frosted translucent white plastic surfaces, rounded corners, and glossy glass-like depth. Use a premium minimal product-design aesthetic with white-on-white layering, soft ambient occlusion, delicate inner shadows, and a restrained accent palette of deep teal green and vivid orange. Include 18 distinct components: 1 large circular rotary knob in the upper left with a dark teal glossy center, fine radial tick marks, and a small orange position indicator; 1 small circular directional control pad with a teal center button and four tiny arrow icons around it; 1 circular play button with a teal triangle icon and a short orange progress arc on the rim; 1 horizontal pill toggle switch at the top right with a teal knob positioned to the right; 1 rounded square heart button with a simple teal outline heart; 1 small circular indicator button with a single orange dot in the center; 1 pill-shaped plus-minus control with a teal minus on the left and teal plus on the right separated by a vertical divider; 1 long horizontal volume slider with a teal speaker icon on the left, fine slider ticks, a teal track, a teal knob near the right side, and a faint waveform icon on the far right; content: Create a modern government program landing page UI mockup for Indonesia in a clean, professional web design style, desktop widescreen aspect ratio. The page uses a white background with bold red accents, soft rounded corners, subtle gray dividers, and a polished frontend-dribbble presentation look. At the very top, build a horizontal navigation bar with 6 visible elements: the Indonesian Garuda emblem and the text "PEMERINTAH REPUBLIK INDONESIA" on the left, then 4 centered menu items labeled "Program", "Dampak", "Menu", and "Pemantauan", and on the far right a large red rounded button labeled "Program MBG" with a small people icon. Below it, design a hero section split into two columns. On the left, show a small program label line with a red bowl icon, the text "MBG", a vertical divider, and "Makan Bergizi Gratis". Under that, place a large bold headline reading "{argument name="headline text" default="Makan Bergizi, Anak Indonesia Kuat"}" in dark navy, spanning 3 lines. Add a short paragraph in Indonesian below: "Program MBG mendukung gizi harian siswa SD dan SMP melalui menu seimbang, pemantauan sekolah, dan laporan dampak yang transparan." Then place 2 call-to-action buttons side by side: a solid red button labeled "Lihat Dampak" with a right arrow, and an outlined white button with red border labeled "Panduan Sekolah" with a right arrow. On the right side of the hero, place a rounded large photo-style image framed by a sweeping white curved divider and red corner background. The image shows an Indonesian elementary classroom with 5 visible schoolchildren in white uniforms with red ties, seated at desks, warm daylight from windows, shallow depth of field, documentary-photo realism. In the foreground, on a wooden desk, show a stainless steel compartment tray meal with exactly 5 food items: white rice, mixed vegetables, a piece of fried chicken, a banana, and watermelon cubes. Beside the tray, place 1 milk carton labeled "SUSU SEGAR". Under the hero, add a full-width red statistics band with 4 equally spaced metric cards separated by thin vertical dividers. Each card has a white circular icon and bold white text. The 4 metrics are: "245.000+" with label "Sekolah Terlayani", "8,7 Juta+" with label "Siswa Penerima Manfaat", "1,2 Miliar+" with label "Porsi Disalurkan", and "98,6%" with label "Kepuasan Siswa". At the bottom center, add a 3-dot carousel indicator with the left dot active in red and the other 2 dots gray. Include a faint Indonesia map texture in the lower-left background. Use crisp typography, generous whitespace, high-end fintech/government website aesthetics, realistic UI proportions, and a production-ready landing page mockup appearance.
title: Indonesian School Nutrition Landing Page
description: A polished desktop website hero mockup for Indonesia's MBG school nutrition program, suitable for government, civic tech, or frontend design showcases.

content: A clean, elegant iPhone app UI mockup for a Chinese perpetual calendar and almanac app, shown as a full-screen mobile screenshot on a soft warm white background with subtle paper-like texture and refined East Asian editorial aesthetics. The interface uses a minimalist serif-and-sans mix, muted brown, gray, black, pale blue, green, and gold accents, with spacious layout and delicate dividers. Show the iOS status bar at the top with the time 8:45, cellular signal, Wi‑Fi icon, and a battery indicator reading 96. Below it, a header for {argument name="month" default="4月"} with secondary text “24日 | 每日万年历” and, on the right, a rounded rectangular date-picker button labeled “择日” with a calendar icon plus a separate plus symbol. The main section is a monthly calendar grid for {argument name="year" default="2026"}, with 7 weekday columns labeled Sunday through Saturday in Chinese: 周日, 周一, 周二, 周三, 周四, 周五, 周六. Render a 6-row month view with exactly 42 date cells including adjacent-month dates. The visible dates should be: first row 29, 30, 31, 1, 2, 3, 4; second row 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11; third row 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17, 18; fourth row 19, 20, 21, 22, 23, 24, 25; fifth row 26, 27, 28, 29, 30, 1, 2; sixth row 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9. Each day cell includes a large Gregorian date and a smaller Chinese lunar date or note underneath. Include colored holiday and solar-term tags across specific cells, with exactly 10 highlighted labels visible: “休十七” on the 4th, “清明节” on the 5th, “休十九” on the 6th, “谷雨” on the 20th in green, “劳动节” on the next-month 1st, “休十六” on the next-month 2nd, “休十七” on the last-row 3rd, “青年节” on the last-row 4th, “休立夏” on the last-row 5th, and “天后诞” on the last-row 9th in orange. Add small lunar phase markers on a few days, including yellow crescent or dot icons around the 2nd, 10th, 17th, 24th, and next-month 2nd. Make the {argument name="selected date" default="24"} cell in the Friday column stand out with a rounded blue gradient tile and soft shadow, with smaller text “初八” inside. Beneath the calendar, show a detailed daily information panel separated by whitespace. The left side features a very large date title “4月24日”; the right side stacks “星期五 2026” and “农历三月初八”. Below that, include smaller gray metadata lines such as “第114天 · 第17周 金尊月” and a traditional sexagenary/date string like “丙午 · 马年 壬辰月 戊辰日”. At the far right of this metadata area, place a rounded outline pill button labeled “今日”. Underneath, present a large white rounded card with almanac guidance. The card contains two major sections with exactly 2 headings: a green “宜” section and a red “忌” section, separated by fine dotted dividers. In the “宜” section, include the directional fortune line “喜神 东南 福神 正北 财神 正北” and three activity items: “祭祀”, “修饰垣墙”, “余事勿取”. In the “忌” section, include the conflict line “冲煞 冲狗 煞南”. At the bottom, show a 5-item iOS-style tab bar with labels exactly “今日”, “MONTH”, “YEAR”, “EVENTS”, “MORE”; the first tab is active and includes the small sublabel “4月24日”. Overall style: premium app design concept, calm scholarly Chinese calendar aesthetic, high-fidelity mobile product shot, realistic yet idealized interface, perfectly aligned typography, subtle shadows, soft contrast, and polished startup-quality UI.
title: Elegant Chinese Calendar App UI
description: This prompt generates a polished mobile UI concept for a Chinese perpetual calendar and almanac app, suitable for app design showcases or product mockups.

content:
{argument name="grid layout" default="12-panel grid (4x3)"}, each panel is an independent FULL equirectangular 360° panorama of the SAME continuous {argument name="environment" default="forest world"}

each panel = complete spherical environment (360° horizontal, 180° vertical)
true equirectangular projection with natural distortion:
stretched edges, curved horizon, vertical compression toward zenith and nadir

STRICT global consistency across panels:
same forest biome, same architectural language, same materials, same lighting logic, same scale, same color palette, no visual drift

cinematic photorealism, live-action quality, physically accurate rendering
natural light behavior, realistic exposure, subtle lens response, filmic dynamic range

ultra-detailed environment, grounded material response (wood, moss, fabric, stone), believable imperfections, micro-detail variation

massive forest environment with large-scale vertical structures integrated into trees
multi-layered platforms, bridges, embedded interiors, organic construction logic

lighting:
motivated light sources only (lanterns, windows, bioluminescence)
soft volumetric fog interacting with light beams
physically correct falloff, no overglow, no artificial bloom
balanced contrast, filmic highlights, deep but readable shadows

atmosphere:
dense air perspective, layered depth, subtle particle presence
natural haze, humidity, soft diffusion

CAMERA (IMPORTANT):
each panel = fixed central capture point of a spherical camera
true 360° capture, no framing, no composition bias, no cropped view
but with subtle real-world camera characteristics:
slight lens softness toward edges, mild exposure adaptation, natural highlight rolloff

each panel represents a different location within the SAME world:
canopy height, mid-bridge level, interior spaces, vertical clearings, forest floor transitions
continuous spatial logic between panels

viewer always positioned at the center of the environment

environment fully resolved in ALL directions:
above (canopy, sky gaps, light sources) and below (structures, roots, depth layers)

COLOR:
{argument name="color scheme" default="deep indigo night base, warm amber practical lights, restrained violet accents"}
cinematic color grading, natural color separation, no oversaturation

STYLE:
cinematic spherical realism, VR-ready environment, physically coherent world
high-end film production quality, not stylized, not game-like

no labels, no text, no numbers
title: 360-Degree Forest World Panorama Grid
description: A sophisticated prompt for generating a 12-panel equirectangular panorama of a continuous forest world with cinematic realism and global consistency.

content: A photorealistic top-down product-style photograph of a single luxury tasting menu printed on bright white textured paper and placed on a dark walnut wooden tabletop, with soft warm ambient lighting and gentle natural shadows. The sheet is portrait orientation, slightly rotated clockwise, occupying most of the frame with clean margins around it. The design is an ultra-minimal fine-dining menu with elegant editorial typography, lots of negative space, precise alignment, and a refined black-and-dark-gray ink palette. At the upper left, the restaurant identity appears in 3 stacked lines: a large serif word {argument name="restaurant name" default="Silence"}, below it 2 Chinese characters "沈默", and below that a large serif French line "Le Silence". Under the title is a small location line reading "Ginza, Tokyo B3F". At the upper right is a small date line in French followed by Japanese date text: {argument name="date text" default="22 Avril 2026 • 令和八年四月二十二日"}. The main body is organized into 3 vertical content zones: a left numbered course list, a middle translated course list, and a far-right icon column. The left list contains exactly 9 numbered courses labeled 1 through 9, each with French title and Japanese subtitle and an English ingredient line beneath; the 9 visible course titles are: "Huître de Bretagne, eau de mer", "Daurade de Kyoto, pétale de sakura", "Oursin d’Hokkaidō, consommé d’algue", "Asperge de Nemuro, sauce mousseline", "Homard de Miyako, bisque légère", "Canard de Challans, figue et balsamique", "Boeuf de Kagoshima, truffe noire", "Fromage de chèvre, miel du Japon", and "Agrume, thé vert et gin". The middle list repeats the 9 dishes in a second compact column with French titles and Japanese descriptions. The far-right column contains exactly 9 horizontal icon rows aligned to the courses, each row showing small monochrome hand-drawn ingredient or allergen pictograms; some rows have 2 icons and some 3, for a total of 19 icons overall. Near the lower left is a section titled "Le mot du chef" followed by a short French paragraph in small serif text. Below that is a section titled "Origine des ingrédients / 食材の産地" with a dense 2-row ingredient-origin grid listing exactly 15 numbered origin entries in tiny text. In the lower right quadrant, include a small label "Chef" above a large sweeping handwritten signature reading {argument name="chef name" default="Keiichiro Aoyama"}. Along the very bottom edge is a thin horizontal rule and a centered allergen legend line with exactly 7 small outline icons and labels: shellfish, crustaceans, egg, fish, milk, gluten, sulfites, each labeled in French with Japanese beneath. The overall impression should be high-end Michelin-style menu design, editorial restraint, immaculate spacing, subtle paper grain, sharply legible text hierarchy, and realistic photography rather than a flat scan.
title: Luxury Bilingual Tasting Menu Photo
description: A realistic overhead photograph of an elegant French-Japanese fine-dining menu sheet, ideal for showcasing AI-generated editorial menu design systems.

content: Create a sophisticated multi-page brand visual manual for a company named "{argument name="brand name" default="Any Brand Name"}". The overall brand persona should be playful, futuristic, vibrant, and highly designed, striking a balance between "toy-like energy" and the "sophistication of a high-end creative tech brand." The visual style should use bold and experimental brand language, including: high-saturation bright colors, simple geometric shapes, modern typography, dynamic visual rhythm, and slightly surreal image expression. The overall atmosphere should convey: creativity, youthfulness, rhythm, tactile experience, and conceptual avant-garde. The expression needs to integrate the fun of consumer products, the presentation of fashion brands, and the language of contemporary digital design. The brand manual should reflect: extreme focus on product details, diverse visual experimentation, packaging design exploration, editorial style photography, immersive retail experience, and cross-platform brand application. The final presentation should construct a confident, contemporary, unified, and complete brand worldview—both easy to understand and approachable, yet possessing a strong sense of art direction, maintaining high visual consistency while showcasing aesthetic standards at a high-end creative studio level.
title: Futuristic Brand Visual Manual
description: A detailed prompt for creating a sophisticated brand visual manual that balances toy-like energy with high-end tech aesthetics.

On the right side, place the word Microsoft in small dark gray sans-serif type above a large product-name line that reads {argument name="headline text" default="Power harassment Ex"}. content: A clean minimalist tech logo composition on a light gray background, wide horizontal layout. On the left, show a stacked cluster of 4 overlapping Microsoft Office-style app icons with soft gradients, rounded corners, subtle depth, and glossy modern vector shading. The front icon is a large blue square tile with a smaller raised blue panel containing a bold white capital P. Behind and slightly above it, place an orange presentation icon with a white pie-chart symbol. Behind the blue icon to the right, place a white document page icon with a folded blue corner and 4 horizontal blue text lines. At the back on the right, place a green spreadsheet icon with a white grid. Arrange the 4 icons so they overlap tightly and read as a unified hybrid Office app mark. On the right side, place the product name in a clean sans-serif font: small black text reading Microsoft above a large multicolor wordmark reading {argument name="headline text" default="PowerWordEx"}. Color the word in segmented Microsoft-style hues: warm orange-red for Power, deep blue for Word, and teal-green for Ex. Center the whole composition vertically, keep generous whitespace, and render it as polished corporate branding mockup, crisp vector illustration, soft shadowing, no extra objects.
title: Microsoft PowerWordEx Logo Mockup
